اللّهُمَّ وَ احْرُسْنِي مِنْ شَرِّ ما يَعْمَلُ الظّالِمُونَ فِي الْأَرْضِ فَإِنَّهُ لا حَوْلَ وَ لا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِكَ، اللّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ إِيماناً ثابِتاً، وَ عَمَلًا مُتَقَبِّلًا، وَ دُعاءً مُسْتَجاباً وَ يَقِيناً صادِقاً، وَ قَوْلًا طَيِّباً، وَ قَلْباً شاكِراً، وَ بَدَناً صابِراً، وَ لِساناً ذاكِراً، اللّهُمَّ أَنْزِعْ حُبَّ الدُّنْيا وَ مَعاصِيها وَ ذِكْرَها وَ شَهْوَتَها مِنْ قَلْبِي.

للّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ بِكَرَمِكَ تَشْكُرُ الْيَسِيرَ مِنْ عَمَلِي فَاغْفِرْ لِيَ الْكَثِيرَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي، وَ كُنْ لِي وَلِيّاً وَ نَصِيراً وَ مُعِيناً وَ حافِظاً، اللّهُمَّ هَبْ لِي قَلْباً أَشَدَّ رَهْبَةً لَكَ مِنْ قَلْبِي، وَ لِساناً أَدْوَمَ لَكَ ذِكْراً مِنْ لِسانِي، وَ جِسْماً أَقْوى‌ عَلى‌ طاعَتِكَ وَ عِبادَتِكَ مِنْ جِسْمِي.

اللّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوالِ نِعْمَتِكَ، وَ مِنْ فُجْأَةِ نِقْمَتِكَ، وَ مِنْ تَحْوِيلِ‌ عافِيَتِكَ، وَ مِنْ هَوْلِ غَضَبِكَ، وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ جُهْدِ الْبَلاءِ، وَ مِنْ دَرَكِ الشَّقاءِ، وَ مِنْ شَماتَةِ الْأَعْداءِ وَ سُوءِ الْقَضاءِ فِي الدُّنْيا وَ الاخِرَةِ.

اللّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الْكَرِيمِ، وَ عَرْشِكَ الْعَظِيمِ، وَ مُلْكِكَ الْقَدِيمِ، يا وَهّابَ الْعَطايا، وَ يا مُطْلِقَ الأُسارى‌، وَ يا فَكّاكَ الرِّقابِ، وَ يا كاشِفَ الْعَذابِ، أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُخْرِجَنِي مِنَ الدُّنْيا سالِماً غانِماً، وَ أَنْ تُدْخِلَنِي الْجَنَّةَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ آمِناً، وَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ أَوَّلَ شَهْرِي هذا صَلاحاً وَ أَوْسَطَهُ فَلاحاً وَ آخِرَهُ نَجاحاً، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ عَلّامُ الْغُيُوبِ‌

text.en: It is proper to visit Lady Fatimah al-Zahra’(a.s.) and to hold consolation ceremonies on these three days, for it has been narrated that she lived after her father only seventy-five days. Accordingly, she must have departed life on one of these three days because the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) departed life on the twenty-eighth of Safar.

On the fifteenth of Jumadi al Ula, AH 36, Imam AliAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.) conquered the city of al-Basrah. Also, Imam Zayn al-’Abidin(a.s.) was born on this day; therefore, it is proper to visit both the Imams (a.s.) on this day.

name: Special 4 rakat salat in jamad al-thani

text.en: SPECIAL 4 Rakat SALAAT OF MONTH Jamadi us saani

Sayyid ibn Tawus in book Ruzwat Al Abidin va Ma'anas al-Raqebin by Ibrahim ibn Umar ibn Faraj al-Vasety it is stated that one should offer four rak`ats of prayer - 2 X 2 rak`ats - anytime during the month
One who recites will have guaranteed safety for  his life, wealth, and family for the full year. If he dies, he will achieve the reward/thawaab of a martyr.
1st Rakat: Sura <ref=1:1>al-Fatihah</ref> once , <ref=1:2:255-257>Ayatul Kursi</ref> once & Sura <ref=1:97>al-Qadr</ref> X 25 times
2nd  Rakat: Surah <ref=1:1>al-Fatihah</ref> once , Surah <ref=1:102>al-Takathur</ref> once &  Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ikhlas</ref> X 25 times
After salam to commence second prayer.
3rd  Rakaat: Surah <ref=1:1>al-Fatihah</ref> once , Surah <ref=1:109>al-Káfirún</ref> once , and Surah <ref=1:113>al-Falaq</ref> X 25 times
4th Rakat: Surah <ref=1:1>al-Fatihah</ref> once , Surah <ref=1:110>al-Nasr</ref> once and  Surah <ref=1:114>al-Nas</ref> x 25 times
Upon completion recite following 1 to 4 :

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ

translation.en: 1. Tasbihate Arba'a X 70 times
2. Salawat X 70 times

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: Invocation of blessings upon the Holy Prophet & his Household

text.en: 3. 3 times:

translation.en: O God, forgive the believing men and women

text.en: 4) Go to Sajdah /Prostration & Recite 3 times :

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ يَا ذَا الْجَلاَلِ وَ الْإِكْرَامِ يَا اللَّهُ يَا رَحْمَانُ يَا رَحِيمُ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: YA HAYYU YA QAYYUM, YA DHALJALAL IWAL IKRAM, YA ALLAHU YA RAHMAAN, YA RAHEEM, YA AR HAMARRAHIMEEN.

text.en: On the third of Jamadi al-Akhirah, AH 11, Lady Fatimah al-Zahra’(a.s.) departed life. The Shi’ah are thus required to hold consolation ceremonies, visit her, and curse those who wronged her and usurped her right.As he mentions that Lady Fatimah al-Zahra’(a.s.) departed life on this day, Sayyid Ibn Tawus, in Iqbal al-A’mal, has mentioned the following form of Ziyarah that is dedicated to her:

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا سَيِّدَةَ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O doyenne of the women of the world!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا وَالِدَةَ ٱلْحُجَجِ عَلَىٰ ٱلنَّاسِ اجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayki ya walidata alhujaji `ala alnnasi ajma`ina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O mother of the Arguments on all people!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ ايّتُهَا ٱلْمَظْلُومَةُ ٱلْمَمْنُوعَةُ حَقَّهَا

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O wronged one whose right was usurped.
O Allah, send blessings to Your lady servant,

segments.transliteration: wabnati nabiyyika wa zawjati wasiyyi nabiyyika

translation.en: the daughter of Your Prophet, the wife of the Successor of Your Prophet—

segments.arabic: صَلاَةً تُزْلِفُهَا فَوْقَ زُلْفَىٰ عِبَادِكَ ٱلْمُكَرَّمِينَ

translation.en: such remarkable blessings that approach her nearer to You than the steps of Your honored servants

segments.transliteration: min ahli alssamawati wa ahli al-aradina

translation.en: among the inhabitants of the heavens and the earth.

text.en: It has been narrated that if one visits Lady Fatimah al-Zahra’(a.s.) with this form of Ziyarah and then implores for Almighty Allah’s forgiveness, Almighty Allah will forgive his sins and allow him Paradise.This very form of Ziyarah has also been mentioned by the son of Sayyid Ibn Tawus in his book entitled Zawa’id al-Fawa’id adding that it is dedicated to the day of Lady Fatimah’s demise, which is the third of Jumada al-Akhirah.

He adds that the method of saying this Ziyarah
is to begin with offering the Ziyarah Prayer or the prayer of Lady
Fatimah al-Zahra’(a.s.), which is a two unit prayer at each of which
Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 is recited once and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 repeated sixty
times if possible, otherwise Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>

are recited in the first unit and Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 and Surah <ref=1:109>Al-Kafiroon</ref>

in the second. After accomplishment, the aforementioned form of
Ziyarah is recited.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Messenger of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Prophet of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ حَبِيبِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the most beloved of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Intimate Servant of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ صَفيِّ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Choice of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ امِينِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Trustee of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ خَيْرِ خَلْقِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayki ya binta khayri khalqi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the best of Allah’s creatures.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ افْضَلِ انْبِيَاءِ ٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِ وَمَلاَئِكَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayki ya binta afdali anbiya'i allahi wa rusulihi wa mala'ikatihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the best of Allah’s Prophets, Messengers, and angels.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ خَيْرِ ٱلْبَرِّيَةِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the best of all created beings.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا سِيِّدَةَ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O doyenne of all women of the world,
including the past and the coming generations.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا زَوْجَةَ وَلِيِّ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O lady of the Intimate Servant of Allah

segments.transliteration: wa khayri alkhalqi ba`da rasuli allahi

translation.en: and the best of all created beings after the Messenger of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا امَّ ٱلْحَسَنِ وَٱلْحُسَيْنِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O mother of al-Hasan and al-Husayn,
the two chiefs of the youth of Paradise.
Peace be upon you, O veracious and martyr.
Peace be upon you, O content and pleased.
Peace be upon you, O virtuous and pure.
Peace be upon you, O Paradisiacal human being.
Peace be upon you, O pious and immaculate.
Peace be upon you, O one talked by the angels, O knowledgeable.
Peace be upon you, O oppressed lady whose right was usurped.
Peace be upon you, O persecuted and maltreated.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا فَاطِمَةُ بِنْتَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayki ya fatimatu binta rasuli allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Fatimah the daughter of the Messenger of Allah.
So be upon you the mercy and blessings of Allah.
May Allah bless you,
your soul, and your body.

segments.arabic: اشْهَدُ انَّكِ مَضَيْتِ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٍ مِنْ رَبِّكِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaki madayti `ala bayyinatin min rabbiki

translation.en: I bear witness that you have spent your life with full awareness of your duty towards your Lord

segments.arabic: وَانَّ مَنْ سَرَّكِ فَقَدْ سَرَّ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa anna man sarraki faqad sarra rasula allahi

translation.en: and (I bear witness) that he who pleases you will have pleased the Messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ جَفَاكِ فَقَدْ جَفَا رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa man jafaki faqad jafa rasula allahi

translation.en: and he who displeases you will have displeased the Messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ آذَاكِ فَقَدْ آذَىٰ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa man adhaki faqad adha rasula allahi

translation.en: and he who harms you will have harmed the Messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ وَصَلَكِ فَقَدْ وَصَلَ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa man wasalaki faqad wasala rasula allahi

translation.en: and he who respects you will have respected the Messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ قَطَعَكِ فَقَدْ قَطَعَ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa man qata`aki faqad qata`a rasula allahi

translation.en: and he who disrespects you will have disrespected the messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household.
This is because you are an inseparable part of him (i.e. the Holy Prophet),
and you are his soul with which he lives.

segments.transliteration: ushhidu allaha wa rusulahu wa mala'ikatahu

translation.en: I ask Allah, His Messengers, and His angels to be the witnesses
that I am verily pleased with him whomever you accept,
I am displeased with him whomever you detest,
I disavow him whomever you disavow,
I am loyal to him whomever you support,
I am the enemy of him whomever you betake as enemy,
I am hateful to him whomever you hate,
and I like him whomever you like.

segments.transliteration: wa kafa billahi shahidan wa hasiban

translation.en: Verily, Allah is Sufficient as Witness, Reckoner,
Punisher, and Rewarder.

text.en:
On the twentieth of Jamadi al-Akhirah, Lady Fatimah al-
Zahra’(a.s.) was born five or two years after the beginning of the Holy
Prophet’s Divine Mission. It is appropriate to practice the following
rites on this day:
First: It is proper to observe fasting

Second: It is recommended to give alms and offer good things to
the believers.
Third: It is recommended to <ref=3:1234>Ziarat of Syeda Fatima (sa)</ref>

It is recommended to offer a certain prayer on each of the White
Nights (i.e. the thirteenth, fourteenth, and fifteenth nights of each
Arabic month) in Rajab, Sha’ban, and Ramadan. At the thirteenth
night of Rajab, it is recommended to offer a prayer consisting of two
units at each of which it is advisable to recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 once
and Surahs <ref=1:36>Yasin</ref>
,<ref=1:67>Al-Mulk</ref>
, and <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
.

A similar prayer, yet with four units and Taslim after each two
units, should be offered at the fourteenth night. Also, a similar prayer,
yet with six units and Taslimafter each two units, should be offered at
the fifteenth night. In this respect, Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) is
reported as saying, “Whoever offers these prayers, will be awarded the
merits of these three months (namely, Rajab, Sha’ban, and Ramadan)
and will have all his sins forgiven, except polytheism.

The thirteenth of Rajab is the fist of the White Days on which it is
recommended to observe fasting, according to narrations, so as to win
an abundant reward. As for those who intend to recite the famous
supplicatory prayer known as Dua Ummi-Dawud, they may begin
with observing fasting on this day.

Famously, Imam Ali ibn Abi-TalibAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.) was
born on the thirteenth of Rajab inside the Holy Ka’bah thirty years
before the Elephant Year.
fifteenth night of rajab

According to narrations, there are many rites to be advisably
performed at the fifteenth (i.e. middle) night of Rajab:
First: Bathing is an advisable act at this night.

Second: As said by ‘Allamah al-Majlisi, It is recommended to
spend this whole night with acts of worship.

Third: It is recommended to visit the holy shrine of Imam al-
Husayn (a.s.) at this night.

Fourth: It is also recommended to offer the six-unit prayer
previously mentioned within the rites of the thirteenth night.

Fifth: It is recommended to offer a prayer consisting of thirty units
in each of which one should recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 one time and
Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 ten times. Sayyid Ibn Tawus has reported this
prayer from the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) with an abundant reward.

Sixth: It is recommended to offer another prayer consisting of
twelve units in each of which Surahs of <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
, <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
, <ref=1:113>Al-Falaq</ref>
, <ref=1:114>Al-Nas</ref>
, <ref=1:97>Al-Qadr</ref> 
, and <ref=1:2:255>Ayah al-Kursi</ref>
 should be recited four times
EACH.

After accomplishing the prayer, one should repeat the
following litany four times:

translation.en: Allah, Allah is my Lord.
I do not associate anyone with Him

segments.transliteration: wa la attakhidhu min dunihi waliyyan

translation.en: and I do not betake any Master other than Him.

text.en: One may then submit his requests

although Shaykh al-Tusi, in Misbah al-
Mutahajjid, has mentioned that Dawud ibn Sarhan narrated that Imam
Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) said the following:
On the fifteenth night of Rajab, you may offer a twelve-unit prayer
in each unit of which you may recite Surah al-Faatehah and any other
Surah.

When you finish, you may recite Surah al-Faatehah, al-Falaq,
al-Nas, al-Tawheed, and Ayah al-Kursi each four times.

After that,
you may repeat the following litany four times:

translation.en: All glory be to Allah,all praise be to Allah,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ وَٱللَّهُ اكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu wallahu akbaru

translation.en: there is no god save Allah,and Allah is the Greatest.

text.en: Then, you may say the following:

translation.en: Allah, Allah is my Lord.
I do not associate anyone with Him.
Only shall that which Allah wills happen.

segments.arabic: لاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: There is no power save with Allah, the Most High, the All-great.

text.en:
The same prayer may be offered at the twenty-seventh night of
Rajab.
fifteenth day of rajab
On this blessed day, the following rites may be advisably done:
First: It is recommended to bathe oneself on this day.

Second: It is also recommended to visit the holy shrine of Imam al-
Husayn (a.s.) on this day. In this respect, it has been narrated that
Abu-Basir asked Imam al-Rida(a.s.) about the best times of visiting
Imam al-Husayn’s tomb. The Imam (a.s.) answered, “These are the
fifteenth of Rajab and the fifteenth of Sha’ban.”

Third: It is recommended to offer the famous Salat Salman prayer
in the form which has been previously mentioned within the rites of
the first day of Rajab.

Fourth: One may offer a four-unit prayer after the accomplishment
of which, one may extend the hands and say the following
supplicatory prayer:

translation.en: O Allah, O He Who humiliates all the tyrants!
O He Who dignifies the believers!
Verily, You are my Shelter when all courses mislead me

segments.transliteration: wa anta bari'u khalqi rahmatan bi

translation.en: and You are the Maker of my creation out of Your having mercy upon me,
while You have never needed to create me.

segments.transliteration: wa lawla rahmatuka lakuntu min alhalikina

translation.en: Were it not for Your mercy, I would be of those who perish.
You are my backer against my enemies,

segments.arabic: وَلَوْلاَ نَصْرُكَ إِيَّايَ لَكُنْتُ مِنَ ٱلْمَفْضُوحِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa lawla nasruka iyyaya lakuntu min almafduhina

translation.en: and were it not for Your support, I would be of those who are exposed.
O He Who sends mercy from its origin!
O He Who originates blessings from their centers!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَصَّ نَفْسَهُ بِٱلشُّمُوخِ وَٱلرِّفْعَةِ
segments.transliteration: ya man khassa nafsahu bilshshumukhi walrrif`ati

translation.en: O He Who has given Himself exclusively disdain and elevation;
therefore, His saints feel dignified out of His Honor!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ وَضَعَتْ لَهُ ٱلْمُلُوكُ نِيرَ ٱلْمَذَلَّةِ عَلَىٰ أَعْنَاقِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man wada`at lahu almuluku nira almadhallati `ala a`naqihim

translation.en: O He for Whom all kings have put the yoke of humiliation on their necks;
they are therefore fearful of His supremacy!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِكَيْنُونِيَّتِكَ ٱلَّتِي ٱشْتَقَقْتَهَا مِنْ كِبْرِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bikaynuniyyatika allati ishtaqaqtaha min kibriya'ika

translation.en: I pray You in the name of Your Entity from which You have derived Your Pride,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِكِبْرِيَائِكَ ٱلَّتِي ٱشْتَقَقْتَهَا مِنْ عِزَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bikibriya'ika allati ishtaqaqtaha min `izzatika

translation.en: I pray You in the name of Your Pride from which You have derived Your Dignity,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِعِزِّتِكَ ٱلَّتِي ٱسْتَوَيْتَ بِهَا عَلَىٰ عَرْشِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bi`izzatika allati istawayta biha `ala `arshika

translation.en: I pray You in the name of Your Dignity by which You have been firmly established on the throne of authority;
so, You have created all Your creatures who are,
as a result, submissive to You.

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi

translation.en: [I pray You to] send blessings to Muhammad and upon his Household.

text.en:
According to a narration, Any aggrieved person who says this
supplicatory prayer will have his grief released by Almighty Allah.

Fifth: The most important rite on this day is to say the supplicatory
prayer known as <ref=3:1025>Dua Ummi-Dawud</ref> .

It is highly desirable to observe fast on the 13th, 14th and 15th of Rajab.The following is narrated through a chain of documents to my grandfather Abi Ja‟far al-Tusi narrated on the authority of Imam As-Sadiq (as): “God would record the fasting and staying up at night of one year for whoever fasts during the thirteenth, fourteenth and fifteenth days of Rajab. He would stand in the position of those who are secure on the Resurrection Day. Have a Ghusl/bath each day, and give alms in the way of Allah.
Ziaraat Ameenullah Recite Dua Sadd Subhan
Nights of “Ayyam Baydh”

The following is reported with its chain of documents from Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Tarazy in his book, on the authority of Abul Hussein Ahmad ibn Ahmad ibn Sa‟eed al-Katib – may God be pleased with him. Abul Abbas Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Sa‟eed narrated that Muhammad ibn Ali al-Qalyani said that he heard his grandfather say that Ahmad ibn Abil Ayfa quoted on the authority of Ja‟far ibn Muhammad (as) who said: “God has granted three months to this nation that He has not granted any other nation. They are the months of Rajab,Sha‟ban and Ramadhan.
He has also bestowed three nights to them that He has not granted anyone else.
They are the thirteenth, the fourteenth and the fifteenth nights of each month.
God has granted this nation three Chapters which He has not granted any other nation.
They are the Chapters Ya Sin, Tabarakul Mulk and Qul Huwa Allahu Ahad

These three things combined constitute the noblest thing that has been granted to this nation.‟ ” He (as) was asked, “How can these three be combined?” He (as) replied, “You can pray on these three nights as below in these three months.
Then you can benefit from the nobility of these three months and God would forgive all your sins except for associating partners with Him.”
Recite a 12 Rak-a’t Salah as under:
On the Night of the 13th recite 2 Rak-a’t,
On the Night of 14th recite 4 Rak-a’t, and
On the Night of 15th recite 6 Rak-a’t:
In each Rak-a’t recite Surah Fatih’ah, Surah Yasin, Surah Mulk and Sura Ikhlaas.

The following has been reported on the authority of the Prophet (saws): “On the middle night of the month of Rajab, God the Sublime orders those who keep and record the Records of Deeds of the people to look at the records and wipe out any bad deeds that are found and replace them with good deeds.”

It is recommended to spend this whole night in acts of worship.It is best to spend it wholeheartedly in the presence of the Lord and put all our thoughts and mind into worship of the Master of our beginning and end and experience His Company and joy of conversing with Him.

You should entrust your deeds to the Ahlulbayt(as) at dawn when this session is about to end. You should take refuge in them, ask them to complete your deeds and ask them to present it to God the Exalted, and help with the fulfillment of your needs.
Perform Ghusl
Ziyarah of Imam Husain (peace be upon him) for the Night of 15th Rajab
Another Ziyarah of Imam Husain (peace be upon him) for the Night of 15th Rajab
Sayyid Ibn Tawus has narrated this prayer in this form from Imam Ja`far al-Sadiq (peace be upon him):

On the fifteenth night of Rajab, you may offer a twelve-unit prayer in each unit of which you may recite; Surah Fatihah, Surah Ikhlaas, al-Falaq, al-Naas, and Ayah al-Kursi and Surah Qadr all four times each.
After that, repeat the following four times:

translation.en: Allah, Allah is my Lord.
I do not associate anyone with Him

segments.transliteration: wa la attakhidhu min dunihi waliyyan

translation.en: and I do not betake any Master other than Him.

text.en: Recite a 12 Rakat Salah: 6x2 with reciting Sura Fatiha and any other Sura in each Rakah
When you finish, recite Surah Fatih’ah, Surah Ikhlaas, Surah Falaq, Surah Kaafiroon, Surah Naas, Surah Qadr and Aayatul Kursi 4 times each.
Then recite the following 4 times:

translation.en: All glory be to Allah,all praise be to Allah,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ وَٱللَّهُ اكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu wallahu akbaru

translation.en: there is no god save Allah,and Allah is the Greatest.

text.en: You may then say the following:

translation.en: Allah, Allah is my Lord.
I do not associate anyone with Him.
Only shall that which Allah wills happen.

segments.arabic: لاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: There is no power save with Allah, the Most High, the All-great.

text.en: It is recommended to offer a prayer consisting of 30 units in each of which one should recite Surah al-Fatihah one time and Surah al-Tawheed ten times.
Sayyid Ibn Tawus has reported this prayer from the Holy Prophet (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) with an abundant reward.
Take a Ghusl on this day.

It is recommended to visit the holy shrine of Imam al-Husain (peace be upon him) on this day. In this respect, it has been narrated that Abu-Basir asked Imam al-Ridha (peace be upon him) about the best times of visiting Imam al-Husayn’s tomb. The Imam (peace be upon him) answered, “These are the fifteenth of Rajab and the fifteenth of Sha`ban.”
Ziyarah of Imam Husain (peace be upon him) for the Day of 15th Rajab
A'amal Umme Dawood is performed on the day of 15th Rajab
Recite Salaah 10 units of Salmaan Farsi
Adi ibn Sabit al-Ansari says went to see Imam Ali(as) on the 15 Rajab.who pointed to me to stand to pray behind him. I did so and said four units of prayers
Recite a 4 [2x2] unit (raka') prayer and after accomplishment raise your hands and say:

translation.en: O Allah, O He Who humiliates all the tyrants!
O He Who dignifies the believers!
Verily, You are my Shelter when all courses mislead me

segments.transliteration: wa anta bari'u khalqi rahmatan bi

translation.en: and You are the Maker of my creation out of Your having mercy upon me,
while You have never needed to create me.

segments.transliteration: wa lawla rahmatuka lakuntu min alhalikina

translation.en: Were it not for Your mercy, I would be of those who perish.
You are my backer against my enemies,

segments.arabic: وَلَوْلاَ نَصْرُكَ إِيَّايَ لَكُنْتُ مِنَ ٱلْمَفْضُوحِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa lawla nasruka iyyaya lakuntu min almafduhina

translation.en: and were it not for Your support, I would be of those who are exposed.
O He Who sends mercy from its origin!
O He Who originates blessings from their centers!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَصَّ نَفْسَهُ بِٱلشُّمُوخِ وَٱلرِّفْعَةِ
segments.transliteration: ya man khassa nafsahu bilshshumukhi walrrif`ati

translation.en: O He Who has given Himself exclusively disdain and elevation;
therefore, His saints feel dignified out of His Honor!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ وَضَعَتْ لَهُ ٱلْمُلُوكُ نِيرَ ٱلْمَذَلَّةِ عَلَىٰ أَعْنَاقِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa ya man wada`at lahu almuluku nira almadhallati `ala a`naqihim

translation.en: O He for Whom all kings have put the yoke of humiliation on their necks;
they are therefore fearful of His supremacy!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِكَيْنُونِيَّتِكَ ٱلَّتِي ٱشْتَقَقْتَهَا مِنْ كِبْرِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bikaynuniyyatika allati ishtaqaqtaha min kibriya'ika

translation.en: I pray You in the name of Your Entity from which You have derived Your Pride,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِكِبْرِيَائِكَ ٱلَّتِي ٱشْتَقَقْتَهَا مِنْ عِزَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bikibriya'ika allati ishtaqaqtaha min `izzatika

translation.en: I pray You in the name of Your Pride from which You have derived Your Dignity,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِعِزِّتِكَ ٱلَّتِي ٱسْتَوَيْتَ بِهَا عَلَىٰ عَرْشِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bi`izzatika allati istawayta biha `ala `arshika

translation.en: I pray You in the name of Your Dignity by which You have been firmly established on the throne of authority;
so, You have created all Your creatures who are,
as a result, submissive to You.

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi

translation.en: [I pray You to] send blessings to Muhammad and upon his Household.

text.en: From Iqbal Aamal:
Section 60 On the Secrets of the 15th Rajab

Beware that this is the day for which there are secrets and many gifts are bestowed on it, the poor become needless and the grief-stricken people will feel relief. Thus you should turn to God and ask him to improve your affairs. Consider yourself to be in the presence of the Lord and a guest of the Prophet (MGB). Remember that you might not live and see the next middle day of the month of Rajab!
The following narration has been reported on the authority of Ibn Abbas. Adam (MGB) said: “O‟ Lord! Please let me know of Your most loved days and times.”

Then God the Blessed the Sublimed revealed to him, “O‟ Adam! The most loved times for me are the middle day of the month of Rajab. O‟ Adam! Seek proximity to me on the middle day of the month of Rajab by offering, feeding people, fasting, reciting supplications and asking for forgiveness and saying, „There is no God but God.‟

O‟ Adam! I have destined to appoint a Prophet (MGB) from your lineage who is not bad-tempered and does not yell in the bazaar. He is kind, merciful, and highly blessed. I will especially honor him and his nation with the middle day of the month of Rajab. I shall grant whatever asked for. I shall forgive whoever asks for forgiveness. I shall provide for whoever asks for provisions. I shall overlook any mistakes. I shall have Mercy upon whoever asks for Mercy. O‟ Adam! Whoever is fasting in the morning of the middle day of the month of Rajab while mentioning God, humble, protecting his private parts and giving charity using his wealth shall have no reward near Me but Paradise.
The Other Events of the Fifteenth Day of Rajab
It has been reported inarration: “On the fifteenth day of Rajab, God‟s Prophet (MGB) left Sha‟b Abu Talib.
Also on this day, God‟s Prophet (MGB) married off our Master Fatima Zahra (MGB) to our Master Ali (MGB) with God‟s permission.
Also, in this day the Qibla was changed from Jerusalem and the Muslims said the evening prayer facing the Ka‟ba.
A'amal Umme Dawood is performed on the day of 15th Rajab
Ziyarat Imam Hussain (peace be upon him) on 1st, 15th Rajab and 15th Sha'ban
According to the opinion of Shaykh al-Mufid and Sayyid Ibn Tawus, the following form of ziyarah is dedicated to the first day of Rajab and the fifteenth night of Sha`ban.
However, al-Shahid added that it is also dedicated to the first night of Rajab, the fifteenth night of it, the fifteenth day of it, and the fifteenth day of Sha`ban.
In conclusion, this form of ziyarah is dedicated to six times.
You may then enter the shrine, stop at the holy tomb, and repeat the following word one hundred times:

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great.

text.en: You may then say the following words:

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَاتَمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the seal of the Prophets.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the Messengers.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the Prophets’ successors.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُسَيْنُ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O al-Husayn the son of `Ali.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka yabna fatimata sayyidati nisa'i al`alamina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the Doyenne of the women of the world.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ وَلِيِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waliyya allahi wabna waliyyihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O saint of Allah and son of His saint.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَفِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ صَفِيِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya safiyya allahi wabna safiyyihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O select of Allah and son of His select.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ حُجَّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya hujjata allahi wabna hujjatihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O argument of Allah and son of His argument.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حَبِيبَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ حَبِيبِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya habiba allahi wabna habibihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O beloved by Allah and son of the beloved by Him.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا سَفِيرَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ سَفِيرِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya safira allahi wabna safirihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O representative of Allah and son of His representative.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَازِنَ ٱلكِتَابِ ٱلْمَسْطُورِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O keeper of the inscribed Scripture.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ ٱلتَّوْرَاةِ وَٱلإِنْجِيلِ وَٱلزَّبُورِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha alttawrati wal-injili walzzaburi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of the Torah, the Gospel, and the Psalms.
Peace be upon you, O trustee of the All-beneficent God.
Peace be upon you, O partner of the Qur'an.
Peace be upon you, O support of the religion.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَابَ حِكْمَةِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya baba hikmati rabbi al`alamina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O door to the wisdom of the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَابَ حِطَّةٍ ٱلَّذِي مَنْ دَخَلَهُ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلآمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya baba hittatin alladhi man dakhalahu kana min al-aminina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O door of Forgiveness; he who enters from this door will be of the secured ones.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَيْبَةَ عِلْمِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O case of Allah’s knowledge.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْضِعَ سِرِّ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O place of Allah’s secret.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ وَٱلْوِتْرَ ٱلْمَوْتُورَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi walwitra almawtura

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O (the object of) Allah’s vengeance and the violated sanctity.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ ٱلأَرْوَاحِ ٱلَّتِي حَلَّتْ بِفِنَائِكَ وَأَنَاخَتْ بِرَحْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka wa `ala al-arwahi allati hallat bifina'ika wa anakhat birahlika

translation.en: Peace be upon you and upon the souls that resided in your yard and settled down near your caravan.

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي وَنَفْسِي يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi wa nafsi ya aba `abdillahi

translation.en: May Allah accept my father, my mother, and myself as ransoms for you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: لَقَدْ عَظُمَتِ ٱلْمُصِيبَةُ وَجَلَّتِ ٱلرَّزِيَّةُ بِكَ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أَهْلِ ٱلإِسْلاَمِ
segments.transliteration: laqad `azumat almusibatu wa jallat alrraziyyatu bika `alayna wa `ala jami`i ahli al-islami

translation.en: O Abu-`Abdullah, unbearable is the sorrow and never-racking is the agony you put up with, for us and for all (true) Muslims.

segments.arabic: فَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً أَسَّسَتْ أَسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ وَٱلْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ البَيْتِ
segments.transliteration: fala`ana allahu ummatan assasat asasa alzzulmi waljawri `alaykum ahla albayti

translation.en: Curse of Allah be on the people who laid the basis of wronging and injustice against you the Household of the Prophet.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً دَفَعَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَقَامِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ummatan dafa`atkum `an maqamikum

translation.en: Curse of Allah be upon the people who removed you from your position

segments.arabic: وَأَزَالَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَرَاتِبِكُمُ ٱلَّتِي رَتَّبَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: wa azalatkum `an maratibikum allati rattabakum allahu fiha

translation.en: and took you away from your actual ranks that Allah has chosen for you.

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي وَنَفْسِي يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi wa nafsi ya aba `abdillahi

translation.en: May Allah accept my father, my mother, and me as ransoms for you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ لَقَدِ ٱقْشَعَرَّتْ لِدِمَائِكُمْ أَظِلَّةُ ٱلعَرْشِ مَعَ أَظِلَّةِ ٱلْخَلائِقِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu laqad iqsha`arrat lidima'ikum azillatu al`arshi ma`a azillati alkhala'iqi

translation.en: I bear witness that the shades of the Divine Throne shared the shades of the creatures in shuddering for the shedding of your blood.

segments.arabic: وَبَكَتْكُمُ ٱلسَّمَاءُ وَٱلأَرْضُ وَسُكَّانُ ٱلْجِنَانِ وَٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa bakatkum alssama'u wal-ardu wa sukkanu aljinani walbarri walbahri

translation.en: The heavens, the earth, and the inhabitants of the gardens of Paradise, the lands, and the oceans—all those wept for you.

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ عَدَدَ مَا فِي عِلْمِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: May Allah shower upon you blessings as many as the number of what is there in the knowledge of Allah.
Here I am at your service, O caller to Allah.

segments.arabic: إِنْ كَانَ لَمْ يُجِبْكَ بَدَنِي عِنْدَ ٱسْتِغَاثَتِكَ وَلِسَانِي عِنْدَ ٱسْتِنْصَارِكَ
segments.transliteration: in kana lam yujibka badani `inda istighathatika wa lisani `inda istinsarika

translation.en: If my body could not respond to your call when you called for aid and my tongue could not respond to your call for help,

segments.transliteration: faqad ajabaka qalbi wa sam`i wa basari

translation.en: then my heart, my hearing, and my sight have verily responded to you.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّنَا إِنْ كَانَ وَعْدُ رَبِّنَا لَمَفْعُولاً
segments.transliteration: subhana rabbina in kana wa`du rabbina lamaf`ulan

translation.en: Glory be to our Lord! Most surely, the promise of our Lord was to be fulfilled.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ طُهْرٌ طَاهِرٌ مُطَهَّرٌ مِنْ طُهْرٍ طَاهِرٍ مُطَهَّرٍ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka tuhrun tahirun mutahharun min tuhrin tahirin mutahharin

translation.en: I bear witness that you are pure, immaculate, and purified and you are the offspring of the pure, immaculate, and purified ones.
You are indeed pure and you are the reason for the purity of the lands.

segments.arabic: وَطَهُرَتْ أَرْضٌ أَنْتَ بِهَا وَطَهُرَ حَرَمُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa tahurat ardun anta biha wa tahura haramuka

translation.en: Pure is the land where you are and pure is your holy shrine.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ أَمَرْتَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَٱلْعَدْلِ وَدَعَوْتَ إِلَيْهِمَا
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka qad amarta bilqisti wal`adli wa da`awta ilayhima

translation.en: I bear witness that you enjoined justice and fairness and you called to them.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّكَ صَادِقٌ صِدِّيقٌ صَدَقْتَ فِيمَا دَعَوْتَ إِلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: wa annaka sadiqun siddiqun sadaqta fima da`awta ilayhi

translation.en: And you are verily honest and veracious, and you were truthful in that for which you called.

segments.transliteration: wa annaka tharu allahi fi al-ardi

translation.en: And you are verily (the object of) Allah’s vengeance on the earth.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ بَلَّغْتَ عَنِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka qad ballaghta `an allahi

translation.en: And I bear witness that you did convey on behalf of Allah,
on behalf of your grandfather the Messenger of Allah,
on behalf of your father the Commander of the Faithful,
and on behalf of your brother al-Hasan.

segments.transliteration: wa nasahta wa jahadta fi sabili allahi

translation.en: And you advised and strove in the way of Allah
and you served Him sincerely until death came upon you.
So, may Allah award you with the best of the rewarding of the foremost (to deeds of goodness).

segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `alayka wa sallama tasliman

translation.en: And may Allah bless and exalt you thoroughly.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ ٱلْمَظْلُومِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa salli `ala alhusayni almazlumi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, and send blessings upon al-Husayn the wronged,
the martyr, the orthodox,
the slain one whom is wept heavily,
and the object of agonies
with such blessings that are increasing, growing, and sacred;

segments.transliteration: yas`adu awwaluha wa la yanfadu akhiruha

translation.en: the first of which ascends and the last of which is infinite,

segments.arabic: أَفْضَلَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَىٰ أَحَدٍ مِنْ أَوْلادِ أَنْبِيَائِكَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
segments.transliteration: afdala ma sallayta `ala ahadin min awladi anbiya'ika almursalina

translation.en: and with the best blessings that You ever sent on any of Your missioned Prophets’ sons.
O God of the worlds!

text.en: You may then kiss the holy tomb and put your right and then your left cheeks on it. You may then circumambulate it and kiss it from the four sides.
Shaykh al-Mufid adds: You may then direct towards the tomb of `Ali ibn al-Husayn, stop there, and say the following words:

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O veracious, pure,
immaculate, dear, favorite,
and son of the basil of Allah’s Messenger.
Peace be upon you as you are steadfast martyr.
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.transliteration: ma akrama maqamaka wa ashrafa munqalabaka

translation.en: How noble your position is and how honorable your seat is.
I bear witness that Allah thanked you for your efforts,
magnified your rewards,
and joined you to the exalted summit
where there is the entire honor
in the elevated chambers.

segments.arabic: كَمَا مَنَّ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ قَبْلُ وَجَعَلَكَ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلبَيْتِ
segments.transliteration: kama manna `alayka min qablu wa ja`alaka min ahli albayti

translation.en: Similarly, He had bestowed upon you and made you one of the members of the Household of the Prophet

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ أَذْهَبَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمُ ٱلرِّجْسَ وَطَهَّرَهُمْ تَطْهِيراً
segments.transliteration: alladhina adhhaba allahu `anhum alrrijsa wa tahharahum tathiran

translation.en: from whom Allah removed filth and whom He purified with thorough purification.

segments.arabic: صَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكَ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ وَرِضْوَانُهُ
segments.transliteration: salawatu allahi `alayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu wa ridwanuhu

translation.en: Allah’s blessings, mercy, benedictions, and pleasure be upon you.

segments.arabic: فَٱشْفَعْ أَيُّهَا ٱلسَّيِّدُ ٱلطَّاهِرُ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ
segments.transliteration: fashfa` ayyuha alssayyidu alttahiru ila rabbika

translation.en: So, O pure master, (please) intercede for me with your Lord

segments.arabic: فِي حَطِّ ٱلأَثْقَالِ عَنْ ظَهْرِي وَتَخْفِيفِهَا عَنِّي
segments.transliteration: fi hatti al-athqali `an zahri wa takhfifiha `anni

translation.en: so that He may unburden and relieve me from the loads (of sins) that I carry on my back.

segments.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْ ذُلِّي وَخُضُوعِي لَكَ وَلِلسَّيِّدِ أَبِيكَ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكُمَا
segments.transliteration: warham dhulli wa khudu`i laka wa lilssayyidi abika salla allahu `alaykuma

translation.en: And (please) have mercy upon my humbleness and submission to you and to the master, your father. May Allah bless you both.

text.en: You may then throw yourself on the tomb and say the following words:

segments.arabic: زَادَ ٱللَّهُ فِي شَرَفِكُمْ فِي ٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: zada allahu fi sharafikum fi al-akhirati

translation.en: May Allah increase your honor in the Hereafter
in the same way as He honored you in this world
and may He bless you in the same way as He blessed others on account of you.
And I bear witness that you are the signposts of the religion
and the stars of the worlds.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alaykum wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

text.en: You may then direct towards the martyrs and say the following words:

translation.en: Peace be upon you all, O supporters of Allah
supporters of His Messenger,
supporters of `Ali the son of Abu-Talib
supporters of Fatimah,
supporters of al-Hasan and al-Husayn,
and supporters of Islam.
I bear witness that you indeed did sincerely for the sake of Allah
and strove sincerely in His way.

segments.arabic: فَجَزَاكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلإِسْلاَمِ وَأَهْلِهِ أَفْضَلَ ٱلْجَزَاءِ
segments.transliteration: fajazakum allahu `an al-islami wa ahlihi afdala aljaza'i

translation.en: So, may Allah reward you on behalf of Islam and its people with the best of rewarding.
By Allah I swear, you did win a great success.

segments.arabic: يَا لَيْتَنِي كُنْتُ مَعَكُمْ فَأَفُوزَ فَوْزاً عَظِيماً
segments.transliteration: ya laytani kuntu ma`akum fa'afuza fawzan `aziman

translation.en: I whish I were with you so that I would win a great success.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكُمْ أَحْيَاءٌ عِنْدَ رَبِّكُمْ تُرْزَقُونَ

translation.en: I bear witness that you are alive with your Lord, receiving sustenance.
I bear witness that you are the true martyrs and the true happy ones

segments.transliteration: wa annakumu alfa'izuna fi darajati al`ula

translation.en: and you are the winners in the most elevated ranks.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alaykum wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

text.en: You may then return to the side of the Imam’s head to offer the (two-unit) prayer of ziyarah and pray Almighty Allah for yourself, your parents, and your brethren-in-faith.
Duas to be recited on the "1st eve" of the Month of Rajab

Referring to the recommended rites at the first night of Rajab, Shaykh al-Tusi has mentioned, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, that Abu’l-Bukhtari Wahab ibn Wahab has narrated on the authority of Imam al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) on the authority of his father on the authority of his grandfather (peace be upon them all) who said that Imam `Ali (peace be upon him) used to devote himself to acts of worship in an exclusive way at four nights, (1) the first night of Rajab, (2) the middle night (i.e. fifteen) of Sha`ban, (3) the `id al-Fitr Night (i.e. the first night of Shawwal), and (4) the Nahr Night (the tenth of Dhu’l-hijjah).
It is highly advisable to bathe oneself (Ghusl) at the first night of Rajab.

In this respect, some scholars have reported the Holy Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) as saying, “Whoever receives the month of Rajab and bathes himself in the first, middle, and last of it, will be released from all of his sins to return as pure as the day of his birth.”
It is recommended to recite this <ref=3:1012>special Ziyarah of Imam Husain (peace be upon him) for the 1st Night of Rajab</ref> & also visit the shrine
SIGHTING THE MOON
At the sight of the new moon, it is recommended to say the following supplicatory prayer:

translation.en: O Allah, cause it (i.e. the moon) to appear carrying for us security, faith,
safety, and Islam.

segments.transliteration: rabbi wa rabbuka allahu `azza wa jalla

translation.en: Your and my Lord is Allah, the Glorified and Majestic.

text.en: It has been also reported that when his eyes fell on the new moon of Rajab, the Holy Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) used to say the following:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِي رَجَبٍ وَشَعْبَانَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma barik lana fi rajabin wa sha`bana

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) pour out Your blessings upon us in Rajab and Sha`ban.
make us catch Ramadan,
and help us observe fasting,
do acts of worship,
suppress our tongues (from saying anything improper),
and cast down our eyes (against what is forbidden for us to look at).

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْ حَظَّنَا مِنْهُ ٱلْجُوعَ وَٱلْعَطَشَ
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`al hazzana minhu alju`a wal`atasha

translation.en: Do not make our share of Ramadan as only hunger and thirst.

text.en:
Second: It is highly advisable to bathe oneself at the first night of
Rajab. In this respect, some scholars have reported the Holy Prophet
(s.a.w.a.) as saying, “Whoever receives the month of Rajab and bathes
himself in the first, middle, and last of it, will be released from all of
his sins to return as pure as the day of his birth.”

Third: It is recommended to visit the shrine of Imam al-Husayn
(a.s.).
SALAAH FOR THE 1ST EVE OF RAJAB
It is recommended to offer, after the obligatory Maghrib Prayer, a twenty unit prayer and to recite in each unit Surah al-Fatihah once and Surah al-Tawhid once.

Whoever offers this prayer, his family members, property, sons, and he will be kept saved from harm, rescued against the grave torture, and pass the Sirat as swiftly as lightning without being called to account.

After the `Isha' Prayer, it is recommended to offer a two unit prayer in the first unit of which Surah al-Fatihah should be recited once, Surah al-Inshirah (No. 94) recited once, and Surah al-Tawhid recited three times. In the second unit, Surahs al-Fatihah, al-Inshirah, al-Tawhid, al-Falaq, and al-Nas should be recited once each. After taslim, the following litany should be repeated thirty times:

translation.en: There is no god but Allah.

text.en: Similarly, this imploration of blessings (Salawaat) should be repeated thirty times:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: The reward of this prayer is that whoever offers it, will have all his sins forgiven and will return as sin-free as the day of his birth.
It is recommended to offer a thirty unit prayer in each unit Surah al-Fatihah is recited once, Surah al-Kafirun (No. 109) recited once, and Surah al-Tawheed repeated three times
DUA TO BE RECITED AFTER ISHA PRAYER ON THE 1ST EVE OF RAJAB
Imam Abu-Ja`far II (peace be upon him) is reported to have recommended saying this the following supplicatory prayer at the first night of Rajab after the `Isha' Prayer:

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your being the King,
having absolute power over all things,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّكَ مَا تَشَاءُ مِنْ أَمْرٍ يَكُونُ
segments.transliteration: wa annaka ma tasha'u min amrin yakunu

translation.en: and whatever matter You want to happen shall happen.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَوَجَّهُ إِلَيْكَ بِنَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni atawajjahu ilayka binabiyyika muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, I turn my face towards You asking You in the name of Your Prophet, Muhammad,

segments.arabic: نَبِيِّ ٱلرَّحْمَةِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: nabiyyi alrrahmati salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi

translation.en: the Prophet of mercy—may Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household.
O Muhammad!
O Messenger of Allah!

segments.arabic: إِنِّي أَتَوَجَّهُ بِكَ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّكَ وَرَبِّي
segments.transliteration: inni atawajjahu bika ila allahi rabbika wa rabbi

translation.en: I seek Your intercession for me with Allah, your and my Lord,
so that He may respond to my request.
O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your Prophet Muhammad
and the Imams from his household,
peace be upon him and them,
to respond to my request.
You may then mention your requests.

text.en: DUA TO BE RECITED BEFORE SALAAT WITR

Ibn Ashyam says: It is advisable to say this supplicatory prayer after offering the eight-unit salat al-Layl (Night Prayer) and before offering the three-unit salat al-witr. Immediately after offering this prayer, it is recommended to say this supplicatory prayer while sitting:

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ تَنْفَدُ خَزَائِنُهُ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi la tanfadu khaza'inuhu

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Whose treasures are inexhaustible
and those whom are secured by Him shall never fear anything.
O my Lord, as I have committed acts of disobedience to You,
this was only out of my full confidence in Your generosity.
Verily, You accept the repentance of Your servants,
pardon their wrongdoings,
and forgive their flaws.
You verily respond to one who prays You,
and You are close to him.

segments.transliteration: wa ana ta'ibun ilayka min alkhataya

translation.en: I am repenting before You from my sins

segments.arabic: وَرَاغِبٌ إِلَيْكَ فِي تَوْفِيرِ حَظِّي مِنَ ٱلْعَطَايَا
segments.transliteration: wa raghibun ilayka fi tawfiri hazzi min al`ataya

translation.en: and from You do I desire for a good portion of Your donations.
O Creator of all beings!
O my Redeemer from all hardships!
O my Rescuer from all perils!
(Please do) confer upon me with pleasure
and save me from the evil end results of matters.

segments.arabic: فَأَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ نَعْمَائِكَ وَجَزِيلِ عَطَائِكَ مَشكورٌ
segments.transliteration: fa anta allahu `ala na`ma'ika wa jazili `ata'ika mashkurun

translation.en: Verily, You are Allah the thanked for Your bounties and affluent gifts
and hoped for all good things.

text.en: DUA AFTER SALAT LAYL ON THE 1ST EVE OF RAJAB
Ali ibn hadid has narrated that Imam Musa ibn Ja`far (peace be upon him) used to say the following supplicatory prayer while prostrating after the accomplishment of the Night Prayer (Salat al-Layl):

translation.en: [O Allah,] If I obey You, then thanks to You,
and if I disobey You, then You have the right (to punish me).

segments.arabic: لاَ صُنْعَ لِي وَلاَ لِغَيْرِي فِي إِحْسَانٍ إِلاَّ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: la sun`a li wa la lighayri fi ihsanin illa bika

translation.en: All favors that are done to me or to anyone else must come from You.
O He Who existed before all things!
O Author of all things!
Verily, You have power over all things.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ ٱلْعَدِيلَةِ عِنْدَ ٱلْمَوْتِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika mina al`adilati `inda almawti

translation.en: O Allah, I seek Your protection against deviation at (the hour of) death,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri almarji`i fi alquburi

translation.en: evil recourse in the grave,
and regret on the Day of the approaching doom.

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: fa-as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I therefore beseech You to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and to make my life wholesome,
my death sound,
and my resort honorable;
neither disgraceful nor scandalous.
O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and his Household;
the Imams, the sources of wisdom,
the causes of bliss,
and the essences of immaculacy,

segments.transliteration: wa i`simni bihim min kulli su'in

translation.en: and protect me, in their name, against all evils,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَأْخُذْنِي عَلَىٰ غِرَّةٍ وَلاَ عَلَىٰ غَفْلَةٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la ta'khudhni `ala ghirratin wa la `ala ghaflatin

translation.en: do not seize me unexpectedly or inattentively,
do not allow my end result to be regretful,
and be pleased with me,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ مَغْفِرَتَكَ لِلظَّالِمِينَ وَأَنَا مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: fa'inna maghfirataka lilzzalimina wa ana min alzzalimina

translation.en: for Your forgiveness is dedicated to the wrongdoers, and I am one of these wrongdoers.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱغْفِرْ لِي مَا لاَ يَضُرُّكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ighfir li ma la yadurruka

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) forgive me (my faults) which do not harm You
and give me from that which does not cause decrease to You.
Verily, You are the One Whose mercy is all-embracing
and Whose wisdom is all-excellent.
(Please do) grant me opulence, comfort,
security, health,
wholesomeness, contentment,
thanksgiving, good health, piety,
patience, belief in You and Your Saints,
affluence, and thanksgiving.

segments.arabic: وَأَعْمِمْ بِذٰلِكَ يَا رَبِّ أَهْلِي وَوَلَدِي
segments.transliteration: wa a`mim bidhalika ya rabbi ahli wa waladi

translation.en: (Please do) include, O my Lord, with this (request) my family members (or my wife), my sons,
and my brethren-in-faith
as well as all those whom I love and those who love me
and my offspring and all my fathers and mothers
among the Muslims and the believers,
O Lord of the worlds!

text.en: Dua & Aamal for the first "Day "of Rajab

It is advisable to observe fasting on this day. According to narrations, Prophet Noah (`a) embarked on the Ark on such a day; he therefore ordered his companions to observe fasting. Hence, whoever observes fasting on this day; Hellfire will move away from him for a distance of one year walking.
Taking a Ghusl is also advisable on this day.
<ref=3:1012>Ziyarah of Imam Husain (peace be upon him) for the 1st Day of Rajab</ref>
<ref=3:1201>Salaah of Salmaan Farsi</ref>
THE SUPPLICATION ON THE FIRST OF RAJAB
It is recommended to recite the long supplication, particularized for this day, that is mentioned in the book of ‘Iqbal al-A`mal’:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ يا اللهُ يا اللهُ يا اللهُ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inny as-aluka ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu,

translation.en: O Allah: I verily beseech You, O Allah; O Allah; O Allah;

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ اللهُ القَديمُ الأَزَلِيُّ الْمَلِكِ العَظيمِ،
segments.transliteration: anta allahu alqadimu al-azaliyyu almaliki al`azimi,

translation.en: You are Allah; the Eternal, Whose Great Kingdom is everlasting.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ اللهُ الحَيُّ القَيُّومُ الْمَوْلى السَّميعُ البَصيرُ،
segments.transliteration: anta allahu alhayyu alqayyumu almawla alssami`u albasiru,

translation.en: You are Allah; the Ever-living, the Self-Subsisting, the Master, the All-hearing, and the All-seeing.
O He to Whose Godhead, might and majesty
And grandeur and greatness
And power and knowledge and potency
And light and spirit
And volition and tenderness and mercy and lordship—all these belong to His Godhead.
To Your light, all lights glowed;
And all fires abated;
And all darkness submitted.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ باسْمِكَ الَّذي اشْتَقَقْتَهُ مِنْ قِدَمِكَ وَأزَلِكَ وَنورِكَ،
segments.transliteration: as-aluka bismika alladhy ishtaqaqtahu min qidamika wa azalika wa nurika,

translation.en: I beseech You by Your Name that You derived from You eternity and infinity and light;

segments.arabic: وَبالإسْمِ الأَعْظَمِ الَّذي اشْتَقَقْتَهُ مِنْ كِبْرِيائِكَ وَجَبَروتِكَ وَعَظَمَتِكَ وَعِزِّكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa balismi al-a`zami alladhy ishtaqaqtahu min kibriya’ika wa jabarutika wa `azamatika wa `izzika,

translation.en: And by the Grandest Name that You derived from Your grandeur and omnipotence and greatness and might;

segments.transliteration: wa bijuwdika alladhy ishtaqaqtahu min rahmatika,

translation.en: And by Your magnanimity that You derived from Your mercy;

segments.transliteration: wa birahmatika allaty ishtaqaqtaha min rafatika,

translation.en: And by Your mercy that You derived from Your clemency;

segments.transliteration: wa birafatika allaty ishtaqaqtaha min judika,

translation.en: And by Your clemency that You derived from Your magnanimity;

segments.transliteration: wa bijudika alladhy ishtaqaqtahu min ghaybika,

translation.en: And by Your magnanimity that You derived from Your knowledge of the unseen;

segments.transliteration: wa bighaybika wa ihatatika wa qiyamika wa dawamika wa qidamika.

translation.en: And by Your knowledge of the unseen, and Your comprehension of all things, and Your subsistence, and Your perpetuity, and Your eternity.
And I beseech You by all of Your Most Excellent Names.

segments.arabic: لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ الواحِدُ الأحَدُ الفَرْدُ الصَّمَدُ الحَيُّ،
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta al-wahidu al-ahadu alfardu alssamadu alhayyu,

translation.en: There is no god save You; the One, the One and Only, the Unique, the Besought of all, the Ever-living,
The Foremost of all things, the Last, the Evident, the Immanent.
To You do belong all great names,
And all lights and unseen things,
And all knowledge and all known things,
And all kingdoms and all affairs.

segments.arabic: وَبِلا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ تَقَدَّسْتَ وَتَعالَيْتَ عُلُوّاً كَبيراً.
segments.transliteration: wa bila ilaha illa anta taqaddasta wa ta`alayta `uluwwan kabiran.

translation.en: And due to that there is no god save You, You have been Holy and Elevated in high exaltation.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إنّي أسْألُكَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ طاهِرٌ مُطَهَّرٌ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inny as-aluka bikulli asmin huwa laka tahirun mutahharun,

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You by all names that are Yours; names that are pure and immaculate
And wholesome and blessed and holy;

segments.arabic: أنْزَلْتَهُ في كُتُبِكَ وَأجْرَيْتَهُ في الذِّكْرِ عِنْدَكَ،
segments.transliteration: anzaltahu fy kutubika wa ajraytahu fy aldhdhikri `indaka,

translation.en: Whether You revealed in Your Books, or You added to the Reminder that You keep,

segments.arabic: وَتَسَمَّيْتَ بِهِ لِمَنْ شِئْتَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa tasammayta bihi liman sh’ita min khalqika

translation.en: Or You used it with any of Your creatures that You willed

segments.arabic: أوْ سَألَكَ بِهِ أحَدٌ مِنْ مَلائِكَتِكَ وَأنْبِيائِكَ وَرُسُلِكَ بِخَيْرٍ تُعْطيهِ فَأعْطَيْتَهُ،
segments.transliteration: aw sa-alaka bihi ahadun min mala’ikatika wa anbiya’ika wa rusulika bikhayrin tu`tihi fa`taytahu,

translation.en: Or by which any of Your angels or Prophets and Messengers besought You for granting him a welfare, and You did,
Or for saving him from an evil, and You did,
And I thus should beseech You by that name.

segments.arabic: فأسْألُكَ يا رَبِّ أنْ تَنْصُرَني عَلى أعْدائي وَتَغْلِبَ ذِكْري عَلى نِسْياني،
segments.transliteration: fa as-aluka ya rabbi an tansurany `ala a`da’y wa taghliba dhikry `ala nisyani,

translation.en: Hence, I beseech You, O my Lord, to give me victory over my enemies and make my perception overcome my oblivion.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إجْعَلْ لِعَقْلي عَلى هَوايَ سُلْطاناً مُبيناً،
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al li`aqly `ala hawaya sultanan mubinan,

translation.en: O Allah: (please) give my intellect a manifest proof against my lusts,
And attach my choices to appositeness,
And decide piety to be my companion,
And arouse me to thank You for Your gifts,

segments.arabic: واهْدني اَللّهُمَّ بِهُداكَ إلى سَبيلِكَ المُقِيمِ وَصِراطِكَ المُسْتِقيمِ ،
segments.transliteration: wahdny allahumma bihudaka ila sabilika almuqimi wa siratika almustiqimi,

translation.en: And, O Allah; guide me through Your true guidance to Your straight course and Your right path.

segments.arabic: وَلا تَمْلِكْ زِمامي الشَّهَواتُ فَتَحْمِلُني عَلى طَريقِ الْمَخْذولينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa la tamlik zimamy alshshahawatu fatahmiluny `ala tariqi almakhdhulina,

translation.en: And do not make desires control over me and thus take me to the way of the disappointed ones,

segments.transliteration: wa hul bayny wa bayna almunkarati,

translation.en: And intervene between me and the forbidden things,
And decide for me advantageous knowledge,

segments.arabic: وَأغْرِسْ في قَلبي حُبَّ الْمَعْروفِ وَلا تَأخُذْني بَغْتَةً،
segments.transliteration: waghris fy qalby hubba alma`rufi wa la takhudhny baghtatan,

translation.en: And implant in my heart the love for the good; and do not overtake me all of a sudden,

segments.arabic: وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إنَّكَ أنْتَ التَّوّابُ الرَّحيمُ.
segments.transliteration: wa tub `al-ayya innaka anta alttawwabu alrrahimu.

translation.en: And accept my repentance; You are verily the Oft-returning to mercy, the Merciful.

segments.transliteration: wa `arrifny barakata hdha alshshahri wa yumnahu,

translation.en: And (please) acquaint me with the blessing and felicity of this month,
And confer upon me with its good and keep away from me its evil,
And protect me against what is peril in it,

segments.arabic: وَأعِنّي عَلى ما أُحِبُّهُ مِنَ القِيامِ بِحَقِّهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa `inny `ala ma auhibbuhu mina alqiyami bihaqqihi,

translation.en: And help me do that which I like from the carrying out if its duty,
And the recognition of its virtue,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْني فيهِ مِنَ الفائِزينَ يا أرْحَمَ الرّاحِمينَ.
segments.transliteration: wa ij`alny fihi mina alfa’izina ya arhama alrrahimina.

translation.en: And make me of the winners; O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إنّي أسْألُكَ بِاسْمِكَ المُتَعالِ الجَليلِ العَظيمِ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inny as-aluka bismika almuta`ali aljalili al`azimi,

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You by Your Name: the elevated, the lofty, and the great,
And by Your Name: the One, the Besought of all,
And by Your Name: the Almighty, the All-high;
And by all of Your Most Excellent Names.
O He before Whom all sounds submit,
And all necks yield,
And all heads humble themselves,
And all hearts fear,
And all things surrender,
And by Whom the heavens and the earth subsisted.
I bear witness that visions cannot comprehend You,
While You comprehend all visions,
And You are the Knower of subtleties, the All-aware.

segments.transliteration: ya rabba jibra’ila wa mika’ila wa israfila,

translation.en: O the Lord of (Archangels) Gabriel and Michael and Israfil

segments.arabic: وَجَميعِ الْمَلائِكَةِ المُقَرَّبينَ وَالكُروبِيّينَ وَالكِرامِ الكاتِبينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa jami`i almala’ikati almuqarrabina wal-kurubiyyina wal-kirami alkatibina,

translation.en: And all the favorite angles and the Cherubim and the noble, recording angles
And all the angels that praise You, declaring Your praiseworthiness,

segments.transliteration: wa rabba adama wa shithin wa idrisa,

translation.en: And the Lord of Adam and Shayth and Idris
And Noah and Hud and Salih
And Abraham and Ishmael
And Isaac and Lot
And Jacob and Joseph and the Tribes
And Job and Moses
And Aaron and Shu`ayb

segments.transliteration: wa dawuda wa sulaymana wa irmiya,

translation.en: And David and Solomon and Jeremiah
And Ezra and Ezekiel
And Joshua and Elias

segments.transliteration: wa ilyasa`a wa yunusa wa dhy alkifli,

translation.en: And Elisha and Jonah and Dhu’l-Kifl
And Zachariah and John
And Jesus and Georges
And Muhammad, peace of Allah be upon him and upon them all,
And peace be upon the favorite angels of Allah
And upon the recording, noble angels,
And upon all the angels who praise Him,
And thorough benediction be upon them.
You are our Lord; the Foremost of all, the Last of all,
The Evident, the Immanent,
It is You Who created the heavens and the layers of the earth
And You then established Yourself on the (Divine) Glorious Throne
By Your Most Excellent Names, You originate (creation) and then reproduce it,

segments.transliteration: wa tughshy allayla alnnahara yatlubuhu hathithan,

translation.en: And You cover the night with the day, which is in haste to follow it,
And the sun and the moon
And the stars and the orbit
And the ages and the creation;
All these are subservient by Your order.

segments.transliteration: tabarakta wa ta`alayta ya rabba al`alamina.

translation.en: Blessed and Exalted be You, O the Lord of the worlds.
There is no god save You;
The All-tender, the All-favorer,
The wonderful Maker of the heavens and the earth,
The Lord of majesty and honor.

segments.arabic: لَوْ كَانَ الْبَحْرُ مِدَاداً لِكَلِمَاتِ رَبِّي
segments.transliteration: law kana albahru midadan likalimati rabbiy

translation.en: Though the sea became ink for the Words of my Lord,

segments.arabic: لَنَفِدَ الْبَحْرُ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَنفَدَ كَلِمَاتُ رَبِّي
segments.transliteration: lanafida albahru qabla an tanfada kalimatu rabbi

translation.en: Verily, the sea would be used up before the words of my Lord were exhausted,
even though We brought the like thereof to help.
You know the weights of mountains,
And the measures of oceans,
And the number of pebbles,
And the numbers of the drops of rain,
And the number of the leaves of trees,
And the number of the stars in the skies,

segments.arabic: وَما أظْلَمَ عَلَيْهِ اللَيْلُ وَأشْرَقَ عَلَيْهِ النَّهارُ،
segments.transliteration: wa ma azlama `alayhi allaylu wa ashraqa `alayhi alnnaharu,

translation.en: As well as whatever is covered by darkness of night and whatever is under the daylight.

segments.arabic: لا يُواري مِنْكَ سَماءٌ سَماءً وَلا أرْضٌ أرْضاً،
segments.transliteration: la yuwary minka sama‘un sama‘an wa la ardun ardan,

translation.en: No sky can screen You from another sky and no layer can screen You from another layer,
Neither does any wavy ocean

segments.transliteration: wa la ma bayna saddi alrrutuqi,

translation.en: Or anything that lies between the blockage of mendings

segments.arabic: وَلا ما في القَرارِ مِنَ الهَباءِ الْمَبْثوثِ.
segments.transliteration: wa la ma fy alqarari mina alhaba‘i almabthuthi.

translation.en: Or anything of the spread motes that lie in the depths.
I beseech You by Your Name; the stored, the concealed,
The luminous light,
The true right,
Which is light made of light
And light on light,
And light over all lights,
And light with all lights,
And to Your Name does belong the entire light.
From You, O Lord, is the light,
And to You does the light return,

segments.arabic: وَبِنورِكَ الَّذي تُضيءُ بِهِ كُلُّ ظُلْمَةٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa binurika alladhy tudi‘u bihi kullu zulmatin,

translation.en: And by Your light are all darknesses lit,

segments.arabic: وَتَبْطُلُ بِهِ كَيْدُ كُلِّ شَيْطانٍ مَريدٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa tabtulu bihi kaydu kulli shaytanin maridin,

translation.en: And by Your Name is the trick of all rebellious devils made ineffective,
And by Your Name are all the obstinate tyrants humiliated,

segments.arabic: وَلا يَقومُ لَهُ شَيْءٌ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yaqumu lahu shay‘un min khalqika

translation.en: And nothing can stand with it against Your will,
And because of its grandeur, the lands and the oceans are split,

segments.transliteration: wa tastaqillu almala’ikatu hina yatakallamu bihi,

translation.en: And angels keep silent when there is speech about it,

segments.arabic: وَتَرْعَدُ مِنْ خَشْيَتِهِ حَمَلَةُ العَرْشِ العَظيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa tar`adu min khashyatihi hamalatu al`arshi al`azimi

translation.en: And due to fear of it, the angels bearing the Great Throne tremble in awe,
so do all those of lower states, down to those in the lowest layers of the earth.
Through it, oceans burst,
And rivers flow,
And springs split,
And stars move,
And clouds are accumulated and moved
And fog straighten up,
And sands heap,
And mountains settle down,
And the layers of the earth become stable,
And drops of rain descend,
And seeds grow up,
And creation have become of various kinds,
And winds blow

segments.transliteration: wa antasharat wa tanaffasat bihi al-arwahu.

translation.en: And souls spread and breathe.
O Allah: It is You to Whom Godhead is ascribed;
(I beseech You) by Your Name: the big, the All-big,
The great, the All-great,
Before which all faces humble themselves.
O the Lord of bounty and graces:

segments.arabic: لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنْتَ يا قَريبُ،
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta ya qaribu,

translation.en: There is no god save You, O the Nigh;
It is You Who prevails on all things;
I beseech You, O Allah, by all of Your Names,

segments.arabic: ما عَلِمْتُ مِنها وَما لَمْ أعْلَمْ،
segments.transliteration: ma `alimtu minha wa ma lam a`lam,

translation.en: Those which I know and those which I do not;
And by every Name that belongs to You;

segments.arabic: أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: (I beseech You) to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
And to rescue me from the plots of my enemies
And to make me attain my hope;
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin,

translation.en: O Allah: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
And have mercy upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa barik `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin,

translation.en: And bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: كَما صَلَّيْتَ وَرَحِمْتَ وَبارَكْتَ وَتَرَحَّمْتَ عَلى إبْراهيمَ وَآلِ إبْراهيمَ
segments.transliteration: kama sallayta wa rahimta wa barakta wa tarahhamta `ala ibrahima wa ali ibrahima

translation.en: As You sent blessings, mercy, benedictions, and clemency upon (Prophet) Abraham and the household of Abraham.
Verily, You are verily worthy of all praise, full of all glory.
O Allah: (please) grant Muhammad the right of intercession and an honorable station
And an exalted position and preference over all Your creatutes,
And decide him to be the target of the Chosen Ones’ greetings,
And elevate his rank to the most exalted place,
And put his position within the position of the Favorite Ones.
O Allah: (please) send blessings upon all of Your angels
And Prophets and Messengers
And people of obedience to You.
O Allah: (please) forgive the believing men and women
And the Muslim men and women,
The alive and the dead,

segments.arabic: وَألِّفْ بَيْنَ قُلوبِنا وَقُلوبِهِمْ عَلى الخَيْراتِ،
segments.transliteration: wa allif bayna qulubina wa qulubihim `ala alkhayrati,

translation.en: And (please) put affection between our and their hearts on good things.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إجْزِ مُحَمَّداً صَلّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ijzi muhammadan salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi

translation.en: O Allah: (please) award Muhammad—peace of Allah be upon him and his Household—

segments.arabic: أفْضَلَ ما جَزَيْتَ نَبِيّاً عَنْ أُمَّتِهِ،

translation.en: With the best award that You have ever given to a Prophet on behalf of his people,
An award that befits his having recited Your verses,
And conveyed that with which You sent him,
And wished well for his nation,
And worshipped You until death came upon him.

segments.arabic: صَلّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلى آلِهِ الطَّيِّبينَ.

translation.en: Allah’s blessings be upon him and upon his Immaculate Household.
“Blessed be Allah, the Lord of the Worlds!”
“Blessed be Allah, the Best of creators!”

segments.arabic: (تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي نَزَّلَ الْفُرْقَانَ عَلَى عَبْدِهِ لِيَكُونَ لِلْعَالَمِينَ نَذِيراً.
segments.transliteration: tabaraka alladhiy nazzala alfurqana `ala `abdihi liyakuwna lil`alamina nadhiran

translation.en: “Blessed is He Who hath revealed unto His slave the Criterion (of right and wrong), that he may be a warner to the peoples.
He unto Whom belongs the Sovereignty of the heavens and the earth,
He has chosen no son

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي الْمُلْكِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu sharikun fiy almulki

translation.en: Nor has He any partner in the Sovereignty.

segments.transliteration: wa khalaqa kulla shay‘in faqaddarahu taqdiran

translation.en: He has created everything and has meted out for it a measure.”

segments.arabic: (تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي إِنْ شَاءَ جَعَلَ لَكَ خَيْراً مِنْ ذَلِكَ
segments.transliteration: tabaraka alladhiy ‘in sha‘a ja`ala laka khayran min dhalika

translation.en: “Blessed is He Who, if He will, will assign You better than all that;
Gardens underneath which rivers flow,
and will assign You mansions.”

segments.arabic: (وَتَبَارَكَ الَّذِي لَهُ مُلْكُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا
segments.transliteration: wa tabaraka alladhiy lahu mulku alssamawati wal-ardi wa ma baynahuma

translation.en: “And blessed be He unto Whom belongs the Sovereignty of the heavens and the earth and all that is between them,
and with Whom is knowledge of the Hour,
and to Whom you will be returned.”

segments.transliteration: tabaraka asmu rabbika dhiy aljalali wal-’ikrami

translation.en: “Blessed be the name of your Lord, Mighty and glorious.”

segments.arabic: (تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي بِيَدِهِ الْمُلْكُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: tabaraka alladhiy biyadihi almulku wa huwa `alai kulli shay‘in qadirun

translation.en: “Blessed is He in Whose hand is the Sovereignty, and, He is Able to do all things;

segments.arabic: الَّذِي خَلَقَ الْمَوْتَ وَالْحَيَاةَ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلاً
segments.transliteration: alladhiy khalaqa almawta wal-haya ta liyabluwakum ayyukum ahsanu `amalan

translation.en: Who has created life and death that He may try you which of you is best in conduct;
and He is the Mighty, the Forgiving.”

segments.transliteration: tabaraka alladhiy ja`ala fiy alssama‘i burujan

translation.en: “Blessed be He Who has placed in the heaven mansions of the stars,

segments.transliteration: wa ja`ala fiha sirajan wa qamaran muniran

translation.en: and has placed therein a great lamp and a moon giving light.”

text.en: You may then add the following:

segments.arabic: أعوذُ بِكَلِماتِ اللهِ التّامّاتِ كُلِّها الَّتي لا يُجاوِزُهُنَّ بِرٌّ وَلا فاجِرٌ،
segments.transliteration: a`udhu bikalimati allhi alttammati kulliha allaty la yujawizuhunna birrun wa lafajirun,

translation.en: I seek the protection of all of the Perfect Words of Allah that neither an upright one nor can a licentious one exceed them,
Against the evil of Iblis and his troops,

segments.transliteration: wa min sharri kulli shaytanin wa sultanin,

translation.en: And against the evil of all devils and rulers
And sorcerers and magicians
And against the evil of all evil ones.

segments.transliteration: allahumma inny astawdi`uka nafsy wa dini

translation.en: O Allah: I keep as trust with You my self and my religion
And my hearing and my sight
And my body and all my organs

segments.transliteration: wa hly wa maly wa awladi

translation.en: And my family members and my property and my children
And all those for whose affairs I am responsible
And the seal of my deeds

segments.transliteration: wa sa’ira ma mallaktany wa khawwaltany wa razaqtani

translation.en: And all that which You have given me in possession and authorized me to dispose and provided me
And conferred upon me
And all the believing men and women.
O the best of trustees;
O the best of keepers;
O the most Merciful of all those showing mercy.
O Allah: I beseech You by Your Name:
Allah, Allah, Allah, Allah, Allah,

segments.arabic: الَّذي لا إلَهَ إلاّ هُوَ رَبُّ العَرْشِ العَظيمِ،
segments.transliteration: alladhy la ilaha illa huwa rabbu al`arshi al`azimi,

translation.en: There is no god save You, the Lord of the Great Throne;

segments.arabic: أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: (I beseech You) to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
And to relieve me;

segments.arabic: يا رَبَّ السَّماواتِ وَالأرَضينَ وَمَنْ فيهِنَّ،
segments.transliteration: ya rabba alssamawati wal-aradina wa man fihinna,

translation.en: O the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whoever is therein;
O He Who causes oceans to flow
And provides provisions to whatever is therein

segments.transliteration: wa fatira alssamawati wal-aradina wa atbaqiha

translation.en: O the Originator of the heavens and the earth and their layers,
