translation.en: I seek forgiveness of Allah who is “There is no God save  He”, the Beneficent, the Merciful; the Ever living, the Eternal, and I turn repentant to Him

text.en:
According to narrations, the best words that are advisably said in
Sha’ban are the implorations for the forgiveness of Almighty Allah
(i.e. istighfar). Hence, to implore for Almighty Allah’s forgiveness
seventy times a day in Sha’ban is equal to imploring for His
forgiveness seventy thousand times a day in the other months.

Third: It is recommended to give alms in this month even if it is as
small as a half date. Almsgiving in this month brings about rescue
from Hellfire.

In this respect, it has been narrated that when Imam al-
Sadiq(a.s.) was asked about the merits of observing fasting in Rajab,
he answered, “Why do you not ask about the merits of observing
fasting in Sha’ban?”

“What is then the reward of one who observes
fasting on one day in Sha’ban?” asked the narrator. The Imam (a.s.)
answered, “The reward will be Paradise. I swear it by Allah.” The
narrator then asked again, “What are the best deeds that should be
done in Sha’ban.”

The Imam (a.s.) answered, “Almsgiving and
imploring for forgiveness are the best deeds in Sha’ban. Verily, if
anyone of you gives alms in Sha’ban, Almighty Allah will breed that
alms in the very same way as you breed your small camels. Hence,
this alms will be as huge as Mount Uhud on the Resurrection Day.”

Fourth: It is recommended to repeat the following litany one
thousand times in Sha’ban:

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ  وَلاَ نَعْبُدُ إِلاَّ إِيَّاهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ٱلْمُشْرِكُون
segments.transliteration: laa ilaaha illallaahu  wa laa naa’-budu illaa iyyaahu mukhlis’eena lahud deen wa law karihal mushrikoon

translation.en: There is no god save Allah. We do not worship save “He” alone, making religion pure for Him (only), however much the disbelievers be averse.

text.en:
This devout rite brings about a great reward. The reward of one
who repeats this litany in Sha’ban is that one is awarded the reward of
serving (Almighty Allah) for one thousand years.

Fifth: It is recommended to offer a two unit prayer each Thursday
in Sha’ban. In each unit, it is recommended to recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 once and repeat Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 one hundred times. After
accomplishment, one should invoke God’s blessings upon the Holy
Prophet and his Household one hundred times. This rite achieves the
granting of all worldly and religious needs.

It is also recommended to
observe fasting on Thursdays in Sha’ban. In this respect, a Hadith
reads that the skies decorate themselves each Thursday in Sha’ban and
the angels pray Almighty Allah, saying, “O our God, (please do)
forgive those who observe fasting on this day and respond to their
prayers.”

The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) is also reported as saying, “If one
observes fasting each Monday and Thursday in Sha’ban, Almighty
Allah will grant forty of his needs - twenty appertained to the worldly
life and twenty to the Hereafter.”

Sixth: It is recommended to repeat very much the invocation of
blessings upon the Holy Prophet and his Household.

The famous supplication of Salawat Sha’baniyyah is one of the most beautiful and valuable prayers which has been gifted to us by the mercy of the Almighty Allah (SWT) taught by Imam Zainul Abideen (peace be upon him), in Authentic sources. He used to recite this Salawat every day in Sha`ban at the time sun passes the merdian (waqt-e-Zawal) and on the night of 15th Sha`ban.
The main theme of this supplication revolves around the virtues of Ahlul Bayt (peace be upon them) as this is the month which Allah (SWT) dedicated to the Holy Prophet (peace and blessings be upon him and his family).

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad;
the tree of Prophethood,
the trustees of the (Divine) Mission,
the frequently visited by the angels,
the core of knowledge,
and the Household of the Divine Revelation.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
the sailing ships through the abysmal waves.
He who embarks on will be saved
but he who abandons will be drowned.
He who precedes them will miss the Right Path
and he who misses them will lose,
but he who adheres to them will win.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
the impregnable shelter,
the succorers of the helpless, distressed ones,
the haven of the fugitives,
and the asylum of those who seek refuge.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
so many blessings that please them

segments.arabic: وَلِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ أَدَاءً وَقَضَاءً
segments.transliteration: wa lihaqqi muhammadin wa ali muhammadin ada'an wa qada'an

translation.en: and settle all (our) duties towards Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: بِحَوْلٍ مِنْكَ وَقُوَّةٍ يَا رَبَّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: bihawlin minka wa quwwatin ya rabba al`alamina

translation.en: by Your might and power, O Lord of the worlds!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
the pure, pious, and righteous
whose rights have been made incumbent upon us by You
and the obedience to whom and whose (divinely ordained) leadership have been (also) deemed obligatory upon us by You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
fill my heart with obedience to You,
do not disgrace me due to my acts of disobedience to You,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي مُوَاسَاةَ مَنْ قَتَّرْتَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni muwasata man qattarta `alayhi min rizqika

translation.en: and grant me the feeling of sympathy towards those whom You have decided to straiten their sustenance
by means of Your favors that You have decided to make expansive for me
and by means of that with which You have covered me out of Your fairness.
Make me live under Your shade.

segments.transliteration: wa hadha shahru nabiyyika sayyidi rusulika

translation.en: This is the month of Your Prophet and the Master of Your Messengers.

segments.arabic: شَعْبَانُ ٱلَّذِي حَفَفْتَهُ مِنْكَ بِٱلرَّحْمَةِ وَٱلرِّضْوَانِ
segments.transliteration: sha`banu alladhi hafaftahu minka bilrrahmati walrridwani

translation.en: It is Sha`ban, which You have encompassed with Your mercy and pleasure

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي كَانَ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ
segments.transliteration: alladhi kana rasulu allahi salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi wa sallama

translation.en: and on which the Messenger of Allah, peace and blessings be upon him and his Household,
used to observe fasting painstakingly and used to spend it with acts of worship
on all of its days and nights

segments.transliteration: bukhu`an laka fi ikramihi wa i`zamihi

translation.en: on account of Your honoring and dignifying this month,
up to his death.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَأَعِنَّا عَلَىٰ ٱلإِسْتِنَانِ بِسُنَّتِهِ فِيهِ

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) help us follow the example of him (i.e. the Holy Prophet as regards the honoring of this month)
and help us attain his intercession for us.
O Allah, (please do) decide him as my interceder (before You) whose intercession for me is acceptable
and as my clear path toward You,
and make me follow him

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ أَلْقَاكَ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ عَنِّي رَاضِياً

translation.en: until I meet You on the Resurrection Day in such a state that You are pleased with me
having overlooked my sins

segments.arabic: قَدْ أَوْجَبْتَ لِي مِنْكَ ٱلرَّحْمَةَ وَٱلرِّضْوَانَ
segments.transliteration: qad awjabta li minka alrrahmata walrridwana

translation.en: and confer upon me with Your mercy and good pleasure

segments.transliteration: wa anzaltani dara alqarari wa mahalla al-akhyari

translation.en: settleing me in the Eternal Abode and the Place of the Righteous.

text.en:
This confidential prayer (Munajat), ascribed to the Holy Imams
(a.s.), is highly significant since it comprises excellent meanings. It is
advisable to say it with presence of heart all the time.

It is recommended to say the following whispered prayer (munajat) that has been narrated by Ibn Khalawayh who commented on it, saying, “This is the confidential prayer of Imam `Ali Amir al-Mu'minin and the Holy Imams (peace be upon them) who used to recite it in the month of Shaban.” It is advisable to recite it with presence of heart all the time.
The late Mirza Agha Maliki Tabrizi, one of the teachers of Imam Khomeini, especially in the fields of ethics and spirituality, says that Munajat Sha‘baniyyah contains a wealth of knowledge and the etiquettes and manners of beseeching Allah, and how one can pray and ask for forgiveness from Him.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
You listen to my prayer whenever I pray,
listen to my call whenever I call upon you,
and accept from me whenever I confidentially whisper to You,
for here I am fleeing in to You,

segments.transliteration: wa waqaftu bayna yadayka mustakinan laka

translation.en: standing before You, showing submission to You,
imploring You,
and hoping for the reward that You have.
You know what is in my inner self,
recognize my needs,
recognize my hidden affairs,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَخْفَىٰ عَلَيْكَ امْرُ مُنْقَلَبِي وَمَثْوَايَ
segments.transliteration: wa layakhfa`alayka amru munqalabi wa mathwaya

translation.en: and all my moves and stillness are known by You.

segments.transliteration: wa mauridu an ubdi'a bihi min mantiqi

translation.en: So are all the utterances which I want to begin with,
all the requests that I want to express,
and all the expectation that I hope for my future.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ جَرَتْ مَقَادِيرُكَ عَلَيَّ يَا سَيِّدِي

translation.en: All that which You, O my Master, have decided for me

segments.arabic: فِيمَا يَكُونُ مِنِّي إِلَىٰ آخِرِ عُمْرِي

translation.en: up to the end of my life,
including my secret and open matters, shall be experienced by me.

segments.arabic: وَبِيَدِكَ لاَ بِيَدِ غَيْرِكَ زِيَادَتِي وَنَقْصِي
segments.transliteration: wa biyadika labiyadi ghayrika ziyadati wa naqsi

translation.en: And it is in Your hand, not anybody else’s, that are all increase and decrease,
and all my benefits and harms that come upon me.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ حَرَمْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَرْزُقُنِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi in haramtani faman dha alladhi yarzuquni

translation.en: O my God, if You deprive me (of Your sustenance), then who else can ever provide me with sustenance?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ خَذَلْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَنْصُرُنِي
segments.transliteration: wa in khadhaltani faman dha alladhi yansuruni

translation.en: If You disappoint me, then who else can ever back me?

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي اعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَضَبِكَ وَحُلُولِ سَخَطِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi a`udhu bika min ghadabika wa hululi sakhatika

translation.en: O my God, I do seek Your protection against Your wrath and against the befalling of Your ire upon me.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كُنْتُ غَيْرَ مُسْتَاهِلٍ لِرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in kuntu ghayra musta'hilin lirahmatika

translation.en: O my God, if I do not deserve Your mercy,

segments.arabic: فَانْتَ اهْلٌ انْ تَجُودَ عَلَيَّ بِفَضْلِ سَعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa-anta ahlun an tajuda `alayya bifadli sa`atika

translation.en: You are still expected to confer upon me with Your expansive favor.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَانِّي بِنَفْسِي وَاقِفَةٌ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi ka-anni binafsi waqifatun bayna yadayka

translation.en: O my God, I now imagine how I will stand before You,
shaded by my good idea about You on account of my trust in You,

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتَ مَا انْتَ اهْلُهُ وَتَغَمَّدْتَنِي بِعَفْوِكَ
segments.transliteration: faqulta maanta ahluhu wa taghammadtani bi`afwika

translation.en: and You will decide for me that which befit You and You will include me with Your forgiveness.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ عَفَوْتَ فَمَنْ اوْلَىٰ مِنْكَ بِذٰلِكَ

translation.en: O my God, if you pardon me, then who else is worthier than You are in pardoning.

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ كَانَ قَدْ دَنَا اجَلِي وَلَمْ يُدْنِنِي مِنْكَ عَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa in kana qad danaajali wa lam yudnini minka `amali

translation.en: If my time of death is approaching while my deeds are still too short to approach me to You,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ جَعَلْتُ ٱلإِقْرَارَ بِٱلذَّنْبِ إِلَيْكَ وَسِيلَتِي
segments.transliteration: faqad ja`altu al-iqrara bildhdhanbi ilayka wasilati

translation.en: I am then considering my confession of being guilty to be my means towards You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي قَدْ جُرْتُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي فِي ٱلنَّظَرِ لَهَا
segments.transliteration: ilahi qad jurtu `alanafsi fi alnnazari laha

translation.en: O my God, I have wronged myself when I allowed myself to behave unrestrainedly;

segments.arabic: فَلَهَا ٱلْوَيْلُ إِنْ لَمْ تَغْفِرْ لَهَا

translation.en: therefore, woe will betide me if You do not forgive.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لَمْ يَزَلْ بِرُّكَ عَلَيَّ ايَّامَ حَيَاتِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi lam yazal birruka `alayya ayyama hayati

translation.en: O my God, You have never ceased Your favors from me all my lifetime;

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَقْطَعْ بِرَّكَ عَنِّي فِي مَمَاتِي

translation.en: so, (please) do not stop Your favors from covering me after my death.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَيفَ آيَسُ مِنْ حُسْنِ نَظَرِكَ لِي بَعْدَ مَمَاتِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi kayfa ayasu min husni nazarika li ba`da mamati

translation.en: O my God, how can I despair of Your nice custody over me after my death

segments.arabic: وَانْتَ لَمْ تُوَلِّنِي إِلاَّ ٱلْجَمِيلَ فِي حَيَاتِي
segments.transliteration: wa anta lam tuwallini illaaljamila fi hayati

translation.en: while You have not shown me but the good throughout my lifetime?

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي تَوَلَّ مِنْ امْرِي مَا انْتَ اهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: ilahi tawalla min amri maanta ahluhu

translation.en: O my God, (please) manage my affairs in the very way that befits You,

segments.arabic: وَعُدْ عَلَيَّ بِفَضْلِكَ عَلَىٰ مُذْنِبٍ قَدْ غَمَرَهُ جَهْلُهُ

translation.en: and confer upon me—a sinful person who is covered by his ignorance—with Your favors.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي قَدْ سَتَرْتَ عَلَيَّ ذُنُوباً فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: ilahi qad satarta `alayya dhunuban fi alddunya

translation.en: O my God, You have concealed my sins in my worldly life,

segments.arabic: وَانَا احْوَجُ إِلَىٰ سَتْرِهَا عَلَيَّ مِنْكَ فِي ٱلاخْرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa anaahwaju ilasatriha`alayya minka fi al-ukhra

translation.en: but I need Your concealment more urgently in the Next Life.

segments.arabic: إِذْ لَمْ تُظْهِرْهَا لاحَدٍ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ

translation.en: You have thus not disclosed my sins before any of Your righteous servants;

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَفْضَحْنِي يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ عَلَىٰ رُؤُوسِ ٱلاشْهَادِ

translation.en: therefore, (please) do not expose me on the Resurrection Day before all the witnesses.
O my God, it is Your magnanimity that expanded my hope,
and surely Your pardon is more preferable than my deeds.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي فَسُرَّنِي بِلِقَائِكَ يَوْمَ تَقْضِي فِيهِ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi fasurrani biliqa'ika yawma taqdi fihi bayna `ibadika

translation.en: O my God, so (please) delight me when I meet You on the day when You shall judge between Your servants.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي ٱعْتِذَارِي إِلَيْكَ ٱعْتِذَارُ مَنْ لَمْ يَسْتَغْنِ عَنْ قَبُولِ عُذْرِهِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi i`tidhari ilayka i`tidharu man lam yastaghni `an qabuli `udhrihi

translation.en: O my God, I submit to You the apology of one who cannot dispense with the acceptance of his excuse;

segments.arabic: فَٱقْبَلْ عُذْرِي يَا اكْرَمَ مَنِ ٱعْتَذَرَ إِلَيْهِ ٱلْمُسِيئُونَ
segments.transliteration: faqbal `udhri yaakrama man i`tadhara ilayhi almusi'una

translation.en: so, (please) accept my excuse, O most Magnanimous of all those before whom the guilty make an apology.
O my God, (please) do not reject my request,
do not fail my big hope for You,

segments.transliteration: wa lataqta` minka raja'i wa amali

translation.en: and do not disappoint my desire and expectation for You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لَوْ ارَدْتَ هَوَانِي لَمْ تَهْدِنِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi law aradta hawani lam tahdini

translation.en: O my God, had You wanted to humiliate me, You would not have guided me (to You).

segments.transliteration: wa law aradta fadihati lam tu`afini

translation.en: Had You decided to disclose me, You would not have saved me.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي مَا اظُنُّكَ تَرُدُّنِي فِي حَاجَةٍ قَدْ افْنَيْتُ عُمْرِي فِي طَلَبِهَا مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi maazunnuka tarudduni fi hajatin qad afnaytu `umri fi talabihaminka

translation.en: O my God, I do not expect You to reject my request that I spent my whole lifetime asking for it from You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي فَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ ابَداً ابَداً دَائِماً سَرْمَداً
segments.transliteration: ilahi falaka alhamdu abadan abadan da'iman sarmadan

translation.en: O my God, all praise be to You, forever, forever, perpetually, everlastingly,

segments.arabic: يَزِيدُ وَلاَ يَبِيدُ كَمَا تُحِبُّ وَتَرْضَىٰ
segments.transliteration: yazidu wa layabidu kamatuhibbu wa tarda

translation.en: increasingly, and imperishably, as exactly as You like and please.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ اخَذْتَنِي بِجُرْمِي اخَذْتُكَ بِعَفْوِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in akhadhtani bijurmi akhadhtuka bi`afwika

translation.en: O my God, if You punish me for my offense, I shall demand with Your pardon,

segments.transliteration: wa in akhadhtani bidhunubi akhadhtuka bimaghfiratika

translation.en: if You punish me for my sins, I shall demand with Your forgiveness,

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ ادْخَلْتَنِي ٱلنَّارَ اعْلَمْتُ اهْلَهَا انِّياحِبُّكَ
segments.transliteration: wa in adkhaltani alnnara a`lamtu ahlahaanni uhibbuka

translation.en: and if You decide to send me to Hell, I shall declare to its inhabitants that I love You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كَانَ صَغُرَ فِي جَنْبِ طَاعَتِكَ عَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi in kana saghura fi janbi ta`atika `amali

translation.en: O my God, if my deed is too little when compared to the true obedience to You,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ كَبُرَ فِي جَنْبِ رَجَائِكَ امَلِي
segments.transliteration: faqad kabura fi janbi raja'ika amali

translation.en: then my hope for You is too big when compared to my prospect from You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَيْفَ انْقَلِبُ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ بِٱلْخَيْبَةِ مَحْرُوماً
segments.transliteration: ilahi kayfa anqalibu min `indika bilkhaybati mahruman

translation.en: O my God, how can it be that I return from You with disappointment and deprivation

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ كَانَ حُسْنُ ظَنِّي بِجُودِكَ انْ تَقْلِبَنِي بِٱلنَّجَاةِ مَرْحُوماً
segments.transliteration: wa qad kana husnu zanni bijudika an taqlibani bilnnajati marhuman

translation.en: while I expect, depending upon Your magnanimity, that You will endow me with safety and mercy?

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَقَدْ افْنَيْتُ عُمْرِي فِي شِرَّةِ ٱلسَّهْوِ عَنْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa qad afnaytu `umri fi shirrati alssahwi `anka

translation.en: O my God, I have spent my whole lifetime with the vigor of being negligent to You

segments.arabic: وَابْلَيْتُ شَبَابِي فِي سَكْرَةِ ٱلتَّبَاعُدِ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ablaytu shababi fi sakrati alttaba`udi minka

translation.en: and I have spent my whole youth with the inebriety of being far away from You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي فَلَمْ اسْتَيْقِظْ ايَّامَ ٱغْتِرَارِي بِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi falam astayqiz ayyama ightirari bika

translation.en: O my God, I have not thus woken up to myself during the period when I seductively felt safe from Your punishment
and when I was taking the path that ends with Your ire.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَانَا عَبْدُكَ وَٱبْنُ عَبْدِكَ قَائِمٌ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa ana`abduka wabnu `abdika qa'imun bayna yadayka

translation.en: O my God, nevertheless, I am—Your servant and the son of Your servant—now standing before You
and begging You in the name of Your generosity.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي انَا عَبْدٌ اتَنَصَّلُ إِلَيْكَ مِمَّا كُنْتُاوَاجِهُكَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi ana`abdun atanassalu ilayka mimmakuntu uwajihuka bihi

translation.en: O my God, I am, being Your servant, disowning all that with which I used to face You;
namely, my shameless inconsideration of You,

segments.arabic: وَاطْلُبُ ٱلْعَفْوَ مِنْكَ إِذ ِٱلْعَفْوُ نَعْتٌ لِكَرَمِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa atlubu al`afwa minka idh al`afwu na`tun likaramika

translation.en: and I am hereby appealing for Your pardon since pardon is one feature of Your generosity.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لَمْ يَكُنْ لِي حَوْلٌ فَانْتَقِلَ بِهِ عَنْ مَعْصِيَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi lam yakun li hawlun fa-antaqila bihi `an ma`siyatika

translation.en: O my God, I had no strength by which I would rid myself of the acts of disobedience to You
except after You aroused me to love You.
Hence, I have become as exactly as You want me to be.
I have thus thanked You, for You have included me with Your generosity

segments.arabic: وَلِتَطْهِيرِ قَلْبِي مِنْ اوْسَاخِ ٱلْغَفْلَةِ عَنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa litathiri qalbi min awsakhi alghaflati `anka

translation.en: and You have purified my heart from the filths of being inattentive to You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي ٱنْظُرْ إِلَيَّ نَظَرَ مَنْ نَادَيْتَهُ فَاجَابَكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi unzur ilayya nazara man nadaytahu fa-ajabaka

translation.en: O my God, (please) look at me in the same way as You have looked at one whom You called and he has responded to You
and whom You have conferred with Your aid and he thus has obeyed You.

segments.arabic: يَا قَرِيباً لاَ يَبْعُدُ عَنِ ٱلْمُغْتَرِّ بِهِ

translation.en: O He Who is too close to depart from one who is inadvertent to Him!

segments.arabic: وَيَا جَوَاداً لاَ يَبْخَلُ عَمَّنْ رَجَا ثَوَابَهُ

translation.en: O He Who is too magnanimous to deprive one who hopes for His reward!

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي هَبْ لِي قَلْباً يُدْنِيهِ مِنْكَ شَوْقُهُ
segments.transliteration: ilahi hab li qalban yudnihi minka shawquhu

translation.en: O my God, (please) grant me a heart whose longing for You will approach it to You,
a tongue whose truthfulness is directed to You,
and a sight whose righteousness advances towards You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنَّ مَنْ تَعَرَّفَ بِكَ غَيْرُ مَجْهُولٍ
segments.transliteration: ilahi inna man ta`arrafa bika ghayru majhulin

translation.en: O my God, he who recognizes You shall never be anonymous,

segments.transliteration: wa man ladha bika ghayru makhdhulin

translation.en: he who seeks Your shelter shall never be disappointed,
and he whom is attended by You shall never be boring.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنَّ مَنِ ٱنْتَهَجَ بِكَ لَمُسْتَنِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: ilahi inna man intahaja bika lamustanirun

translation.en: O my God, he who abides by Your Path shall be enlightened,

segments.transliteration: wa inna man i`tasama bika lamustajirun

translation.en: and he who resorts to You shall be succored.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ لُذْتُ بِكَ يَا إِلٰهِي فَلاَ تُخَيِّبْ ظَنِّي مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa qad ludhtu bika yailahi falatukhayyib zanni min rahmatika

translation.en: I am thus having recourse to You, O my God! So, (please) do not disappoint me as regards Your having mercy upon me
and do not divest me of Your kindness.
O my God, grant me, among those who show servitude to You,

segments.arabic: مُقَامَ مَنْ رَجَا ٱلزِّيَادَةَ مِنْ مَحَبَّتِكَ

translation.en: the position of one who (incessantly) longs for more love for You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَالْهِمْنِي وَلَهاً بِذِكْرِكَ إِلَىٰ ذِكْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa alhimni walahan bidhikrika iladhikrika

translation.en: O my God, (please) inspire me with passionate love for ceaseless reference to You,

segments.arabic: وَهِمَّتِي فِي رَوْحِ نَجَاحِ اسْمَائِكَ وَمَحَلِّ قُدْسِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa himmati fi rawhi najahi asma'ika wa mahalli qudsika

translation.en: and (please) devote all my pursuit to my attaining the delight of the success that is achieved through Your names and the amount of Your Holiness.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي بِكَ عَلَيْكَ إِلاَّ الْحَقْتَنِي بِمَحَلِّ اهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi bika `alayka illaalhaqtani bimahalli ahli ta`atika

translation.en: O my God, I beseech You in Your name to put me in the position of those who are obedient to You
and in an honorable standing of Your pleasure,
for I, verily, have no power to rescue
or to benefit myself.
O my God, I am Your servant—the feeble and sinful—
and Your slave—the penitent.

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ صَرَفْتَ عَنْهُ وَجْهَكَ

translation.en: So, (please) do not include me with those against whom You have turned Your face
or those whom are deprived of Your pardon because of their inattentiveness to You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي هَبْ لي كَمَالَ ٱلاِنْقِطَاعِ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi hab li kamala alinqita`i ilayka

translation.en: O my God, (please) grant me absolute devotion to You

segments.arabic: وَانِرْ ابْصَارَ قُلُوبِنَا بِضِيَاءِ نَظَرِهَا إِلَيْكَ

translation.en: and illuminate the sights of our hearts with the light of observing of You

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تَخْرِقَ ابْصَارُ ٱلْقُلُوبِ حُجُبَ ٱلنُّورِ

translation.en: so that the sights of the hearts will penetrate the Screens of Light
and arrive at the Core of Magnificence,
and that our souls hang to the majesty of Your Holiness.
O my God, (please) make me of those who responded to You when You called them,
those who were shocked for Your Majesty when You observed them
and You have thus taken into their confidence and they acted for You openly.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لَمْاسَلِّطْ عَلَىٰ حُسْنِ ظَنِّي قُنُوطَ ٱلايَاسِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi lam usallit `alahusni zanni qunuta al-ayasi

translation.en: O my God, I have shaded neither despair nor gloom over my good idea about You

segments.arabic: وَلاَ ٱنْقَطَعَ رَجَائِي مِنْ جَمِيلِ كَرَمِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lainqata`a raja'i min jamili karamika

translation.en: and I have never lost hope in Your excellent magnanimity.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كَانَتِ ٱلْخَطَايَا قَدْ اسْقَطَتْنِي لَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in kanat alkhatayaqad asqatatni ladayka

translation.en: O my God, if my sins have overthrown me in Your sight,
then please pardon me for my excellent trust in You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ حَطَّتْنِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبُ مِنْ مَكَارِمِ لُطْفِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in hattatni aldhdhunubu min makarimi lutfika

translation.en: O my God, if my wrongdoings have caused me to lose Your honorable kindness,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ نَبَّهَنِي ٱلْيَقِينُ إِلَىٰ كَرَمِ عَطْفِكَ

translation.en: then my belief in You has called my attention to the generosity of Your sympathy.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ انَامَتْنِيَ ٱلْغَفْلَةُ عَنِ ٱلإِسْتِعْدَادِ لِلِقَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in anamatni alghaflatu `an alisti`dadi liliqa'ika

translation.en: O my God, if my inadvertence has screened me against readying myself for meeting You,
then my recognition of the generosity of Your bounties has awakened me.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ دَعَانِي إِلَىٰ ٱلنَّارِ عَظِيمُ عِقَابِكَ

translation.en: O my God, if Your grave chastisement has drawn me to Hellfire,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ دَعَانِي إِلَىٰ ٱلْجَنَّةِ جَزِيلُ ثَوَابِكَ

translation.en: then Your opulent reward has drawn me to Paradise.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي فَلَكَ اسْالُ وَإِلَيْكَ ابْتَهِلُ وَارْغَبُ
segments.transliteration: ilahi falaka as'alu wa ilayka abtahilu wa arghabu

translation.en: O my God, You alone do I pray and You alone do I implore and desire.

segments.arabic: وَاسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka an tusalliya `alamuhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa an taj`alani mimman yudimu dhikraka

translation.en: and to include me with those who always mention You,
who never breach their covenant to You,
who never fail to thank You,
and who never belittle Your affairs.
O my God, (please do) connect me with the most brilliant Light of Your Dignity
so that I will recognize You
and I will leave everybody else,
and that I will be fearful of and careful with You.
O Lord of Majesty and Honor!

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ رَسُولِهِ وَآلِهِ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa sallaallahu `alamuhammadin rasulihi wa alihi alttahirina

translation.en: May Allah send blessings to Muhammad, His Messenger, and upon his Household the Infallible,
and exalt them very much.

name: 3rd of shaban - Birth of Imam Hussain (as)

text.en: Shaykh al-Tusi says in Misbah al-Mutahajjid: Imam al-Husayn ibn `Ali (peace be upon him) was born on the third of Sha`ban. Abu’l-Qasim ibn `Ala’ al-Hamadani, the representative of Imam al-Hasan al-`Askari (peace be upon him), received a document telling that our master, Imam al-Husayn ibn `Ali (peace be upon him), was born on the third of Sha`ban; therefore, you should observe fast on this day and say the following:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اسْالُكَ بِحَقِّ ٱلْمَوْلُودِ فِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bihaqqi almawludi fi hadhaalyawmi

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of the one born on this day,

segments.transliteration: almaw`udi bishahadatihi qabla istihlalihi wa wiladatihi

translation.en: the promised with martyrdom before the beginning of his lifetime and before his birth,
the heavens and all their inhabitants wept for him;
and so did the earth and those living one it
before his feet stepped on it,
the mourned slain one,
the master of the Family (of Prophet hood),
the one who shall be backed with victory on the Day of Return,

segments.arabic: ٱلْمُعَوِّضِ مِنْ قَتْلِهِ انَّ ٱلائِمَّةَ مِنْ نَسْلِهِ
segments.transliteration: almu`awwidi min qatlihi anna al-a'immata min naslihi

translation.en: the one whom has been awarded the favor of the Imams’ being from his offspring as recompense of his being slain,
the one awarded the favor of the soil of his grave carrying cure,
the one awarded the favor that he will be triumphing when he will be returned
and the Prophet’s Successors from his offspring will be returned
after the advent of their Rising Imam and after his occultation
so that they shall take revenge,
retaliate,
please the Omnipotent Lord,
and be the best supporters.

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمْ مَعَ ٱخْتِلافِ ٱللَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ

translation.en: May Allah’s blessings be perpetually upon them whenever night and day succeed each other.
O Allah, I thus beg You in the name of them
and implore You with the imploration of a sinful one who confesses of his sin,
and who has done evil to himself
due to his violations—the past and the present.
He thus beseeches You for Your protection up to the place of his grave.
O Allah, (please) send blessings to Muhammad and his Offspring,
include us with his group (on the Resurrection Day),
and allow us to dwell in the House of Honor with him
and in the abode of residence.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَكَمَا اكْرَمْتَنَا بِمَعْرِفَتِهِ فَاكْرِمْنَا بِزُلْفَتِهِ

translation.en: O Allah, as You have conferred upon us with the honor of our recognition of him, so (please) confer upon us with the honor of being near to him,
bestow upon us with the bliss of accompanying him and enjoying a close rank to him,
and include us with those who submit to him totally
and those who invoke Your blessings upon him whenever they mention him,
and upon all his Successors and Selected Ones,
whom are defined by You as twelve persons,
being the luminous stars,
and the Arguments against all humankind.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَهَبْ لَنَا فِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ خَيْرَ مَوْهِبَةٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa hab lanafi hadhaalyawmi khayra mawhibatin

translation.en: O Allah, and (please) grant us on this day the best of grants,
make all our prayers on this day responded,
just as You gifted al-Husayn to Muhammad, his grandfather,
just as the angel Futrus sought refuge with his (i.e. al-Husayn) cradle,
we are thus seeking refuge with his tomb after him (i.e. his martyrdom),
as we are witnessing the soil of him and expecting his return.
Respond to us, O Lord of the worlds.

text.en:
DUA' AL HUSSAIN (PEACE BE UPON HIM)
After that, you may say Du`a' al-Husayn , which is the last prayer he said when his enemies surrounded him in large numbers on the Day of Ashura (the tenth of Muharram):
Ibn `Ayyash has reported al-Husayn ibn `Ali ibn Sufyan al-Bazufi as saying that he heard Imam Ja`far al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) saying this prayer on the third of Sha`ban, the birthday of Imam al-Husayn (peace be upon him).

translation.en: O Allah, You are verily the Elevated in position,
the Magnificent in omnipotence,
the Mighty in prowess,
the Self-Sufficient from the creatures,
the Ample in pride,
the Powerful over all that which You want,
the Close in mercy,
the Truthful in promise,
the Opulent in favors,
the Sympathetic in ordeals,
the Nigh when Your are prayed,
the All-encompassing of all that which You have created,
the Accepter of the repentance of him who repents to You,
the Powerful to do whatever You want,
the Taker in all that which You decide,
the Thankful for those who thank You,
and the Rememberer of those who mention You.
I pray You for I need You,
I desire for You for I am in want of You,
I resort to You for I am terrified,
I weep before You for I am distressed,
I seek Your aid for I am weak,
and I depend upon You for I trust in none save You.
(Please do) decide between our people and us with the truth,
for they have deceived us, cheated us,
disappointed us, betrayed us, and killed us.
We are the progeny of Your Prophet
and the sons of Your beloved one;
namely, Muhammad the son of `Abdullah,
whom You have chosen for the Divine Mission
and for keeping Your Revelation.

segments.arabic: فَٱجْعَلْ لَنَا مِنْ امْرِنَا فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً
segments.transliteration: faj`al lana min amrinafarajan wa makhrajan

translation.en: So, (please) prepare a way out and a relief for us,
out of Your mercy, O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

name: 4th of shaban - Birth of Hazrat Abbas (as)

text.en:
Birth : 4th Shaban 26 AH | Martyred in Kerbala 10th Muharran Ashura 61 AH
Father Imam Ali(as)the first Imam and successor of the Prophet(peace be upon him and his progeny),
Mother Lady Ummulbeneen
He was the half brother of Imam Hussain(as)
By his supreme sacrifice, Abbas became a universal soul that transcends time and space.To the Muslims, Abbas is known in different ways: as the lion of Ali, the hero of Karbala, the flag-bearer of Hussain, the beloved brother of Zainab, and the loving uncle of Sakina (peace be upon them all).Al-’Abbas was called Abu’l-Fadhl (father or owner of virtue). Some mentioned that he had a son called al-Fadhl.

The noble Shaykh Ja`far ibn Qawlawayh al-Qummi has reported through a chain of authority that Abu-Hamzah al-Thumali reported Imam al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) as saying: If you intend to visit the tomb of al-`Abbas ibn `Ali (peace be upon him) that lies on the bank of the River Euphrates opposite to al-Ha'ir, you should stop at the gate of the shed (precinct) and say these words:

segments.transliteration: salamu allahi wa salamu mala'ikatihi almuqarrabina

translation.en: Peace of Allah and peace of His favorite angels,
His commissioned prophets,
His righteous servants,
all the martyrs, and all the veracious (ones),

segments.transliteration: walzzakiyatu alttayyibatu fima taghtadi wa taruhu

translation.en: and also pure, true blessings that come and go,
be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful.
I testify to you of submission (to the will of God), honest acceptance as true,
loyalty, and sincerity

segments.arabic: لِخَلَفِ ٱلنَّبِيِّ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِ
segments.transliteration: likhalafi alnnabiyyi salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi almursali

translation.en: to the descendant of the commissioned Prophet, Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household,
the chosen grandson (of the Prophet),
the well knowledgeable guide (to the true religion),
the conveying successor,
and the wrongfully oppressed one.
So, Allah may reward you on behalf of His Messenger,
the Commander of the Faithful,
al-Hasan, and al-Husayn,
peace of Allah be upon them,
with the best reward
for your steadfastness, dedication (to the sake of God), and support (for the right party).
Very excellent be the reward of the eternal life.
Allah’s curse be on him who killed you.

segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu man jahila haqqaka

translation.en: Allah’s curse be on him who ignored your position
and belittled your sanctity.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ مَنْ حَالَ بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَ مَاءِ ٱلْفُرَاتِ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu man hala baynaka wa bayna ma'i alfurati

translation.en: Allah’s curse be on him who precluded you from having from the water of the Euphrates.
I testify that you were killed wrongfully

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ مُنْجِزٌ لَكُمْ مَا وَعَدَكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa anna allaha munjizun lakum ma wa`adakum

translation.en: and that Allah will verily fulfill His promise that He made with you.

segments.arabic: جِئْتُكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلُمْؤْمِنينَ وَافِداً إِلَيْكُمْ
segments.transliteration: ji'tuka yabna amiri almu'minina wafidan ilaykum

translation.en: O son of the Commander of the Faithful, I have come to you to present myself before you.

segments.transliteration: wa qalbi musallimun lakum wa tabi`un

translation.en: My heart is submissive to you and is following you.
And I am your follower.
I am ready to support you
until Allah decides.
He is surely the best of all those who decide.
I am verily with you,
not with your enemy.

segments.transliteration: inni bikum wa bi'iyabikum min almu'minina

translation.en: I am one of those who believe in you and believe in your Return.

segments.transliteration: wa biman khalafakum wa qatalakum min alkafirina

translation.en: I also one of those who deny your opposites and killers.

segments.arabic: قَتَلَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً قَتَلَتْكُمْ بِٱلأَيْدِي وَٱلأَلْسُنِ
segments.transliteration: qatala allahu ummatan qatalatkum bil-aidi wal-alsuni

translation.en: Allah may kill the group who killed you with hands and tongues (by giving orders of killing you.)

text.en: You should then enter, throw yourself on the tomb, and say the following words:

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O righteous servant (of Allah)

segments.transliteration: almuti`u lillahi wa lirasulihi wa li'amiri almu'minina

translation.en: and obedient to Allah, to His Messenger, to the Commander of the Faithful,

segments.arabic: وَٱلحَسَنِ وَٱلحُسَيْنِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمْ وَسَلَّمَ
segments.transliteration: walhasani walhusayni salla allahu `alayhim wa sallama

translation.en: to al-Hasan, and to al-Husayn, peace and greetings of Allah be upon them.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace, Allah’s mercy, blessings,

segments.transliteration: wa maghfiratuhu wa ridwanuhu wa `ala ruhika wa badanika

translation.en: forgiveness, and gratifications be upon you, your soul, and your body.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ وَأُشْهِدُ ٱللَّهَ أَنَّكَ مَضَيْتَ عَلَىٰ مَا مَضَىٰ بِهِ ٱلبَدْرِيُّونَ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu wa ushhidu allaha annaka madayta `ala ma mada bihi albadriyyuna

translation.en: I testify, and call Allah to witness, that you abided by the same course that was taken by the warriors of (the battle of) Badr
and the strivers for Allah’s sake
who sincerely served Him in the battlefields against His enemies,
did their bests for supporting His disciples,
and defended His intimate ones.
So, Allah may reward you the best,
the maximum,
the most abundant,

segments.arabic: وَأَوْفَىٰ جَزَاءِ أَحَدٍ مِمَّنْ وَفَىٰ بِبَيْعَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa awfa jaza'i ahadin mimman wa fa bibay`atihi

translation.en: and the most conclusive reward that He may give to any one who fulfills his homage,
answers the call (of the religion),
and obeys his (divinely elected) leaders.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ بَالَغْتَ فِي ٱلنَّصِيحَةِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka qad balaghta fi alnnasihati

translation.en: I testify that you acted extremely sincerely
and exerted all your efforts (in this regard).
Allah may attach you to the martyrs,

segments.transliteration: wa ja`ala ruhaka ma`a arwahi alssu`ada'i

translation.en: add your soul to the souls of the happy ones,

segments.transliteration: wa a`taka min jinanihi afsahaha manzilan

translation.en: give you the largest abode in His Paradise
and the most handsome room,
exalt your mention in `Illiyyin (the most elevated position),
and join you to the Prophets, the veracious ones,
the martyrs, and the righteous ones.
Very excellent is the companionship of such ones.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ لَمْ تَهِنْ وَلَمْ تَنْكُلْ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka lam tahin wa lam tankul

translation.en: I testify that you did not lag behind and did not turn away the face,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّكَ مَضَيْتَ عَلَىٰ بَصِيرَةٍ مِنْ أَمْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa annaka madayta `ala basiratin min amrika

translation.en: and that you left this life with full awareness of the truth,
following the examples of the righteous ones
and sticking to the Prophets.
So, Allah may gather us with you,
with His Messenger, and with His disciples
in the abodes of those who practiced humbly (with their Lord).
He is certainly the most merciful of all the merciful ones.

text.en:
According to the previously mentioned narration, the ziyarah of al-`Abbas ends here.
But Sayyid Ibn Tawus and Shaykh al-Mufid, as well as other scholars, have added the following: You may then turn to the side of the head and offer a two-unit prayer. Afterwards, you may offer prayers as many as you wish. You may also supplicate Almighty Allah earnestly. After these prayers, you may say the following supplicatory prayer:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَلا تَدَعْ لِي فِي هٰذَا ٱلمَكَانِ ٱلمُكَرَّمِ وَٱلمَشْهَدِ ٱلمُعَظَّمِ ذَنْباً إِلاَّ غَفَرْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa la tada` li fi hadha almakani almukarrami walmashhadi almu`azzami dhanban illa ghafartahu

translation.en: and do not leave for me, in this honored place and glorified shrine, any sin that I did but that You forgive it,
any care but that You relieve it,
any illness but that You cure it,
any defect buth that You cover up,
any source of sustenance but that You expand it,
any item of terror but that You pacify it,
any disunity but that You reunify it,

segments.transliteration: wa la gha'iban illa hafiztahu wa adnaytahu

translation.en: any absent one but that You guard it and approach (him to me),

segments.arabic: وَلا حَاجَةً مِنْ حَوَائِجِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hajatan min hawa'iji alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: and any single need, among the many needs for this life as well as the life to come

segments.arabic: لَكَ فِيهَا رِضَىٰ وَلِيَ فِيهَا صَلاحٌ
segments.transliteration: laka fiha ridan wa liya fiha salahun

translation.en: whose settlement achieves your gratification and my good,
but that You grant it. O He Who is the most merciful of all the merciful ones!

text.en: You may then return to the tomb, stop at the side of the legs, and say the following words:

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَاَ ٱلفَضْلِ ٱلعَبَّاسَ بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya aba alfadli al`abbasa ibna amiri almu'minina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu’l-Fadl al-`Abbas the son of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the successors (of the Prophets).

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَوَّلِ ٱلْقَوْمِ إِسْلاَماً

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the foremost to Islam,
the first to believe,
the best to have served the religion of Allah,
and the most careful for Islam.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ لَقَدْ نَصَحْتَ لِلَّهِ وَلِرَسُولِهِ وَلأَخِيكَ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu laqad nasahta lillahi wa lirasulihi wa li'akhika

translation.en: I bear witness that you served Allah, His Messenger, and your brother sincerely.
You were the most excellent self-sacrificing brother.
So, Allah’s curse be on the group who killed you.
Allah’s curse be on the group who wronged you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً ٱسْتَحَلَّتْ مِنْكَ ٱلْمَحَارِمَ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ummatan istahallat minka almaharima

translation.en: Allah’s curse be on the group who violated your sanctities
and infringed the sanctity of Islam.
You were the most excellent steadfast fighter,
protector, supporter,
and brother who defended his brother,
responded to the obedience to his Lord,

segments.arabic: ٱلرَّاغِبُ فِيمَا زَهِدَ فِيهِ غَيْرُهُ مِنَ ٱلثَّوَابِ ٱلْجَزِيلِ
segments.transliteration: alrraghibu fima zahida fihi ghayruhu min alththwabi aljazili

translation.en: and worked desirably for gaining the abundant reward, which others refused,
and the nice tribute.

segments.arabic: وَأَلْحَقَكَ ٱللَّهُ بِدَرَجَةِ آبَائِكَ فِي جَنَّاتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa alhaqaka allahu bidarajati aba'ika fi jannati alnna`imi

translation.en: So, Allah may attach you to the rank of your fathers in the gardens of bliss.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي تَعَرَّضْتُ لِزِيَارَةِ أَوْلِيَائِكَ رَغْبَةً فِي ثَوَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ta`arradtu liziyarati awliya'ika raghbatan fi thawabika

translation.en: O Allah, I have done the pilgrimage to Your disciples out of my desire for (winning) your reward

segments.transliteration: wa raja'an limaghfiratika wa jazili ihsanika

translation.en: and my wish for Your forgiveness and Your abundant benevolence.

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: fa's'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa alihi alttahirina

translation.en: So, I implore You to send Your blessings upon Muhammad and his immaculate Household

segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala rizqi bihim darran

translation.en: and to make my sustenance flow copiously in their names,
my living delightful in their names,
my pilgrimage rewardable in their names,
and my life pleasant in their names,
to make me take to the conduct of the honored ones,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ يَنْقَلِبُ مِنْ زِيَارَةِ مَشَاهِدِ أَحِبَّائِكَ
segments.transliteration: waj`alni mimman yanqalibu min ziyarati mashahidi ahibba'ika

translation.en: to make me one of those who, as returning from the pilgrimage to the tombs of Your beloved ones,
win success and prosperity
and deserve forgiveness of sins,
covering up of defects,
and relief of disasters.

segments.transliteration: innaka ahlu alttaqwa wa ahlu almaghfirati

translation.en: You are surely worthy of being feared and worthy of forgiving.

text.en: If you intend to take leave, you may approach the holy tomb and say the following words, which has been reported from Abu-Hamzah al-Thumali and have been mentioned by other scholars:

translation.en: I entrust you with Allah, beseech Him to keep you under His guard,
and invoke peace upon you.

segments.transliteration: amanna billahi wa birasulihi wa bikitabihi

translation.en: We have believed in Allah, in His Messenger, in His Book,

segments.arabic: وَبِمَا جَاءَ بِهِ مِنْ عِنْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa bima ja'a bihi min `indi allahi

translation.en: and in that which he conveyed from Allah.
O Allah, record our names with the witnesses.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ لا تَجْعَلْهُ آخِرَ ٱلعَهْدِ مِنْ زِيَارَتِي قَبْرَ ٱبْنِ أَخِي رَسُولِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma la taj`alhu akhira al`ahdi min ziyarati qabra ibni akhi rasulika

translation.en: O Allah, do not decide this pilgrimage to the tomb of the son of Your Messenger’s brother to be the last one of mine.
Peace be upon him (i.e. the Messenger) and upon his Household.
Grant me opportunities to visit him so long as You keep me alive,

segments.arabic: وَٱحْشُرْنِي مَعَهُ وَمَعَ آبَائِهِ فِي ٱلْجِنَانِ
segments.transliteration: wahshurni ma`ahu wa ma`a aba'ihi fi aljinani

translation.en: join me to him and to his fathers in the gardens of Paradise,

segments.arabic: وَعَرِّفْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَهُ وَبَيْنَ رَسُولِكَ وَأَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa `arrif bayni wa baynahu wa bayna rasulika wa awliya'ika

translation.en: and introduce me to him, to Your Messenger, and to Your disciples.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send Your blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and take me to You while I am abiding by the believing in You,
giving credence to Your Messenger,

segments.arabic: وَٱلوِلاَيَةِ لِعَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَٱلأَئِمَّةِ مِنْ وُلْدِهِ
segments.transliteration: walwilayati li`aliyyi bni abi talibin wal-a'immati min wuldihi

translation.en: being faithful to `Ali the son of Abu-Talib and the Imams from his progeny,
and disavowing their enemy.

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي قَدْ رَضِيتُ يَا رَبِّي بِذٰلِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni qad raditu ya rabbi bidhalika

translation.en: My Lord, I have accepted such.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: Allah may send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: SHORT ZIYARAH

translation.en: Peace be upon you O son of Ameerul Momineen,

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَیْکَ اَیُّہَا الْعَبْدُ الصَّالِحُ الْمُطِیْعُ لِلّٰہِ وَ لِرَسُوْلِہٖ
segments.transliteration: aalsalaamu alayka aayua alabdu alsaalihu almutiyu lili wa lirasuli

translation.en: Peace be upon you O righteous servant (of Allah), and obedient to Allah, to His Messenger,

segments.arabic: اَشْہَدُ اَنَّکَ قَدْ جَاہَدْتَ وَ نَصَحْتَ وَ صَبَرْتَ حَتّٰی اَتٰیکَ الْیَقِیْنُ
segments.transliteration: aashadu aanaka qad jaadta wa nasahta wa sabarta haty aatyka alyaqiynu

translation.en: I testify that you that you did jihad & was patient until death came to you

segments.arabic: لَعْنَ اﷲُ الظَّالِمِیِن لَکُمْ مِنَ الْاَوَّلِیْنَ وَالْآخِرِیْنَ وَ اَلْحِقْہُمْ بِدَرَکِ الْجَحِیْمِ.
segments.transliteration: lana aallhu alzaalimiyin lakum mina alaawaliyna walakhiriyna wa aalhiqum bidaraki aljahiymi.

translation.en: So, Allah’s curse be on the group who killed you from the first to the last & may they be in hell forever

name: 5th of shaban - Birth of Imam Zain ul Abedin (as)

text.en: Imam `Alī ibn Husayn (a.s.) had wept for years upon his father after the event of Karbala Someone asked to Imām (A.S)“O my master! Your sorrow has not diminished and your lamenting has not ceased?” Imām `Alī ibn Husayn (a.s.) Replied:“Woe be to you! Ya'qoob (a.s.) was a Prophet and had twelve sons. One of his sons (Prophet Yusuf) was concealed from his eyes by Allāh, and the hair of his head turned grey due to extreme sorrow, and his back bent due to this anxiety, while the sight of his eyes faded due to excessive weeping, and all this although his son was alive in this world. While I have witnessed my father, brother and eighteen members from among my family fallen upon the ground and martyred, then how could my sorrow diminish and tears cease?”[Reference: Nafasul Mahmum, Section 14, Chapter # 39]

translation.en: Peace be on you, O leader of Those who prostrate!
Peace be on you, O prestige of Worshipping ones!
Peace be on you, O participant Of unhappiness and sadness!
Peace be on you, O the Imam, Who got sores on spots which Touched during sijda!
Peace be on you, O one who Wept and mourned!
Peace be on you, one who was Captive of hardships!

segments.arabic: السلام عليك يا أعظم آل العباء
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa aadama aalil e’baae

translation.en: Peace be on you, O one from The great worshippers!

segments.arabic: السلام عليك يا ابن خامس أصحابأهل الكساء
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yabna khaamese ahlil kesaae..

translation.en: Peace be on you , O the son of The fifth of the people of the Cloak (Husayn)

segments.arabic: السلام عليك يا ابن سيد الشهداء

translation.en: Peace be on you, O son of the Leader of the martyrs!
Peace be on you , O support of Pious ones!

segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka wa rahmatullaahe wa barakaatohu..

translation.en: Peace be on you, and Allah’s Blessings and bounties on you!

text.en: Another ziarat

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا قُرَّةَ عَيْنِ النَّاظِرِينَ العَارِفِينَ
segments.transliteration: alsalamu alayka ya qurata ayni alnaazirina alarifina

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَازِنَ وَصَايَا المُرْسَلِينَ,
segments.transliteration: alsalamu alayka ya khazina wasaya almursalina,

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ذُخْرَ المُتَعَبِّدِينَ السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مِصْبَاحَ العَالَمِينَ,
segments.transliteration: alsalamu alayka ya dhukhra almutaabidina alsalamu alayka ya misbaha alalamina,

segments.arabic: السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ يَا أَبَا مُحَمِّدٍ,
segments.transliteration: alsalamu alayka ya mawlaya ya aaba muhamidi,

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ عَبَدْتَ اللَّهَ حَقَّ عِبَادَتِهِ,
segments.transliteration: aashhadu aanaka qad abadta allaha haqa ibadatihi,

segments.arabic: وَأَطَعْتَهُ حَقَّ طَاعَتِهِ حَتَّى أَتَاكَ اليَقِينُ,
segments.transliteration: waatatahu haqa taatihi hatay aataka alyaqinu,

segments.arabic: فَعَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ أَفْضَلُ التَّحِيَّةِ,
segments.transliteration: faalayka ya mawlaya ya bna rasuli allahi aafdalu altahiati,

text.en: Another ziarat

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَیْکَ یَا کَہْفَ التُّقیٰ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَیْکَ یَا قَائِدَ اَہْلِ التَّقْویٰ
segments.transliteration: aalsalaamu alayka ya kafa altuqy aalsalaamu alayka ya qayida aali altaqwy

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَیْکَ یَا بَاقِرَ عَلْمِ النَّبِیِّیْنَ
segments.transliteration: aalsalaamu alayka ya baqira almi alnabiyiyna

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَیْکَ یَا زَیْنَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالْاَرْضِیْنَ
segments.transliteration: aalsalaamu alayka ya zayna alsamwti walaardiyna

segments.arabic: اَللّٰہُمَّ کَمَا جَعَلْتَہٗ عَلَماً لِعِبَادِکَ وَ مُسْتَوْدَعاً لِحِلْمِکَ وَ مُتَرْجِماً لِوَحْیِکَ
segments.transliteration: aalluma kama jaalta alamaa liibadika wa mustawdaaa lihilmika wa mutarjimaa liwahyika

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَیْہِ اَفْضَلَ مَا صَلَّیْتَ عَلیٰ اَحَدٍ مِّنْ ذُرِّیَّۃِ اَنْبِیَائِکَ وَ اَصْفِیَائِکَ وَ رُسُلِکَ وَ اُمَنَائِکَ یَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِیْنَ
segments.transliteration: fasali alayi aafdala ma salayta aly aahadi min dhuriyai aanbiyayika wa aasfiyayika wa rusulika wa aumanayika ya raba alalamiyna

text.en: Invocation of Blessings upon Imam `Ali ibn al-Husayn(as)

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon `Ali the son of al-Husayn
the chief of worshippers
whom You have purely dedicated to Yourself
and brought forth from him the Leaders of True Guidance

segments.transliteration: alladhina yahduna bilhaqqi wa bihi ya`diluna

translation.en: who guide to the truth and judge with it.
You have chosen him for Yourself,
purified him against filth,
selected him, and made him guide and well-guided.
O Allah, send blessings upon him
with the most excellent blessings that You have ever sent upon any
of Your Prophets' offspring

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تَبْلُغَ بِهِ مَا تَقَرُّ بِهِ عَيْنُهُ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: hatta tablugha bihi ma taqarru bihi `aynuhu fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: so that these blessings raise him to what delights his eye in this world and the Hereafter.
You are verily Almighty and Wise.

text.en:
This night is extraordinarily honorable. Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.)
has narrated that when Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (a.s.) was asked
about the merits of the fifteenth night of Sha’ban, he answered, “It is
the most favorable night after the Qadr Night. At this night, Almighty
Allah bestows upon His servants with His favors and grants them His
pardon out of His conferral of benefits to them. Therefore, you should
exert all efforts to seek nearness to Him at this night, because He - the
Majestic and Honorable - has decided not to reject any asker as long
as he does not ask for an act of disobedience to Him. Almighty Allah
has chosen this night for us, the Ahl al-Bayt, just as He has chosen the
Qadr Night for our Prophet - peace be upon him and his Household.
You should thus pray and thank Him diligently.”

One of the marvelous blessings of this night is that it is the birth
night of the Patron of the Age, Imam al-Mahdi(a.s.) - may Allah
accept our souls as ransoms for him. He was born in Surra-man-ra’a
(currently Samarra’) at the hour before daybreak in AH 255. This
incident increases the merits of this honorable night.
However, narrations have carried may recommended rites to be
carried out at this night:

First: It is highly recommended to bathe oneself at this night, for
this act decreases the punishment for one’s sins

Second: It is highly recommended to imitate Imam Ali ibn al-
Husayn Zayn al-’Abidin (a.s.) who used to spend this whole night
with acts of worship, prayers, supplications, invocations, and
implorations for forgiveness. A tradition confirm that as for one who
spends this whole night with acts of worship, his heart will not die
when other hearts die.

Third: It is highly recommended to <ref=3:1248>Ziyarat Of Imam Hussain (as)</ref>
. In fact, this is the most favorable act at this night. It also
brings about forgiveness of one’s sins. If you desire that 124,000
Prophets shake hands with you, you may visit the holy tomb of Imam
al-Husayn (a.s.) at this night. The least act of Ziyarah is to go up an
elevated place, look to the right and the left, raise the head towards the
heavens, and say these statements:

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يا أَبا عَبْدِ الله السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ وَرَحْمَةُ الله وَبَرَكاتُهُ

text.en:
One who performs this form of Ziyarah is expected to win the
reward of one Hajj and one ‘Umrah. In the section of Ziyarat, we will mention further details about the peculiar merits of Ziyarah at this
night

Fourth: It is recommended to say the following supplicatory prayer,
which stands for a form of Ziyarah for Imam al-Mahdi(a.s.). This
supplicatory prayer has been mentioned by both Sayyid Ibn Tawus
and Shaykh al-Tusi:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ بِحَقِّ لَيْلَتِنا وَمَوْلُودِها وَحُجَّتِكَ وَمَوْعُودِها الَّتِي قَرَنْتَ إِلى فَضْلِها فَضْلاً فَتَمَّتْ كَلِمَتُكَ صِدْقاً وَعَدْلاً ، لا مُبَدِّلَ لِكَلِماتِكَ وَلا مُعَقِّبَ لآياتِكَ نُورُكَ المُتَأَلِّقُ وَضِياؤُكَ المُشْرِقُ وَالعَلَمُ النُّورُ فِي طَخْياء الدَيْجُورِ ، الغائِبُ المَسْتُورُ جَلَّ مَوْلِدُهُ وَكَرُمَ مَحْتِدُهُ وَالمَلائِكَةُ شُهَّدُهُ وَالله ناصِرُهُ وَمُؤَيِّدُهُ إذا آنَ مِيعادُهُ وَالمَلائِكَةُ أَمْدادُهُ ، سَيْفُ الله الَّذِي لايَنْبُو وَنُورُهُ الَّذِي لا يَخْبُو وَذُو الحِلْمِ الَّذِي لايَصْبُو مَدارُ الدَّهْرِ وَنَوامِيسُ العَصْرِ وَوُلاةُ الأمْرِ وَالمُنَزَّلُ عَلَيْهِمْ مايَتَنَزَّلُ فِي لَيْلَةَ القَدْرِ وَأَصْحابُ الحَشْرِ وَالنَشْرِ تَراجِمَةُ وَحْيِهِ وَوُلاةُ أَمْرِهِ وَنَهْيِهِ. اللّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلى خاتِمِهِمْ وَقائِمِهِمْ المَسْتُورِ عَنْ عَوالِمِهِمْ ، اللّهُمَّ وَادْرِكْ بِنا أَيَّامَهُ وَظُهُورَهُ وَقِيامَهُ وَاجْعَلْنا مِنْ انْصارِهِ وَاقْرِنْ ثَأْرَنا بِثَأْرِهِ وَاكْتُبْنا فِي أَعْوانِهِ وَخُلَصائِهِ وَاحْيِنا فِي دَوْلَتِهِ ناعِمِينَ وَبِصُحْبَتِهِ غانِمِينَ وَبِحَقِّهِ قائِمِينَ وَمِنَ السُّوءِ سالِمِينَ يا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ وَالحَمْدُ للهِ رَبِّ العالَمِينَ وَصَلَواتُهُ عَلى سَيِّدِنا مُحَمَّدٍ خاتَمِ النَّبِيِّنَ وَالمُرْسَلِينَ وَعَلى أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ الصَّادِقِينَ وَعِتْرَتِهِ النَّاطِقِينَ وَالعَنْ جَمِيعَ الظَّالِمِينَ وَاحْكُمْ بَيْنَنا وَبَيْنَهُمْ يا أَحْكَمَ الحاكِمِينَ

text.en:
Fifth: Shaykh Isma’il ibn Fadl al-Hashimi has narrated that Imam
Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) instructed him to say the following supplicatory
prayer at the fifteenth night of Sha’ban:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الحَيُّ القَيُّومُ العَلِيُّ العَظِيمُ الخالِقُ الرَّازِقُ المُحْيِي المُمِيْتُ البَدِيُ البَدِيعُ ، لَكَ الجَلالُ وَلَكَ الفَضْلُ وَلَكَ الحَمْدُ وَلَكَ المَنُّ وَلَكَ الجُودُ وَلَكَ الكَرَمُ وَلَكَ الاَمْرُ وَلَكَ المَجْدُ وَلَكَ الشُّكْرُ وَحْدَكَ لا شَرِيكَ لَكَ ، يا واِحُد يا أحَدُ يا صَمَدُ يا مَنْ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوا أَحَدٌ ؛ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَاغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي وَاكْفِنِي ما أَهَمَّنِي وَاقْضِ دَيْنِي وَوَسِّعْ عَلَيَّ فِي رِزْقِي ، فَإِنَّكَ فِي هذِهِ الليْلَةِ كُلَّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ تُفَرِّقُ وَمَنْ تَشاءُ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ تَرْزُقُ فَارْزُقْنِي وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِينَ ، فَإِنَّكَ قُلْتَ وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ القائِلِينَ النَّاِطِقينَ : (وَاسْأَلُوا الله مِنْ فَضْلِهِ) فَمِنْ فَضْلِكَ أَسْأَلُ وَإِيَّاكَ قَصَدْتُ وَابْنَ نَبِيِّكَ اعْتَمَدْتُ وَلَكَ رَجَوْتُ فَارْحَمْنِي يا أرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ

text.en:
Sixth: It is recommended to say this supplicatory prayer, which the
Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) used to say at this night:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ اقْسِمْ لَنا مِنْ خَشْيَتِكَ مايحَوُلُ بَيْنَنا وَبَيْنَ مَعْصِيَتِكَ وَمِنْ طاعَتِكَ ماتُبَلِّغُنا بِهِ رِضْوانَكَ وَمِنَ اليَّقِينِ مايَهُونُ عَلَيْنا بِهِ مُصِيباتُ الدُّنْيا ، اللّهُمَّ أَمْتِعْنا بِأَسْماعِنا وَأَبْصارِنا وَقُوَّتِنا ما أَحْيَيْتَنا وَاجْعَلْهُ الوارِثَ مِنَّا وَاجْعَلْ ثأْرَنا عَلى مَنْ ظَلَمَنا وَانْصُرْنا عَلى مَنْ عادانا وَلا تَجْعَلْ مُصِيبَتَنا فِي دِينِنا وَلا تَجْعَلْ الدُّنْيا أَكْبَر هَمِّنا وَلا مَبْلَغَ عِلْمِنا ، وَلا تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيْنا مَنْ لا يَرْحَمُنا بِرَحْمَتِكَ يا أرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

text.en:
Actually, this supplicatory prayer is one of the perfect,
comprehensive prayers that may be said at all times. In the word of the
book of ‘Awali al-La’ali, the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) used to say this
supplicatory prayer at all times.

Seventh: It is recommended to say the prayers that are preferably
said at middays. These prayers, previously mentioned, begin with the
following statement:

Eighth: It is recommended to say the famous supplicatory prayer
known as <ref=3:1299>Dua Kumayl</ref>
 which has been cited in the previous section
of this book. Narrations have mentioned that it is highly advisable to
say this famous supplicatory prayer at this night.

Ninth: It is recommended to mention Almighty Allah by the
following litany one hundred times so that one’s past acts of
disobedience to Him will be forgiven and one’s worldly and religious
needs will be granted:

segments.arabic: سُبْحانَ الله وَالحَمْدُ للهِ وَلا إِلهَ إِلاّ الله وَالله أَكْبَرُ

text.en: ليغفر الله له ما سلف من معاصيه ويقضي له حوائج الدنيا والآخرة

Tenth: Shaykh al-Tusi, in Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has narrated a
tradition about the merits of the night of mid-Sha’ban entailing that
Abu-Yahya asked Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) about the best of
supplicatory prayers to be said at this night. The Imam (a.s.) instructed
him, saying: After you accomplish the obligatory Isha’ Prayer, you may offer a
two unit prayer in the first unit of which you should recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 and Surah <ref=1:109>al-Kafiroon</ref>
 and in the second Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>

and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>.When you accomplish the prayer, you may
repeat thirty-three times

translation.en: subhanallah

text.en: thirty-three times

translation.en: alhamdulilla

text.en: thirty-four times

translation.en: Allahu-akbar

text.en: You may then say the following supplicatory prayer:

segments.arabic: يا مَنْ إِلَيْهِ مَلْجأُ العِبادِ فِي المُهِمَّاِت وَإِلّيْهِ يَفْزَعُ الخَلْقُ فِي المُلِمَّاتِ يا عالِمَ الجَهْرِ وَالخَفِيَّاتِ يا مَنْ  لاتَخْفى عَلَيْهِ خَواطِرُ الاَوْهامِ وَتَصرُّفُ الخَطَراتِ يا رَبَّ الخَلائِقِ وَالبَرِيَّاِت يا مَنْ بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ الأَرْضِينَ وَالسَّماواتِ ، أَنْتَ الله لا إِلهَ إِلاّ أَنْتَ أَمُتُّ إِلَيْكَ بِلا إِلهَ إِلاّ أَنْتَ فَيا لا إِلهَ إِلاّ أَنْتَ اجْعَلْنِي فِي هذِهِ الليْلَةِ مِمَّنْ نَظَرْتَ إِلَيْهِ فَرَحِمْتَهُ وَسَمِعْتَ دُعائَهُ فَأَجَبْتَهُ وَعَلِمْتَ اسْتِقالَتَهُ فَأَقَلْتَهُ وَتَجاوَزْتَ عَنْ سالِفِ خَطِيئَتِهِ وَعَظِيمِ جَرِيرَتِهِ فَقَدْ اسْتَجَرْتُ بِكَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي وَلَجَأْتُ إِلَيْكَ فِي سَتْرِ عُيُوبِي ، اللّهُمَّ فَجُدْ عَلَيَّ بِكَرَمِكَ وَفَضْلِكَ وَاحْطُطْ خَطايايَ بِحِلْمِكَ وَعَفْوِكَ وَتَغَمَّدْنِي فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ بِسابِغِ كَرامَتِكَ وَاجْعَلْنِي فِيها مِنْ أَوْلِيائِكَ الَّذِينَ اجْتَبَيْتَهُمْ لِطاعَتِكَ وَاخْتَرْتَهُمْ لِعِبادَتِكَ وَجَعَلْتَهُمْ خالِصَتَكَ وَصَفْوَتَكَ ، اللّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ سَعَدَ جَدُّهُ وَتَوَفَّرَ مِنَ الخَيْراتِ حَظُّهُ وَاجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ سَلِمَ فَنَعِمَ وَفازَ فَغَنِمَ وَاكْفِنِي شَرَّ ما أَسْلَفْتُ وَاعْصِمْنِي مِنَ الازْدِيادِ فِي مَعْصِيَتِكَ وَحَبِّبْ إلى طاعَتَكَ وَما يُقَرِّبُنِي مِنْكَ وَيُزْلِفُنِي عِنْدَكَ. سَيِّدِي ، إِلَيْكَ يَلْجَأُ الهارِبُ وَمِنْكَ يَلْتَمِسُ الطَّالِبُ وَعَلى كَرَمِكَ يَعِّولُ المُسْتَقِيلُ التائبُ أَدَّبْتَ عِبادَكَ بِالتَّكَرُّمِ وَأَنْتَ أَكْرَمُ الاَكْرَمِينَ وَأَمَرْتَ بِالعَفْوِ عِبادَكَ وَأَنْتَ الغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ ، اللّهُمَّ فَلا تَحْرِمْنِي ما رَجَوْتُ مِنْ كَرَمِكَ وَلا تُؤْيِسْنِي مِنْ سابِغِ نِعَمِكَ وَلا تُخَيِّبْنِي مِنْ جَزِيلِ قِسَمِكَ فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ لاَهْلِ طاعَتِكَ وَاجْعَلْنِي فِي جَنَّةٍ مِنْ شِرارِ بَرِيَّتِكَ. رَبِّ ، إِنْ لْم أَكُنْ مِنْ أَهْلِ ذلِكَ فَأَنْتَ أَهْلُ الكَرَمِ وَالعَفْوِ وَالمَغْفِرَةِ وَجُدْ عَلَيَّ بِما أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ لا بِما أَسْتَحِقُّهُ فَقَدْ حَسُنَ ظَنِّي بِكَ وَتَحَقَّقَ رَجائِي لَكَ وَعَلِقَتْ نَفْسِي بِكَرَمِكَ فَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ وَأَكْرَمُ الاَكْرَمِينَ ، اللّهُمَّ وَاخْصُصْنِي مِنْ كَرَمِكَ بِجَزِيلِ قسمِكَ وَأَعوذُ بِعَفْوِكَ مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ وَاغْفِرْ لِي الذَّنْبَ الَّذِي يَحْبِسُ عَلَيَّ  الخُلُقَ وَيُضيِّقُ عَلَيَّ الرِّزْقَ حَتّى أَقُومَ بصالِحِ رِضاكَ وَانْعَمَ بِجَزِيلِ عَطائِكَ وَأَسْعَدَ بِسابِغِ نَعْمائِكَ ، فَقَدْ لُذْتُ بِحَرَمِكَ وَتَعَرَّضْتُ لِكَرَمِكَ وَاسْتَعَذْتُ بِعَفْوِكَ مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ وبِحِلْمِكَ مِنْ غَضَبِكَ فَجُدْ بِما سَأَلْتُكَ وَأَنِلْ ماالتَمَسْتُ مِنْكَ أَسْأَلُكَ بِكَ لا بِشَيٍْ هُوَ أَعْظَمُ مِنْكَ.

text.en:
You may prostrate yourself and repeat the following supplicatory
phrase twenty times:
And then repeat the following phrase seven times:
And then repeat the following phrase seven times:

segments.arabic: لا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إِلاّ بِالله

text.en: And then repeat the following phrase ten times:
And then repeat the following phrase ten times:

You may then invoke Almighty Allah’s blessings upon the Holy
Prophet and beseech Him to grant your requests By Allah I swear, even if you pray for things that are as many as
raindrops, Almighty Allah, out of His generosity and favors, will grant
them all.

Eleventh: Shaykh al-Tusi and Shaykh al-Kaf’ami say: It is suitable
to say the following supplicatory prayer at this night:

segments.arabic: إِلهِي تَعَرَّضَ لَكَ فِي هذا اللَّيْلِ المُتَعَرِّضُونَ وَقَصَدَكَ القاصِدُونَ وَأَمَّلَ فَضْلَكَ وَمَعْرُوفَكَ الطَّالِبُونَ وَلَكَ فِي هذا اللَّيْلِ نَفَحاتٌ وَجَوائِزُ وَعَطايا وَمَواهِبُ تَمُنُّ بِها عَلى مَنْ تَشاءُ مِنْ عِبادِكَ وَتَمْنَعُها مَنْ لَمْ تَسْبِقْ لَهُ العِنايَةُ مِنْكَ ، وَها أَنا ذا عُبَيْدُكَ الفَقِيرُ إِلَيْكَ المُؤَمِّلُ فَضْلَكَ وَمَعْرُوفَكَ ، فَإِنْ كُنْتَ يا مَوْلاي تَفَضَّلْتَ فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ عَلى أَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ وَعُدْتَ عَلَيْهِ بِعائِدَةٍ مِنْ عَطْفِكَ فَصَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ الطَيِّبِينَ الطَّاهِرِينَ الخَيِّرِينَ الفاضِلِينَ ، وَجُدْ عَلَيَّ بِطَوْلِكَ وَمَعْرُوفِكَ يا رَبَّ العالَمينَ ، وَصَلَّى الله عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ خاتَمِ النَّبِيِّينَ وَآلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ وَسَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً ، إِنَ الله حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ. اللّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَما أَمَرْتَ فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَما وَعَدْتَ إِنَّكَ لا تُخْلِفُ المِيعادَ

text.en:
It is worth mentioning that this supplicatory prayer is advisably said
immediately after the accomplishment of the Shaf’ Prayer at the last
hours of night

Twelfth: It is recommended to say the supplicatory prayer narrated
by Shaykh al-Tusi and Sayyid Ibn Tawus after each two units of the
Night Prayer (Salat al-Layl), the Shaf’ Prayer, and the Witr Prayer.

Thirteenth: It is recommended to do the prostrations and say the
supplicatory prayers that are reported from the Holy Prophet
(s.a.w.a.). One of these is that Shaykh al-Tusi has narrated on the
authority of Hammad ibn ‘Isa on the authority of Aban ibn Taghlib on
the authority of Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) recounted the following:
It was the fifteenth night of Sha’ban when the Holy Prophet
(s.a.w.a.) was with ‘A’ishah, his wife. At midnight, the Holy Prophet
(s.a.w.a.) left the bed. When ‘A’ishah woke up and could not find him,
she felt jealous and thought that he had joined one of his other wives.
She therefore left her bed and put on her cloak, which was made of
neither silk, nor linen, nor cotton; rather, it was made of camel hair. In
any event, ‘A’ishah searched for the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) in all of
the rooms of his other wives but she found him prostrating himself on
the ground like a thrown dress. As she approached, she heard him
saying:

segments.arabic: سَجدَ لَكَ سَوادِي وَخَيالِي وَآمَنَ بِكَ فُؤادِي هذِهِ يَدايَ وَما جَنَيْتُهُ عَلى نَفْسِي يا عَظِيمُ تُرْجى لُكُلِّ عَظيمٍ اغْفِرْ لِيَ العَظِيمَ فَإنَّهُ لا يَغْفِرُ الذَّنْبَ العَظِيمَ إِلاّ الرَبُّ العَظِيمُ.

text.en:
The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) then raised his head and then prostrated
himself again, saying:

segments.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِنُورِ وَجْهِكَ الَّذِي أَضائَتْ لَهُ السَّماواتُ وَالأَرْضُونَ وانْكَشَفَتْ لَهُ الظُّلُماتُ وَصَلَحَ عَلَيْهِ أَمْرُ الأوّلِينَ وَالآخِرِينَ مِنْ فُجأَةِ نَقِمَتِكَ وَمِنْ تَحْوِيلِ عافِيَتِكَ وَمِنْ زَوالِ نِعْمَتِكَ ، اللّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنِي قَلْباً تَقِيّاً نَقِيّاً وَمِنَ الشِّرْكِ بَرِيئاً لا كافِراً وَلا شَقِيّاً.

text.en:
The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) then attached his face to the ground and
said:

segments.arabic: عَفَّرْتُ وَجْهِي فِي التُّرابِ وَحُقَّ لِي أَنْ أَسْجُدَ لَكَ.

text.en:
When the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) accomplished these acts of
worship and directed towards his bed, ‘A’ishah ran before him until
she reached the bed before he did. When he heard her speedy breathes,
the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) wondered. He then said, “Do you know
what this night is? This is the mid-Sha’ban night. At this night, shares
of provisions are distributed, lifetimes are decided, and the pilgrims
are appointed. Verily, Almighty Allah, at this night, forgives as many
of His creatures as the hairs of the horses of Kalb Tribe. Almighty
Allah also orders angels to descend to the earth, to Makkah, at this
night.

Fourteenth: It is recommended to offer the famous Ja’far al-
Tayyar’s Prayer <ref=3:1193>Salat Jafar Tayyar</ref>
 as is narrated by Shaykh al-Tusi from
Imam al-Rida(a.s.).

Fifteenth: It is recommended to offer the prayers that are dedicated
to this night. In fact, these prayers are many. One of them is what is
reported by Abu-Yahya al-San’ani, as well as other thirty trustworthy
reporters, from Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (a.s.) and Imam Ja’far al-
Sadiq(a.s.) as follows:
At the mid-Sha’ban night, you may offer a four unit prayer in each
unit of which you may recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 once and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 one hundred times. After accomplishment, you may say the
following supplicatory prayer:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إِنِّي إِلَيْكَ فَقِيرٌ وَمِنْ عَذابِكَ خائِفٌ مُسْتَجِيرٌ ، اللّهُمَّ لا تُبَدِّلْ اسْمِي وَلا تُغَيِّرْ جِسْمِي وَلا تَجْهَدْ بَلائِي وَلا تُشْمِتْ بِي أَعْدائِي ، أَعُوذُ بِعَفْوِكَ مِنْ عِقابِكَ وَأَعُوذُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ مِنْ عَذابِكَ وَأَعُوذُ بِرِضاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْكَ جَلَّ ثَناؤُكَ أَنْتَ كَما أَثْنَيْتَ عَلى نَفْسِكَ وَفَوْقَ ما يَقُولُ القائِلُونَ

text.en:
It is worth mentioning that traditions have decided a great reward
for one who offers a one hundred unit prayer at this night; in each
unit, Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 is recited once and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 ten
times.
It has been previously mentioned, within the rites of Rajab, that it is
recommended to offer a prayer composing of six units in each of which Surahs <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
, <ref=1:36>Yasin</ref>
, <ref=1:67>al-Mulk</ref>
 and <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 are
recited.

segments.arabic: اللهم إنك عليم حليم ذو أناةٍ  و لا طاقة لنا بحُكمك بحلمك يا الله يا الله يا اللّــــــه  الأمان الأمان الأمان
segments.transliteration: Allaahumma Innak A’zeemun D’u Anaatin Wa Laa T’aaqata Lanaa Li—h’ukmika Yaa Allah Yaa Allah Yaa Allah Al —amaan Al —amaan Al —amaan;

translation.en: O Allah, verily Thou art Sublime, Patient, gives respite, (because) we do not have the capacity to withstand the conditions that take effect under Thy authority. O Allah! O Allah! O Allah! Mercy! Mercy! Mercy!

segments.arabic: من الطاعون و الوباء و موتِ الفجأة  و سوء القضاء و و شماتة الأعداء  ربنا اكشف عنا العذاب إنا مؤمنون برحمتك يا أرحم الراحمين

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You in the name of this night and in the name of him whom was born at it

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللّهِ  وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ وَلا إلهَ إلاَّ اللّه وَاللّهُ أَك ْبَرُ

translation.en: and in the name of Your Argument and in the name of Your promise in it,

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللّه السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ وَرَحْمَةُ اللّه وَبَرَكَاتُهُ

translation.en: the night that You have added a new merit to its many merits
So, Your Word has been accomplished truly and fairly;
no one can change Your words,
nor obscure Your signs,
(He is) Your glowing Light
and Your bring splendor
and the luminous sign in the obscurity of darkness
and the absent and the concealed,
Lofty is his birth and noble is his lineage
and the angels are his witnesses
and Allah is his Supporter and Backer
when his time comes and the angels shall be his sponsors;
(He shall act as) the sword of Allah that shall never miss the target,
and His light that shall never be extinguished
And the forbearing person who shall never deviate the truth.
and the motive and reason of the course of events,
and the one for whom the laws of ages have been made
and (one of) the men of authority
who receive that which is revealed on the Grand Night.
and the managers of the Resurrection and the Account;
(They are) the interpreters of His revelations

segments.arabic: وَالْمُنَزَّلُ عَلَيْهِمْ مَا يَتَنَزَّلُ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ،

translation.en: and in charge of what is deemed lawful and what is deemed unlawful by Him.
O Allah: send blessings on their seal and their Riser
whom is hidden from their world.
O Allah: (please) make us causes for the coming of him,
and causes for his advent and reappearance
and (please) include us with his supporters
and join our vengeance to his
and decide us to be among his assistants and retinue.
and make us live in bliss in his reign,
and make us win the ecstasy of his companionship,
and make us of those who carry out our duty toward him,
and save us from evil.
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
All praise be to Allah, Lord of the worlds.
His blessings be upon our master, Muhammad
the seal of the Prophets and the Messengers,
and upon his Household, the veracious,
and his offspring, the spokespersons of the truth,
and curse all the wrongdoers
and judge between them and us
O the Most Just of all judges.
All praise be to Allah; the Most High, the All-great.
Peace be upon you; O the righteous, pure servant (of Allah).

segments.transliteration: udi`uka shahadatan minny laka tuqarribuny ilayka fi yawmi shafa`atika

translation.en: I entrust with you a testimony of mine that takes me near you on the day of your intercession (for some people).

segments.transliteration: ash-hadu annaka qutilta wa lam tamut

translation.en: I bear witness that although you were slain, you have not died;

segments.arabic: والسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أيُّها الْعَبْدُ الصَّالِحُ الزَّكيُّ
segments.transliteration: bal biraja‘i hayatika hayiyat qulubu shi`atika

translation.en: Rather the hearts of your adherents (Shi`ah) are living on the hope of your being alive;

segments.arabic: اُودِعُكَ شَهادَةً مِنِّي لَكَ تُقَرِّبُني إلَيْكَ فِي يَوْمِ شَفاعَتِكَ،

translation.en: And by the light of your illumination have those seeking you been guided (to the right path).

segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu annaka nuru allahi alladhy lam yutfa wa layutfa’u abadan

translation.en: And I bear witness that you are verily the Light of Allah that has not and shall never be extinguished.

segments.arabic: بَلْ بِرَجاءِ حَياتِكَ حَيِيَتْ قُلُوبُ شيعَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa annaka wajhu allahi alladhy lam yahlik wa layuhlaku abadan

translation.en: And you are verily the Face of Allah that has not and shall never be perishing.

segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu ann hadhihi alttrbata turbatuka

translation.en: And I bear witness that this soil is yours,

segments.arabic: وَأشْهَدُ أنَّكَ نُورُ اللهِ الَّذي لَمْ يُطْفَأْ وَلا يُطْفَأُ أبَداً،

translation.en: And this holy precinct is yours.

segments.arabic: وَأنَّكَ وَجْهُ اللهِ الَّذي لَمْ يَهْلِكْ وَلا يُهْلَكُ أبَداً،

translation.en: And this death is the death of your body only,
While you have never been humiliated since Allah is the One Who is pouring honor upon you
And you have never been defeated since Allah is the One Who is supporting you.

segments.transliteration: hadhihi shahadatun li `indaka ilayawmi qabzi ruhy bihazratika

translation.en: I would like you to keep this testimony of mine with you up to the day when my soul will be grasped in the presence of you.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.
O Allah: You are verily the Ever-living, the Self-Subsisting,

segments.arabic: هذِهِ شَهادَةٌ لي عِنْدَكَ إلى يَوْمَ قَبْضِ روُحي بِحَضْرَتِكَ،

translation.en: the Most High, the All-great,
