the Creator, the Sustainer,
the Giver of live, the Causer of death,
the Originator, the Maker.
To You is the Majesty
and to You is the favor,
and to You is all praise,
and to You is thanks,
and to You is magnanimity,
and to You is generosity,
and to You do belong all affairs,
and to You is glory,
and to You is gratitude;
You are alone without having any partner with You.
O the One: O the Absolute: O the Besought of all:

segments.transliteration: yaman lam yalid wa lam yulad

translation.en: O He Who neither begets nor is He begotten,

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu kufwan ahadun

translation.en: and there is none like to Him.

segments.arabic: يَا وَاحِدُ يَا أَحَدُ يَا صَمَدُ

translation.en: (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ

translation.en: and forgive me; and have mercy upon me;
and relieve me from whatever has aggrieved me;
and help me settle my debt;
and expand my provisions;

segments.transliteration: fa’innaka fi hadhihi allaylati kull amrin hakimin tafruqu

translation.en: for You, at this night, make distinct all affairs of wisdom;

segments.transliteration: wa man tasha‘u min khalqika tarzuqu

translation.en: and You grant sustenance to whomever You wish among Your creatures.
So, (please do) grant me sustenance and You are verily the Best of sustainers.

segments.arabic: فَإنَّكَ فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ كُلَّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ تَفْرُقُ،
segments.transliteration: fa’innaka qulta wa anta khayru alqa’ilina alnnatiqina:

translation.en: You have said—and You are the Best of those who speak and utter—
“Ask Allah of His bounty.”
I thus ask You of Your bounty;

segments.arabic: فَإنَّكَ قُلْتَ وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْقَائِلِينَ النَّاطِقِينَ:

translation.en: and to You do I turn my face;
and the intercession of Your Prophet’s son do I seek;
and for You do I hope.
So, (please do) have mercy upon me; O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
O Allah: (please do) grant us an amount of fearfulness of You
that prevents us from committing acts of disobedience to You;
and an amount of obedience to You that makes us attain Your satisfaction;

segments.transliteration: wa mina aliyaqini mayahunu `alaynabihi musibatu alddunya

translation.en: and an amount of conviction that help us tolerate the vicissitudes of this worldly life.
O Allah: (please do) make us enjoy our hearings, sights, and powers

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ طَاعَتِكَ مَا تُبَلِّغُنَا بِهِ رِضْوَانَكَ،

translation.en: so long as You decide to keep us alive; and (please do) make it the inheritor of us.

segments.arabic: وَمِنَ الْيَقِينِ مَا يَهُونُ عَلَيْنَا بِهِ مُصِيبَاتُ الدُّنْيَا.

translation.en: And (please do) make us avenge ourselves against them who wrong us;
and back us against them who antagonize us;
and do not suffer misfortunes in affairs of our religion;
and do not make our worldly affairs happen to be our greatest concern or our utmost knowledge;
and do not set him who does not have mercy upon us, as master over us;
in the name of Your mercy; O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: وَلا تَجْعَلِ الدُّنْيَا أَكْبَرَ هَمِّنَا وَلا مَبْلَغَ عِلْمِنَا،
segments.transliteration: yaman ilayhi malja’u al`ibadi fi almuhimmati

translation.en: O He to Whom the servants (of Him) resort in urgencies

segments.arabic: وَلا تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيْنَا مَنْ لا يَرْحَمُنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa ilayhi yafza`u alkhalqu fi almulimmati

translation.en: and to Whom the creatures turn in ordeals;
O He Who knows the open and the hidden matters;

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ إلَيْهِ مَلْجَأُ الْعِبَادِ فِي الْمُهِمَّاتِ،
segments.transliteration: yaman latakhfa`alayhi khawatiru alawhami wa tasarrfu alkhatarati

translation.en: O He from Whom neither the ideas of illusions nor the initiatives of delusions can be concealed;
O the Lord of creatures and beings;
O He Who grasps the kingdoms of the earth and the heavens;

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لا تَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ خَوَاطِرُ الأَوْهَامِ وَتَصَرُّفُ الْخَطَرَاتِ،

translation.en: You are verily Allah; there is no god save You;
I thus try to connect with you in the name of ‘There is no god save You’

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ الأَرَضِينَ وَالسَّمَاوَاتِ،
segments.transliteration: fayalailaha illaanta aj`alny fi hadhihi allaylati mimmn nazarta ilayhi farahimtahu

translation.en: So, O He save Whom there is no god: (please) include me at this night with those at whom You have looked and thus You have mercy upon them;

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ اللّهُ لا إلهَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ،

translation.en: and with those whose prayers have been heard by You and thus You have responded to them;

segments.arabic: أَمُتُّ إلَيْكَ بِلا إلهَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ،

translation.en: and with those whose true repentance has been admitted by You and thus You have accepted it;

segments.arabic: فَيَا لا إلهَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ اجْعَلْنِي فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ مِمَّنْ نَظَرْتَ إلَيْهِ فَرَحِمْتَهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa tajawazta `an salifi khatiiatihi wa `azimi jariratihi

translation.en: and You have thus overlooked their past sins and enormous offenses.
verily, I am seeking Your shelter against my sins,
and I am resorting to You so that You may conceal my defects.

segments.arabic: وَتَجَاوَزْتَ عَنْ سَالِفِ خَطِيئَتِهِ وَعَظِيمِ جَرِيرَتِهِ،

translation.en: O Allah: (please) bestow lavishly upon me with Your generosity and Favor;
and condone my misdeeds out of Your forbearance and pardon,

segments.transliteration: wa taghammdny fi hadhihi allaylati bisabighi karamatika

translation.en: and encompass me, at this night, with Your opulent honoring,

segments.transliteration: waj`alny fihamin awlia’ika alladhina ajtabaytahum lita`atika

translation.en: and include me at this night with Your intimate servants whom You have selected for obeying You,
and whom You have chosen for worshipping You,

segments.arabic: وَتَغَمَّدْنِي فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ بِسَابِغِ كَرَامَتِكَ،

translation.en: and whom You have made Your elite and select people.

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْنِي فِيهَا مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِكَ الَّذِينَ اجْتَبَيْتَهُمْ لِطَاعَتِكَ،

translation.en: O Allah: (please) make me of those whose efforts are of a happy end,
and those whose shares of good things are big,
and make me of those who enjoy blissful life as they have been safe (from sins)
and those who have been awarded excellently as they have won,
and rescue me from the evil consequences of what I have committed,
and save me from doing more acts of disobedience to You,

segments.transliteration: wa habbib ilayya ta`ataka wa mayuqarribuny minka wa yuzlifuny `indaka

translation.en: and make me love the acts of obedience to You and whatever draws me near You and approaches me toward You.
O my Master: a fugitive resorts to none save You,
and a needy begs none save You,

segments.arabic: وَحَبِّبْ إلَيَّ طَاعَتَكَ وَمَا يُقَرِّبُنِي مِنْكَ وَيُزْلِفُنِي عِنْدَكَ.

translation.en: and only on Your generosity does a repentant, contrite one depends

segments.transliteration: addabta `ibadaka bilttakarrumi wa anta akramu alakramina

translation.en: You have disciplined Your servants by means of generosity; and You are verily the most Generous of all those who are generous.

segments.transliteration: wa amarta bil`afui `ibadaka wa anta alghafuru alrrahimu

translation.en: and You have instructed Your servants to pardon; and You are verily the All-forgiving, the All-merciful.
O Allah: (please) do not deprive me of Your generosity for which I hope,

segments.arabic: أَدَّبْتَ عِبَادَكَ بِالتَّكَرُّمِ وَأَنْتَ أَكْرَمُ الأَكْرَمِينَ،

translation.en: and do not make me despair of Your opulent bounties,

segments.arabic: وَأَمَرْتَ بِالْعَفْوِ عِبَادَكَ وَأَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ.
segments.transliteration: wa latukhayybny min jazili qisamika fi hadhihi allaylati liahli ta`atika

translation.en: and do not disappoint me of Your abundant sustenance that You decide, this night, for those who are obedient to You,

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ فَلا تَحْرِمْنِي مَا رَجَوْتُ مِنْ كَرَمِكَ،
segments.transliteration: waj`alny fi junnatin min shirari bariyyatika

translation.en: and include me with Your protection against Your evil creatures.

segments.transliteration: rabbi in lam akun min ahli dhalika fanta ahlu alkarami wal-`afui wal-maghfirati

translation.en: O my Lord: If I do not deserve so, then You are worthy of acting generously to me, and pardoning and forgiving me,

segments.arabic: وَلا تُخَيِّبْنِي مِنْ جَزِيلِ قِسَمِكَ فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ لأهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ،

translation.en: and (please) bestow upon me magnanimously according to that which befits You, not according to what I deserve,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْنِي فِي جُنَّةٍ مِنْ شِرَارِ بَرِيَّتِكَ،

translation.en: verily, I carry an excellent opinion about You,

segments.arabic: رَبِّ إنْ لَمْ أَكُنْ مِنْ أَهْلِ ذلِكَ فَأَنْتَ أَهْلُ الْكَرَمِ وَالْعَفْوِ وَالْمَغْفِرَةِ،

translation.en: and I do hope for You,

segments.arabic: وَجُدْ عَلَيَّ بِمَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ لا بِمَا أَسْتَحِقُّهُ،

translation.en: and my self is hanged to the rope of Your generosity,
for You are verily the most Merciful of all those who show mercy,
and You are the most Generous of all those who are generous.

segments.transliteration: allahumma wakhsusny min karamika bijazili qisamika

translation.en: O Allah: (please) confer upon me exclusively with an abundant share of what You decide, out of Your generosity,
and I seek refuge with Your pardon against Your chastisement,

segments.transliteration: wa ghfir liya aldhdhanba alladhy yahbisu `alayya alkhuluqa

translation.en: and (please) forgive me the sin that prevents me from enjoying high morals,

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ وَاخْصُصْنِي مِنْ كَرَمِكَ بِجَزِيلِ قِسَمِكَ،

translation.en: and suppresses my sustenance,
so that I will do that which excellently achieves Your satisfaction

segments.arabic: وَاغْفِرْ لِيَ الذَّنْبَ الَّذِي يَحْبِسُ عَلَيَّ الْخُلُقَ،

translation.en: and I will enjoy Your profuse granting,
and I will be delighted by Your abundant bounties.
I am having recourse to Your sanctity,
and I am asking for Your generosity,
and I am taking shelter in Your pardon against Your punishment,
and in Your forbearance against Your ire.
So, (please) bestow upon me generously with that which I have asked from You,
and confer upon me with that which I have begged from You,

segments.transliteration: asaluka bika labishay‘in huwa a`zamu minka

translation.en: I beseech You in Your name, since there is nothing great that You are.
O my Lord!
O Allah!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِكَ لا بِشَيْءٍ هُوَ أَعْظَمُ مِنْكَ.
segments.transliteration: la hawla wala quwwata illa billah(i)

translation.en: There is neither might nor power save with Allah.
Only that which Allah wants (will be).
There is no power save with Allah.

segments.arabic: لا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إلاَّ بِاللّهِ.
segments.transliteration: ilahy ta`arrada laka fi hadhaallayli almuta`arriduna

translation.en: O Allah: tonight the seekers of favors, restless and eager, present themselves to You;
the determined aspirers have You in mind;

segments.transliteration: wa ammla fadlaka wa ma`rufaka alttalibuna

translation.en: those who make requests look long and attentively at Your obligingness and kindness;

segments.arabic: إلهِي تَعَرَّضَ لَكَ فِي هذَا اللَّيْلِ الْمُتَعَرِّضُونَ،
segments.transliteration: wa laka fi hadhaallayli nafahatun wa jawa’izu

translation.en: You, in this night, give gifts, bounties beyond measure,
free donations, and favors,
to those whom You will from among Your servants when they make a request,

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ فِي هذَا اللَّيْلِ نَفَحَاتٌ وَجَوَائِزُ
segments.transliteration: wa tamna`uhaman lam tasbiq lahu al`inaiyatu minka

translation.en: and say no to those who do not try to get in advance (remain behind) for obtaining the bounties from You.
I, a modest needy bondman,

segments.arabic: تَمُنُّ بِهَا عَلَى مَنْ تَشَاءُ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ،

translation.en: am hopeful of Your obligingness and kindness.

segments.arabic: وَتَمْنَعُهَا مَنْ لَمْ تَسْبِقْ لَهُ الْعِنَايَةُ مِنْكَ،
segments.transliteration: fain kunta yamawlaiya tafaddalta fi hadhihi allaylati `alaahadin min khalqika

translation.en: Indeed if You, O My Master, bestows a favor on any one, in this night, from among Your created beings,

segments.arabic: وَهَا أَنَا ذَا عُبَيْدُكَ الْفَقِيرُ إلَيْكَ

translation.en: and multiply profits and gains for him out of love and affection,
please send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad:

segments.arabic: فَإنْ كُنْتَ يَا مَوْلايَ تَفَضَّلْتَ فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ عَلَى أَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: the pure, the immaculate, the virtuous, and the righteous;
and then let me have enough and be contented on account of Your liberality and obligingness,
O Lord of the worlds!
May Allah send blessings upon Muhammad, the seal of the Prophets,
and upon his Household, the immaculate,
and may He exalt them very much.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّى اللّهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: verily, Allah is worthy of all praise, full of all glory.
O Allah: I am praying You as You ordered me to do,
So, (please) respond to me as You promised.
verily, You never break Your promise.
Prostrating before You are my body and my shadow
and my heart is in full faith of You
These are my two hands and this is what I have committed against myself,
O the All-great: You are hoped for all enormous things;
Please, forgive me my serious offences

segments.arabic: هذِهِ يَدَايَ وَمَا جَنَيْتُهُ عَلَى نَفْسِي،
segments.transliteration: fa’innhu layaghfiru aldhdhanba al`azima illaalrrabbu al`azimu

translation.en: because none can forgive the serious sin except the All-great Lord.

segments.transliteration: a`udhu binuri wa jhika alladhy ada‘at lahu alssamawatu wal-araduna

translation.en: I seek the protection of the light of Your Face that has lit the heavens and the earth
and has removed all darkness

segments.arabic: فَإنَّهُ لا يَغْفِرُ الذَّنْبَ الْعَظِيمَ إلاَّ الرَّبُّ الْعَظِيمُ.

translation.en: and has made active all the affairs of the past and the coming generations

segments.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِنُورِ وَجْهِكَ الَّذِي أَضَاءَتْ لَهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَالأَرَضُونَ،

translation.en: against Your sudden chastisement
and against withdrawing the good health that You have granted me
and against the vanishing of Your bounties.
O Allah: (please) grant me a heart that is pious and pure,
and is released from polytheism,
and is neither atheist nor unhappy.
I am putting my face on the ground

segments.transliteration: wa huqqa li an asjuda laka

translation.en: and it is my duty to prostrate myself before You
O Allah: I am in need for You,
and I am fearful of You and seeking Your shelter against Your chastisement.
O Allah: (please) do not erase my name,
and do not change my body,
and do not increase my ordeals,
and do not make my enemies rejoice at my misfortune.
I resort to Your pardon against Your punishment,
and I resort to Your mercy against Your chastisement,
and I resort to Your pleasure against Your wrath,
and I resort to You from You
Enormous be the praise of You
You are as exactly as You have praised Yourself,
and above all that which is said about You.

text.en:
As mentioned in Iqbal al-A’mal, narrations have referred to many
prayers to be offered at the first night of Sha’ban. One of these prayers
is a twelve unit prayer in each unit of which Surah al-Faatehah is
recited once and Surah al-Tawheed repeated eleven times.

A great reward is gained from fasting on the first day of Sha’ban.
Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) is reported as saying, “Paradise will be
incumbently decided for one who observes fasting on the first day of
Sha’ban.”

name: 15th Day of shaban- Birth of Imam Mahdi (atfs)

text.en:
On the fifteenth of Sha’ban, the twelfth Imam al-Mahdi, the Patron
of the Age (Sahib al-Zaman), was born. May Almighty Allah’s
blessings be upon him and his immaculate ancestors. It is
recommended to visit him at each time and place and to pray
Almighty Allah for hastening in his advent. His <ref=3:1260>Ziyarats of Imam Mahdi (ajtfs) at Samarra Sirdab</ref>
 is more favorable. Beyond any dispute, Imam al-
Mahdi(a.s.) shall appear, overcome, and fill the earth with justice and
equality just as it would be filled with injustice and bias.
Dua sahar

The highly considerable supplicatory prayer known as Dua
al-Baha’ is reported from Imam Ali ibn Musa al-Rida(a.s.) who said,
“This is the supplicatory prayer that Imam al-Baqir (a.s.) used to say
at the last hours of Ramadan nights.” It is as follows:

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ بَهَائِكَ بِأَبْهَاهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min baha'ika bi-abhahu

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to give me from Your brilliance at its most splendrous,
and all Your glories are radiantly brilliant.
O Allah, I beseech You in the name of all Your glories.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ جَمَالِكَ بِأَجْمَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min jamalika bi-ajmalihi

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to grant me from Your beauty at its utmost ,
and all Your beauties are beautiful.
O Allah, I beseech You by all Your beauties.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ جَلالِكَ بِأَجَلِّهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min jalalika bi-ajallihi

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to give me from Your majesty that gives grandeur,
and all Your majestic powers are majestic.
O Allah, I beseech You in the name of all Your majesty.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عَظَمَتِكَ بِأَعْظَمِهَا

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to give me from Your greatness at its greatest,
and all Your greatness are great.
O Allah, I beseech You in the name of all Your greatness.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ نُورِكَ بِأَنْوَرِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min nurika bi-anwarihi

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You to give me from Your light at its utmost luminosity,
and all Your Light is luminious.
O Allah, I beseech You by all Your Light.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ بِأَوْسَعِهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min rahmatika bi-awsa`iha

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to give me from Your mercy at its utmost inclusiveness,
and all Your mercy is inclusive.
O Allah, I beseech You by all your mercy.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ كَلِمَاتِكَ بِأَتَمِّهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min kalimatika bi-atammiha

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to give me from Your Words at their utmost completeness,
and all Your words are complete
O Allah, I beseech You by all Your Words.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ كَمَالِكَ بِأَكْمَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min kamalika bi-akmalihi

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to give me from Your perfections at their utmost perfectness
and all Your perfections are perfect.
O Allah, I beseech You by all Your perfections.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ أَسْمَائِكَ بِأَكْبَرِهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min asma'ika bi-akbariha

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to give me from Your Names the greatest of them ,
and all Your Names are great.
O Allah, I beseech You by all Your Names.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عِزَّتِكَ بِأَعَزِّهَا

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You to give me from Your might at its mightiest,
and all Your might is mighty.
O Allah, I beseech You by all your might.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ مَشِيئَتِكَ بِأَمْضَاهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min mashi'atika bi-amdaha

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to give me from Your Will at its utmost effectualness
and all Your willing is effectual.
O Allah, I beseech You by all Your Will.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ قُدْرَتِكَ بِٱلْقُدْرَةِ ٱلَّتِي ٱسْتَطَلْتَ بِهَا عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min qudratika bilqudrati allati istatalta biha `ala kulli shay'in

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to give me from Your that omnipotence which controls everything,
and all your powers are prevailing.
O Allah, I beseech You by all Your omnipotence.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عِلْمِكَ بِأَنْفَذِهِ

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to give me from Your knoweledge at its utmost pervasiveness,
and all Your is pervasive.
O Allah, I beseech You all by Your knowledge.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ قَوْلِكَ بِأَرْضَاهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min qawlika bi-ardahu

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You grant me from Your most admirable of sayings,
and all Your sayings are admirable.
O Allah, I beseech You by all Your sayings.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ مَسَائِلِكَ بِأَحَبِّهَا إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min masa'ilika bi-ahabbiha ilayka

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You to grant me from the most chersihed of requests made to You
and all requests made to you are cherished.
O Allah, I beseech You by all requests made to You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ شَرَفِكَ بِأَشْرَفِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min sharafika bi-ashrafihi

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to give me from Your dignity at its noblest,
and all Your dignity is noble.
O Allah, I beseech You by all Your dignity.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ سُلْطَانِكَ بِأَدْوَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min sultanika bi-adwamihi

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to grant me from Your most enduring authority,
and all Your authority is enduring.
O Allah, I beseech You by all Your authority.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ مُلْكِكَ بِأَفْخَرِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min mulkika bi-afkharihi

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to grant me from Your kingdom at its utmost magnificence,
and all Your kingdom is magnificent.
O Allah, I beseech You by Your entire kingdom.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عُلُوِّكَ بِأَعْلاهُ

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to grant me from Your highness at its utmost sublimity
and all Your eminence is sublime.
O Allah, I beseech You by all Your highness.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ مَنِّكَ بِأَقْدَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min mannika bi-aqdamihi

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to grant me from Your earliest of favours,
and all Your bounties are pre eternal.
O Allah, I beseech You by all Your bounties.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ آيَاتِكَ بِأَكْرَمِهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min ayatika bi-akramiha

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to grant me noblest of Your signs which gives out freely,
and all Your signs are noble.
O Allah, I beseech You by of all Your signs.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَا أَنْتَ فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلشَّأْنِ وَٱلْجَبَرُوتِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bima anta fihi min alshsha'ni waljabaruti

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You to give me whereby You exercises absolute authority and power,

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِكُلِّ شَأْنٍ وَحْدَهُ وَجَبَرُوتٍ وَحْدَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bikulli sha'nin wahdahu wa jabarutin wahdaha

translation.en: I beseech You by the works that engage You and Your prepotency, by every single work and every single prepotency.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَا تُجِيبُنِي بِهِ حِينَ أَسْأَلُكَ فَأَجِبْنِي يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bima tujibuni bihi hina as'aluka fa-ajibni ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You by that whereby You will answer my supplication So answer me, O Allah!

text.en:
You may then submit your requests, for they will be completely
settled, God willing.
Dua Ya Uddati

Shaykh al-Tusi has also mentioned the following
supplicatory prayer to be said at the last hours of Ramadan nights:

translation.en: O my means in troubles:
O my Companion in hardships:
O the Provider of my amenities;
O the utmost of my desires.
It is You Who conceals my defects,
Who relieves my apprehensions,
and Who overlooks my slips;
so, (please do) forgive my sin.
O Allah: I pray You for the submission of faith
before I encounter the submission of humiliation in Hellfire.

segments.arabic: يَا وَاحِدُ يَا أَحَدُ يَا صَمَدُ

translation.en: O the One: O the Absolute: O the Besought of all:

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
segments.transliteration: yaman lam yalid wa lam yulad

translation.en: O He Who neither begets nor is He begotten,

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu kufwan ahadun

translation.en: and there is none like to Him.
O He Who confers upon him who beseeches Him
on account of His sympathy and mercy;

segments.transliteration: wa yabtadiiu bilkhayri man lam yas-alhu

translation.en: and He Who initially grants welfare to those who have not asked for it,
on account of His liberality and generosity.
I beseech You in the name of Your endless generosity
that You bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa hab li rahmatan wasi`atan jami`atan

translation.en: and bestow upon me with mercy—vast and comprehensive—
by which I can win the welfare of this world as well as the Next World.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إنِّي أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا تُبْتُ إلَيْكَ مِنْهُ ثُمَّ عُدْتُ فِيهِ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni astaghfiruka limatubtu ilayka minhu thumm `udtu fihi

translation.en: O Allah: I do pray for Your forgiveness for the sins from which I had repented to You but I committed them again.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ خَيْرٍ أَرَدْتُ بِهِ وَجْهَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa astaghfiruka likulli khayrin aradtu bihi wajhaka

translation.en: And I pray for Your forgiveness for my righteous acts that although I intended them purely for Your sake,
some purposes that are not intended for You intruded upon them.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and pardon my transgression and my offenses
in the name of Your forbearance and magnanimity;
O the All-generous. O He- one who prays Him will never be disappointed;
one who seeks His rewards will never be devoid of goodness.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ عَلا فَلا شَيْءَ فَوْقَهُ،

translation.en: O He Who is so Elevated that nothing can ever be higher than He is;
and Who is so Nigh that nothing can ever be closer that He is:
(please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and have mercy upon me—
O He Who split asunder the sea for (Prophet) Moses—
this very night, this very night, this very night,
this very hour, this very hour, this very hour.
O Allah: (please do) purify my heart from hypocrisy;
and purify my acts from showing off;
and purity my tongue from telling untruths;
and purify my eye from treason,

segments.arabic: فَإنَّكَ تَعْلَمُ خَائِنَةَ الأَعْيُنِ وَمَا تُخْفِي الصُّدُورُ،
segments.transliteration: fa’innaka ta`lamu kha’inata ala`iuni wa matukhfy alssuduru

translation.en: for You know the stealYour looks and that which the breasts conceal.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ هذَا مَقَامُ الْعَائِذِ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ،
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi hadhamaqamu al`a’idhi bika mina alnnari

translation.en: O my Lord: this is the manner of him who seeks Your protection from Hellfire.

segments.arabic: هذَا مَقَامُ الْمُسْتَجِيرِ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ،

translation.en: This is the manner of him who seeks Your shelter against Hellfire.

segments.arabic: هذَا مَقَامُ الْمُسْتَغِيثِ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ،

translation.en: This is the manner of him who seeks Your aid against Hellfire.

segments.arabic: هذَا مَقَامُ الْهَارِبِ إلَيْكَ مِنَ النَّارِ،

translation.en: This is the manner of him who flees to You from Hellfire.

segments.arabic: هذَا مَقَامُ مَنْ يَبُوءُ لَكَ بِخَطِيئَتِهِ،

translation.en: This is the manner of him who returns to You carrying his offenses,
confessing of his sins,
and repenting to You—his Lord.
This is the manner of the miserable, the poor.
This is the manner of the fearful, the seeker of Your refuge.
This is the manner of the aggrieved, the distressed.
This is the manner of the depressing, the gloomy.
This is the manner of the stranger, the drowned.
This is the manner of the alienated, the frightened.

segments.arabic: هذَا مَقَامُ مَنْ لا يَجِدُ لِذَنْبِهِ غَافِراً غَيْرَكَ،
segments.transliteration: hadhamaqamu man layajidu lidhanbihi ghafiran ghayraka

translation.en: This is the manner of him who cannot find anyone save You to forgive his sins;
who cannot find anyone save You to give him power;
and who cannot find anyone save You to relieve his grief.
O Allah, O All-generous:

segments.arabic: لا تُحْرِقْ وَجْهِي بِالنَّارِ بَعْدَ سُجُودِي لَكَ وَتَعْفِيرِي
segments.transliteration: latuhriq wajhy bilnnari ba`da sujudy laka wa ta`firy

translation.en: (please) do not burn my face with Hellfire after I have prostrated myself before You and I have soiled my face for You.
Of course, this is not a personal favor that I have done to myself;

segments.arabic: بَلْ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَالْمَنُّ وَالتَّفَضُّلُ عَلَيَّ،

translation.en: rather it is on account of Your Praiseworthy favor and guidance to me.

segments.arabic: ارْحَمْ أَيْ رَبِّ أَيْ رَبِّ أَيْ رَبِّ...
segments.transliteration: arham ay rabb ay rabb ay rabbi…

translation.en: So, have mercy, O Lord, O Lord, O Lord…
upon my weakness,
upon my confusedness,
upon the softness of my skin,
upon the separation of my organs,

segments.transliteration: wa tanathura lahmy wa jismy wa jasadi

translation.en: upon the dispersal of my flesh, body, and corpse,

segments.transliteration: wa wahdaty wa wahshaty fi qabry

translation.en: upon my loneliness and lonesomeness in my grave,
and upon my anxiety at the least misfortune that inflicts me.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ يَا رَبِّ قُرَّةَ الْعَيْنِ وَالإغْتِبَاطَ
segments.transliteration: as’aluka ya rabbi qurrata al`ayni wal-aghtibata

translation.en: I beseech You, O Lord, for delight and happiness
on the Day of regret and remorse.

segments.arabic: بَيِّضْ وَجْهِي يَا رَبِّ يَوْمَ تَسْوَدُّ الْوُجُوهُ،
segments.transliteration: bayyid wajhy ya rabbi yawma taswaddu alwujuhu

translation.en: (Please do) whiten my face, O Lord, when some faces will be blackened.
(Please do) secure me against the Supreme Horror.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ الْبُشْرَى يَوْمَ تُقَلَّبُ الْقُلُوبُ وَالأَبْصَارُ،

translation.en: I beseech You for good tidings when hearts and sights shall be turned about
and for good tidings when I depart this life.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي أَرْجُوهُ عَوْناً لِي فِي حَيَاتِي،
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhy arjuhu `awnan li fi hayati

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Whom I hope for aiding me in my life
and Whom I want to act as my Provision on the day of my neediness.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي أَدْعُوهُ وَلا أَدْعُو غَيْرَهُ،
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhy ad`uhu wa laad`w ghayrahu

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Whom alone do I beseech and I never beseech anyone rather than Him;

segments.transliteration: wa law da`awtu ghayrahu lakhayyaba du`a’y

translation.en: and even if I beseech anyone else, he will definitely let me down.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي أَرْجُوهُ وَلا أَرْجُو غَيْرَهُ،
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhy arjuhu wa laarjw ghayrahu

translation.en: All praise be to Allah for Whom I hope and I never hope for anyone rather than Him;

segments.transliteration: wa law rajawtu ghayrahu la-akhlafa raja’y

translation.en: and even if I hope for anyone else, he will definitely disappoint me.
All praise be to Allah, the All-benefactor, the All-donor,
the All-favorer, the All-liberal,
the Lord of Majesty and Honor,
the Source of all bounties,
And the Cause of all good deeds,
the Ultimate Goal of all desires,
and the Answerer of all needs.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: warzuqny aliyaqina wa husna alzznni bika

translation.en: and grant me conviction and having good idea about You;
and fix my hope for You in my heart;
and deprive me of putting my hope in anyone other than You,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى لا أَرْجُوَ غَيْرَكَ وَلا أَثِقَ إلاَّ بِكَ،

translation.en: so that I shall hope for none but You and I shall trust none but You.
O He Who is Benignant to whom He pleases:

segments.arabic: أُلْطُفْ لِي فِي جَمِيعِ أَحْوَالِي بِمَا تُحِبُّ وَتَرْضَى،
segments.transliteration: altuf li fi jami`i ahwal-y bimatuhibbu wa tarda

translation.en: (please do) have benignity towards me in all my manners in the very way that You like and please.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ إنِّي ضَعِيفٌ عَلَى النَّارِ فَلا تُعَذِّبْنِي بِالنَّارِ،
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi inni da`ifun `alaalnnari falatu`adhdhibny bilnnari

translation.en: O my Lord: verily, I am too weak to encounter Your Fire; therefore, (please) do not punish me with Your Fire.

segments.transliteration: ya rabbi arham du`aiy wa tadarru`y

translation.en: O my Lord: (please do) have mercy upon my prayers, my earnest imploring,

segments.transliteration: wa khawfy wa dhully wa maskanaty

translation.en: my fear, my humiliation, my neediness,
my seeking Your protection, and my seeking Your refuge.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ إنِّي ضَعِيفٌ عَنْ طَلَبِ الدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi inni da`ifun `an talabi alddunya

translation.en: O my Lord: I am too weak to seek earnings in this world
and You are Ample-giving and All-generous.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ يَا رَبِّ بِقُوَّتِكَ عَلَى ذلِكَ،

translation.en: I beseech You, O my Lord, in the name of Your power over that,
and Your supremacy over it,
and Your dispensing with it,
and my urgent need for it
that You grant me sustenance in this year,
in this month,
on this day,
at this hour—

segments.arabic: رِزْقاً تُغْنِينِي بِهِ عَنْ تَكَلُّفِ مَا فِي أَيْدِي النَّاسِ
segments.transliteration: rizqan tughniny bihi `an takallfi mafi aidy alnnasi

translation.en: sustenance by which You may make me dispense with what the others possess,
from Your sustenance, legal and nice.
O my Lord: from You do I ask;
and for You do I desire;
and for You do I hope;
and You are the worthiest of hope.

segments.transliteration: wa anta ahlu dhalika laarju ghayraka

translation.en: I hope for none but You
and I trust in none but You.
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy:
O my Lord: I have wronged myself;
so, (please do) forgive me, have mercy upon me, and grant me good health.
O the Hearer of all sounds;
O He Who takes precedence over everything that passes away;
O the Reviver of all souls after death;
O He Whom is not screened by murk;
O He Whom is not made confused by sounds;
O He Whom is not engaged by something against another thing;

segments.arabic: أَعْطِ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّى اللّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ أَفْضَلَ مَا سَأَلَكَ،
segments.transliteration: a`ti muhammadan sallaallahu `alayhi wa alihi afdala masa-alaka

translation.en: (please do) grant Muhammad—peace be upon him and his Family—the best of all that for which he has besought You
and the best of all that which has been asked from You for him

segments.arabic: وَأَفْضَلَ مَا أَنْتَ مَسْؤُولٌ لَهُ إلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wa afdala maanta mas'ulun lahu ilayawmi alqiyamati

translation.en: and the best all that which You shall be asked for him up to the Resurrection Day;

segments.arabic: وَهَبْ لِيَ الْعَافِيَةَ حَتَّى تُهَنِّئَنِي الْمَعِيشَةَ،
segments.transliteration: wa hab liya al`afiyata hattatuhanniany alma`ishata

translation.en: and grant me good health so that I may enjoy my life;

segments.arabic: وَاخْتِمْ لِي بِخَيْرٍ حَتَّى لا تَضُرَّنِي الذُّنُوبُ.

translation.en: and end my life with a happy end so that my sins may not injure me.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ رَضِّنِي بِمَا قَسَمْتَ لِي حَتَّى لا أَسْأَلَ أَحَداً شَيْئاً.
segments.transliteration: allahumma raddiny bimaqasamta li hattalaasala ahadan shay’an

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) make me satisfied with that which You have decided for me so that I will not ask anyone else for anything.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
And open to me the stores of Your mercy

segments.arabic: وَارْحَمْنِي رَحْمَةً لا تُعَذِّبُنِي بَعْدَهَا أَبَداً فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ،
segments.transliteration: warhamny rahmatan latu`adhdhibuny ba`daha abadan fi alddunyawal-akhirati

translation.en: and cover me with a mercy from You owing to which You will not punish me neither in this world nor in the Hereafter;

segments.arabic: وَارْزُقْنِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْوَاسِعِ رِزْقاً حَلالاً طَيِّباً
segments.transliteration: warzuqny min fadlika alwasi`i rizqan halalan tayyiban

translation.en: and grant me from Your limitless favor sustenance, legal and nice,

segments.arabic: لا تُفْقِرُنِي إلَى أَحَدٍ بَعْدَهُ سِوَاكَ،

translation.en: owing to which You will make me dispense with anyone other than You;
increasing my gratitude to You,
and my neediness and submission before You,

segments.transliteration: wa bika `amman siwaka ghinan wa ta`affufan

translation.en: and increasing my dispensing with and doing without everyone save You.
O the All-benefactor; O the All-donor;
O the All-favorer; O the All-liberal,
O the All-omnipotent; O the All-sovereign;
(please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and relieve me from all grievances;
and decide the most excellent for me;

segments.transliteration: wa barik li fi jami`i a’umury

translation.en: and bless all my affairs;
and settle all my needs.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ يَسِّرْ لِي مَا أَخَافُ تَعْسِيرَهُ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) make easy for me all that which I anticipate to be difficult,

segments.arabic: فَإنَّ تَيْسِيرَ مَا أَخَافُ تَعْسِيرَهُ عَلَيْكَ سَهْلٌ يَسِيرٌ،
segments.transliteration: fa’inna taysira maakhafu ta`sirahu `alayka sahlun yasirun

translation.en: for it is quite easy for You to make easy for me that which I anticipate to be difficult;
and (please do) facilitate for me that I anticipate to be complicated;
and give vent to that which I anticipate to be narrow;
and save me from that which I anticipate to cause me distress;
and guard me from that which I anticipate to cause me misfortune;
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
O Allah: (please do) fill in my heart with love for You,
with fear from You,
with belief in You,
with faith in You,
with terror from You,
and with eagerness to You;
O the Lord of Majesty and Honor.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إنَّ لَكَ حُقُوقاً فَتَصَدَّقْ بِهَا عَلَيَّ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna laka huquqan fatasaddaq biha`alayya

translation.en: O Allah: I owe You some rights; so, (please do) consider them alms and excuse me from their liabilities.
I also owe people some responsibilities; so, (please do) release me from their charges.

segments.transliteration: wa qad awjabta likulli dayfin qiran

translation.en: You have instructed us to honor our guests;

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا ضَيْفُكَ فَاجْعَلْ قِرَايَ اللَّيْلَةَ الْجَنَّةَ،
segments.transliteration: wa anadayfuka faj`al qiraya allaylata aljannata

translation.en: and I am Your guest at this night; so, (please do) decide Paradise for me as Your honoring me at this night.
O the Grantor of Paradise;
O the Grantor of forgiveness;

segments.transliteration: wa lahawla wa laquwwata illa bika

translation.en: and there is no power nor might save with You.

text.en: Dua Mujeer
Recited on the Days of Ayyamul Baydh (13th 14th & 15th)

This is a supplication of high eminence which is reported to have been brought by Angel Jibreel for the Holy Prophet (pbuh) when he was engrossed in prayers in Maqam-e-Ibrahim. Kafa'ami has reported this supplication in Baladul Amin and in Misbah. It is mentioned by him that the reward for the one reciting it during the Ayyam al-bidh ( i.e. on 13th, 14th & 15th day) of the Holy month of Ramadan, is that his sins are forgiven even if they are in such plenty as the drops of rain water, leaves of trees or sand of a desert. It is also very effective for the cure of the sick, fulfillment of debts, acquisition of wealth and relief from grief.

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful
Glory be to You. O Allah!
Exalted are You. O Beneficent!

“Glory be to You. Verily, I have been a wrongdoer.”

segments.transliteration: fastajabna lahu wa najjaynahu mina alghammi

translation.en: “So We heard his prayer and saved him from the anguish
Thus We save believers.”

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ اجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala sayyidina muhammadin wa alihi ajma`ina

translation.en: Blessings of Allah be on our chief, Muhammad and his Household, one and all.
(All) praise be to Allah the Lord of the worlds.

segments.transliteration: wa hasbuna allahu wa ni`ma alwakilu

translation.en: Sufficient for us is Allah. He is the Best Protector.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: There is no power and no might except (with) Allah, the High, the Great.

text.en: Dua Hajj

In al-Kafi, al-Kulayni has narrated on the authority of Abu-Basir
that Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.) used to say the following supplicatory prayer
in Ramadan:

This supplication is called Dua al-Hajj. It has been narrated by
Sayyid Ibn Tawus in al-Iqbal who said that Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.) used
to say this supplicatory prayer after the Maghrib (sunset) Prayers in
Ramadan. Moreover, Shaykh al-Kaf’ami, in al-Balad al-Amin, has
narrated that it is recommended to say this supplicatory prayer every
day in Ramadan and especially at the first night of it. As to Shaykh al-
Mufid, he, in his book of al-Muqni’ah, has mentioned that this
supplicatory prayer is exclusively said at the first night of Ramadan
after the Maghrib Prayer.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إنِّي بِكَ وَمِنْكَ أَطْلُبُ حَاجَتِي،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni bika waminka atlubu hajati

translation.en: O Allah: From You and by You, I beseech for settling my need,
If others beg people for settling their needs,

segments.arabic: فَإنِّي لا أَطْلُبُ حَاجَتِي إلا مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: fa-inni la atlubu hajati illa mink

translation.en: I ask none except You for settling my need;
From You alone, since You have no partner with You
and I thus implore You in the name of Your favor and Your pleasure,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ

translation.en: to send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَ لِي فِي عَامِي هذَا إلَى بَيْتِكَ الْحَرَامِ سَبِيلاً
segments.transliteration: wa-an taj'ala li fi `ami hadha ila baytikal-harami sabila

translation.en: And to choose for me a way to Your Holy House this year:

segments.arabic: حِجَّةً مَبْرُورَةً مُتَقَبَّلَةً زَاكِيةً خَالِصَةً لَكَ
segments.transliteration: hijjatan mabruratan mutaqabbalatan zakiyatan khalisatan lak

translation.en: A pilgrimage that is admitted, accepted, pure, and sincerely for You
By which You delight me,
And raise my rank with You
And to confer upon me with the grace of making me cast my sight down (against what is illegal for me to look at)
And making me act chastely

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ أَكُفَّ بِهَا عَنْ جَمِيعِ مَحَارِمِكَ

translation.en: And making me stop committing any deed that You have deemed unlawful

segments.arabic: حَتَّى لا يَكُونَ شَيْءٌ آثَرَ عِنْدِي مِنْ طَاعَتِكَ وَخَشْيَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: hatta la yakuna shay`un athara `indi min ta’atika wakhashyatik

translation.en: So that nothing will be more preferred in my sight than the obedience to You and the fear of You
And doing all that which You love,
And avoiding all that which You have detested and warned against.

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ ذلِكَ فِي يُسْرٍ وَيَسَارٍ وَعَافِيَةٍ وَمَا أَنْعَمْتَ بِهِ عَلَيَّ،
segments.transliteration: waj’al dhalika fi yusrin wayasarin wa-`afiyatin wama an’amta bihi `alayy

translation.en: And (please) make all that take place with easiness, lenience, and good health as well as the grave that You have bestowed upon me.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ وَفَاتِي قَتْلاً فِي سَبِيلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa-as`aluka an tahala wafati qatlan fi sabilik

translation.en: And I beseech You to cause me to die as martyr for Your sake,
Under the pennon of Your Prophet and in the line of Your intimate servants.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَقْتُلَ بِي أَعْدَاءَكَ وَأَعْدَاءَ رَسُولِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa-as`aluka an taqtula bi a’da`aka wa-a’da`a rasulik

translation.en: And I ask You to make me the means of killing Your enemies and the enemies of Your Messenger.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُكْرِمَنِي بِهَوَانِ مَنْ شِئْتَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa-as`aluka an tukrimani bihawani man shi`ta min khalqik

translation.en: And I ask You to honor me through humiliating any one of Your created beings that You choose,

segments.arabic: وَلا تُهِنِّي بِكَرَامَةِ أَحَدٍ مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِكَ.
segments.transliteration: wala tuhinni bikaramati ahadin min awliya`ik

translation.en: And not to humiliate me through honoring any of Your intimate servants.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ لِي مَعَ الرَّسُولِ سَبِيلاً،

translation.en: O Allah: find me a way with the Messenger.
Allah is Sufficient unto me! Only that which Allah wants shall take place.

text.en: Ziyarat Imam Ali(as)
recited on on 21st of Ramadan

According to a hadith, Hazrat Khidr (á) came hurriedly to Imam Ali's (á) house on the day of his martyrdom, while he was weeping and reciting ayah of istirja Qur'an,Inna lillahahe wa Inna ilahay he rajeoon(2:156) he stood at the door of the Imam's home and said “Rahamkallah ho ya Abal Hassan” And enumerated many of his virtues.

His wording was like that of this ziyarat; The text that is considered as the Ziyarat of the Imam's (á) martyrdom day has been mentioned in “Hadiyyat al-Za'ir”. These words, quoted from al-Kafi 1:454,

translation.en: May Allah have mercy upon you, O Abu’l-hasan.

segments.arabic: كُنْتَ أَوَّلَ الْقَوْمِ إسْلاَماً وَأَخْلَصَهُمْ إيمَاناً
segments.transliteration: kunta awwalal-qawmi islaman wa akhlasahum imana

translation.en: You were the first of all in accepting Islam and the most sincere of all in faith,

segments.transliteration: wa ashaddahum yaqinan wa akhwafahum lillah

translation.en: And you were the firmest in conviction and the most Allah-fearing,

segments.arabic: وَأَعْظَمَهُمْ عَناءً وَأَحْوَطَهُمْ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa a’zamahum ‘ana-an wa ahwatahum ‘ala rasulil-lahi sallal-lahum ‘alayhi wa alih

translation.en: And you were the most steadfast (against ordeals for the sake of Islam) and the most watchful for Allah’s Messenger—peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.transliteration: wa amanahum ‘ala ashabihi wa afdalahum manaqib

translation.en: And you were the most careful for his companions and you were endowed with the most favorable merits,

segments.transliteration: wa akramahum sawabiqa wa arfa’ahum darajah

translation.en: And you were the foremost of everyone else in everything, and the owner of the most elevated rank,

segments.arabic: وَأَقْرَبَهُمْ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa aqrabahum min rasulil-lahi sallal-lahu ‘alayhi wa alih

translation.en: And you were the closest of them to Allah’s Messenger—peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَأَشْبَهَهُمْ بِهِ هَدْياً وَخُلُقاً وَسَمْتاً وَفِعْلاً
segments.transliteration: wa ashbahahum bihi hadyan wa khuluqan wa samtan wa fi’la

translation.en: And you were the most similar to him in guidance, morals, manners, and deeds,
And you were the owner of the most honorable position, and the most respected (by Almighty Allah and His Messenger).

segments.arabic: فَجَزَاكَ اللهُ عَنِ الإسْلاَمِ وَعَنْ رَسُولِهِ وَعَنِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ خَيْراً.

translation.en: May Allah reward you on behalf of Islam, the His Messenger, and the Muslims with the best rewarding.
You became stronger when his companions became weak,
And you advanced when they surrendered,
And you stood up (to face difficulties) when they became showed weak-heartedness,

segments.arabic: وَلَزَمْتَ مِنْهَاجَ رَسُولِ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ إذْ هُمْ أَصْحَابُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa lazamta minhaja rasulil-lahi sallal-lahu ‘alayhi wa alihi idh hum ashabuh

translation.en: And you abode by the course of Allah’s Messenger—peace be upon him and his Household—as they were his companions,
And you were truly his vicegerent.
No one could ever compete with you or vie with you in this position
In spite of the existence of hypocrites and the despise of the unbelievers,
And the malice of the enviers and the disgrace of the wicked ones.
You thus managed the matters when they failed to do so
And you spoke (the truth) when they stammered,
And you carried on with the light of Allah when they stopped.
As they followed you, they were guided (to the true path),

segments.transliteration: wakunta akhfadahum sawtan wa a’lahum qunuta

translation.en: You voice was the lowest (out of politeness) and was the highest in supplication,

segments.transliteration: wa aqallahum kalaman wa aswabahum nutqa

translation.en: And you were the least in speaking and the you were the most eloquent of them,

segments.transliteration: wa akbarahum ra-yan wa ashja’ahum qalba

translation.en: And you were the most apposite in opinions and the most courageous,

segments.arabic: وَأَشَدَّهُمْ يَقِيناً وَأَحْسَنَهُمْ عَمَلاً وَأَعْرَفَهُمْ بِالأُمُورِ.
segments.transliteration: wa ashaddahum yaqinan wa ahsanahum ‘amalan wa a’rafahum bil-umur

translation.en: And you were the firmest in conviction, the best of them in deeds, and the most learned in questions.

segments.arabic: كُنْتَ وَاللهِ يَعْسُوباً لِلدِّينِ أَوَّلاً وَآخِراً:
segments.transliteration: kunta wallahi ya’suban liddini awwalan wa akhira

translation.en: By Allah (I swear), you were the true leader of the religion first and last:

segments.arabic: اَلأوَّلَ حِينَ تَفَرَّقَ النَّاسُ وَالآخِرُ حِينَ فَشِلُوا
segments.transliteration: al-awwala hina tafarraqan-nasu wal-akhiru hin fashilu

translation.en: You were thus the first (of the enduring ones) when the other people departed, and you were the last (in steadfastness) when they failed.

segments.arabic: كُنْتَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ أباً رَحِيماً إذْ صَارُوا عَلَيْكَ عِيَالاً
segments.transliteration: kunta lil-mu`minina aban rahiman idh saru ‘alayka ‘iyala

translation.en: For the believers, you were merciful father, as they were your dependants;
So, you carried the burdens that they were too weak to carry,

segments.arabic: وَحَفِظْتَ مَا أَضَاعُوا وَرَعَيْتَ مَا أَهْمَلُوا
segments.transliteration: wa hafizta ma ada’u wa ra’ayta ma ahmalu

translation.en: And you preserved that which they forfeited, and you conserved that which they neglected,

segments.arabic: وَشَمَّرْتَ إذْ اجْتَمَعُوا وَعَلَوْتَ إذْ هَلَعُوا
segments.transliteration: wa shammarta idhij-tama’u wa ‘alawta idh hala’u

translation.en: And you prepared yourself for facing those who allied (against Islam) and you advanced when they were dismayed,

segments.arabic: وَصَبَرْتَ إذْ أَسْرَعُوا وَأَدْرَكْتَ أَوْتَارَ مَا طَلَبُوا
segments.transliteration: wa sabarta idh asra’u wa adrakta awtara ma talabu

translation.en: And you resisted when they hurried (in absconding) and you achieved the goals for which they fought,

segments.transliteration: wa nalu bika ma lam tahtasibu

translation.en: And they tasted at your hands that which they had not expected.

segments.arabic: كُنْتَ عَلَى الْكَافِرِينَ عَذَاباً صَبّاً وَنَهْباً

translation.en: You were thus incessant and relentless torment on the unbelievers
And you were support and shelter for the believers.
Thus, I swear by Allah that you won its bliss and gained its reward,

segments.transliteration: wa ahrazta sawabighaha wa dhahabta bifada`iliha

translation.en: And you attained its merits and prevailed on its worth.

segments.arabic: لَمْ تَفْلُلْ حُجَّتُكَ وَلَمْ يَزِغْ قَلْبُكَ
segments.transliteration: lan taflul hujjatuka walam yazigh qalbuk

translation.en: Your argument was never weak and your heart never deviated,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ تَضْعُفْ بَصِيرَتُكَ وَلَمْ تَجْبُنْ نَفْسُكَ وَلَمْ تَخُنْ
segments.transliteration: walam tad-‘uf basiratuka walam tajbun nafsuka walam takhun

translation.en: And your sagacity was never feeble, and your determination never cowered, and you never betrayed.
You were as firm as mountain, as storms could never displace you,

segments.arabic: وَكُنْتَ كَمَا قَالَ: أَمِنَ النَّاسُ فِي صُحْبَتِكَ وَذَاتِ يَدِكَ.
segments.transliteration: wakunta kama qala aminan-nasu fi suhbatika wadhati yadik

translation.en: And you were as exactly as what was said about you: People felt secure under your government and in what was entrusted with you.

segments.arabic: وَكُنْتَ كَمَا قَالَ: ضَعِيفاً فِي بَدَنِكَ قَوِيّاً فِي أَمْرِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: wakunta kama qala da’ifan fi badanika qawiyyan fi amrillah

translation.en: You were also as exactly as what was said about you: modest in your body and strong in carrying out the orders of Allah,

segments.arabic: مُتَوَاضِعاً فِي نَفْسِكَ عَظِيماً عِنْدَ اللهِ

translation.en: Humble in yourself and enjoying a great standing with Allah,

segments.arabic: كَبِيراً في الأرْضِ جَلِيلاً عِنْدَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Great in the earth and lofty in the view of the believers.

segments.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنْ لأِحَدٍ فِيكَ مَهْمِزٌ وَلا لِقَائِلٍ فِيكَ مَغْمَزٌ
segments.transliteration: lam yakun li-ahadin fika mahmazun wala liqa`ilin fika maghmaz

translation.en: None could ever find fault with you, and none could ever speak evil of you,

segments.arabic: وَلا لأِحَدٍ فِيكَ مَطْمَعٌ وِلا لأحَدٍ عِنْدَكَ هَوَادَةٌ.
segments.transliteration: wala li-ahadin fika matma’un wala li-ahadin ‘indaka hawadah

translation.en: And you never desired for anyone, And you were never lenient (unfairly) to anyone.

segments.arabic: الضَّعِيفُ الذَّلِيلُ عِنْدَكَ قَوِيٌّ عَزِيزٌ حَتَّى تَأخُذَ لَهُ بِحَقِّهِ
segments.transliteration: ad-da’ifudh-dhalilu ‘indaka qawiyyun ‘azizun hatta ta`khudha lahu bihaqqih

translation.en: The weak, humble one was strong and mighty in your view until you give him back his right,

segments.arabic: وَالْقَوِيُّ العَزِيزُ عِنْدَكَ ضَعِيفٌ ذَلِيلٌ حَتَّى تَأخُذَ مِنْهُ الْحَقَّ
segments.transliteration: wal-qawiyyul-‘azizu ‘indaka da’ifun dhalilun hata ta`khudha minhul-haqq

translation.en: And the strong, mighty one was weak in your view until you take the others’ rights from him.

segments.arabic: وَالْقَرِيبُ وَالْبَعِيدُ عِنْدَكَ فِي ذَلِكَ سَوَاءٌ.

translation.en: The near and the remote were equal in your view.
You habit was to be right, honest, and kind,
And your words were ruling and determination,
And your custom was forbearance and fortitude,

segments.arabic: وَرَأْيُكَ عِلْمٌ وَعَزْمٌ فِي مَا فَعَلْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa ra`yuka ‘ilmun wa ‘azmun fi ma fa’alt

translation.en: And your view was knowledge and firmness in whatever you did.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ نُهِجَ بِكَ السَّبِيلُ وَسُهِّلَ بِكَ الْعَسِيرُ
segments.transliteration: waqad nuhija bikas-sabilu wa sahhala bikal-‘asir

translation.en: Through you, the right path was taken and the difficult was made easy,

segments.arabic: وَأُطْفِئَتِ النِّيرَانُ وَاعْتَدَلَ بِكَ الدِّينُ وَقَوِيَ بِكَ الإسْلاَمُ وَالمُؤمِنُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa utfi`atin-niran wa’tudila bikad-dinu waqawiya bikal-islamu wal-mu`minun

translation.en: Fires were also extinguished by you and the religion became even at your hands, and Islam and the believers because mighty because of you,

segments.arabic: وَسَبَقْتَ سَبْقاً بَعِيداً وَأتْعَبْتَ مَنْ بَعْدَكَ تَعَباً شَدِيداً
segments.transliteration: wasabaqta sabqan ba’idan wa at-‘abta man ba’daka ta’aban shadida

translation.en: You thus advanced in great strides and stopped and curbed the wrongdoings of those who came after you.

segments.arabic: فَجَلَلْتَ عَنِ الْبُكَاءِ وَعَظُمَتْ رَزِيَّتُكَ فِي السَّمَاءِ

translation.en: You are thus too lofty to be mourned and the calamity (of losing you) was so astounding for the inhabitants of the heavens,
And this calamity undermined all people.
Surely, we are Allah's and to Him we shall surely return.

segments.arabic: رَضِينَا عَنِ اللهِ قَضَائَهُ وسَلَّمْنا للهِ أمْرَهُ

translation.en: We succumb to Allah’s acts and to His matters do we submit.

segments.arabic: فَواللهِ لَمْ يُصَبِ المُسْلِمونَ بِمِثْلِك أبَداً.

translation.en: By Allah I swear, the calamity of losing you is the ever most catastrophic for the Muslims.

segments.arabic: كُنْتَ لِلمُؤمِنِينَ كَهْفاً وَحِصْناً وَقُنَّةً رَاسِياً
segments.transliteration: kunta lil-mu`minina kahfan wa hisnan wa qunnatan rasiya

translation.en: You were haven, shelter, and unshakable fortress of the believers.
And you were, at the same time, firm and furious on the opposing unbelievers.

segments.arabic: فَألْحَقَكَ اللهُ بِنَبِيِّهِ وَلاَ حَرَمَنا أجْرَكَ ولا أَضَلَّنا بَعْدَكَ.
segments.transliteration: fa alhaqakal-lahu binabiyyihi wala haramana ajraka wala adallana ba’dak

translation.en: May Allah join you to His Prophet and may He never deprive us of the reward of our grief for you, and may He never mislead us after you.

name: Aamal/Takbeer

text.en: It is recommended to perform ghusl at sunset on the Night of Eid al-Fitr which includes the physical bath of the body and the [spiritual] bath of purifying hearts from sins. and it has also been narrated that the ghusl should be taken at the end of the Night of Eid. (Ibid. H. 772 from al-Iqbaal1, 457)

Keep Awake in Worship
It is recommended to spend the whole night with offering prayers, supplicating, imploring for forgiveness, and staying at mosques.

Holy Prophet (s): Allah (swt) pours down good (al-khyayr) in abundance on 4 nights: Night of [Eid) al-Adhaa, [Eid] al-Fitr, . . (Muhammad al-Ray Shahri, Shahrullah fil-kitaab wal-sunnah, p. 495, H. 767 taken from Kanzul ‘ummal, 12, 322, H. 35215) AND
"He who keeps awake on the Nights of Two Eids (i.e. al-Fitr & al-Adhaa) expecting reward from Allah (muhtasiban lillah), his heart would not die on the day when hearts [of others] die" (Sunan ibn Maajah 1, 567, 1782)
Imam Ali (a): If you can preserve [the importance] of Nights of Fitr and Nahr . . . then do so; say a lot of supplications, prayers and recitation of the Qur’an. (Ibid, p. 496, H. 769 taken from Misbah al-tahajjud, p 852 from Harith b. ‘Abdullah)

Imam al-Sadiq (a): The Night of Fitr is the night of receiving in full the reward of the laborer (Ibid, H. 770 from al-Hidayah, p. 210)

In al-Fiqh attributed to Imam al-Ridha (a): Put efforts in spending the Night of Fitr in supplications and keeping awake. (Ibid, H. 771 from Fiqh al-Ridha p. 206)
It is also highly recommended to recite Sura 67 Al Mulk in night of EiD

Imam al-Sadiq (a): He who visits the grave of al-Husayn (a) on three nights, Allah forgives his past and future sins. “Which are these nights,” asked ‘Abdur Rahman b. Hajjaj. The Imam said, “the Night of Fitr, Night of al-adhaa and Night of the Middle of Sha‘baan.” (Ibid. H. 781 from Tahdhib al-ahkam 6, 49, 112).
Recite the following “takbeerat” at the end of Maghrib / Ishaa / Fajr and also on Eid Prayers

translation.en: Allah is Great. Allah is Great.
There is no god save Allah.
And Allah is Great.Allah is Great.
All praise be to Allah.
All praise be to Allah for He has shown us the Right Path.
All thanks be to Him for that which He has conferred upon us.

subcategory: Ramadan - Dua & Aamal for Eid Night and Day

name: Salaat/Dua after Maghrib

text.en:
Third: Fourth: After accomplishing the Maghrib obligatory and
supererogatory prayers, it is recommended to raise the hands towards
the sky and say the following:

segments.arabic: يا ذا المَنِّ وَالطَّوْلِ ، يا ذا الجُودِ ، يا مُصْطَفِيَ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَناصِرَهُ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَاغْفِرْ لِي كُلَّ ذَنْبٍ أَحْصَيْتَهُ وَهُوَ عِنْدَكَ فِي كِتابٍ مُبِينٍ.

text.en:
Then, it is recommended to prostrate oneself and repeat the
following statement one hundred times:

Then, one may pray Almighty Allah for all needs required, for they
shall be granted, by Almighty Allah’s permission.Then invoke Allah to fulfill your legitimate desires.
According to the narration mentioned by Shaykh al-Tusi, it is recommended to prostrate after the Maghrib and `Isha' Prayers and then say the following supplication:

translation.en: O the Lord of power;
O the Lord of bounty;
O He Who has chosen Muhammad and granted him victory;
(please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and forgive me every sin that I have committed

segments.arabic: وَنَسِيتُهُ أَنَا وَهُوَ عِنْدَكَ فِي كِتَابٍ مُبِينٍ
segments.transliteration: wa nasituhu ana wa huwa `indaka fi kitabin mubinin

translation.en: and forgotten, but it is recorded with You in a Manifest Record.

text.en: say one hundred times

translation.en: I turn repentant unto Allah

text.en:
It is recommended to offer a two unit prayer reciting, in the
first unit, Surah al-Faatehah once and repeating Surah al-Tawheed one
thousand times and reciting, in the second unit, Surah al-Faatehah
once and Surah al-Tawheed once only. After accomplishment, it is
recommended to prostrate and say the following:
After that, the following supplicatory prayer should be said:

segments.arabic: يا ذا المَنِّ وَالجُودِ ، يا ذا المَنِّ وَالطَّوْلِ ، يا مُصْطَفِيَ مُحَمَّدٍ صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ وَافْعَلْ بِي كَذا وَكَذا

text.en:
Then, one may pray for the granting of one’s personal needs.
It is reported that when Imam AliAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.) used to
offer this prayer, he would say, “I swear by Him Who grasps my soul,
Almighty Allah shall definitely respond to whoever offers this prayer
and then prays Him for granting his needs, and Almighty Allah shall
forgive him even if his sins would be as much as the pebbles in
deserts.”

According to another narration, Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 is repeated one
hundred times, not one thousand. Yet, this narration has mentioned
that this prayer is offered after the Maghrib obligatory and
supererogatory prayers.

Having mentioned this prayer, Shaykh al-Tusi and Sayyid Ibn
Tawus recorded that the following supplicatory prayer should be said
after the prayer:

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
favor on me with Your pleasure,
grant me amnesty through Your munificence,

segments.arabic: وَتُوَسِّعَ عَلَيَّ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ ٱلْحَلاَلِ ٱلطَّيِّبِ
segments.transliteration: wa tuwassi`a `alayya min rizqika alhalali alttayyibi

translation.en: and expand Your lawful, good sustenance to me

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ حَيْثُ احْتَسِبُ وَمِنْ حَيْثُ لاَ احْتَسِبُ
segments.transliteration: wa min haythu ahtasibu wa min haythu la ahtasibu

translation.en: from whence I expect and from whence I do not,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي عَبْدُكَ لَيْسَ لِي احَدٌ سِوَاكَ

translation.en: for I am Your servant, I have no one else other than You,
and there is no one to whom I turn to other than You!
O Most Merciful of the Merciful!
Only that which Allah wills takes place.

segments.arabic: لاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظيمِ
segments.transliteration: la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: There is no power except in Allah, the High, the Great.

text.en: One may then prostrate and say the following:

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!

segments.arabic: يَا رَبُّ يَا رَبُّ يَا رَبُّ
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi ya rabbi ya rabbi

translation.en: O Lord-Nourisher! O Lord-Nourisher! O Lord-Nourisher!
O He Who sends down blessing!
To You only are all desires turned.

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ بِكُلِّ ٱسْم فِي مَخْزُونِ ٱلْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bikulli ismin fi makhzuni alghaybi `indaka

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of every name treasured in Your invisible collection,
and in the name of Your celebrated names,
inscribed on the hangings of Your Throne,

segments.arabic: انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an taqbala minni shahra ramadana

translation.en: to accept my offerings made in the month of Ramadan,

segments.arabic: وَتَكْتُبَنِي مِنَ ٱلْوَافِدينَ إِلىٰ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْحَرَامِ
segments.transliteration: wa taktubani min alwafidina ila baytika alharami

translation.en: to record my name in the list of those who will journey to Your Sacred House,
to overlook my grand sins,

segments.arabic: وَتَسْتَخْرِجَ لِي يَا رَبِّ كُنُوزَكَ يَا رَحْمٰنُ
segments.transliteration: wa tastakhrija li ya rabbi kunuzaka ya rahmanu

translation.en: to demonstrate, O Lord, before me Your treasures, O All-beneficent!

text.en:
inth: It is recommended to offer a prayer of fourteen units and to
recite Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 once, <ref=1:2:255>Ayah al-Kursi</ref>
 once, and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 three times at each unit. The reward of offering each unit of
this prayer is as same as the reward of forty-year worship as well as
the reward of each and every one who has observed fasting and
offered prayers in this month.

Tenth: In Misbah al-Mutahajjid, Shaykh al-Tusi says: At the last
hour of this night, you may bathe yourself and sit in your prayer-place
until dawn

subcategory: Ramadan - Dua & Aamal for Eid Night and Day

name: Dua Ya Daemal

text.en: Repeat 10 times

translation.en: O He Who is ever-Favorer on the beings!
O He Who is openhandedly Bestower of gifts!
O He Who is the Giver of sublime donations!
Bless Muhammad and his Household,
the best of all creatures in traits,
and forgive us, O Lord of Highness,
at this evening.

subcategory: Ramadan - Dua & Aamal for Eid Night and Day

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
favor on me with Your pleasure,
grant me amnesty through Your munificence,

segments.arabic: وَتُوَسِّعَ عَلَيَّ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ ٱلْحَلاَلِ ٱلطَّيِّبِ
segments.transliteration: wa tuwassi`a `alayya min rizqika alhalali alttayyibi

translation.en: and expand Your lawful, good sustenance to me

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ حَيْثُ احْتَسِبُ وَمِنْ حَيْثُ لاَ احْتَسِبُ
segments.transliteration: wa min haythu ahtasibu wa min haythu la ahtasibu

translation.en: from whence I expect and from whence I do not,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي عَبْدُكَ لَيْسَ لِي احَدٌ سِوَاكَ

translation.en: for I am Your servant, I have no one else other than You,
and there is no one to whom I turn to other than You!
O Most Merciful of the Merciful!
Only that which Allah wills takes place.

segments.arabic: لاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظيمِ
segments.transliteration: la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: There is no power except in Allah, the High, the Great.

text.en: One may then prostrate and say the following:

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!

segments.arabic: يَا رَبُّ يَا رَبُّ يَا رَبُّ
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi ya rabbi ya rabbi

translation.en: O Lord-Nourisher! O Lord-Nourisher! O Lord-Nourisher!
O He Who sends down blessing!
To You only are all desires turned.

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ بِكُلِّ ٱسْم فِي مَخْزُونِ ٱلْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bikulli ismin fi makhzuni alghaybi `indaka

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of every name treasured in Your invisible collection,
and in the name of Your celebrated names,
inscribed on the hangings of Your Throne,

segments.arabic: انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an taqbala minni shahra ramadana

translation.en: to accept my offerings made in the month of Ramadan,

segments.arabic: وَتَكْتُبَنِي مِنَ ٱلْوَافِدينَ إِلىٰ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْحَرَامِ
segments.transliteration: wa taktubani min alwafidina ila baytika alharami

translation.en: to record my name in the list of those who will journey to Your Sacred House,
to overlook my grand sins,

segments.arabic: وَتَسْتَخْرِجَ لِي يَا رَبِّ كُنُوزَكَ يَا رَحْمٰنُ
segments.transliteration: wa tastakhrija li ya rabbi kunuzaka ya rahmanu

translation.en: to demonstrate, O Lord, before me Your treasures, O All-beneficent!

subcategory: Ramadan - Dua & Aamal for Eid Night and Day

name: Dua after Fajr

text.en: On the Dawn Prayer for the Festival Day and Supplications to Follow - Ch 37 Iqbal Aamal - 4 Duas

1.Say the Takbir (God is Great) that was mentioned to be said following the evening and the night prayers of the night of the Fitr Festival after the morning prayer of the Festival. Then it should be followed with the following supplications which Muhammad ibn Abi Qarrih - may God have mercy upon him - has reported in his book. Muhammad ibn Abi Qarrih narrated the following in his book A‟mal-i-Shahr-i-Ramadhan1 on the authority of Abi Amru Muhammad ibn Muhammad ibn Nasr al-Sakooni – May God be pleased with him: “I asked Aba Bakr Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Uthman al-Baghdadi – may God have mercy on him – to read the supplications of the month of Ramadhan which his uncle Al-Sheikh Abu Ja‟far Muhammad ibn Uthman ibn Sa‟eed al-Umari - may God be pleased with him and please him. He took out a red notebook with supplications for the month of Ramadhan and presented it to me. One of these supplications is to be said after the morning prayer of the Festival day as follows.”

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي تَوَجَّهْتُ‌ إِلَيْكَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ أَمَامِي وَ عَلِيٍّ مِنْ خَلْفِي وَ عَنْ يَمِينِي وَ أَئِمَّتِي عَنْ يَسَارِي أَسْتَتِرُ بِهِمْ مِنْ عَذَابِكَ وَ أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ زُلْفَى لَا أَجِدُ أَحَداً أَقْرَبَ إِلَيْكَ مِنْهُمْ فَهُمْ أَئِمَّتِي فَآمِنْ بِهِمْ خَوْفِي مِنْ عِقَابِكَ وَ سَخَطِكَ وَ أَدْخِلْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِي عِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِينَ أَصْبَحْتُ بِاللَّهِ مُؤْمِناً [مُوقِناً] مُخْلِصاً عَلَى دِينِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ سُنَّتِهِ وَ عَلَى دِينِ عَلِيٍّ وَ سُنَّتِهِ وَ عَلَى دِينِ الْأَوْصِيَاءِ وَ سُنَّتِهِمْ آمَنْتُ بِسِرِّهِمْ وَ عَلَانِيَتِهِمْ وَ أَرْغَبُ إِلَى اللَّهِ تَعَالَى فِيمَا رَغِبَ فِيهِ إِلَيْهِ مُحَمَّدٌ وَ عَلِيٌّ وَ الْأَوْصِيَاءُ وَ أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا اسْتَعَاذُوا مِنْهُ وَ لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ وَ لَا عِزَّةَ وَ لَا مَنَعَةَ وَ لَا سُلْطَانَ إِلَّا لِلَّهِ الْوَاحِدِ الْقَهَّارِ الْعَزِيزِ الْجَبَّارِ الْمُتَكَبِّرِ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ‌ وَ مَنْ يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ بالِغُ أَمْرِهِ‌ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أُرِيدُكَ فَأَرِدْنِي وَ أَطْلُبُ مَا عِنْدَكَ فَيَسِّرْهُ لِي وَ اقْضِ لِي حَوَائِجِي فَإِنَّكَ قُلْتَ فِي كِتَابِكَ وَ قَوْلُكَ الْحَقُ‌ شَهْرُ رَمَضانَ الَّذِي أُنْزِلَ فِيهِ الْقُرْآنُ هُدىً لِلنَّاسِ وَ بَيِّناتٍ مِنَ الْهُدى‌ وَ الْفُرْقانِ‌ فَعَظَّمْتَ حُرْمَةَ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ بِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ وَ خَصَصْتَهُ وَ عَظَّمْتَهُ بِتَصْيِيرِكَ فِيهِ لَيْلَةَ الْقَدْرِ فَقُلْتَ‌ لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌ مِنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ تَنَزَّلُ الْمَلائِكَةُ وَ الرُّوحُ فِيها بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِمْ مِنْ كُلِّ أَمْرٍ سَلامٌ هِيَ حَتَّى مَطْلَعِ الْفَجْرِ اللَّهُمَّ وَ هَذِهِ أَيَّامُ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ قَدِ انْقَضَتْ وَ لَيَالِيهِ قَدْ تَصَرَّمَتْ وَ قَدْ صِرْتُ مِنْهُ يَا إِلَهِي إِلَى مَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي وَ أَحْصَى لِعَدَدِهِ [بِعَدَدِهِ‌] مِنْ عَدَدِي فَأَسْأَلُكَ يَا إِلَهِي بِمَا سَأَلَكَ بِهِ عِبَادُكَ الصَّالِحُونَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلَى أَهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَنْ تَتَقَبَّلَ [تَقْبَلَ‌] مِنِّي كُلَّمَا [مَا] تَقَرَّبْتُ بِهِ إِلَيْكَ وَ تَتَفَضَّلَ عَلَيَّ بِتَضْعِيفِ عَمَلِي وَ قَبُولِ تَقَرُّبِي وَ قُرُبَاتِي وَ اسْتِجَابَةِ دُعَائِي وَ هَبْ لِي مِنْكَ عِتْقَ رَقَبَتِي مِنَ النَّارِ وَ مُنَّ عَلَيَّ بِالْفَوْزِ بِالْجَنَّةِ وَ الْأَمْنِ يَوْمَ الْخَوْفِ مِنْ كُلِّ فَزَعٍ وَ مِنْ كُلِّ هَوْلٍ أَعْدَدْتَهُ لِيَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ أَعُوذُ بِحُرْمَةِ وَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيمِ وَ بِحُرْمَةِ نَبِيِّكَ وَ حُرْمَةِ الصَّالِحِينَ أَنْ يَنْصَرِمَ هَذَا الْيَوْمُ وَ لَكَ قِبَلِي تَبِعَةٌ تُرِيدُ أَنْ تُؤَاخِذَنِي بِهَا أَوْ ذَنْبٌ تُرِيدُ أَنْ تُقَايِسَنِي بِهِ وَ تُشْقِيَنِي وَ تَفْضَحَنِي بِهِ أَوْ خَطِيئَةٌ تُرِيدُ أَنْ تُقَايِسَنِي بِهَا وَ تَقْتَصَّهَا مِنِّي لَمْ تَغْفِرْهَا لِي وَ أَسْأَلُكَ بِحُرْمَةِ وَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيمِ الْفَعَّالِ لِمَا يُرِيدُ الَّذِي يَقُولُ لِلشَّيْ‌ءِ كُنْ فَيَكُونُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ إِنْ كُنْتَ رَضِيتَ عَنِّي فِي هَذَا الشَّهْرِ أَنْ تَزِيدَنِي فِيمَا بَقِيَ مِنْ عُمُرِي رِضًا فَإِنْ [وَ إِنْ‌] كُنْتَ لَمْ تَرْضَ عَنِّي فِي هَذَا الشَّهْرِ فَمِنَ الْآنَ فَارْضَ عَنِّي السَّاعَةَ السَّاعَةَ السَّاعَةَ وَ اجْعَلْنِي فِي هَذِهِ السَّاعَةِ وَ فِي هَذَا الْمَجْلِسِ مِنْ عُتَقَائِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ وَ طُلَقَائِكَ مِنْ جَهَنَّمَ وَ سُعَدَاءِ خَلْقِكَ‌ مَغْفِرَتِكَ وَ رَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِحُرْمَةِ وَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيمِ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ شَهْرِي هَذَا خَيْرَ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانٍ عَبَدْتُكَ فِيهِ وَ صُمْتُهُ لَكَ وَ تَقَرَّبْتُ بِهِ إِلَيْكَ مُنْذُ أَسْكَنْتَنِي فِيهِ أَعْظَمَهُ أَجْراً وَ أَتَمَّهُ نِعْمَةً وَ أَعَمَّهُ عَافِيَةً وَ أَوْسَعَهُ رِزْقاً وَ أَفْضَلَهُ عِتْقَا مِنَ النَّارِ وَ أَوْجَبَهُ رَحْمَةً وَ أَعْظَمَهُ مَغْفِرَةً وَ أَكْمَلَهُ رِضْوَاناً وَ أَقْرَبَهُ إِلَى مَا تُحِبُّ وَ تَرْضَى اللَّهُمَّ لَا تَجْعَلْهُ آخِرَ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانٍ صُمْتُهُ لَكَ وَ ارْزُقْنِي الْعَوْدَ ثُمَّ الْعَوْدَ حَتَّى تَرْضَى وَ بَعْدَ الرِّضَا وَ حَتَّى تُخْرِجَنِي مِنَ الدُّنْيَا سَالِماً وَ أَنْتَ عَنِّي رَاضٍ وَ أَنَا لَكَ مَرْضِيٌّ اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِيمَا تَقْضِي وَ تُقَدِّرُ مِنَ الْأَمْرِ الْمَحْتُومِ الَّذِي لَا يُرَدُّ وَ لَا يُبَدَّلُ أَنْ تَجْعَلَنِي مِمَّنْ تُثِيبُ [تنبت‌] وَ تُسَمِّي وَ تَقْضِي لَهُ وَ تَزِيدُ وَ تُحِبُّ لَهُ وَ تَرْضَى وَ أَنْ تَكْتُبَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ الْحَرَامِ فِي هَذَا الْعَامِ وَ فِي كُلِّ عَامٍ الْمَبْرُورِ حَجُّهُمُ الْمَشْكُورِ سَعْيُهُمُ الْمَغْفُورِ ذُنُوبُهُمُ الْمُتَقَبَّلِ عَنْهُمْ مَنَاسِكُهُمُ الْمُعَافَيْنَ [المعانين‌] عَلَى أَسْفَارِهِمُ الْمُقْبِلِينَ عَلَى نُسُكِهِمُ الْمَحْفُوظِينَ فِي أَنْفُسِهِمْ وَ أَمْوَالِهِمْ وَ ذَرَارِيهِمْ وَ كُلِّ مَا أَنْعَمْتَ بِهِ عَلَيْهِمْ اللَّهُمَّ اقْلِبْنِي مِنْ مَجْلِسِي هَذَا فِي شَهْرِي هَذَا فِي يَوْمِي هَذَا فِي سَاعَتِي هَذِهِ مُفْلِحاً مُنْجِحاً مُسْتَجَاباً لِي مَغْفُوراً ذَنْبِي مُعَافاً مِنَ النَّارِ وَ مُعْتَقاً مِنْهَا عِتْقاً لَا رِقَّ بَعْدَهُ أَبَداً وَ لَا رَهْبَةَ يَا رَبَّ الْأَرْبَابِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ فِيمَا شِئْتَ وَ أَرَدْتَ وَ قَضَيْتَ وَ قَدَّرْتَ وَ حَتَمْتَ وَ أَنْفَذْتَ أَنْ تُطِيلَ عُمُرِي وَ أَنْ تَنْسَأَنِي فِي أَجَلِي وَ أَنْ تُقَوِّيَ ضَعْفِي وَ أَنْ تُغْنِيَ فَقْرِي وَ أَنْ تَجْبُرَ فَاقَتِي وَ أَنْ تَرْحَمَ مَسْكَنَتِي وَ أَنْ تُعِزَّ ذُلِّي وَ أَنْ تَرْفَعَ ضَعَتِي وَ أَنْ تُغْنِيَ عَائِلَتِي وَ أَنْ تُؤْنِسَ وَحْشَتِي وَ أَنْ تُكْثِرَ قِلَّتِي وَ أَنْ تُدِرَّ رِزْقِي فِي عَافِيَةٍ وَ يُسْرٍ وَ خَفْضٍ وَ أَنْ تَكْفِيَنِي مَا أَهَمَّنِي مِنْ أَمْرِ دُنْيَايَ وَ آخِرَتِي وَ لَا تَكِلَنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي فَأَعْجِزَ عَنْهَا وَ لَا إِلَى النَّاسِ فَيَرْفُضُونِي وَ أَنْ تُعَافِيَنِي فِي دِينِي وَ بَدَنِي وَ جَسَدِي وَ رُوحِي وَ وُلْدِي وَ أَهْلِي وَ أَهْلِ مَوَدَّتِي وَ إِخْوَانِي وَ جِيرَانِي مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَ الْمُسْلِمَاتِ الْأَحْيَاءِ مِنْهُمْ وَ الْأَمْوَاتِ وَ أَنْ تَمُنَّ عَلَيَّ بِالْأَمْنِ وَ الْإِيمَانِ مَا أَبْقَيْتَنِي فَإِنَّكَ وَلِيِّي وَ مَوْلَايَ وَ ثِقَتِي وَ رَجَائِي وَ مَعْدِنُ مَسْأَلَتِي وَ مَوْضِعُ شَكْوَايَ وَ مُنْتَهَى رَغْبَتِي فَلَا تُخَيِّبْنِي فِي رَجَائِي يَا سَيِّدِي وَ مَوْلَايَ وَ لَا تُبْطِلْ طَمَعِي وَ رَجَائِي فَقَدْ تَوَجَّهْتُ إِلَيْكَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ قَدَّمْتُهُمْ إِلَيْكَ أَمَامِي وَ أَمَامَ حَاجَتِي وَ طَلِبَتِي وَ تَضَرُّعِي وَ مَسْأَلَتِي وَ اجْعَلْنِي [فَاجْعَلْنِي‌] بِهِمْ‌ وَجِيهاً فِي الدُّنْيا وَ الْآخِرَةِ وَ مِنَ الْمُقَرَّبِينَ‌ فَإِنَّكَ مَنَنْتَ عَلَيَّ بِمَعْرِفَتِهِمْ [بِهِمْ‌] فَاخْتِمْ‌ لِي بِهِمُ السَّعَادَةَ [بِالسَّعَادَةِ] إِنَّكَ عَلى‌ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ قَدِيرٌ زِيَادَةٌ فِيهِ مَنَنْتَ عَلَيَّ بِهِمْ فَاخْتِمْ لِي بِالسَّعَادَةِ وَ الْأَمْنِ وَ السَّلَامَةِ وَ الْإِيمَانِ وَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ وَ الرِّضْوَانِ وَ السَّعَادَةِ وَ الْحِفْظِ يَا اللَّهُ أَنْتَ لِكُلِّ حَاجَةٍ لَنَا فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ عَافِنَا وَ لَا تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيْنَا أَحَداً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِ وَ اكْفِنَا كُلَّ أَمْرٍ مِنْ أَمْرِ [أُمُورِ] الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَ الْإِكْرَامِ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ تَرَحَّمْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ سَلِّمْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَأَفْضَلِ مَا صَلَّيْتَ وَ بَارَكْتَ وَ رَحِمْتَ [وَ تَرَحَّمْتَ‌] وَ سَلَّمْتَ وَ تَحَنَّنْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَ آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ.

translation.en:
O‟ my God! I turn to You by Muhammad (MGB) in my front, Ali (MGB) on my back and my right side, the Divine Leaders on my left side, and I hide myself from Your Punishment by them. I seek nearness to You. I find no one closer to You than them. They are my leaders, so please secure my fear of Your Wrath and Punishment by them and with Your Mercy include me amongst Your Servants in the ranks of the righteous. I made it to the morning believing in God and sincerely devoted to Muhammad‟s (MGB) religion and his traditions; to Ali‟s (MGB) religion and his traditions; to the religion of the Trustees (MGB) and their traditions. I believe in their secrets and what they made public. I desire from God the Sublime what Muhammad, Ali and the Trustees desired. There is no Change or Power except with God – Exalted in Might, the Irresistible. I rely upon God. God suffices for whoever relies upon Him and God shall take care of his affairs. O‟ my God! I desire You so please desire me and I demand what You have so please make it easy for me. Please fulfill my needs as verily You said the following in Your Book and indeed whatever you say is right, “Ramadhan is the (month) in which was sent down the Qur‟an, as a guide to mankind, also clear (Signs) for guidance and judgment (Between right and wrong)…”1 You honored the sanctity of Ramadhan by sending down the Qur‟an during it and exalted it and made it unique with the Night of Destiny. You made it better than a thousand months. You said, “The Night of Destiny is better than a Thousand months.
