O people, certainly, the gates of Paradise are open wide in this
month; therefore, pray your Lord not to close them before you.
Similarly, the gates of Hellfire are close in this month; therefore, pray
your Lord not to open them for you. Devils are tied up in this month;
therefore, pray your Lord not to set them up over you...”

Shaykh al-Saduq has also narrated that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.)
used to release all prisoners and give all beggars when the month of
Ramadan comes upon him.

To sum it up, the month of Ramadan is the month of Allah. It is the
most honorable of all months. In this month, the doors of heavens,
gardens of Paradise, and mercy are opened while the doors of Hellfire
are closed. In this month too, there is a night at which the acts of
worship are more favorable than the worship of one thousand months.
In view of that, you are advised to take notice of this and consider
how to spend the nights and days of this month and how to keep your
organs and senses against committing any act of disobedience to
Almighty Allah.

Beware of being one of those who spend the nights of Ramadan
with sleeping and its days with negligence of mentioning your Lord.
In this respect, a Hadith reads, “Verily, Almighty Allah releases one
million persons from Hellfire at the last of each day in Ramadan and,
more specifically, at the hour of breaking the fasting. At the last night
and on the last day of Ramadan, He releases from Hellfire as same as
the number of all those whom He has released all over the month of
Ramadan.”

Dear reader: Beware lest the holy month of Ramadan comes upon
you and ends while you have still had some sins owing to which you
will be punished. Beware lest you are included with the sinners whom
are deprived of imploring for the forgiveness of their sins and praying
Almighty Allah for granting your desires.

Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) is reported to have said, “Verily, one
whom is not forgiven in Ramadan will not be forgiven up to the next
Ramadan unless (he participates in the season of the Hajj and thus) he
witnesses the ritual of the Halting at Mount ‘Arafat (al-wuquf
‘ala‘arafah).”

Moreover, try to keep yourself against all that which is deemed
forbidden by Almighty Allah and try your best not to break your
fasting with a forbidden thing. Finally, you should act upon the
following recommendation of our master, Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.):

“When you begin your day observing fasting, you should make
sure that your hearing, your sight, your hair, your sink, and all your
organs are also observing fasting, that is abstaining from not only the
forbidden acts but also the discommended ones.”

Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.) has also said, “Do not allow the day on which
you observe fasting to be like your other days.”
He has also said, “Verily, fasting is not the abstinence from food
and drink; rather, when you observe fasting, you should keep your
tongues from uttering falsehood, keep your sights from seeing
forbidden views, do not engage yourselves in disputes, do not envy
each other, do not backbite each other,

do not quarrel with each other,
do not swear, whether falsely or truly, do not insult each other, do not
revile at each other, do not wrong each other, do not engage yourselves in shameless disputes, do not be bored, do not be careless
of mentioning Almighty Allah or of prayers, abide by silence,
quietness, patience, truthfulness, and avoidance of the evildoers, avoid
perjury, lie, slander, contention, evil thinking, backbiting, and
talebearing

ready yourselves for the Next World and for your happy
days; that is the Advent of the Rising Imam from the Household of
Muhammad - peace be upon them all - expecting that which Almighty
Allah has promised you, preparing yourselves for meeting Almighty
Allah with tranquility, solemnity, piety, submission, and humiliation
of the slaves who fear and hope for their masters.

O observer of
fasting, purify your heart from defects, clean your inner self from filth,
wash your body from dirt, disavow the enemies of Almighty Allah,
act sincerely in His presence, abstain from all that which He has
deemed unlawful for you to do in secret and in public, fear Almighty
Allah as exactly as He deserves in secret and in public,

edicate
yourself to Almighty Allah during the days of your fasting, empty
your heart from all things save Him, and ready yourself to do
whatever is commanded by Him and to do whatever He has ordered
you to do. After you do all these, only then you are considered fasting
for the sake of Almighty Allah as truly as it should be. Carry out all
that which He has ordered you to do.

But if you violate any of these
matters, this will decline the degree of your fasting. My father - peace
be upon him - narrated that when the Holy Messenger of Allah - peace
be upon him and his Household - heard a woman, who claimed
observing fasting, insulting one of her bondwomen, he summoned her,
brought her some food, and ordered her to eat.

‘I am observing
fasting!’ she stated. But the Holy Prophet - peace be upon him and his
Household - answered, ‘How can you be fasting while you have
insulted your bondwoman?’ Verily, fasting is not to abstain from
eating and drinking; rather, Almighty Allah has decided fasting to be
screen from all spoken and done evildoings. Too little is the fasting
and too much is the feeling of hunger!’”

Imam AliAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.) has said, “Too many are the
fasting ones who suffer nothing but thirst. Likewise, too many are the
worshippers who suffer nothing but fatigue. How wonderful the
sleeping and eating of the courteous ones are!”

It has been narrated on the authority of Jabir ibn Yazid that Imam
Muhammad al-Baqir (a.s.) narrated that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.)
said to Jabir ibn ‘Abdullah al-Ansari, “Listen, Jabir! This is the month
of Ramadan. If one observes fasting on the days of this month, spends
a part of its nights with acts of worship, wards off his stomach and
private parts, and suppresses his tongue - if one does all these things,
he will dispose of all his sins in the same way as the month ends.”
Jabir commented, “O Allah’s Messenger, what wonderful these words

are!” The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) answered, “But how difficult
these terms are!”
The recommended rites of the month of Ramadan will be presented
in two parts and an epilogue.

name: General Duas for the Days & Nights

text.en:
Sayyid Ibn Tawus has narrated that Imam al-Sadiq and Imam al-
Kazim (a.s.) instructed to say the following supplicatory prayer after
each and every obligatory prayer all over the month of Ramadan:

translation.en: O Allah: (please) confer upon me with the grace of pilgrimage to Your Holy House,

segments.arabic: فِي عَامِي هذَا وَفِي كُلِّ عَامٍ

translation.en: in this year and every year

segments.arabic: مَا أَبْقَيْتَنِي فِي يُسْرٍ مِنْكَ وَعَافِيَةٍ وَسَعَةِ رِزْقٍ،
segments.transliteration: ma abqaytani fi yusrin minka wa’afiyatin wasa’ati rizq

translation.en: as long as You keep me alive, with easiness, good health, and expansive sustenance from You.

segments.arabic: وَلا تُخْلِنِي مِنْ تِلْكَ الْمَوَاقِفِ الْكَرِيمَةِ،

translation.en: and do not deprive me of these noble situations,
and holy places,

segments.arabic: وَزِيَارَةِ قَبْرِ نَبِيِّكَ صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ،

translation.en: and visiting the tomb of Your Prophet—may Your blessings be upon him and his Household;

segments.arabic: وَفِي جَمِيعِ حَوَائِجِ الدُّنْيَا وَالأخِرَةِ فَكُنْ لِي
segments.transliteration: wafi jami’i hawa`ijid-dunya wal-akhirati fakun li

translation.en: and (please) stand for me in all of my needs for this worldly life and the Next World.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ فِي مَا تَقْضِي وَتُقَدِّرُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as`aluka fi ma taqdi watuqaddir

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You regarding that which You decide and determine

segments.arabic: مِنْ الأمْرِ الْمَحْتُومِ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ

translation.en: from the inevitable decisions that You make on the Grand Night—

segments.arabic: مِنَ الْقَضَاءِ الَّذِي لا يُرَدُّ وَلا يُبَدَّلُ

translation.en: decisions that are neither retreated nor altered—

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَكْتُبَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ الْحَرَامِ

translation.en: that You may include me with the pilgrims to Your Holy House,
whose pilgrimage is admitted by You
and whose efforts are thankfully accepted by You,
and whose sins are forgiven by You,
and whose offenses are pardoned by You,
and that You, also within Your determined decisions,
that You decide for me a long life,
and expansive sustenance,
and that You help me fulfill my trusts and settle my debts,
Respond to me; O the Lord of the worlds.

text.en:
You may also say the following supplicatory prayer after all
obligatory prayers in Ramadan:

translation.en: O the Most High; O the All-great;
O the All-forgiving; O the All-merciful
You are the All-great Lord
Like Whom there is nothing
and He is the All-hearing, the All-aware;
and this is a month that You have glorified and ennbled,
and honored and preferred to the other months,

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ الشَّهْرُ الَّذِي فَرَضْتَ صِيَامَهُ عَلَيَّ،

translation.en: it is the month that You imposed upon me to observe fasting in it,

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ الْقُرْآنَ

translation.en: it is the month of Ramadan during which You revealed the Qur'an

segments.arabic: هُدَىً لِلنَّاسِ وَبَيِّنَاتٍ مِنَ الْهُدَى وَالْفُرْقَانِ

translation.en: as guidance for people and clear proofs on true guidance and distinction (between the right and the wrong);
and You decided the Grand Night to be in it,
and You have decided it to be more favorable than one thousand months.

segments.arabic: فَيَا ذَا الْمَنِّ وَلا يُمَنُّ عَلَيْكَ

translation.en: So, O the Lord of graces; and none can ever do favor to You;

segments.arabic: مُنَّ عَلَيَّ بِفَكَاكِ رَقَبَتِي مِنَ النَّارِ فِي مَنْ تَمُنُّ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: munna `alayya bifakaki raqabati minan-nari fi man tamunnu `alayhi

translation.en: Please do me a favor by releasing me from the Fire and by including me with those to whom You do this favor,
and allow me to enter Paradise;
on account of Your mercy; O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en:
In al-Misbah and in al-Balad al-Amin, Shaykh al-Kaf’ami, as well
as Shaykh al-Shahid in al-Majmu’ah, have narrated that the Holy
Prophet (s.a.w.a.) said that one who says the following supplicatory
prayer after each obligatory prayer in Ramadan will have all his sins
forgiven up to the Resurrection Day:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ أَدْخِلْ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْقُبُورِ السُّرُورَ،

translation.en: O Allāh, Instil Happiness in the Spirits of the Inhabitants of the Grave
O Allāh, Enrich Every Indigent (Poor One)
O Allāh, Satisfy Every Hungry Person
O Allāh, Clothe Every Unclothed One
O Allāh, Facilitate the Payment of Every Indebted One
O Allāh, Relieve Every Deeply Anguished One
O Allāh, Return Every Stranger
O Allāh, Free Every Captive

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ أَصْلِحْ كُلَّ فَاسِدٍ مِنْ أُمُورِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma aslih kulla fasidin min umuril-muslimin

translation.en: O Allāh, Reform Every Uneven Affair of the Muslims
O Allāh, Cure Every Sick Person
O Allāh, Fill Our Poverty With Your Needlessness

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ غَيِّرْ سُوءَ حَالِنَا بِحُسْنِ حَالِكَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma ghayyir su`a halina bihusni halik

translation.en: O Allāh, Change Our Unpleasant State Into Your Beautiful State

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ اقْضِ عَنَّا الدَّيْنَ وَأَغْنِنَا مِنَ الْفَقْرِ،

translation.en: O Allāh, Facilitate the Payment of Our DebtAnd Make us Needless
Surely You Are All-Powerful Over Everything

text.en:
In fact, the best of deeds at the nights and on the days of Ramadan
is the recitation of the Holy Qur’an. It is thus highly advisable to recite
it in this month in a way different from reciting it in the other months,
since its revelation was in Ramadan. A Hadith reads that everything
has a springtime; and the springtime of the Holy Qur’an is the month
of Ramadan. It is recommended to recite the whole Qur’an once a
month or once each six days in the other months, according to some
narrations. As to the month of Ramadan, it is required to recite it
wholly once every three days. If possible, it will be better if it is
recited wholly every day.

Allamah al-Majlisi has narrated that some
of the Holy Imams (a.s.) used to recite the whole Qur’an forty times,
or even more, in Ramadan. The reward of reciting the whole Qur’an is
doubled when its recitation is dedicated to the souls of the holy
fourteen Infallibles (a.s.) by dedicating each recitation to each one of them respectively. According to some narrations, the reward of one
who dedicates the recitation of the Holy Qur’an to the Holy Infallibles
(a.s.) is that one shall be included with them on the Resurrection Day.
It is also advisable to say supplications, offer prayers, implore for
Almighty Allah’s forgiveness, and confess His Oneness (by repeating
the phrase of la-ilaha illal-lahu –there is no god save Allah-) as much
as possible in Ramadan.

In this regard, Imam Ali ibn al-Husayn Zayn
al-’Abidin (a.s.) used to stop talking in Ramadan except with phrases
of prayers, glorification of Almighty Allah, implorations of His
forgiveness, and phrases of confessing of His magnificence (i.e.
Takbir –saying: Allahu-akbar).
It is finally recommended to pay a great interest to the reported acts
of worship as well as the supererogatory prayers at nights and days.

Allamah al-Hilli, in al-Risalah al-Sa’diyyah, has narrated that
Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) said, “As for any believer who feeds
another believer with a single bite of food in Ramadan, Almighty
Allah will decide for him the reward of manumitting thirty believing
slaves and will decide to respond to his prayers.”

First: Narrations have confirmed that it is advisable to recite
Surah <ref=1:97>al-Qadr</ref> one thousand times a night.
Second: When possible, it is recommended to recite Surah <ref=1:44>al-Dukhan</ref> one hundred times a night.

Third: Sayyid ibn Tawus has mentioned that if one says the
following supplicatory prayer each night in Ramadan, his sins of forty
years will be forgiven:

translation.en: O Allah: the Lord of the month of Ramadhan,
In which You revealed the Qur'an,
And You imposed fasting on Your servants:
(Please) confer upon me with the pilgrimage to Your Holy House,

segments.arabic: فِي عامِي هذا وَفِي كُلِّ عامٍ

translation.en: And forgive my serious sins,
For none can forgive them save You,

text.en:
Forth:It is recommended to say the previously mentioned
supplicatory prayer known as Dua al-Hajj after the Maghrib Prayer.
Fifth: <ref=3:1043>DUA AL-IFTITAH</ref>

Sixth: It is recommended to say the following supplicatory
prayer every night in Ramadan:

segments.transliteration: allahumma birahmatika fi alssalihina fa adkhilna

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) include us with the righteous ones, out of Your mercy,
uplift us to the rank of`illiyyin(most elevated rank),
serve us with water
running out of spring of Salsabil,

segments.transliteration: wa min alhuri al`ini birahmatika fazawwijna

translation.en: out of Your mercy, give us as wives the Paradisiacal women,
make the Paradisiacal youths who never alter in age
and who are like hidden pearls serve us,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ ثِمَارِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَلُحُومِ ٱلطَّيْرِ فَاطْعِمْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa min thimari aljannati wa luhumi alttayri fa'at`imna

translation.en: give us food from the fruits of Paradise and from the meat of birds there,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ ثِيَابِ ٱلسُّنْدُسِ وَٱلْحَرِيرِ وَٱلإِسْتَبْرَقِ فَالْبِسْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa min thiyabi alssundusi walhariri wal-istabraqi fa'albisna

translation.en: dress us from the clothes of fine and thick silk and rich brocade,
give us success to catch the Grand Night,
lead us to pilgrimage to Your Holy House

segments.transliteration: wa qatlan fi sabilika fawaffiq lana

translation.en: and martyrdom in Your way,

segments.transliteration: wa saliha alddu`a'i walmas'alati fastajib lana

translation.en: and respond to our goodly prayer and supplication.

segments.arabic: وَإِذَا جَمَعْتَ ٱلاوَّلِينَ وَٱلآخِرِينَ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ فَٱرْحَمْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa idhajama`ta al-awwalina wal-akhirina yawma alqiyamati farhamna

translation.en: When You shall gather the past and the coming generations on the Resurrection Day, (please) have mercy upon us.

segments.transliteration: wa bara'atan min alnnari faktub lana

translation.en: (Please) release us from Hellfire.
Do not fetter us in Hell,
do not try us through Your chastisement and humiliations,
do not feed us fromzaqqumand thorns,
do not add us to the devils,

segments.arabic: وَفِي ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِنَا فَلاَ تَكْبُبْنَا

translation.en: do not throw us down on our faces in Hellfire,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ ثِيَابِ ٱلنَّارِ وَسَرَابِيلِ ٱلْقَطِرَانِ فَلاَ تُلْبِسْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa min thiyabi alnnari wa sarabili alqatirani falatulbisna

translation.en: do not dress us from the clothes of fire and the shirts of tar,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ يَا لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa min kulli su'in yalailaha illaanta

translation.en: and save us from all evils; O He save Whom there is no god!

segments.arabic: بِحَقِّ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ فَنَجِّنَا

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of there is no god save You.

text.en:
Seventh: Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.) is reported to have instructed to say
the following supplicatory prayer every night in Ramadan:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ فِيمَا تَقْضِي وَتُقَدِّرُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka an taj`ala fima taqdi wa tuqaddiru

translation.en: O Allah :I beseech You that You,

segments.arabic: مِنَ الأَمْرِ الْمَحْتُومِ فِي الأَمْرِ الْحَكِيمِ
segments.transliteration: min al-amri almahtumi fi al-amri alhakimi

translation.en: while taking decisions and rendering possible things and events decisively

segments.arabic: مِنَ الْقَضَاءِ الَّذِي لا يُرَدُّ وَلا يُبَدَّلُ
segments.transliteration: min alqada'i alladhi la yuraddu wa la yubaddalu

translation.en: (decisions which can not be changed or bypassed),

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَكْتُبَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ الْحَرَامِ
segments.transliteration: an taktubani min hujjaji baytika alharami

translation.en: write my name in the list of those pilgrims of Your Holy House
whose pilgrimage receives Your approval,
whose efforts are appreciated,
whose sins are forgiven,
whose wrongdoings are overlooked;

segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala fima taqdi wa tuqaddiru

translation.en: that You, while making decisions and rendering possible things and events;

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُطِيلَ عُمْرِي فِي خَيْرٍ وَعَافِيَةٍ،

translation.en: make possible for me long life, goodness, welfare,
and enough means of livelihood,

segments.transliteration: wa taj`alani mimman tantasiru bihi lidinika

translation.en: and let me be like him whom You helps with Your Religion;
not substituting any other in my place.

text.en:
Eighth: According to the book of Anis al-Salihin, it is
recommended to say the following supplicatory prayer every night in
Ramadan:

translation.en: I seek refuge with the majesty of Your Honorable Face,
Against that the month of Ramadan elapses

segments.arabic: أَوْ يَطْلُعَ الْفَجْرُ مِنْ لَيْلَتِي هذِهِ
segments.transliteration: aw yatlu`a alfajru min laylati hadhihi

translation.en: Or dawn breaks this night,

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ قِبَلِي تَبِعَةٌ أَوْ ذَنْبٌ تُعَذِّبُنِي عَلَيْهِ.
segments.transliteration: wa laka qibali tabi`atun aw dhanbun tu`adhdhibuni `alayhi

translation.en: And there is still a sin or an offense in my record for which You may chastise me.

text.en:
Ninth: In the margin of al-Balad al-Amin, al-Kaf’ami has
reported on the authority of Sayyid Ibn Baqi that it is recommended to
offer a two unit prayer every night in Ramadan, reciting in the first
unit Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 once and repeating Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
three
times. After accomplishment, it is recommended to say the following
litany:

segments.arabic: سُبْحانَ مَنْ هُوَ حَفِيظٌ لايَغْفَلُ سُبْحانَ مَنْ هُوَ رَحِيمٌ لا يَعْجَلُ سُبْحانَ مَنْ هُوَ قائِمٌ لايَسْهُو سُبْحانَ مَنْ هُوَ دائِمٌ لايَلْهُو.

text.en:
After that, it is recommended to say the al-Tasbihat al-Arba’ah (the
Four Statements of Glorification):seven times

segments.arabic: سُبْحانَ اللَّهِ وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَ لا إِلهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَ اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ

text.en:
Then, it is recommended to say the following imploration for
forgiveness:

segments.arabic: سُبْحانَكَ سُبْحانَكَ سُبْحانَكَ يا عَظِيمُ اغْفِرْ لِي الذَّنْبَ العَظِيمَ

text.en:
Then, it is recommended to invoke blessings upon the Holy Prophet
and his Household ten times:

Almighty Allah will forgive seventy thousand sins of those who
offer this prayer in the previous form.
Tenth: According to a Hadith, if one recites Surah <ref=1:48>al-Fath</ref> in a considerable prayer, he will be saved all over that year.

One of the recommended acts in the month of Ramadan is to offer
the one thousand unit prayer. Master scholars have referred to this
prayer in their books of jurisprudence and acts of worship. However,
the way of offering this prayer has been mentioned by narrations in
many forms. According to the report of Ibn Abi-Qurrah from Imam
Muhammad al-Jawad(a.s.) that is also adopted by Shaykh al-Mufid in
his book of al-Ghariyyah wa’l-Ashraf, this prayer, in its most familiar
form, is offered as follows:

As for the first twenty nights of Ramadan, twenty units of this
prayer should be offered at each night with an interval between each
two units. To explain, eight units should be offered after the
obligatory Maghrib Prayer and the others are performed after the
obligatory Isha’ Prayer. The total is thus seven hundred units and the
remainder is three hundred. These three hundred units should be
offered at the Qadr Nights, which are the nineteenth, the twenty-first,
and the twenty-third nights of the month. One hundred units should be
offered at each of these three Qadr Nights. Thus, one thousand units
are completed.

It is worth mentioning that other divisions of these one thousand
units have been cited. Yet, these divisions will not be mentioned in
this book for fear of lengthiness.
Our virtuous readers are expected to offer this prayer so as not to
miss its great rewards and merits.

It has been narrated that it is recommended to say the following
supplicatory prayer after the accomplishment of every two units of the
supererogatory prayers (nawafil) in Ramadan:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِيما تَقْضِي وَتُقَدِّرُ مِنَ الاَمْرِ المَحْتُومِ وَفِيما تَفْرُقُ مِنَ الاَمْرِ الحَكِيمِ فِي لَيْلَةِ القَدْرِ

أَنْ تَجْعَلَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ الحَرامِ المَبْرُورِ حَجُّهُمُ المَشْكُورِ سَعْيُهُمُ المَغْفُورِ ذُنُوبُهُمْ ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُطِيلَ عُمْرِي فِي طاعَتِكَ وَتُوَسِّعَ لِي فِي رِزْقِي يا أرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ

text.en:
First: It is highly advisably not to neglect having the early dawn
meal (suhur) even if a single date or a drink of water are had. The best
food in the early dawn meal is fine flour and dates. A Hadith reads
that Almighty Allah and His angels bless those who implore for His
forgiveness at the last hours of night and have the early dawn meal.”

Second: It is recommended to recite Surah al-Qadr at early dawn
(sahar), for a Hadith reads that any believer who recites Surah al-Qadr
at the early dawn meal and the breaking the fast meal (iftar) will be
decided as sacrificing his blood for the sake of Almighty Allah
between these two times.

Third: The highly considerable supplicatory prayer known as Dua
<ref=1:34>al-Baha</ref> is reported from Imam Ali ibn Musa al-Rida(a.s.) who said,
“This is the supplicatory prayer that Imam al-Baqir (a.s.) used to say
at the last hours of Ramadan nights.”

Fourth: In Misbah al-Mutahajjid, it has been narrated on the
authority of Abu-Hamzah al-Thumali that Imam Ali ibn al-Husayn
Zayn al-’Abidin (a.s.) used to offer prayers at the nights of Ramadan
wholly. At the last hour of Ramadan nights, he used to say the
following supplicatory prayer: <ref=3:1039>Dua Abu Hamza Thumali</ref>
Fifth: <ref=3:1040>Dua Ya Uddati</ref>

Sixth: It is recommended to say the supplicatory prayer known as
<ref=3:1297>Dua Nabi Idris</ref> which has been mentioned by Shaykh al-Tusi and Sayyid
Ibn Tawus. The gentle readers are thus advised to find this
supplicatory prayer in the books of Misbah al-Mutahajjid or Iqbal al-
A’mal.

Seventh: It is recommended to say the following supplicatory
prayer, which is considered the shortest supplicatory prayer to be said
at the last hours of Ramadan nights. It is also mentioned in Iqbal al-
A’mal <ref=3:1296>Dua Ya Mafzai</ref>

Eighth: As mentioned in Iqbal al-A’mal, it is recommended to say
the following doxology: <ref=3:39>Tasbih for the time of Sahar</ref>

segments.arabic: سُبْحانَ مَنْ يَعْلَمُ جَوارِحَ القُلُوبِ سُبْحانَ مَنْ يُحْصِي عَدَدَ الذُّنُوبِ سُبْحانَ مَنْ لا يَخْفى عَلَيْهِ خافِيَةٌ فِي السَّماواتِ وَالأَرْضِينَ سُبْحانَ الرَّبِّ الوَدُودِ سُبْحانَ الفَرْدِ الوِتْرِ سُبْحانَ العَظِيمِ الأَعْظَمِ سُبْحانَ مَنْ لايَعْتَدِي عَلى أَهْلِ مَمْلَكَتِهِ سُبْحانَ مَنْ لا يُؤاخِذُ أَهْلَ الأَرْضِ بِأَلْوانِ العَذابِ سُبْحانَ الحَنّانِ المَنَّانِ سُبْحانَ الرَّؤوفِ الرَّحِيمِ سُبْحانَ الجَبَّارِ الجَوادِ سُبْحانَ الكَرِيمِ الحَلِيمِ سُبْحانَ البَصِيرِ العَلِيمِ سُبْحانَ البَصِيرِ الواسِعِ سُبْحانَ الله عَلى اقْبالِ النَّهارِ سُبْحانَ الله عَلى ادْبارِ النَّهارِ سُبْحانَ الله عَلى أدْبارِ اللَّيْلِ وَإِقْبالِ النَّهارِ [٣] ولَهُ الحَمْدُ وَالمَجْدُ وَالعَظَمَةُ وَالكِبْرِياءُ مَعَ كُلِّ نَفَسٍ وَكُلِّ طَرْفَةِ عَيْنٍ وَكُلِّ لَمْحَةٍ سَبَقَ فِي عِلْمِهِ سُبْحانَكَ مِلَْ ما أَحْصى كِتابُكَ سُبْحانَكَ زِنَةَ عَرْشِكَ سُبْحانَكَ سُبْحانَكَ سُبْحانَكَ!

text.en:
It is worth mentioning that scholars have confirmed that the
intention (niyyah) of fasting should be preferably declared after the
sahar meal. It is also permissible to intend fasting at any hour of the
night. It is sufficient, for the achievement of intention, to intend to
observe fasting the next day for the sake of Almighty Allah and to
abstain from having or doing any of the things or acts that break the
fasting. It is also highly recommended not to neglect the famous Salat
al-Layl (Night Prayer) and not to neglect the night worship.

name: Daily Duas in ramadan

text.en:
First: It is recommended to say the following supplicatory prayer
that is mentioned by Shaykh al-Tusi and Sayyid Ibn Tawus:

translation.en: O Allah: this is the month of Ramadhan
in which You revealed the Qur'an,

segments.transliteration: hudan lilnnasi wa bayyinatin mina alhudawal-furqani

translation.en: a guidance for humankind and clear proofs of true guidance and distinction (between the right and the wrong)
This is the month of observing fasting,
this is the month of acts of worship,
This the month of turning to You (in penitence),
This is the month of repentance,
This is the month of forgiveness and mercy,

segments.arabic: وَهذَا شَهْرُ العِتْقِ مِنَ النَّارِ وَالفَوْزِ بِالجَنَّةِ،
segments.transliteration: wa hadhashahru al`itqi mina alnnari wal-fawzi biljannati

translation.en: This is the moth of release from Hellfire and winning Paradise,
This is the month in which there is the Grand Night

segments.arabic: الَّتِي هِيَ خَيْرٌ مِنَ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ.
segments.transliteration: allaty hiya khayrun mina alfi shahrin

translation.en: Which is better than one thousand months.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
And help me observe fasting and do acts of worship during it,

segments.transliteration: wa sallimhu li wa sallimny fihi

translation.en: And keep it upright for me, and keep me safe during it,
And help me observe it with the best of Your help

segments.arabic: وَوَفِّقْنِي فِيهِ لِطَاعَتِكَ وَطَاعَةِ رَسُولِكَ وَأَوْلِيَائِكَ صَلَّى اللّهُ عَلَيْهِمْ،
segments.transliteration: wa waffqny fihi lita`atika wa ta`ati rasulika wa awliya’ika sallaallahu `alayhim

translation.en: And make me succeed in doing acts of obedience to You and to Your Prophet and Your intimate servants upon whom be Your blessings,

segments.arabic: وَفَرِّغْنِي فِيهِ لِعِبَادَتِكَ وَدُعَائِكَ وَتِلاوَةِ كِتَابِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa farrighny fihi li`ibadatika wa du`a’ika wa tilawati kitabika

translation.en: And make me devote myself to acts of worship to You, to praying You, and to reciting Your Book,
And increase its blessings for me
And confer upon me with good health during it,
And make my body healthy during it,
And expand my sustenance during it,
And save me from whatever aggrieves me during it,
And respond to my prayers during it,
And make me attain my hope during it.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَأَذْهِبْ عَنِّي فِيهِ النُّعَاسَ وَالكَسَلَ وَالسَّأْمَةَ
segments.transliteration: wa adhhib `anni fihi alnn`asa wal-kasala wal-ssa’mata

translation.en: And remove from me during it drowsiness, and lethargy, and laziness,
And weariness, and hardheartedness, and inattentiveness, and carelessness.
And put aside from me during it illnesses and sicknesses
And grievances and sorrows
And ailments and diseases
And wrongdoings and sins.
And send away from me during it evil and indecency
And fatigue and ordeals
And tiredness and suffering.
Verily, You are the Hearer of prayers.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa a`idhny fihi mina alshshaytani alrrajimi

translation.en: And protect me during it from Satan the cursed

segments.transliteration: wa hamzihi wa lamzihi wa nafthihi wa nafkhihi

translation.en: And from his sting and from his slander and from his devilry

segments.transliteration: wa waswasatihi wa tathbitihi wa batshihi wa kaydihi

translation.en: And from his evil inspirations and from his frustration and from his obstinacy and from his trickeries

segments.transliteration: wa makrihi wa haba’ilihi wa khuda`ihi wa amaniyyihi

translation.en: And from his deceptions and from his traps and from his scams and from his false hopes,

segments.transliteration: wa ghururihi wa fitnatihi wa sharakihi wa ahzabihi

translation.en: And from his vanities, and from his seductions, and from his ruses, and from his allies,

segments.transliteration: wa atba`ihi wa ashia`ihi wa awlia’ihi wa shuraka’ihi

translation.en: And from his followers and from his fans and from his supporters and from his partners,
And from all his snares.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
And bestow upon us with the observance of fasting and acts of worship

segments.transliteration: wa bulugha alamali fihi wa fi qiyamihi

translation.en: And attainment of our hopes during it and by means of doing acts of worship in it,
And accomplishment of that which brings about Your pleasure,
By means of steadfastness and acting for Your sake and faith and certitude,

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ ذلِكَ مِنِّي بِالأَضْعَافِ الكَثِيرَةِ،
segments.transliteration: thumma taqabbal dhalika minny bilad`afi alkathirati

translation.en: And then admit all that from me with manifold rewards,
And great gifts,
O the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
And grant me (the opportunity to undergo) Hajj and `Umrah,
And hard work and painstaking
And power and activity
And turning to You and repentance
And success and seeking Your nearness
And admitted good-doing and desire (for You) and fear (from You)
And submission (to You) and meekness
And tenderness and sincere intention,
And truthfulness
And dread from You
And hoping for You
And reliance upon You
And having trust in You
And abstention from committing that which You have deemed unlawful
Along with decent speaking,
And admitted efforts
And elevated deeds
And responded prayers.

segments.arabic: وَلا تَحُلْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ شَيْءٍ مِنْ ذلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa latahul bayny wa bayna shay‘in min dhalika

translation.en: And do not let anything to intervene between me and any of these matters,
Such as an accidental event or disease
Or grief or unhappiness

segments.arabic: وَلا سُقْمٍ وَلا غَفْلَةٍ وَلا نِسْيَانٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa lasuqmin wa laghaflatin wa lanisyanin

translation.en: Or ailment or advertence or oblivion;

segments.transliteration: bal biltta`ahudi wal-ttahaffuzi laka wa fika

translation.en: Rather (help me do all that) with observance and carefulness to You and for Your sake

segments.transliteration: wal-rri`aiyati lihaqqika wal-wafa‘i bi`ahdika wa wa`dika

translation.en: And adherence to that which is incumbent upon me toward You and fulfillment of my covenant and promise to You
(let all that be) out of Your mercy, O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَاقْسِمْ لِي فِيهِ أَفْضَلَ مَا تَقْسِمُهُ لِعِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِينَ،
segments.transliteration: waqsim li fihi afdala mataqsimuhu li`ibadika alssalihina

translation.en: And decide for me during this month the best of that which You decide for Your righteous servants,

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطِنِي فِيهِ أَفْضَلَ مَا تُعْطِي أَوْلِيَاءَكَ المُقَرَّبِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa a`tiny fihi afdala matu`ty awlya‘aka almuqarrbina

translation.en: And give me during it the most favorable of that which You give to Your intimate, favorite servants;
Such as mercy, forgiveness, kindness, responding (of prayers)
Pardon, perpetual forgiveness, good health, continuous wellbeing,
Release from Hellfire, winning Paradise,
And the goodness of this worldly life and the Next World.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
And cause my prayers during this month to reach You,

segments.transliteration: wa rahmataka wa khayraka ilayy fihi nazilan

translation.en: And cause Your mercy and goodness during it to reach me,
And cause my deed to be accepted (by You)
And cause my efforts during it to be praiseworthy
And cause my sins during it to be forgiven
So that my share (of Your awards) shall be the most abundant,
And my portion to be the most copious.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
And guide me to observe the Grand Night adequately,

segments.arabic: عَلَى أَفْضَلِ حَالٍ تُحِبُّ أَنْ يَكُونَ عَلَيْهَا أَحَدٌ مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِكَ وَأَرْضَاهَا لَكَ،
segments.transliteration: `alaafdali halin tuhibb an yakuna `alayhaahadun min awliya’ika wa ardahalaka

translation.en: Being on the most favorable and most pleased state that You would like to notice from any of Your intimate servants,

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ اجْعَلْهَا لِي خَيْراً مِنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ،
segments.transliteration: thumm aj`alhali khayran min alfi shahrin

translation.en: And then decide it to be better for me that one thousand months,

segments.arabic: وَارْزُقْنِي فِيهَا أَفْضَلَ مَا رَزَقْتَ أَحَداً مِمَّنْ بَلَّغْتَهُ إيَّاهَا وَأَكْرَمْتَهُ بِهَا،
segments.transliteration: warzuqny fihaafdala marazaqta ahadan mimmn ballaghtahu iyyahawa akramtahu biha

translation.en: And confer upon me during this night the best conferrals that You ever confer upon anyone whom You guide to attain it and whom You honor during it,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْنِي فِيهَا مِنْ عُتَقَائِكَ مِنْ جَهَنَّمَ،

translation.en: And include me in it with those whom You release from Hell,
And whom You manumit from Hellfire

segments.transliteration: wa su`ada‘i khalqika bimaghfiratika wa ridwanika

translation.en: And with those of Your creatures who are happy due to Your forgiveness and satisfaction (that reach them),
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَارْزُقْنَا فِي شَهْرِنَا هذَا الجِدَّ وَالإجْتِهَادَ

translation.en: And grant us during this month with hard working and painstaking
And power and activeness
And whatever You like and please.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ رَبَّ الفَجْرِ وَلَيَالٍ عَشْرٍ وَالشَّفْعِ وَالوَتْرِ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma rabba alfajri wa layalin `ashrin wal-shshf`i wal-watri

translation.en: O Allah; the Lord of the Dawn, the Ten Nights, the Even and the Odd;

segments.arabic: وَرَبَّ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ وَمَا أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ مِنَ القُرْآنِ،
segments.transliteration: wa rabba shahri ramadana wa maanzalta fihi mina alqur’ani

translation.en: And the Lord of the month of Ramadan and the Qur'an that You have revealed during it,

segments.transliteration: wa rabba jabra’ila wa mika’ila wa israfila wa `izra’ila

translation.en: And the Lord of (Archangels) Gabriel, Michael, Israafeel and `Izrael
As well as all the Favorite Angels,
And the Lord of (Prophets) Abraham and Ishmael
And Isaac and Jacob,
And the Lord of Moses and Jesus,
As well as all the Prophets and the Messengers,
And the Lord of Muhammad, the seal of the Prophets,
May Your blessings be upon him and upon them all,
And I beseech You in the name of their duty toward You Your duty toward them,

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّكَ العَظِيمِ لَمَّا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَعَلَيْهِمْ أَجْمَعِينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqika al`azimi lammasallayta `alayhi wa alihi wa `alayhim ajma`ina

translation.en: And in the name of the great duty toward You that You may bless him and his Household and all of them,
And that You may take a merciful look at me,

segments.arabic: تَرْضَى بِهَا عَنِّي رِضَىً لا سَخَطَ عَلَيَّ بَعْدَهُ أَبَداً،

translation.en: Due to which You be pleased to me so perfectly that You never be irate with me after that,

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطَيْتَنِي جَمِيعَ سُؤْلِي وَرَغْبَتِي وَأُمْنِيَتِي وَإرَادَتِي،
segments.transliteration: wa a`taytany jami`a su´li wa raghbaty wa a’umniyaty wa iradati

translation.en: And You may grant me all my requests, desires, hopes, and needs,
And You may ward off me all that which I despise and try to avoid,

segments.arabic: وَأَخَافُ عَلَى نَفْسِي وَمَا لا أَخَافُ

translation.en: And all that which I fear for myself and all that which I do not fear,

segments.transliteration: wa `an ahly wa mali wa ikhwany wa dhurriyyati

translation.en: And do the same to my family members, my property, my brethren and my offspring.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إلَيْكَ فَرَرْنَا مِنْ ذُنُوبِنَا فَآوِنَا تَائِبِينَ،

translation.en: O Allah: to You are we running from our sins; so (please do) shelter us as we are repentant,
And accept our repentance as we are seeking Your forgiveness,
And forgive us as we are seeking Your protection,
And protect us as we are seeking Your aid,
And aid us as we are surrendering to You,
And never disappoint us as we are fearful of You,
And secure us as we are desiring for You,
And accept our intercession as we are begging You,

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطِنَا إنّكَ سَمِيعُ الدّعَاءِ قرِيبٌ مُجِيبٌ.
segments.transliteration: wa a`tinainnaka sami`u alddu`a‘i qribun mujibun

translation.en: And grant us (what we hope) as You are verily the Hearer of prayers, the Nigh, and the Responding.
O Allah: You are my Lord and I am Your servant,

segments.transliteration: wa ahaqqu man sa-ala al`abdu rabbahu

translation.en: And it is conventional that a servant begs from his Lord,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَسْأَلِ العِبَادُ مِثْلَكَ كَرَماً وَجُوداً،
segments.transliteration: wa lam yas’ali al`ibadu mithlaka karaman wa judan

translation.en: And all Your servants have never begged anyone who is as generous and magnanimous as You are.
O the center of the complaints of the beseechers;
O the ultimate goal of the needs of the desirers,
O the Aide of the seekers of aid,
O the Responding to the prayers of the distressed ones,
O the Shelter of the fugitives,
O the Helper of the seekers of help,
O the Lord of the enfeebled ones,
O the Reliever of the grievances of the aggrieved ones,
O the Releaser of the agonies of the sad ones,
O the Reliever of the enormous calamities;

segments.arabic: يَا اللّهُ يَا رَحْمنُ يَا رَحِيمُ

translation.en: O Allah; O the All-beneficent; O the All-merciful;
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy:
(please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
And forgive my sins and my defects,

segments.transliteration: wa isa‘aty wa zulmy wa jurmy

translation.en: And my offenses and my wrongdoing and my felonies
And my extravagance in my affairs,
And (please) grant me out of Your favors and mercy,
For none possess these save You,
And (please) pardon me

segments.arabic: وَاغْفِرْ لِي كُلّ مَا سَلَفَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي،
segments.transliteration: waghfir li kull masalafa min dhunubi

translation.en: And forgive all my past sins
And save me from sinning in the rest of my lifetime,
And cover me as well as my parents,

segments.transliteration: wa walady wa qarabaty wa ahli huzanaty

translation.en: And my children and my relatives and my friends,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ كَانَ مِنّي بِسَبِيلٍ مِنَ المُؤْمِنِينَ وَالمُؤْمِنَاتِ فِي الدّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wa man kana minny bisabilin mina almu´minina wal-mu´minati fi alddunyawal-akhirati

translation.en: And all those who relate to me from the believing men and women in this worldly life and the life to come,
For all that is managed by You alone
And You are verily the Liberal in forgiving,
So, please my Master: do not disappoint me,

segments.arabic: وَلا تَرُدّ دُعَائِي وَلا يَدِي إلَى نَحْرِي
segments.transliteration: wa latarudda du`aiy wa layady ilanahry

translation.en: And do not reject my prayer and do not let me down,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى تَفْعَلَ ذلِكَ بِي وَتَسْتَجِيبَ لِي جَمِيعَ مَا سَأَلْتُكَ
segments.transliteration: hattataf`ala dhalika by wa tastajiba li jami`a masa’altuka

translation.en: But please do all that to me and respond to my in all that which I have asked from You,
And increase Your favoring upon me,
Because You verily have power over all things,
And for You do we desire.
O Allah: Yours are the Most Excellent Names
And the Most Elevated Examples,
And every greatness and all bounties.
I thus beseech You by Your Name:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful;

segments.arabic: إنْ كُنْتَ قَضَيْتَ فِي هذِهِ اللّيْلَةِ
segments.transliteration: in kunta qadayta fi hadhihi allaylati

translation.en: If you have decided at this night,
During which the angels and the Holy Spirit are allowed to descend,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلّيَ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ،

translation.en: That You may bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala ismy fi alss`ada‘i

translation.en: And You may add my name to the (list of the) happy ones,
And add my soul to the martyrs,
And elevate my good doings exaltedly
And decide my ill deeds to be forgiven,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَهَبَ لِي يَقِيناً تُبَاشِرُ بِهِ قَلْبِي،
segments.transliteration: wa an tahaba li yaqinan tubashiru bihi qalbi

translation.en: And that You grant me conviction with which You fill in my heart,
And grant me faith free of doubt,
And grant me satisfaction with that which You decide for me,

segments.arabic: وَآتِنِي فِي الدّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً
segments.transliteration: wa atiny fi alddunyahasanatan wa fi alakhirati hasanatan

translation.en: And grant me good in this worldly life and good in the Next World
And save me from the Fire of Hell.

segments.arabic: وَإنْ لَمْ تَكُنْ قَضَيْتَ فِي هذِهِ اللّيْلَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa in lam takun qadayta fi hadhihi allaylati

translation.en: And if You have not decided at this night,
During which the angels and the Holy Spirit are allowed to descend,
Then (please) postpone Your decisions about me to that night,
And confer upon me during it with reference to You and showing gratitude to You,
And doing acts of obedience to You and worshipping You in the best manner;
And (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
With Your most favorable blessings, O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
O the Unique, O the Besought of all;
O the Lord of Muhammad
(please) revenge on this day for Muhammad and for the pious ones from his offspring,
And eradicate all of their enemies,
And put them all under Your reprimand

segments.arabic: وَلا تَدَعْ عَلَى ظَهْرِ الأَرْضِ مِنْهُمْ أَحَداً،

translation.en: And do not leave anyone of them to live on this earth,
And never forgive them.
O the most excellent Companion;
O the Heir of the Prophets
You are verily the most Merciful of all those who show mercy,
The Commencer, the brilliant Maker,
There is none like You
And You are the Eternal Who never omits anything,
And You are the Ever-living Who never dies,
On each day, You have a certain state;
You are the Heir of Muhammad,
And the Supporter of Muhammad,
And the Selector of Muhammad

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَنْصُرَ وَصِيّ مُحَمّدٍ وَخَلِيفَةَ مُحَمّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as’aluka an tansura wa siyy muhammadin wa khalifata muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You to give victory to the successor and representative of Muhammad,
The Imam who shall appear with justice among the successors of Muhammad,
May Your blessings be upon him and upon them,
(please) turn Your victory toward them,
O He but Whom there is no god
I beseech You in the name of that there is no god but You,
(please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
And allow me to join them in this worldly life as well as the Next World

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ عَاقِبَةَ أَمْرِي إلَى غُفْرَانِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ

translation.en: And allow all my affairs to end up with Your forgiveness and mercy,
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: وَكَذلِكَ نَسَبْتَ نَفْسَكَ يَا سَيّدِي بِاللّطْفِ،
segments.transliteration: wa kadhalika nasabta nafsaka yasayyidy billutfi

translation.en: O my Master: You have ascribed the feature of kindness to Yourself,
And You are truly kind,
So, (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
And treat me kindly as You like,

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَارْزُقْنِي الحَجّ وَالعُمْرَةَ فِي عَامِنَا هذَا،

translation.en: And grant me (the opportunity to undertake) Hajj and `Umrah in this year,

segments.arabic: وَتَطَوّلْ عَلَيّ بِجَمِيعِ حَوَائِجِي لِلآخِرَةِ وَالدّنْيَا.
segments.transliteration: wa tatawwal `alayya bijami`i hawa’ijy lilakhirati wal-ddunya

translation.en: And confer upon me with the favor of settling all my needs for the Next World and this worldly life

text.en: Then repeat the following imploration three times:

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللّهَ رَبّي وَ أَتُوبُ إلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha rabby wa atubu ilayhi

translation.en: I seek the forgiveness of Allah, my Lord, and I repent before Him,
Surely, my Lord is Nigh and Responding.

segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha rabby wa atubu ilayhi

translation.en: I seek the forgiveness of Allah, my Lord, and I repent before Him,
Surely, my Lord is Merciful, Loving.

segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha rabby wa atubu ilayhi

translation.en: I seek the forgiveness of Allah, my Lord, and I repent before Him,
He is surely All-forgiving.
O Allah: (please do) forgive me,
You are verily the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: رَبّ إنّي عَمِلْتُ سُوءاً وَظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي
segments.transliteration: rabbi inni `amiltu su‘an wa zalamtu nafsy

translation.en: O my Lord: I have committed ill deeds and wronged myself,

segments.arabic: فَاغْفِرْ لِي إنّهُ لا يَغْفِرُ الذّنُوبَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ،
segments.transliteration: faghfir li innahu la yaghfiru aldhdhunuba illa anta

translation.en: So (please) forgive me, because none can forgive sins save You.

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللّهَ الّذِي لا إلهَ إلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhy la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: I seek the forgiveness of Allah save Whom there is no god,
The Ever-living, the Self-Subsistent, the Indulgent, the All-great,
The Noble, the forgiver of fatal sins,
And I repent before Him.
I seek the forgiveness of Allah,
Allah is verily Forgiver, Merciful.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلّيَ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala fima taqdy wa tuqaddiru

translation.en: And to decide within the decisions that You make,

segments.arabic: مِنَ الأَمْرِ العَظِيمِ المَحْتُومِ فِي لَيْلَةِ القَدْرِ
segments.transliteration: mina alamri al`azimi almahtumi fi laylati alqadri

translation.en: From the great, inevitable affair at the Grand Night,

segments.arabic: مِنَ القَضَاءِ الّذِي لا يُرَدّ وَلا يُبَدّلُ
segments.transliteration: mina alqada‘i alladhy la yuraddu wa la yubaddalu

translation.en: Within the decision that is neither rejected nor altered,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَكْتُبَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ الحَرَامِ
segments.transliteration: an taktubany min hujjaji baytika alharami

translation.en: That You write my name with the pilgrims of Your Holy House,
Whose Hajj is admitted,
Whose efforts are praiseworthy,
Whose sins are forgiven,
And whose offenses are pardoned.

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَ فِيمَا تَقْضِي وَتُقَدّرُ أَنْ تُطِيلَ عُمْرِي،
segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala fima taqdy wa tuqaddru an tutila `umri

translation.en: And that You may decide among the decisions that You make that You grant me long lifetime,
And expand my sustenance,
And help me fulfill my trusts and settle my debts,
Respond to me; O the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ اجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ أَمْرِيَ فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً،
segments.transliteration: allahumma aj`al li min amriya farajan wa makhrajan

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) make for me relief and an outlet,

segments.arabic: وَارْزُقْنِي مِنْ حَيْثُ أَحْتَسِبُ وَمِنْ حَيْثُ لا أَحْتَسِبُ،
segments.transliteration: warzuqny min haythu ahtasibu wa min haythu la ahtasibu

translation.en: And provide for me from whence I expect and from whence I do not expect,

segments.arabic: وَاحْرُسْنِي مِنْ حَيْثُ أَحْتَرِسُ وَمِنْ حَيْثُ لا أَحْتَرِسُ،
segments.transliteration: wahrusny min haythu ahtarisu wa min haythu la ahtarisu

translation.en: And guard me from when I take precautions and from whence I do not take precautions,

segments.arabic: وَصَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ وَسَلّمْ كَثِيراً.
segments.transliteration: wa salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa sallm kathiran

translation.en: And send plentiful blessings and benedictions upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal For The Days of ramadan

name: Daily Tasbeehat in ramadan

text.en:
Second: He has also said: It is recommended to say the following
doxology everyday in Ramadan. It consists of ten parts; each part
comprises ten phrases of glorification of Almighty Allah:

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلسَّمِيعِ ٱلَّذِي لَيْسَ شَيْءٌ أَسْمَعَ مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alssami`i alladhi laysa shay'un asma`a minhu

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the All-hearing; there is nothing is more hearing than He is.

segments.arabic: يَسْمَعُ مِنْ فَوْقِ عَرْشِهِ مَا تَحْتَ سَبْعِ أَرَضِينَ
segments.transliteration: yasma`u min fawqi `arshihi ma tahta sab`i aradina

translation.en: He hears from above His Throne what is under seven layers of the earth.

segments.arabic: وَيَسْمَعُ مَا فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa yasma`u ma fi zulumati albarri walbahri

translation.en: He hears that which is in the murk of lands and oceans.
He hears the moaning and the complaints.
He hears the secret and what is more veiled than secrets.
He hears the inspirations of hearts.
No sound can ever deafen His hearing.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْبَصِيرِ ٱلَّذِي لَيْسَ شَيْءٌ أَبْصَرَ مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi albasiri alladhi laysa shay'un absara minhu

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the All-seeing; there is nothing more seeing than He is.

segments.arabic: يُبْصِرُ مِنْ فَوْقِ عَرْشِهِ مَا تَحْتَ سَبْعِ أَرَضِينَ
segments.transliteration: yubsiru min fawqi `arshihi ma tahta sab`i aradina

translation.en: He sees from above His Throne what is under seven layers of the earth.

segments.arabic: وَيُبْصِرُ مَا فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa yubsiru ma fi zulumati albarri walbahri

translation.en: He sees that which is in the murk of lands and oceans.
Visions cannot comprehend Him.
He comprehends all visions.
He is the Knower of subtleties, the Aware.
Darkness cannot screen His sight.
None can hide from Him behind any screen.
No wall can ever prevent Him from seeing.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَغِيبُ عَنْهُ بَرٌّ وَلاَ بَحْرٌ
segments.transliteration: wa la yaghibu `anhu barrun wa la bahrun

translation.en: No land and no ocean can ever be absent from Him.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَكُنُّ مِنْهُ جَبَلٌ مَا فِي أَصْلِهِ وَلاَ قَلْبٌ مَا فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la yakunnu minhu jabalun ma fi aslihi wa la qalbun ma fihi

translation.en: No mountain can ever conceal its root from Him or conceals its center from Him.

segments.transliteration: wa la janbun ma fi qalbihi

translation.en: No side of it can conceal its center from Him.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَسْتَتِرُ مِنْهُ صَغِيرٌ وَلاَ كَبِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: wa la yastatiru minhu saghirun wa la kabirun

translation.en: Neither big nor small thing can ever hide from Him.

segments.transliteration: wa la yastakhfi minhu saghirun lisigharihi

translation.en: No tiny thing can ever be unseen by Him due to its smallness.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَخْفَىٰ عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ فِي ٱلأَرْضِ وَلاَ فِي ٱلسَّمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa la yakhfa `alayhi shay'un fi al-ardi wa la fi alssama'i

translation.en: Surely, nothing is hidden from Him in the earth or in the heavens.

segments.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُصَوِّرُكُمْ فِي ٱلأَرْحَامِ كَيْفَ يَشَاءُ
segments.transliteration: huwa alladhi yusawwirukum fi al-arhami kayfa yasha'u

translation.en: He it is Who fashions you in the wombs as pleases Him.

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa huwa al`azizu alhakimu

translation.en: There is no god save Him; the Almighty, the Wise.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يُنْشِئُ ٱلسَّحَابَ ٱلثِّقَالَ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi yunshi'u alssahaba alththiqala

translation.en: Glory be to Allah Who raises the heavy clouds.

segments.arabic: وَيُسَبِّحُ ٱلرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَٱلْمَلاَئِكَةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa yusabbihu alrra`du bihamdihi walmala'ikatu min khifatihi

translation.en: The thunder declares His glory with His praise, and the angels too for awe of Him;

segments.arabic: وَيُرْسِلُ ٱلصَّوَاعِقَ فَيُصِيبُ بِهَا مَنْ يَشَاءُ
segments.transliteration: wa yursilu alssawa`iqa fayusibu biha man yasha'u

translation.en: and He sends the thunderbolts and smites with them whom He pleases.

segments.arabic: وَيُرْسِلُ ٱلرِّيَاحَ بُشْراً بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَحْمَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa yursilu alrriyaha bushran bayna yadai rahmatihi

translation.en: He sends forth the winds bearing good news before His mercy.

segments.transliteration: wa yunazzilu alma'a min alssama'i bikalimatihi

translation.en: He causes water to descend from the heavens through His Word.
He causes plants to grow out of His power.
Leaves fall down by His knowledge.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَعْزُبُ عَنْهُ مِثْقَالُ ذَرَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi la ya`zubu `anhu mithqalu dharratin

translation.en: Glory be to Allah: not the weight of an atom becomes absent from Him,

segments.transliteration: fi al-ardi wa la fi alssama'i

translation.en: in the heavens or in the earth,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ أَصْغَرُ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ وَلاَ أَكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa la asgharu min dhalika wa la akbaru

translation.en: and neither less than that nor greater,
but (all) is in a clear book.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يَعْلَمُ مَا تَحْمِلُ كُلُّ أُنْثَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi ya`lamu ma tahmilu kullu untha

translation.en: Glory be to Allah Who knows what every female bears,

segments.transliteration: wa ma taghidu al-arhamu wa ma tazdadu

translation.en: and that of which the wombs fall short of completion and that in which they increase;
and there is a measure with Him of everything.
The knower of the unseen and the seen, the Great, the Most High.

segments.arabic: سَوَاءٌ مِنْكُمْ مَنْ أَسَرَّ ٱلْقَوْلَ وَمَنْ جَهَرَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: sawa'un minkum man asarra alqawla wa man jahara bihi

translation.en: Alike to Him among you is he who conceals his words and he who speaks them openly,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ هُوَ مُسْتَخْفٍ بِٱللَّيْلِ وَسَارِبٌ بِٱلنَّهَارِ
segments.transliteration: wa man huwa mustakhfin billayli wa saribun bilnnahari

translation.en: and he who hides himself by night and who goes forth by day.

segments.arabic: لَهُ مُعَقِّبَاتٌ مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِ
segments.transliteration: lahu mu`aqqibatun min bayni yadayhi wa min khalfihi

translation.en: For his sake, there are angels following one another, before him and behind him,
who guard him by Allah's commandment.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يُمِيتُ ٱلأَحْيَاءَ وَيُحْيِي ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi yumitu al-ahya'a wa yuhyi almawta

translation.en: Glory be to Allah Who causes the alive to die and restores the dead to life.

segments.transliteration: wa ya`lamu ma tanqusu al-ardu minhum

translation.en: He knows indeed what the earth diminishes of them

segments.arabic: وَيُقِرُّ فِي ٱلأَرْحَامِ مَا يَشَاءُ إِلَىٰ أَجَلٍ مُسَمَّىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa yuqirru fi al-arhami ma yasha'u ila ajalin musamman

translation.en: and He causes what We please to stay in the wombs till an appointed time.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.
Glory be to Allah, Master of the Kingdom!
You give the kingdom to whomsoever You please
and take away the kingdom from whomsoever You please,
and You exalt whom You please
and abase whom You please
in You hand is the good.
Surely, You have power over all things.
You make the night to pass into the day
and You make the day to pass into the night,
and You bring forth the living from the dead
and You bring forth the dead from the living,

segments.transliteration: wa tarzuqu man tasha'u bighayri hisabin

translation.en: and You give sustenance to whom You please without measure.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي عِنْدَهُ مَفَاتِحُ ٱلْغَيْبِ

translation.en: Glory be to Allah with Whom are the keys of the unseen treasures.
None knows them but He.

segments.transliteration: wa ya`lamu ma fi albarri walbahri

translation.en: He knows what is in the land and the sea,

segments.arabic: وَمَا تَسْقُطُ مِنْ وَرَقَةٍ إِلاَّ يَعْلَمُهَا
segments.transliteration: wa ma tasqutu min waraqatin illa ya`lamuha

translation.en: and there falls not a leaf but He knows it,

segments.transliteration: wa la habbatin fi zulumati al-ardi

translation.en: nor a grain in the darkness of the earth,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ رَطْبٍ وَلاَ يَابِسٍ إِلاَّ فِي كِتَابٍ مُبِينٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la ratbin wa la yabisin illa fi kitabin mubinin

translation.en: nor anything green nor dry but it is all in a clear book.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُحْصِي مِدْحَتَهُ ٱلْقَائِلُونَ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi la yuhsi midhatahu alqa'iluna

translation.en: Glory be to Allah. No speaker can ever declare His actual praiseworthiness.

segments.transliteration: wa la yajzi bi-ala'ihi alshshakiruna al`abiduna

translation.en: All the thankful ones and worshippers cannot thank Him adequately for His (innumerable) bounties.

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ كَمَا قَالَ وَفَوْقَ مَا نَقُولُ
segments.transliteration: wa huwa kama qala wa fawqa ma naqulu

translation.en: He is as same as He has described Himself and above whatever we say about Him.

segments.arabic: وَاللَّهُ سُبْحَانَهُ كَمَا أَثْنَىٰ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِ

translation.en: Allah, the Glorified, is as same as He has praised Himself, by saying:

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلاَّ بِمَا شَاءَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yuhituna bishay'in min `ilmihi illa bima sha'a

translation.en: “They cannot comprehend anything out of His knowledge except what He pleases.
His knowledge extends over the heavens and the earth,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَؤُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا وَهُوَ ٱلْعَلِيُّ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
segments.transliteration: wa la ya'uduhu hifzuhuma wa huwa al`aliyyu al`azimu

translation.en: and the preservation of them both tires Him not, and He is the Most High, the Great.”
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يَعْلَمُ مَا يَلِجُ فِي ٱلأَرْضِ وَمَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi ya`lamu ma yaliju fi al-ardi wa ma yakhruju minha

translation.en: Glory be to Allah Who knows that which goes down into the earth and that which comes out of it,

segments.arabic: وَمَا يَنْزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ وَمَا يَعْرُجُ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: wa ma yanzilu min alssama'i wa ma ya`ruju fiha

translation.en: and knows that which comes down from the heaven and that which goes up to it.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَشْغَلُهُ مَا يَلِجُ فِي ٱلأَرْضِ وَمَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا
segments.transliteration: wa la yashghaluhu ma yaliju fi al-ardi wa ma yakhruju minha

translation.en: That which goes down into the earth does not occupy Him

segments.arabic: عَمَّا يَنْزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ وَمَا يَعْرُجُ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: `amma yanzilu min alssama'i wa ma ya`ruju fiha

translation.en: from that which comes down from the heavens and that which goes up to it.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَشْغَلُهُ مَا يَنْزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ وَمَا يَعْرُجُ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: wa la yashghaluhu ma yanzilu min alssama'i wa ma ya`ruju fiha

translation.en: That which comes down from the heavens and that which goes up to it does not occupy Him

segments.arabic: عمَّا يَلِجُ فِي ٱلأَرْضِ وَمَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا
segments.transliteration: `mma yaliju fi al-ardi wa ma yakhruju minha

translation.en: from that which goes down into the earth and that which comes out of it.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَشْغَلُهُ عِلْمُ شَيْءٍ عَنْ عِلْمِ شَيْءٍ

translation.en: The knowledge of anything does not occupy Him from the knowledge of something else.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَشْغَلُهُ خَلْقُ شَيْءٍ عَنْ خَلْقِ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la yashghaluhu khalqu shay'in `an khalqi shay'in

translation.en: The creation of anything does not occupy Him from the creation of something else.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حِفْظُ شَيْءٍ عَنْ حِفْظِ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la hifzu shay'in `an hifzi shay'in

translation.en: The preservation of anything does not occupy Him from the preservation of something else.
Nothing is equal to Him.
Nothing is His match.
Nothing is like Him.
He is the All-hearing, the All-seeing.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.
Glory be to Allah, the Originator of the heavens and the earth,
the Maker of the angels, messengers flying on wings,
two, and three, and four.
He increases in creation what He pleases.

segments.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ

translation.en: Surely, Allah has power over all things.

segments.arabic: مَا يَفْتَحِ ٱللَّهُ لِلنَّاسِ مِنْ رَحْمَةٍ فَلاَ مُمْسِكَ لَهَا
segments.transliteration: ma yaftah allahu lilnnasi min rahmatin fala mumsika laha

translation.en: Whatever Allah grants to men of His mercy, there is none to withhold it,

segments.arabic: وَمَا يُمْسِكْ فَلاَ مُرْسِلَ لَهُ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ma yumsik fala mursila lahu min ba`dihi

translation.en: and what He withholds there is none to send it forth after that.
He is the Mighty, the Wise.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura

translation.en: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يَعْلَمُ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi ya`lamu ma fi alssamawati wa ma fi al-ardi

translation.en: Glory be to Allah Who knows whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth.

segments.arabic: مَا يَكُونُ مِنْ نَجْوَىٰ ثَلاثَةٍ إِلاَّ هُوَ رَابِعُهُمْ
segments.transliteration: ma yakunu min najwa thalathatin illa huwa rabi`uhum

translation.en: Nowhere is there a secret counsel between three persons but He is the fourth of them,

segments.transliteration: wa la khamsatin illa huwa sadisuhum

translation.en: nor (between) five but He is the sixth of them,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ أَدْنَىٰ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ وَلاَ أَكْثَرَ إِلاَّ هُوَ مَعَهُمْ أَيْنَمَا كَانُوَٱ
segments.transliteration: wa la adna min dhalika wa la akthara illa huwa ma`ahum aynama kanu

translation.en: nor less than that nor more but He is with them wherever they are.

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ يُنَبِّئُهُمْ بِمَا عَمِلُوٱ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ

translation.en: Then, He will inform them of what they did on the Day of Resurrection.
Surely, Allah is Cognizant of all things.

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal For The Days of ramadan

name: Daily Salawat in ramadan

text.en:
Third: Shaykh al-Tusi and Sayyid ibn Tawus have also said: You
are advised to say the following invocation of blessings upon the Holy
Prophet everyday in Ramadan:

segments.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ وَمَلاَئِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَىٰ ٱلنَّبِيِّ
segments.transliteration: inna allaha wa mala'ikatahu yusalluna `ala alnnabiyyi

translation.en: Verily, Allah and His angels send blessings to the Prophet.

segments.arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ آمَنُوٱ صَلُّوٱ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوٱ تَسْلِيماً
segments.transliteration: ya ayyuha alladhina amanu sallu `alayhi wa sallmu tasliman

translation.en: O you who believe, Call for Divine blessings on him and salute him with a becoming salutation.

segments.transliteration: labbayka ya rabbi wa sa`dayka wa subhanaka

translation.en: Here I am at Your service, my Lord! Doing that which pleases You, and glory be to You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa barik `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: and send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ وَبَارَكْتَ عَلَىٰ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَآلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
segments.transliteration: kama sallayta wa barakta `ala ibrahima wa ali ibrahima

translation.en: just as You have blessed and conferred benedictions upon (Prophet) Abraham and the Household of Abraham.
You are verily worthy of all praise and full of all glory.

segments.transliteration: allahumma irham muhammadan wa ala muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) have mercy upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: kama rahimta ibrahima wa ala ibrahima

translation.en: just as You had mercy upon (Prophet) Abraham and the Household of Abraham.
You are verily worthy of all praise and full of all glory.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ سَلِّمْ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma sallim `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send peace upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: كَمَا سَلَّمْتَ عَلَىٰ نُوحٍ فِي ٱلْعَالَمِينَ

translation.en: just as You sent peace upon Noah among all the creatures.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱمْنُنْ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma imnun `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) confer favors on Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
just as You conferred a favor upon (Prophets) Moses and Aaron.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا شَرَّفْتَنَا بِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin kama sharraftana bihi

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad just as You have honored us by him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا هَدَيْتَنَا بِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin kama hadaytana bihi

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad just as You have guided us through him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَٱبْعَثْهُ مَقَاماً مَحْمُوداً يَغْبِطُهُ بِهِ ٱلأَوَّلُونَ وَٱلآخِرُونَ
segments.transliteration: wab`athhu maqaman mahmudan yaghbituhu bihi al-awwaluna wal-akhiruna

translation.en: and send his a praiseworthy standing due to which all the past and the coming generations shall covet him.

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ كُلَّمَا طَلَعَتْ شَمْسٌ أَوْ غَرَبَتْ
segments.transliteration: `ala muhammadin wa alihi alssalamu kullama tala`at shamsun aw gharabat

translation.en: Upon Muhammad and his Household be peace whenever the sun rises and sets.

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ كُلَّمَا طَرَفَتْ عَيْنٌ أَوْ بَرَقَتْ
segments.transliteration: `ala muhammadin wa alihi alssalamu kullama tarafat `aynun aw baraqat

translation.en: Upon Muhammad and his Household be peace whenever an eye twinkles or glitters.

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ كُلَّمَا ذُكِرَ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: `ala muhammadin wa alihi alssalamu kullama dhukira alssalamu

translation.en: Upon Muhammad and his Household be peace whenever peace is mentioned.

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ كُلَّمَا سَبَّحَ ٱللَّهَ مَلَكٌ أَوْ قَدَّسَهُ
segments.transliteration: `ala muhammadin wa alihi alssalamu kullama sabbaha allaha malakun aw qaddasahu

translation.en: Upon Muhammad and his Household be peace whenever an angel glorifies or exalts Allah.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلأَوَّلِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala muhammadin wa alihi fi al-awwalina

translation.en: Peace be upon Muhammad and his Household among the past generations.

segments.arabic: وَٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلآخِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `ala muhammadin wa alihi fi al-akhirina

translation.en: Peace be upon Muhammad and his Household among the last generations.

segments.arabic: وَٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `ala muhammadin wa alihi fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: Peace be upon Muhammad and his Household in this world and in the Hereafter.
O Allah, Lord of the Holy Town,
Lord of the Rukn (Corner of Ka`bah) and the Maqam (Standing-place near Ka`bah),
and Lord of legality and sanctuary,
(please do) convey our greetings to Muhammad, Your Prophet.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعْطِ مُحَمَّداً مِنَ ٱلْبَهَاءِ وَٱلنَّضْرَةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma a`ti muhammadan min albaha'i walnnadrati

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) grant Muhammad brilliance, bloom,
delight, honor, happiness, right of intervention,
(exalted) rank, (exalted) position, nobility, elevation,
and right of intercession before You on the Resurrection Day,

segments.arabic: أَفْضَلَ مَا تُعْطِي أَحَداً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: afdala ma tu`ti ahadan min khalqika

translation.en: in the best way You have ever granted to any of Your creations.

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطِ مُحَمَّداً فَوْقَ مَا تُعْطِي ٱلْخَلاَئِقَ
segments.transliteration: wa a`ti muhammadan fawqa ma tu`ti alkhala'iqa

translation.en: (Please) grant Muhammad more than what You grant Your creatures

segments.arabic: مِنَ ٱلْخَيْرِ أَضْعَافاً كَثِيرَةً لاَ يُحْصِيهَا غَيْرُكَ
segments.transliteration: min alkhayri ad`afan kathiratan la yuhsiha ghayruka

translation.en: with many folds of goodness that none can count save You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: atyaba wa athara wa azka wa anma

translation.en: with the most excellent, purest, most increasing, most growing,

segments.arabic: وَأَفْضَلَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَىٰ أَحَدٍ مِنَ ٱلأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلآخِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa afdala ma sallayta `ala ahadin min al-awwalina wal-akhirina

translation.en: and best blessings that You have ever conferred on anyone from the past and the coming generations

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ أَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ ٱلرَّاحِمِينَ
