segments.transliteration: wa `ala ahadin min khalqika ya arhama alrrahimina

translation.en: and on anyone of Your created beings. O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيٍّ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to `Ali, the Commander of the Believers,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who provoke his enmity,

segments.arabic: وَضَاعِفِ ٱلعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَنْ شَرِكَ فِي دَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa da`if al`adhaba `ala man sharika fi damihi

translation.en: inflict double chastisement on any one who had a hand in the shedding of his blood.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ فَاطِمَةَ بِنْتِ نَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala fatimata binti nabiyyika muhammadin `alayhi wa alihi alssalamu

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Fatimah, the daughter of Your Prophet Muhammad, peace be upon him and his Household,
be the supporter of those who support her,
be the enemy of him who provoke her enmity,
inflict double chastisement on those who wronged her,
and curse those who injured Your Prophet as they injured her.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَسَنِ وَٱلْحُسَيْنِ إِمَامَيِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala alhasani walhusayni imamay almuslimina

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to al-Hasan and al-Husayn, the two leaders of the Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports them,
be the enemy of any one who provoke their enmity,

segments.arabic: وَضَاعِفِ ٱلْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَنْ شَرِكَ فِي دِمَائِهِمَا
segments.transliteration: wa da`if al`adhaba `ala man sharika fi dima'ihima

translation.en: and inflict double chastisement on any one who had a hand in the shedding of their blood.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala `aliyyi ibni alhusayni imami almuslimina

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to `Ali ibn al-Husayn, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and inflict double chastisement upon any one who wronged him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadi bni `aliyyin imami almuslimina

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad ibn `Ali, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and inflict double chastisement upon any one who wronged him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala ja`fari bni muhammadin imami almuslimina

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Ja`far ibn Muhammad, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and inflict double chastisement upon any one who wronged him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala musa bni ja`farin imami almuslimina

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Musa ibn Ja`far, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,

segments.arabic: وَضَاعِفِ ٱلْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَنْ شَرِكَ فِي دَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa da`if al`adhaba `ala man sharika fi damihi

translation.en: and inflict double chastisement upon any one who had hand in the shedding of his blood.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَىٰ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala `aliyyi bni musa imami almuslimina

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to `Ali ibn Musa, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,

segments.arabic: وَضَاعِفِ ٱلْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَنْ شَرِكَ فِي دَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa da`if al`adhaba `ala man sharika fi damihi

translation.en: and inflict double chastisement upon any one who had a hand in the shedding of his blood.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadi bni `aliyyin imami almuslimina

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad ibn `Ali, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and inflict double chastisement upon any one who wronged him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala `aliyyi bni muhammadin imami almuslimina

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to `Ali ibn Muhammad, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and inflict double chastisement upon any one who wronged him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala alhasani bni `aliyyin imami almuslimina

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to al-Hasan ibn `Ali, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and inflict double chastisement upon any one who wronged him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْخَلَفِ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala alkhalafi min ba`dihi imami almuslimina

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to the Successor after him, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and expedite his Relief.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْقَاسِمِ وَٱلطَّاهِرِ ٱبْنَيْ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala alqasimi walttahiri ibnay nabiyyika

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to al-Qasim and al-Tahir, the two sons of Your Prophet.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ رُقَيَّةَ بِنْتِ نَبِيِّكَ

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Ruqayyah, the daughter of Your Prophet
and curse those who injured Your Prophet through wronging her.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ أُمِّ كُلْثُومَ بِنْتِ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala ummi kulthuma binti nabiyyika

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Umm-Kulthum, the daughter of Your Prophet
and curse those who injured Your Prophet through wronging her.
O Allah, (please do) send blessings to the offspring of Your Prophet.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱخْلُفْ نَبِيَّكَ فِي أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ukhluf nabiyyaka fi ahli baytihi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) be the representative of Your Prophet among his Household.
O Allah, (please do) grant them power in the land.
O Allah, (please do) include us with their troop, their aides,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْصَارِهِمْ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَقِّ فِي ٱلسِّرِّ وَٱلْعَلانِيَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa ansarihim `ala alhaqqi fi alssirri wal`alaniyati

translation.en: and their supporters on confirming the truth secretly and openly.

segments.transliteration: allahumma utlub bidhahlihim wa witrihim wa dima'ihim

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) retaliate upon those who wronged and slew them, and those who shed their blood.

segments.arabic: وَكُفَّ عَنَّا وَعَنْهُمْ وَعَنْ كُلِّ مُؤْمِنٍ وَمُؤْمِنَةٍ
segments.transliteration: wa kuffa `anna wa `anhum wa `an kulli mu'minin wa mu'minatin

translation.en: And (please) save us, them, and every believing man and women
the evil of all tyrants and transgressors,

segments.transliteration: wa kulli dabbatin anta akhidhun binasiyatiha

translation.en: and every living creature that You hold it by its forelock.

segments.transliteration: innaka ashaddu ba'san wa ashaddu tankilan

translation.en: Verily, You are the strongest in prowess and the strongest to give an exemplary punishment.

text.en: Sayyid Ibn Tawus adds: You may also say the following:

translation.en: O my means in troubles!
O my Companion in hardships!
O Provider of my amenities!
O utmost of my desires!
It is You Who conceals my defects,
Who relieves my apprehensions,
and Who overlooks my slips.
So, (please do) forgive my sin.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: You may also say the following:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ لِهَمٍّ لاَ يُفَرِّجُهُ غَيْرُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka lihammin la yufarrijuhu ghayruka

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You about a grief that none can relieve save You,

segments.transliteration: wa lirahmatin la tunalu illa bika

translation.en: for mercy that cannot be attained except through You,

segments.transliteration: wa likarbin la yakshifuhu illa anta

translation.en: about hardship from which none can rescue except You,

segments.transliteration: wa liraghbatin la tublaghu illa bika

translation.en: for desire that cannot be obtained except by You,

segments.transliteration: wa lihajatin la yaqdiha illa anta

translation.en: and for a need that none can settle save You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا كَانَ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ مَا أَذِنْتَ لِي بِهِ مِنْ مَسْأَلَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama kana min sha'nika ma adhinta li bihi min mas'alatika

translation.en: O Allah, just as You have decided to allow me to pray You
and had mercy upon me through allowing me to refer to You,

segments.arabic: فَلْيَكُنْ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ سَيِّدِي ٱلإِجَابَةُ لِي فِيمَا دَعَوْتُكَ
segments.transliteration: falyakun min sha'nika sayyidi al-ijabatu li fima da`awtuka

translation.en: so also, please, my Master, decide to respond to me in what I have prayed You for,
confer upon me the favors for which I have hoped You,
and grant me redemption from that against which I have resorted to You.

segments.arabic: فَإِنْ لَمْ أَكُنْ أَهْلاً أَنْ أَبْلُغَ رَحْمَتَكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'in lam akun ahlan an ablugha rahmataka

translation.en: But if I do not deserve to attain Your mercy,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ رَحْمَتَكَ أَهْلٌ أَنْ تَبْلُغَنِي وَتَسَعَنِي
segments.transliteration: fa'inna rahmataka ahlun an tablughani wa tasa`ani

translation.en: then, Your mercy is too wide to avoid including and covering me.

segments.transliteration: wa in lam akun lil-ijabati ahlan

translation.en: If I do not deserve Your response,
then, You are the worthiest of granting favors
and Your mercy has covered all things.
So, let Your mercy include me, O my God.
O All-generous! I beseech You in the name of Your Noble Face

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi

translation.en: to bless Muhammad and his Household,
relieve my grief,
release me from my hardship and agony,
have mercy upon me out of Your mercy,
and confer on me with Your favor.
You are verily the Hearer of prayers, the Nigh, and the Responding.

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal For The Days of ramadan

name: The Other Daily Aamal in ramadan

text.en:
Fourth: Both Shaykh al-Tusi and Sayyid ibn Tawus have
recommended saying the following supplicatory prayer throughout the
days of Ramadan:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ بِأَفْضَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min fadlika bi-afdalihi

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from the best of Your favors;
and all Your favors are excellent.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your whole favor.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ بِأَعَمّهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min rizqika bi-a`ammhi

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from the most widespread of Your sustenance;
and all Your sustenance is widespread.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your whole sustenance.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عَطَائِكَ بِأَهْنَئِهِ

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from the most wholesome of Your bestowal;
and Your entire bestowal is wholesome.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your entire bestowal.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِكَ بِأَعْجَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min khayrika bi-a`jalihi

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from Your most instant welfare;
and Your entire welfare is instant.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your entire welfare.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ إحْسَانِكَ بِأَحْسَنِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min ihsanika bi-ahsanihi

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from You most excellent benevolence;
and Your entire benevolence is excellent.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your entire benevolence.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَا تُجِيبُنِي بِهِ حِينَ أَسْأَلُكَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka bimatujibuny bihi hina as’aluka

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You in the name of all that through which You may respond to me if I beseech You;
therefore, (please do) respond to me, O Allah.
And (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad, Your pleased servant,
Your chosen Messenger,

segments.transliteration: wa aminika wa najiyyika duna khalqika

translation.en: Your trustee, Your confidant one among all Your beings,
Your selected one among all Your servants,
Your true Prophet, and Your much-loved one.

segments.arabic: وَصَلّ عَلَى رَسُولِكَ وَخِيَرَتِكَ مِنَ العَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salli `alarasulika wa khiyaratika mina al`alamina

translation.en: And (please do) send blessings upon (him) Your messenger, Your choicest among all people,
the conveyor of good tidings (for the believers), the warner ,
and the luminous lantern;
and (please do send blessings) upon his Household, the pious and the immaculate;

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى مَلائِكَتِكَ الّذِينَ اسْتَخْلَصْتَهُمْ لِنَفْسِكَ وَحَجَبْتَهُمْ عَنْ خَلْقِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa `alamala’ikatika alladhina astakhlastahum linafsika wa hajabtahum `an khalqika

translation.en: and upon Your angels whom You have attached to Your Person and concealed against Your beings;

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى أَنْبِيَائِكَ الّذِينَ يُنْبِئُونَ عَنْكَ بِالصّدْقِ،

translation.en: and upon Your Prophets who convey Your instructions truly;
and upon Your Messengers whom You have given exclusively Your Revelations
and You have made excel the others by means of Your messages;
and upon Your righteous servants
whom You have included with Your mercy,

segments.transliteration: al-a’immati almuhtadina alrrashidina wa awliya’ika almutahharina

translation.en: the guides, the well-guided, the orthodox, and Your pure saints;

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى جَبْرَائِيلَ وَمِيكَائِيلَ وَإسْرَافِيلَ وَمَلَكِ المَوْتِ،
segments.transliteration: wa `alajabra’ila wa mika’ila wa israfila wa malaki almawti

translation.en: and upon (Archangels) Gabriel, Michael, Israfil, and the Angel of Death;
and upon Ridwan the Keeper of Paradise;
and upon Malik the Keeper of Hell,
and the Holy Spirit,
the Spirit of Faith,
and the Favorite Bearers of Your Throne;
and upon the two angels who watch over me—

segments.arabic: بِالصّلاةِ الّتِي تُحِبّ أَنْ يُصَلّيَ بِهَا عَلَيْهِمْ أَهْلُ السّمَاوَاتِ وَأَهْلُ الأَرَضِينَ،
segments.transliteration: bilsslati allaty tuhibb an yusalliya biha`alayhim ahlu alssamawati wa ahlu alaradina

translation.en: blessings that You desire that the inhabitants of the heavens and the inhabitants of the earth pray You to send upon them;
blessings that are pure, abundant,
holy, genuine, growing, evident,
deep, honorable, and virtuous

segments.arabic: تُبَيّنُ بِهَا فَضْلَهُمْ عَلَى الأَوّلِينَ وَالآخِرِينَ.

translation.en: through which You obviously demonstrate their precedence over the past and the coming generations.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ أَعْطِ مُحَمّداً الوَسِيلَةَ وَالشّرَفَ وَالفَضِيلَةَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma a`ti muhammadan alwasilata wal-shsharafa wal-fadilata

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) give Muhammad subtle way, honor, and precedence

segments.arabic: وَاجْزِهِ خَيْرَ مَا جَزَيْتَ نَبِيّاً عَنْ أُمّتِهِ.

translation.en: and reward him with the best reward that You ever give to a Prophet on behalf of his nation.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ وَأَعْطِ مُحَمّداً صَلَّى اللّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ مَعَ كُلّ زُلْفَةٍ زُلْفَةً،
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa a`ti muhammadan sallaallahu `alayhi wa alihi ma`a kulli zulfatin zulfatan

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) give Muhammad—peace of Allah be upon him and his Family—an additional proximity with each proximity that You decide for him;
and an additional subtle means with each means that You decide for him;
and an additional merit with each merit that You decide for him;
and an additional honor with each honor that You decide for him;

segments.arabic: تُعْطِي مُحَمّداً وَآلَهُ يَوْمَ القِيَامَةِ أَفْضَلَ مَا أَعْطَيْتَ أَحَداً مِنَ الأَوّلِينَ وَالآخِرِينَ.
segments.transliteration: tu`ty muhammadan wa alahu yawma alqiyamati afdala maa`tayta ahadan mina al-awwalina wal-akhirina

translation.en: and (please do) give Muhammad and his Household, on the Resurrection Day, the best of all that which You have given to any of Your creatures from the past and the coming generations.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ وَاجْعَلْ مُحَمّداً صَلَّى اللّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ أَدْنَى المُرْسَلِينَ مِنْكَ مَجْلِساً،
segments.transliteration: allahumma waj`al muhammadan sallaallahu `alayhi wa alihi adnaalmursalina minka majlisan

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) choose for Muhammad—peace of Allah be upon him and his Family—the nearest position to You;
and the most expansive abode in Paradise in Your vicinity;
and the most effective means to You.
And (please do) make him the chief interceder,
the chief mediator,
the first speaker,
the most successful petitioner.

segments.arabic: وَابْعَثْهُ المَقَامَ المَحْمُودَ الّذِي يَغْبِطُهُ بِهِ الأَوّلُونَ وَالآخِرُونَ
segments.transliteration: wab`athhu almaqama almahmuda alladhy yaghbituhu bihi alawuluna wal-akhiruna

translation.en: And (please do) send him the Praiseworthy Standing due to which all the past and coming generations will envy him;
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلّيَ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa as’aluka an tusalliya `alamuhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: And I do beseech You to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
to hear my voice;
to respond to my plea,
to overlook my sins,
to excuse my wrongdoings,
to give success to my prayer,
to settle my needs,
to fulfill Your promise to me,
to let off my offense,
to forgive my sins,
to pardon my evildoings,
to accept me and not to reject me,
to have mercy upon me and not to punish me,
to grant me good health and not to afflict me,

segments.arabic: وَتَرْزُقَنِي مِنَ الرّزْقِ أَطْيَبَهُ وَأَوْسَعَهُ وَلا تَحْرِمَنِي،
segments.transliteration: wa tarzuqany mina alrrzqi atiyabahu wa awsa`ahu wa latahrimani

translation.en: to grant me from the nicest and most extensive sustenance and not to deprive me (of Your sustenance).
O my Lord: (please do) help me settle my debts;
and relieve me of my burdens;

segments.arabic: وَلا تُحَمّلْنِي مَا لا طَاقَةَ لِي بِهِ،

translation.en: and do not impose on me that which I have not the strength to bear.

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلايَ وَأَدْخِلْنِي فِي كُلّ خَيْرٍ أَدْخَلْتَ فِيهِ مُحَمّداً وَآلَ مُحَمّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: yamawlaya wa adkhilny fi kull khayrin adkhalta fihi muhammadan wa ala muhammadin

translation.en: O my Master: and (please do) include me with every good item that You have chosen from Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَأَخْرِجْنِي مِنْ كُلّ سُوءٍ أَخْرَجْتَ مِنْهُ مُحَمّداً وَآلَ مُحَمّدٍ صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَيْهِمْ،
segments.transliteration: wa akhrijny min kulli su‘in akhrajta minhu muhammadan wa ala muhammadin salawatuka `alayhi wa `alayhim

translation.en: and take me out of any evil from which You have saved Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad—Your blessings be upon him and them.

segments.arabic: وَالسّلامُ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَيْهِمْ وَرَحْمَةُ اللّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ.
segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayhi wa `alayhim wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace, Allah’s mercy, and blessings be upon him and them.

text.en: and say three times:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: alluhumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ قَلِيلاً مِنْ كَثِيرٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka qalilan min kathirin

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You for a little from the very much,
in the midst of my many needs for which I entirely depend on You,
and You, since eternity, are able to do without them,
but for me it is titanic
and for You it is very easy and simple.

segments.arabic: فَامْنُنْ عَلَيّ بِهِ إنّكَ عَلَى كُلّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ،
segments.transliteration: famnun `alayya bihi innaka `ala kulli shay‘in qadirun

translation.en: So, (please do) bestow upon me with them, for You have power over all things.
Respond to me, O the Lord of the worlds.

text.en:
Fifth: It is recommended to say the supplicatory prayer that begins
with: <ref=3:39>Dua Allah'Humma Inni Aduka</ref>

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ بَهَائِكَ بِأَبْهَاهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min baha’ika bi-abhahu

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your brilliance that beautifies,
and all Your glories are radiantly brilliant,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your glories.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ جَلالِكَ بِأَجَلّهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min jalalika bi-ajallhi

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your majesty that gives grandeur,
and all Your majestic powers are strongly sublime;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your powers.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ جَمَالِكَ بِأَجْمَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min jamalika bi-ajmalihi

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your refined good that makes more handsome,
and all Your refinements are gracefully beautiful;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your beauties.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عَظَمَتِكَ بِأَعْظَمِهَا

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your greatness that makes great,
and all Your powers are extensively important;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your influences.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ نُورِكَ بِأَنْوَرِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min nurika bi-anwarihi

translation.en: O Allah I beseech You to give me from Your light that enlightens,
and all Your enlightenments are luminously bright;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your lights.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ بِأَوْسَعِهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min rahmatika bi-awsa`iha

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your mercy that gives much,
and all Your kind leniencies are plenteously many,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your compassions.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ كَمَالِكَ بِأَكْمَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min kamalika bi-akmalihi

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your perfection that brings to fullness,
and all Your perfections are total and whole,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your perfections.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ كَلِمَاتِكَ بِأَتَمّهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min kalimatika bi-atammha

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your Words that elaborate and conclude;
and all Your words are complete and perfect;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your Words.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ أَسْمَائِكَ بِأَكْبَرِهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min asma’ika bi-akbariha

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your Names that make great,
and all Your Names are important;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your Names:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عِزّتِكَ بِأَعَزّهَا

translation.en: O Allah I beseech You to give me from Your authority that surpasses in honor and power,
and all Your authorities are rare and supreme,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your authorities.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ مَشِيئَتِكَ بِأَمْضَاهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min mashi-atika bi-amdaha

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your Will that (simultaneously) takes effect,
and all Your wills are (at once) executed;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your wills.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ قُدْرَتِكَ بِالْقُدْرَةِ الّتِي اسْتَطَلْتَ بِهَا عَلَى كُلّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min qudratika bilqudrati allaty astatalta biha`alakulli shay‘in

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your that omnipotence which controls everything,
and at all events Your omnipotence dominates.
O Allah I beseech You in the name of Your all-embracing omnipotence.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عِلْمِكَ بِأَنْفَذِهِ

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your Wisdom that pierces through and enforces,
and Your Wisdom is altogether effective,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of Your Wisdom.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ قَوْلِكَ بِأَرْضَاهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min qawlika bi-ardahu

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your promise which always is fulfilled,
and all Your promises are kept and fulfilled,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your promises.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ مَسَائِلِكَ بِأَحَبّهَا إلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min masa’ilika bi-ahabbhailayka

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your Channels which are most dear to You,
and all that which is dear to You is most desirable,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your Channels.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ شَرَفِكَ بِأَشْرَفِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min sharafika bi-ashrafihi

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your distinctions that vie in glory,
and all Your distinctions are noble;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your distinctions.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ سُلْطَانِكَ بِأَدْوَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min sultanika bi-adwamihi

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your sovereignty which lasts and continues forever,
and for all times Your sovereignty is everlasting;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of Your absolute sovereignty.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ مُلْكِكَ بِأَفْخَرِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min mulkika bi-afkharihi

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your kingdom that surpasses in glory and nobility,
and in reality Your kingdom alone is the most celebrated and magnificent;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of Your unlimited kingdom.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عَلاءِكَ بِأَعْلاهُ

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your highest height that exalts,
and Your eminence is altogether sublime;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of Your highest sublimeness.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ مَنّكَ بِأَقْدَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min mannka bi-aqdamihi

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your bounties which always move ahead, come in advance,
and all Your bounties are eternal,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your bounties.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ آيَاتِكَ بِأَعْجَبِهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min ayatika bi-a`jabiha

translation.en: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your signs; the most wonderful of them,
and all Your signs are wonderful;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your signs,

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kamaamartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ بِأَفْضَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min fadlika bi-afdalihi

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from the best of Your favors;
and all Your favors are excellent.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your whole favor.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ بِأَعَمّهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min rizqika bi-a`ammhi

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from the most widespread of Your sustenance;
and all Your sustenance is widespread.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your whole sustenance.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عَطَائِكَ بِأَهْنَئِهِ

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from the most wholesome of Your bestowal;
and Your entire bestowal is wholesome.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your entire bestowal.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِكَ بِأَعْجَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min khayrika bi-a`jalihi

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from Your most instant welfare;
and Your entire welfare is instant.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your entire welfare.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ إحْسَانِكَ بِأَحْسَنِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min ihsanika bi-ahsanihi

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from You most excellent benevolence;
and Your entire benevolence is excellent.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your entire benevolence.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَا تُجِيبُنِي بِهِ حِينَ أَسْأَلُكَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka bimatujibuny bihi hina as’aluka

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You in the name of all that through which You may respond to me if I beseech You;
therefore, (please do) respond to me, O Allah.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَا تُجِيبُنِي بِهِ حِينَ أَسْأَلُكَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka bimatujibuny bihi hina as’aluka

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You in the name of all that through which You may respond to me if I beseech You;
Yes, I have besought You, O Allah.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ بِمَا أَنْتَ فِيهِ مِنَ الشُّؤونِ وَالْجَبَرُوتِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma bimaanta fihi mina alshshu’uni wal-jabaruti

translation.en: O Allah: (I beseech You) in the name of all authorities and powers that You enjoy.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنّي أسْألُكَ بِشَأنِكَ وَجَبَروتِكَ كُلِّها
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka bisha’nika wa jabarutika kulliha

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You in the name of all of Your authorities and powers.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَا تُجِيبُنِي بِهِ حِينَ أَسْأَلُكَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka bimatujibuny bihi hina as’aluka bih

translation.en: O Allah: I ask You to give me whereby You gives answer to my supplication whenever I turn to You,
So, (please) respond to me, O Allah.
Send blessings on Muhammad and the Family of Muhammad

segments.arabic: اللّهُم صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: send blessings on Muhammad and the Family of Muhammad
and resurrect me abiding by the believing in You,
giving credence to Your Messenger,

segments.arabic: وَالوِلايَةِ لِعَلِيّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ عَلَيْهِما السَّلامُ،
segments.transliteration: wal-wilayati li`aliyyi bni aby talibin `alayhima alssalamu

translation.en: being faithful to `Ali ibn Abu-Talib—peace be upon both of them;
being following the (Divinely commissioned) leadership of the Imams from the Household of Muhammad
And disavowing their enemy.

segments.arabic: فَإِنّي قَدْ رَضِيتُ يَا رَبّي بِذلِكَ،
segments.transliteration: fa’inni qad raditu ya rabby bidhlika

translation.en: My Lord, I have accepted such.

segments.arabic: اللّهُم صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah: send blessings on Muhammad and the Family of Muhammad
And I beseech You for the best of the goodness: Your pleasure and Paradise;

segments.arabic: وَأعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ الشَّرِّ: سَخَطِكَ وَالنّارِ.
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min sharri alshsharri sakhatika wannari

translation.en: And I seek Your protection against the most evil of the evil: Your wrath and Hellfire.

segments.arabic: اللّهُم صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ،

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad;

segments.arabic: وَاحْفَظْنِي مِنْ كُلِّ مُصِيبَةٍ وَكُلِّ بَلِيَّةٍ،
segments.transliteration: wahfazhniy min kulli musiibatin wakulli baliyyatin,

translation.en: And safeguard me against all misfortunes and all ordeals
And all punishments
And all seditious matters
And all trials
And all evils
And all tribulations
And all misfortunes
And all catastrophes

segments.arabic: نَزَلَتْ أو تَنْزِلُ مِنَ السَّماءِ إلى الأرْضِ في هذِهِ السّاعَةِ،
segments.transliteration: nazalat aw tanzilu mina alssama‘i ili alardi fy hdhihi alssa`ati,

translation.en: That have already or will ascend from the heavens to the earth at this very hour,
And at this night
And on this day
And in this month
And in this year.

segments.arabic: اللّهُم صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ،

translation.en: O Allah: (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad;
And decide for me a portion from all pleasant things,
And all joys
And all straightness
And all relief
And all well-being
And all safety
And all honor

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ كُلِّ رِزْقٍ واسِعٍ حَلالٍ طَيِّبٍ،
segments.transliteration: wamin kulli rizqin wasi`in halalin tayyibin,

translation.en: And all items of sustenance that is expansive, legally gotten, and pleasant
And all graces
And all advantageous things

segments.arabic: نَزَلَتْ أو تَنْزِلُ مِنَ السَّماءِ إلى الأرْضِ في هذِهِ السّاعَةِ
segments.transliteration: nazalat aw tanzilu mina alssama‘i ili alardi fy hdhihi alssa`ati

translation.en: That have already or will ascend from the heavens to the earth at this very hour,
And at this night
And on this day
And in this month
And in this year.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إنْ كانَتْ ذُنوبي قَدْ أخْلَقَتْ وَجْهِيَ عِنْدَكَ،
segments.transliteration: aalllhumma in kanat dhunuby qad akhlaqat wajhiia `indaka,

translation.en: O Allah: If my sins have deformed my face in Your view
And have thus cut the path taking me to You
And have changed my status with You,

segments.arabic: فَإنّي أسْألُكَ بِنورِ وَجْهِكَ الكَريمِ الَّذي لَمْ يُطْفَأ،
segments.transliteration: fainny asaluka binuri wajhika alkarimi alladhy lam yutfa’,

translation.en: Then, I beseech You in the name of the Light of Your Magnanimous Face that is never extinguished,
And in the name of the face of Your Chosen Prophet, Muhammad,
And in the name of the face of Your well-pleased servant, `Ali,
And in the name of Your intimate servants that You have selected,

segments.arabic: أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،

translation.en: (I beseech You) that You send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَأنْ تَغْفِرَ لي وَلِوالِدَيَّ وَما وَلَدا،
segments.transliteration: Wa’an taghfira ly waliualidayya wama walada,

translation.en: And forgive for me, for my parents, and for all their offspring
And forgive for the believing men and women
And for all their offspring
All our sins,
Including the insignificant and the major,
And that You seal our lives with righteous deeds,
And that You settle our needs and important desires,
And that You respond to us our well-intended prayers and requests;
So, (please), respond to us,
In the name of Muhammad and his Household.

segments.arabic: اللّهُم صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ،

translation.en: O Allah: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
(please) respond; (please) respond; (please) respond;
Only that which Allah wills shall come to pass.

segments.arabic: لا حَولَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إلاّ باللهِ،
segments.transliteration: la hawla wala quwwata illa ballahi,

translation.en: There is no power and no might except with Allah.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ،

translation.en: Glory be to your Lord, the Lord of Honor, above what they describe.
And peace be on the messengers.
And all praise is due to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.
O He but Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ بِحَقِّ مَنْ حَقُّهُ عَلَيْكَ عَظيمٌ،

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of those whose names enjoy a great regard with You
And in the name of there is no god save You

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ بِبَهاءِ لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ،
segments.transliteration: asaluka bibaha‘i la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta,

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the luminosity of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ بِجَلالِ لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ،
segments.transliteration: asaluka bijalali la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta,

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the majesty of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ بِجَمالِ لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ.
segments.transliteration: asaluka bijamali la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta.

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the splendor of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ بِنورِ لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ،
segments.transliteration: asaluka binuri la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta,

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the light of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ بِكَمالِ لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ،
segments.transliteration: asaluka bikamali la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta,

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the excellency of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ بِعِزَّةِ لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bi`izzati la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the honor of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ بِعِظَمِ لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bi`izhami la ilha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the grandeur of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ بِقَولِ لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka biqawli la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the saying of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ بِشَرَفِ لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bisharafi la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the dignity of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ بِعَلاءِ لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bi`ala‘i la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the elevation of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ بِلا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إلاّ أنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bila ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: يا رَبّاهُ يا رَبّاهُ يا رَبّاهُ…
segments.transliteration: ya rabbahu ya rabbahu ya rabbahu…

translation.en: O my Lord; O my Lord; O my Lord
I beseech You; O my Master:
O Allah; O my Lord:

segments.arabic: يا سَيِّداهُ يا مَولاهُ يا غِياثاهُ يا مَلْجَآهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya sayyidahu ya mawlahu ya ghiyathahu ya malja-ahu

translation.en: O my Master; O my Lord: O my Aide; O my Shelter;
O the Ultimate goal of my all desires;
O the Most Merciful of all those who show mercy;
I beseech You, for nothing is like You

segments.arabic: وَأسْألُكَ بِكُلِّ دَعْوَةٍ مُسْتَجابَةٍ دَعاكَ بِها نَبِيٌّ مُرْسَلٌ أوْ مَلَكٌ مُقَرَّبٌ،
segments.transliteration: wa as’aluka bikulli da`watin mustajabatin da`aka biha nabiyyun mursalun aw malakun muqarrabun

translation.en: And I beseech You with every responded prayer that has been addressed to You by a missioned Prophet or a favorite angel

segments.arabic: أوْ عَبْدٌ مُؤمِنٌ امْتَحَنْتَ قَلْبَهُ لِلإيمانِ،

translation.en: Or a faithful servant (of You) whose heart has been tried by You to carry faith
And then You responded to his prayer.

segments.arabic: وَأتَوَجَّهُ إلَيْكَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ نَبِيِّكَ نَبِيِّ الرَّحْمَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wa atawajjahu ilayka bimuhammadin nabiyyika nabiyyi alrrahmati

translation.en: I turn my face towards You asking You in the name of Your Prophet, Muhammad, the Prophet of mercy
And I seek his intercession before You for the sake of Your settlement of my need
O Muhammad: O the Messenger of Allah;

segments.arabic: بِأبي أنْتَ وَاُمِّي أَتَوَجَّهُ بِكَ إلى رَبِّكَ وَرَبّي،
segments.transliteration: bi-abi anta wa-ummi atawajjahu bika ila rabbika wa rabbi

translation.en: May Allah accept my father and mother as ransoms for you! In your name do I turn my and your Lord;
And I seek your intercession for the sake of the Lord’s settling my needs.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبّاهُ يَا رَبّاهُ يَا رَبّاهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya rabbahu ya rabbahu ya rabbahu

translation.en: O my Lord; O my Lord; O my Lord;
I beseech You by Your sake,
For there is nothing like You.
And I turn my face towards You, asking You in the name of Muhammad, Your most beloved one,
And in the name of his offspring—the guide ones,
And I seek their intercession for the sake of Your settling my needs.

segments.arabic: وَأسْألُكَ اللّهُمَّ بِحَياتِكَ الَّتي لا تَموتُ،
segments.transliteration: wa as’aluka allahumma bihayatika allaty la tamutu

translation.en: And I beseech You in the name of Your everl-ivingness, since You never dies,
And in the name of the Light of Your Face that is never extinguished
And in the name of Your Eye that never sleeps

segments.arabic: وَأسْألُكَ بِحَقِّ مَنْ حَقُّهُ عَلَيْكَ عَظيمٌ،

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of those whose names enjoy a great regard with You

segments.arabic: أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،

translation.en: That You may send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
Before everything,
And after everything,
And as many as all things,
And as weighty as all things,
And as full as all things

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنّي أسْألُكَ أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ المُصْطَفى،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin `abdika almustafa

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to send blessings upon Muhammad—Your chosen servant
And Your well-pleased Messenger

segments.transliteration: wa aminika almustafa wa najibika duna khalqika

translation.en: And Your Chosen Trustee and Your selected one among all Your creatures,
And Your most beloved one, and Your elect among all Your beings.
The Warner, the Bearer of good tidings, and the luminous lantern.

segments.arabic: وَعَلى أهْلِ بَيتِهِ الطَّيِّبينَ الطّاهِرينَ المُطَهَّرينَ الأخْيارِ الأبْرار،
segments.transliteration: wa `ala ahli baytihi alttayyibina alttahirina al-akhyari al-abrari

translation.en: And upon his Household—the pure, the immaculate, the purified, the virtuous, and the pious,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى مَلائِكَتِكَ الّذِينَ اسْتَخْلَصْتَهُمْ لِنَفْسِكَ وَحَجَبْتَهُمْ عَنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala mala’ikatika alladhina istakhlastahum linafsika wa hajabtahum `an khalqika

translation.en: And upon Your angels whom You have chosen for Yourself and screened from Your creatures,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى أَنْبِيَائِكَ الّذِينَ يُنْبِئُونَ بِالصّدْقِ عَنْكَ،

translation.en: And upon Your Prophets who convey truly from You
And upon Your righteous servants,
Whom You have included with Your mercy;
The leaders, the well-guided, the orthodox, the purified,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala jibra’ila wa mika’ila wa israfila

translation.en: And upon (Archangels) Gabriel, and Michael, and Israfil,
And the Angel of Death, and Ridwan the doorkeeper of Paradise,
And Malik the doorkeeper of Hell,
And the Holy Spirit

segments.transliteration: wa hamalatil-`arshi wa munkarin wa nakirin

translation.en: And the Bearers of the (Divine) Throne, and Munkar and Nakir
And the two angels whom are in charge of supervising me

segments.arabic: بِالصّلاةِ الّتِي تُحِبّ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ بِها عَلَيْهِمْ،
segments.transliteration: bilssalari allati tuhibbu an tusalliya biha `alayhim

translation.en: (please bless them all) with the blessing that You like to bless them with;

segments.arabic: صَلاةً كَثيرَةً طَيِّبَةً مُبارَكَةً زاكِيَةً نامِيَةً،
segments.transliteration: salatan kathiratan tayyibatan mubarakatan zakiyatan namiyatan

translation.en: (Let it be) a blessing that is abundant, pure, holy, genuine, growing,
deep, honorable, and virtuous

segments.arabic: تُبَيّنُ بِهَا فَضْلَهُمْ عَلَى الأَوّلِينَ وَالآخِرِينَ.

translation.en: through which You obviously demonstrate their precedence over the past and the coming generations.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَسْمَعَ صَوْتِي،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka an tasma`a sawti

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to hear my voice,
And to respond to my prayer,
And to forgive my sins,
And to give success to my prayer,
And to settle my needs,
And to accept my excuses
And to fulfill Your promise to me,
And to let off my offense,
And to overlook my sins,
And to excuse my wrongdoings,
And to pardon my evildoings,
And to be always present for me
And never reject me
And to have mercy upon me and not to punish me,
And to grant me good health and not to afflict me,

segments.transliteration: wa tarzuqany mina alrrzqi atiyabahu wa awsa`ahu

translation.en: And to grant me from the nicest and most extensive sustenance
And most pleasant and most wholesome
And most plentiful and most abundant

segments.arabic: وَلا تَحْرِمَني يا رَبِّ دِيني وَأمانَتي،
segments.transliteration: wa la tahrimni ya rabbi dini wa amanati

translation.en: And not to deprive me, O my Lord, of my faith and belief trusted with me
And (please) relieve me of my burdens;

segments.arabic: وَلا تُحَمِّلْني ما لا طاقَةَ لي به،
segments.transliteration: wa la tuhammilny ma la taqata li bihi

translation.en: and do not impose on me that which I have not the strength to bear.
O my Master;

segments.arabic: وَأدْخِلْني في كُلِّ خَيْرٍ أدْخَلْتَ فيهِ مُحَمَّداً وَآلَ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa adkhilny fi kull khayrin adkhalta fihi muhammadan wa ala muhammadin

translation.en: And (please do) include me with every good item that You have chosen from Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَأخْرِجْني مِنْ كُلِّ سوءٍ أخْرَجْتَهُمْ مِنْهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa akhrijny min kulli su‘in akhrajtahum minhu

translation.en: and take me out of any evil from which You have saved them

segments.arabic: وَلا تُفَرِّقْ بَيْني وَبَيْنَهُمْ طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ أبَداً في الدُّنْيا وَالآخِرَةِ.
segments.transliteration: wa la tufarriq bayni wa baynahum tarfata `aynin abadan fiddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: And never separate me from them for even a twinkling of an eye neither in this worldly life nor in the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani

translation.en: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَسْأَلُكَ قَلِيلاً مِنْ كَثِيرٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka qalilan min kathirin

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You for a little from the very much,
in the midst of my many needs for which I entirely depend on You,
and You, since eternity, are able to do without them,
but for me it is titanic

segments.arabic: فَامْنُنْ بِهِ عَلَيّ إنّكَ عَلَى كُلّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ.
segments.transliteration: famnun bihi `alayya innaka `ala kulli shay‘in qadirun

translation.en: So, (please do) bestow upon me with them, for You have power over all things.
O Allah: (please do) include us with the righteous ones, out of Your mercy.
And uplift us to the rank of `illiyyin (most elevated rank).

segments.arabic: وَبِكَأْسٍ مِنْ مَعِينٍ مِنْ عَيْنٍ سَلْسَبِيلٍ فَاسْقِنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa bikasin min ma`inin min `aynin salsabilin fasqina

translation.en: And serve us with water running out of spring of Salsabil.

segments.transliteration: wa mina alhuri al`ini birahmatika fazawwijna

translation.en: And, out of Your mercy, give us as wives the women of Paradise.

segments.arabic: وَمِنَ الْوِلْدَانِ الْمُخَلّدِينَ كَأَنّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَكْنُونٌ فَأَخْدِمْنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa mina alwildani almukhalldina ka-annahum lu´lu´un maknunun fa-akhdimna

translation.en: And make the Paradisiacal youths who never alter in age and who are like hidden pearls serve us.

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ ثِمَارِ الْجَنّةِ وَلُحُومِ الطّيْرِ فَأَطْعِمْنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa min thimari aljannati wa luhumi alttiri fat`imna

translation.en: And give us food from the fruits of Paradise and from the meat of birds there.

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ ثِيَابِ السّنْدُسِ وَالْحَرِيرِ وَالإسْتَبْرَقِ فَأَلْبِسْنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa min thiyabi alssundusi wal-hariri wal-istabraqi fa-albisna

translation.en: And dress us from the clothes of fine and thick silk and rich brodace.
And give us success to catch the Grand Night
The pilgrimage to Your Holy House,

segments.arabic: وَقَتْلاً فِي سَبِيلِكَ مَعَ وَلِيِّكَ فَوَفّقْ لَنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa qatlan fi sabilika ma`a waliyyika fawaffiq lana

translation.en: And the martyrdom in Your way under the pennon of Your Representative.

segments.transliteration: wa saliha aldd`a‘i wal-masalati fastajib lana

translation.en: And respond to our goodly prayer and invocation.
O our Creator: (please) listen to (our prayer) and respond to us.

segments.arabic: وَإذَا جَمَعْتَ الأَوّلِينَ وَالآخِرِينَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ فَارْحَمْنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa idha jama`ta al-awwalina wal-akhirina yawma alqiyamati farhamna

translation.en: And when You shall gather the past and the coming generations on the Resurrection Day, (please) have mercy upon us.

segments.arabic: وَبَرَاءَةً مِنَ النَّارِ وَأماناً مِنَ العَذابِ فَاكْتُبْ لَنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa bara‘atan mina alnnari wa amanan minal-`dhabi faktub lana

translation.en: And (please) release us from Hellfire and secure us against the chastisement.
And do not fetter us in Hell.
And do not add us to the devils.

segments.arabic: وَفِي النَّارِ عَلَى وُجُوهِنَا فَلا تَكْبُبْنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa fi alnnari `ala wujuhina fala takbubna

translation.en: And do not throw us down on our faces in Hellfire.

segments.transliteration: wa fi hawanika wa `adhabika fala taqlubna

translation.en: And do not make us turn over in Your humiliation and in Your chastisement.

segments.transliteration: wa mina alzzuqqumi wal-ddari`i fala tut`imna

translation.en: And do not feed us from zaqqum and thorns.

segments.arabic: وَفِي النَّارِ عَلَى وُجُوهِنَا فَلا تَكْبُبْنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa fi alnnari `ala wujuhina fala takbubna

translation.en: And do not throw us down on our faces in Hellfire.

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ ثِيَابِ النَّارِ وَسَرَابِيلِ الْقَطِرَانِ فَلا تُلْبِسْنَا،
segments.transliteration: wa min thiabi alnnari wa sarabili alqatirani fala tulbisna

translation.en: And do not dress us from the clothes of fire and the shirts of pitchl

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ كُلّ سُوءٍ يَا لا إلهَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ بِحَقّ لا إلهَ إلاَّ أَنْتَ فَنَجّنَا.
segments.transliteration: wa min kulli su‘in ya la ilaha illa anta bihaqqi la ilaha illa anta fanajjina

translation.en: And save us from all evils; O there is no god save You, I beseech You in the name of there is no god save You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إني أسْألُكَ وَلَمْ يُسْألْ مِثْلُكَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka wa lam yus’al mithluka

translation.en: O Allah: I am beseeching You, and there is none like You to be besought.

segments.arabic: وَأرْغَبُ إلَيْكَ وَلَمْ يُرْغَبْ إلى مِثْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa arghabu ilayka wa lam yurghab ila mithlika

translation.en: and to You do I desire, and there is none like You to be desired.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ أنْتَ مَوْضِعُ مَسْألَةِ السّائِلينَ،
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi anta mawdi`u mas’alati alssa’ilina

translation.en: O my Lord: It is You Who is the object of the requests of the beseechers,
and it is You Who is the ultimate goal of the desire of those who have desires.

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ اللَّهُمَّ بِأفْضَلِ أسْمائِكَ كُلِّها وَأنْجَحِها،
segments.transliteration: as’aluka allahumma bi-afdali asma’ika kulliha wa anjahiha

translation.en: I beseech You, O Allah, in the name of the best and the most effective of all Your (Excellent) Names
O Allah; O the All-beneficent,

segments.arabic: وَبِاسْمِكَ المَخْزونِ المَصُونِ الأعَزِّ الأَجَلِّ الأعْظَمِ الَّذي تُحِبُّهُ وَتَهْواهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa bismika almakhzuni almasuni al-a`azzi al-ajalli al-a`zami alladhi tuhibbuhu wa tahwahu

translation.en: and I beseech You by Your Name—the sealed, the reserved, the mightiest, the loftiest, the greatest,; that You love and like,
and that You are pleased with him who prays You by it,
and thus You answer his prayers.

segments.arabic: وَحَقَّ عَلَيْكَ يا رَبِّ أنْ لا تَحْرِمَ سائِلَكَ.
segments.transliteration: wa haqqa `alayka ya rabbi an la tahrima sa’ilaka

translation.en: It is incumbent upon You, O Lord, that You never disappoint him who beseeches You.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إنّي أسْألُكَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka bikulli ismin huwa laka

translation.en: O Allah: I do beseech You by every name that belongs to You,
and by which a servant of You has prayed You
in a land or in a sea
or in a plain or on a mountain
or at Your Sacred House,
or in any of Your ways.

segments.arabic: فَأَدْعُوكَ يا رَبِّ دُعاءَ مَنْ قَدِ اشْتَدَّتْ فَاقَتُهُ،
segments.transliteration: fa ad`uka ya rabbi du`a’a man qad ishtaddat faqatuh

translation.en: So, I beseech You, O my Lord, the beseeching of him whose neediness is great
and whose offense is grave, and whose efforts are modest,
and who is about to perish
and who has no trust in any of his deeds

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَجِدْ لِما هُوَ فيهِ سادّاً وَلا لِذَنْبِهِ غافِراً وَلا لِعَثْرَتِهِ مُقيلاً غَيْرُكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa lam yajid lima huwa fihi saddan wa la lidhanbihi ghafiran wa la li`athratihi muqilan ghayruka

translation.en: and who has not found anyone who can make up for him or can forgive his sin or can overlook his slips save You,
He is thus resorting to You,
seeking Your refuge,
worshipping You,
showing no disdain, no pride,

segments.transliteration: wa la mustahsirin wa la mutajabbirin

translation.en: no arrogance, no condescension,
and no aloofness;
rather, he is miserable, needy,
fearful, and seeking shelter.
I beseech You, O Allah, O the All-beneficent,
O the All-tender, O the All-bestower of boons,
O the magnificent Maker of the heavens and the earth,
O the Lord of majesty and honor;

segments.arabic: أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: (I beseech You) to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
blessings that are abundant, superb,
sanctified, ever-increasing,
pure, and honorable.

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ اللَّهُمَّ أنْ تَغْفِرَ لي في شَهْري هذا وَتَرْحَمَني،
segments.transliteration: as’aluka allahumma an taghfira li fi shahri hadha wa tarhamani

translation.en: I beseech You, O Allah, to forgive me in this month and to have mercy upon me
and to release me from Hellfire

segments.arabic: وَتُعْطِيَني فِيهِ خَيْرَ ما أَعْطَيْتَ بِهِ أحَداً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa tu`tiyani fihi khayra ma a`tayta bihi ahadan min khalqika

translation.en: and to grant me the best of that which You have ever given any of Your creatures
and the best of that which You will ever give,

segments.arabic: وَلا تَجْعَلْهُ آخِرَ شَهْرِ رَمَضانَ صُمْتُهُ لَكَ مُنْذُ أسْكَنْتَنِي أرْضَكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`alhu akhira shahri ramadana sumtuhu laka mundhu askantani ardaka

translation.en: and (please) do not decide this month of Ramadan to be the last one in which I observe fasting for Your sake since You allowed me to live on Your lands
up to this day;

segments.arabic: بَلِ اجْعَلْهُ عَلَيَّ أتَمَّهُ نِعْمَةً وَأَعَمَّهُ عافِيَةً،

translation.en: rather (please) make it the month of the most perfect bounty that You have ever conferred upon me and of the most excellent well-being that You have ever covered me with,
and of the most expansive sustenance that You have ever decided for me,
and of the most profuse reward that You grant me and of the most pleasant times that have ever come upon me.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنّي أعُوذُ بِكَ وَبِوَجْهِكَ الكَريمِ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika wa biwaj-hika alkarimi

translation.en: O Allah: I do seek Your protection and the protection of Your Magnanimous Face,
and Your Majestic Kingdom,

segments.arabic: أنْ تَغْرُبَ الشَّمْسُ مِنْ يَومي هَذا،
segments.transliteration: an taghruba alshshamsu min yawmi hadha

translation.en: against that sun sets at the end of this day,
or this day comes to its end,

segments.arabic: أوْ يَطْلُعَ الفَجْرُ مِنْ لَيلَتي هذِهِ،
segments.transliteration: aw yatlu`a alfajru min laylati hadhihi

translation.en: or this night dawns,
or this month elapses,

segments.transliteration: wa laka qibali tabi`atun aw dhanbun

translation.en: but there is still an offense of a sin due to which You shall punish me,

segments.arabic: أوْ خَطيئَةٌ تُريدُ أنْ تُقايِسَني بِها،
segments.transliteration: aw khati’atun turidu an tuqayisani biha

translation.en: or a wrongdoing for which You may want to interrogate me,
or punish me,

segments.arabic: أوْ تُوقِفَنِي بِها مَوْقِفَ خِزْيٍ في الدُّنْيا وَالآخِرَةِ،
segments.transliteration: aw tuqifani biha mawqifa khizyin fiddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: or put me in a disgraceful situation in this world or the next world,
or chastise me on the day when I will meet You.
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إنّي أَدْعُوكَ لِهَمّ لا يُفَرّجُهُ غَيْرُكَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka lihammin la yufarrijuhu ghayruka

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You about a grief that none can relieve save You,

segments.transliteration: wa lirahmatin la tunalu illa bika

translation.en: And for mercy that cannot be attained except through You,

segments.transliteration: wa likarbin la yakshifuhu illa anta

translation.en: And about hardship from which none can rescue except You

segments.transliteration: wa liraghbatin la tublaghu illa bika

translation.en: And for desire that cannot be obtained except by You
And for a need that cannot be settled without Your intervention

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ فَكَمَا كَانَ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ مَا أرَدْتَنِي بِهِ مِنْ مَسْأَلَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama kana min sha’nika ma aradtani bihi min mas’alatika

translation.en: O Allah: As You have decided to allow me to pray You,
And as You have had mercy upon me through allowing me to refer to You,

segments.arabic: فَلْيَكُنْ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ الإجَابَةُ لِي فِيمَا دَعَوْتُكَ،
segments.transliteration: falyakun min shanika alijabatu li fima da`awtuka

translation.en: So, please decide that my prayers are responded by You,
And grant me redemption from that against which I have resorted to You.

segments.arabic: أيَا مُلَيّنَ الحَدِيدِ لِدَاوُدَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ،

translation.en: O He Who made the iron pliant for (Prophet) David, peace be upon him;

segments.arabic: يَا كَاشِفَ الضّرّ وَالكُرَبِ العِظَامِ عَنْ أَيّوبَ،
segments.transliteration: ya kashifa alddurri wal-kurabi al`izami `an ayyuba

translation.en: O He Who took off the harm and calamity that afflict (Prophet) Job;
O He Who relieved the sorrow of (Prophet) Jacob;
O He Who removed the grief of (Prophet) Joseph:
(Please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
And (please) do to me that which befits You,

segments.transliteration: fa innaka ahlu alttaqwa wa ahlu almaghfirati

translation.en: You are surely worthy of being feared and worthy of forgiving.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ ثِقَتِي فِي كُلِّ كَرْبٍ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma anta thiqati fi kulli karbin

translation.en: O Allah: I trust in You in hard times
and confide in you hopefully in tribulations,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ لِي فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ نَزَلَ بِي ثِقَةٌ وَعِدَّةٌ.
segments.transliteration: wa anta li fi kulli amrin nazala bi thiqatun wa `iddatun

translation.en: and in You lie my faith and hope in every misfortune that inflicts me.

segments.arabic: كَمْ مِنْ كَرْبٍ يَضْعُفُ فِيهِ الفُؤَادُ،
segments.transliteration: kam min karbin yad`ufu fihi alfu’adu

translation.en: Many were the griefs that crinkled my heart,
were hardly curable,
caused my friends to disappoint me,
and made my enemies rejoice (over my helplessness);
but when I relegated them –i.e. the griefs- to You and complained about them to You,

segments.arabic: رَغْبَةً مِنِّي فِيهِ إِلَيْكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ،

translation.en: because I heartily intended You, no one else,

segments.transliteration: fa farrajtahu wa kashaftahu wa kafaytahu

translation.en: You relieved and alleviated them and saved me from their consequences.
You are certainly the source of all graces,
the cause of all favors,
and the only intention of aspirations.
I seek the protection of all of the Perfect Words of Allah

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ مِنْ شَيْءٍ.
segments.transliteration: min sharri ma khalaqa min shay’in

translation.en: against the evil of whatever thing He has created.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ عافِني في يَومي هذا حَتّى أُمْسِي،
segments.transliteration: allahumma `afini fi yawmi hadha hatta umsi

translation.en: O Allah: (please) convey upon me with good health on this day up to the evening.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنّي أسْألُكَ بَرَكَةَ يَوْمي هَذا،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka barakata yawmi hadha

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me the blessing of this day

segments.arabic: وَما نَزَلَ فِيهِ مِنْ عَافِيَةٍ وَمَغْفِرَةٍ وَرَحْمَةٍ وَرِضْوانٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa ma nazala fihi min `afiyatin wa maghfiratin wa rahmatin wa ridwanin

translation.en: as well as whatever has been descended on this day, including well-being, forgiveness, mercy, pleasure,

segments.arabic: وَرِزْقٍ وَاسِعٍ حَلالٍ تَبْسُطُهُ عَلَيَّ وَعَلى وَالِدَيَّ وَوِلْدِي وَأهْلي وَعِيالِي وَأهْلِ حُزانَتِي،
segments.transliteration: wa rizqin wasi`in halalin tabsutuhu `alayya wa `ala walidayya wa wildi wa ahli wa `iyali wa ahli huzanati

translation.en: and sustenance that is expansive and legally gotten that You may extend it for me, for my parents, for my sons, for my wife, for my dependants, for my friends,
for all those whom I love, for all thos who love me,
for my descendants and for my ascendants.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنّي أعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الشَّكِّ وَالشِّرْكِ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min alshshakki walshshirki

translation.en: O Allah: I seek Your protection against doubt and polytheism
and envy and oppression
and fanaticism and rage.
O Allah; the Lord of the Seven Skies
and the Lord of the seven layers of the earth

segments.arabic: وَما فِيهِنَّ وَما بَيْنَهُنَّ وَرَبَّ العَرْشِ العَظيمِ،
segments.transliteration: wa ma fihinna wa ma baynahunna wa rabba al-`arshi al-`azimi

translation.en: and whatever thing exists in and between them; and the Lord of the Great Throne:
(Please do) bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَاكْفِني المُهِمَّ مِنْ أمْري بِما شِئْتَ،
segments.transliteration: wakfini almuhimma min amri bima shi’ta

translation.en: and relieve me from my aggrieving matters by the means that You will
and the method that You will.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنَّكَ قُلْتَ لِنَبِيِّكَ صَلّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ: (وَلَسَوْفَ يُعْطِيكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرْضَى)،
segments.transliteration: allaumma innaka qulta linabiyyika salla allahu `layhi wa alihi: wa lasawfa yu`tika rabbuka fatarda

translation.en: O Allah: You have said to Your Prophet—Peace of Allah be upon him and his Household: “And soon shall your Lord give you so that you shall be well pleased.”

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنَّ نَبِيَّكَ وَرَسُولَكَ وَحَبِيبَكَ وَخِيَرَتَكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna nabiyyaka wa rasulaka wa habibaka wa khiyarataka min khalqika

translation.en: O Allah: Verily, Your Prophet, Messenger, Most Beloved, and Elite from among Your creatures

segments.arabic: لا يَرْضى بأنْ تُعَذِّبَ أحَداً مِنْ أُمَّتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: la yarda bi-an tu`adhdhiba ahadan min ummatihi

translation.en: is not pleased if You torment one of his nation

segments.arabic: دَانَكَ بِمُوالاتِهِ وَمُوالاةِ الأَئِمَّةِ مِنْ أهْلِ بَيْتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: danaka bimuwalatihi wa muwalati al-a’immati min ahli baytihi

translation.en: who worships You through acting loyally to the Prophet and to the Imams from his Household
even if that one is guilty and sinful,
(and to torture him) in Hellfire.

segments.arabic: فَأَجِرْني يَا رَبِّ مِنْ جَهَنَّمَ وَعَذابِها،
segments.transliteration: fa ajirni ya rabbi min jahannama wa `adhabiha

translation.en: So, (please) rescue me from Hell and its torture,

segments.transliteration: wa habni limuhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: and pardon me for the sake of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad;
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: يَا جَامِعاً بَيْنَ أهْلِ الجَنَّةِ عَلى تَأَلُّفٍ مِنَ القُلوبِ وَشِدَّةِ الْمَحَبَّةِ،
segments.transliteration: ya jami`an bayna ahli aljannati `ala ta’allufin mina alqulubi wa shiddati almahabbati

translation.en: O He Who shall gather the inhabitants of Paradise on terms of cordiality and affability;
and He Who shall remove rancor that may be in their breasts,
and He shall thus make them brothers; face to face on couches.
O He Who Shall gather between those who are obedient to Him
and him for whom it was created.

segments.transliteration: wa ya mufarrija huzni kulli mahzunin

translation.en: O He Who relieves the sad of every aggried one;
O He Who is the resource of every stranger;

segments.arabic: يا رَاحِمِي فِي رَغْبَتِي وَفِي كُلِّ أحْوالِي بِحُسْنِ الحِفْظِ وَالكَلاءَةِ لِي،
segments.transliteration: ya rahimi fi raghbati wa fi kulli ahwali

translation.en: O He Who covers me with His mercy when I desire for something as well as in all my circumstances by means of well safeguarding and protection.

segments.arabic: يَا مُفَرِّجَ ما بِي مِنَ الضِّيقِ وَالخَوْفِ،
segments.transliteration: ya mufarrija ma bi mina alddiqi walkhawfi

translation.en: O He Who relieves all my depression and fears;
(please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَاجْمَعْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ أَحِبَّتِي وَقادَتِي وَسادَتِي وَهُداتِي وَمَوالِيَّ.
segments.transliteration: wajma` bayni wa bayna ahibbati wa qadati wa sadati wa hudati wa mawaliyya

translation.en: and join me with my beloved ones: my leaders, my masters, my guides, and my lords.
O He Who joins the dear ones with each other;
(please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَلا تَفْجَعْنِي بِانْقِطاعِ رُؤيَةِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِّي،
segments.transliteration: wa la tafja`ni binqita`i ru’yati muhammadin wa ali muhammadin `anni

translation.en: and never distress me by preventing me from seeing Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
or ceasing them from seeing me.

segments.arabic: فَبِكُلِّ مَسائِلِكَ يَا رَبِّ أدْعُوكَ إلَهي،
segments.transliteration: fabikulli masa’ilika ya rabbi ad`uka ilahi

translation.en: I thus beseech You, O my God, in the name of all that by which You are prayed;
So, please respond to my beseeching You,
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنّي أسْأَلُكَ بِانْقِطاعِ حُجَّتِي وَوُجُوبِ حُجَّتِكَ أنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka binqita`i hujjati wa wujubi hujjatika an taghfira li

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You in the name of that I have no claim against You but You have all claims against me, that You may forgive me.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إنّي أعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ خِزْيِ يَوْمِ الْمَحْشَرِ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min khizyi yawmi almahshari

translation.en: O Allah: I seek Your protection against the disgrace of the Day of Resurrecting,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرَّ ما بَقِيَ مِنَ الدَّهْرِ،
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri ma baqiya mina alddahri

translation.en: and against the evil of the coming days of my life,
and against the evil of the enemies,
and against the approaching of termination
and against cureless maladies,
and against disappointment,
and against fading away of boons,
and against unexpected chastisements.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ لِي قَلْباً يَخْشاكَ كَأَنَّهُ يَراكَ إلَى يَوْمِ يَلْقاكَ.
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al li qalban yakhshaka ka’annahu yaraka ila yawmi yalqaka

translation.en: O Allah: (please) decide for me a heart that fears You as if it can see You directly up to the day on which it shall meet You.

text.en:
Sixth: In al-Muqni’ah, Shaykh al-Mufid has narrated on the
authority of the trustworthy master scholar, Ali ibn Mahziyar, that
Imam Muhammad al-Yaqi(a.s.) said that it is recommended to say the
following supplicatory prayer as many times as possible during the
month of Ramadan on days and at nights from the beginning of the
month to its end:

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الّذِي كَانَ قَبْلَ كُلّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: ya dhalladhy kana qabla kulli shay‘in

translation.en: O He Who has been always there before all things,
And He then created all things,

segments.transliteration: thumm yabqa wa yafna kullu shay‘in

translation.en: And He then stays while all things vanish.

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الّذِي لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ شَيْءٌ،

translation.en: O He Whose like in not found at all

segments.arabic: وَيَا ذَا الّذِي لَيْسَ فِي السّمَاوَاتِ العُلَى،
segments.transliteration: wa ya dhalladhy laysa fi alssamawati al`ula

translation.en: O He; neither in the highest heavens,
Nor in the lowest layers of the earth

segments.arabic: وَلا فَوْقَهُنّ وَلا تَحْتَهُنّ وَلا بَيْنَهُنّ إلهٌ يُعْبَدُ غَيْرُهُ،
