expected to be the Qadr Night a prayer of one hundred units reciting at
each unit Surah al-Faatehah once and repeating Surah al-Tawheed ten
times. “If I fail to do all the movements of this prayer, what will I
do?” asked Abu-Basir. “You may then offer it while sitting,” said
Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.). “What if I, too, fail to offer it while sitting?”
asked Abu-Basir. “You may then offer it while lying on your bed,” said Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.).

In the book of Da’a’im al-Islam, it is mentioned that the Holy
Prophet (s.a.w.a.) used to roll up his bed and tie his garment so as to
dedicate all his time to acts of worship at the last ten nights of
Ramadan. He also used to awaken his family members at the twenty-
third night of Ramadan (so as to practice acts of worship) by splashing
water on their faces. Lady Fatimah al-Zahra’(a.s.), too, used to prevent
her family members from sleeping at the twenty-third night of
Ramadan by reducing the amount of food that she usually gave to
them and by making them sleep at day so as not to be overcome by
sleepiness at night. She then used to say, “The actual deprived one is
he who is deprived of the good of this night.”

331
]ُثْ ِ َيبح[ال ُ نُور َ تْاَنِنُّ ورَْيش ِ هِ كَمِثْل َ لَيْس ْ مَن َ سُبْحَان ِ الاْ ُمُور ِ ِ َمِيعبج َ تْطَ اَح ِ بالاْ َرْبَا  ُّبَر َ وَو ٌ ء
ُ
غَيـْرُه هَكَذَا لا َ و هَكَذَا َ هُو ْ مَن َ سُبْحَان ُ يرِ الْبَص ُ َّ مِيعالس َ هُو
Then, one may pray for settling his needs.
Eighth: It is recommended to do a new bathing, other than the first
one, at the last hours of night. In fact, to bathe oneself, to spend the
whole night with acts of worship, to visit the holy tomb of Imam al-
Husayn (a.s.), and to offer the one hundred unit prayer at this night -
all these deeds have been confirmed by narrations to be done at the
twenty-third night of Ramadan.
In Tahdhib al-Ahkam, Shaykh al-Tusi has narrated that Imam Ja’far
al-Sadiq(a.s.) instructed Abu-Basir to offer at the night that is
expected to be the Qadr Night a prayer of one hundred units reciting at
each unit Surah al-Faatehah once and repeating Surah al-Tawheed ten
times. “If I fail to do all the movements of this prayer, what will I
do?” asked Abu-Basir. “You may then offer it while sitting,” said
Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.). “What if I, too, fail to offer it while sitting?”
asked Abu-Basir. “You may then offer it while lying on your bed,”
said Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.).
In the book of Da’a’im al-Islam, it is mentioned that the Holy
Prophet (s.a.w.a.) used to roll up his bed and tie his garment so as to
dedicate all his time to acts of worship at the last ten nights of
Ramadan. He also used to awaken his family members at the twenty-
third night of Ramadan (so as to practice acts of worship) by splashing
water on their faces. Lady Fatimah al-Zahra’(a.s.), too, used to prevent
her family members from sleeping at the twenty-third night of
Ramadan by reducing the amount of food that she usually gave to
them and by making them sleep at day so as not to be overcome by
sleepiness at night. She then used to say, “The actual deprived one is
he who is deprived of the good of this night.”
It has been also narrated that Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.), at the
twenty-third night of Ramadan, ordered his servants to carry him to
the mosque because he was ailed. He spent that night in the mosque
up to the next morning.
‘Allamah al-Majlisi has confirmed that one should recite as much
amount as possible from the Holy Qur’an at this night and should also
pray Almighty Allah by saying the supplicatory prayers of al-Sahifah
al-Kamilah al-Sajjadiyyah in general and the supplicatory prayers
known as Makarim al-Akhlaq and al-Tawbah in particular.

The sanctity of the Qadr Days should be considered by engaging
oneself with acts of worship, recitation of the Holy Qur’an, and
praying Almighty Allah. Through a considerable chain of authority, it
has been narrated that the Qadr Days are as holy as the Qadr Nights.
It is also recommended to add the following supplication:

translation.en: O the Director of all affairs;
O the Resurrector of all those in graves;
O He Who causes oceans to flow;
O He Who made the iron pliant for (Prophet) David;
(Please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad…

text.en: You may here mention your needs, and then continue:

translation.en: This very night; this very night.

text.en: Dua 5 from Sahifa Imam Mehdi(atfs) recited on 23rd Ramadan’

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ کُنْ لِوَلِیِّکَ الْقَائِمِ بِأَمْرِکَ، مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ الْمَهْدِیِّ، عَلَیْهِ وَ عَلٰی آبَائِهِ اَفْضَلُ الصَّلاَةِ وَالسَّلاَمِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma kun li-walliyikal-qaimi bi amrika, Muhammad-ibn-il-Hasan-il-Madhi ‘alayhi wa ‘alaa aabaihis-salaati was-salam

translation.en: O’ Allah! Offer blessing and peace to be Your guard who will establish Your affair, Muhammad bin Al-Hassan Al-Mahdi, may the best blessing and peace be on him and his forefathers

segments.arabic: فِیْ هٰذِهِ السَّاعَةِ وَ فِيْ کُلِّ سَاعَةٍ، وَلِیًّا وَ حَافِظًا وَ قَائِدًا وَ نَاصِراً وَ دَلِیْلاً وَ مُؤَیِّدًا
segments.transliteration: fi hadhi-his-sa’ati wa fi kullis-sa’atin waliyaan wa ‘hafidhan wa qaidan wa naasiran wa daleelan wa mu-ayyidan

translation.en: at this particular time and other time, as a guard, protector, leader, helper, evidence and supporter

segments.arabic: حَتّٰی تُسْکِنَهُ اَرْضَکَ طَوْعًا، وَ تُمَتِّعَهُ فِیْهَا طُوْلاً وَ عَرْضًا
segments.transliteration: ‘hatta tuskinahu ardhaka taw’an wa tumatti’ahu feeha tu-lan wa ‘ardhan

translation.en: till You make Your Earth in subservient to him, and make him have long and extensive pleasure in it

segments.arabic: وَ تَجْعَلَهُ وَ ذُرِّیَّتَهُ مِنَ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْوَارِثِیْنَ ۔
segments.transliteration: wa taj’alahu wa dhuriyyatahu min-al-aimmati-il waritheena

translation.en: and including his offspring among the inherited Imams.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ انْصُرْهُ وَانْتَصِرْ بِهِ، وَاجْعَلِ النَّصْرَ مِنْکَ عَلٰی یَدِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumman-surhu wan-tasir bihi waj’alin-nasra minka ‘ala yadihi

translation.en: O’ Allah, help him and to become victorious through him, let the victory come from You through his hand

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلِ النَّصْرَ لَهُ وَالْفَتْحَ عَلٰی وَجْهِهِ، وَلاَ تُوَجِّهِ الْاَمْرَ اِلٰی غَیْرِهِ
segments.transliteration: waj’alin-nasra lahu wal-fat’ha ‘alaa wajhihi wa la tuwajjihil amra ilaa ghayrihi

translation.en: let the help and victory come in his presence, and don’t give this responsibility to other than him.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَظْهرْ بِهِ دِیْنَکَ وَ سُنَّةَ نَبِیِّکَ، حَتّٰی لاَ یَسْتَخْفِیَ بِشَیْئٍ مِنَ الْحَقِّ مَخَافَةَ اَحَدٍ مِنَ الْخَلْقِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma adh-hir bihi deenaka wa sunnata nabiyyika, ‘hatta la yastakhfiya bi-shayin min-al ‘haqqi makhafata ahadin min-al khalqi

translation.en: O’ Allah manifest Your religion and the custom of Your Prophet through him, till none of the fact is hidden due to the fear of some Your creatures.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّیْ اَرْغَبُ اِلَیْکَ فِيْ دَوْلَةٍ کَرِیْمَةٍ تُعِزُّبِها الْاِسْلاَمَ وَ اَهلَهُ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni arghabu ilayka fi daulatin kareematin tu’izzu bih-al islama wa ahlahu

translation.en: O Allah, we ardently desire that You confer upon us a respectful government through which You may give might to Islam and its followers

segments.arabic: وَ تُذِلُّ بِهَا النِّفَاقَ وَ اَهْلَهُ، وَ تَجْعَلُنَا فِیْهَا مِنَ الدُّعَاةِ اِلٰی طَاعَتِکَ
segments.transliteration: wa tudhillu bih-an-nifaaqa wa ahlahu wa taj’aluna feeha min-addu’aati ila ta’atika

translation.en: and humiliate hypocrisy and its people and include us among those who invite people to the obedience to You

segments.arabic: وَالْقَادَةِ اِلٰی سَبِیْلَکَ، وَ آتِنَا فِيْ الدُّنْیَا حَسَنَةً وَ فِيْ الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً، وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ،
segments.transliteration: wal qaadati ila sabeelika wa aatina fid-duniya ‘hasanatan wa fil akhirati ‘hasanatan wa qina ‘adhab-an-naari

translation.en: and lead them to Your approved path. Give us the good of this world and the world to come and save us from the Hell fire

segments.arabic: وَاجْمَعْ لَنَا خَیْرَ الدَّارَیْنِ، وَاقْضِ عَنَّا جَمِیْعَ مَا تُحِبُّ فِیْهِمَا
segments.transliteration: wajm’a lana khair-ad-daareeni waqdhi ‘anna jamee’a ma tu’hibbu feehima

translation.en: Gather for us all the good turns in the two worlds, grant us all that You love in the two worlds.

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ لَنَا فِي ذَالِکَ الْخِیَرَةَ بِرَحْمَتِکَ وَ مَنِّکَ في عَافِیَةٍ، آمِیْنَ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِیْنَ
segments.transliteration: waj’al lana fi dhalik-al-khayrata bi-rahmatika wa mannika fi ‘aafiyatin, aameena rabb-il-‘aalameena

translation.en: And make them good for us with Your blessing, Amen the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: وَ زِدْنَا مِنْ فَضْلِکَ وَ یَدُکَ الْمَلأُ، فَاِنَّ کُلَّ مُعْطٍ یَنْقُصُ مِنْ مُلْکِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa zidna min fadhlika wa yaduk-al-malau finna kulla m’utin yanqusu min mulkihi

translation.en: Increase Your favour from Your full hand on us. Every donor’s kingdom reduces
but Your donation increases Your Kingdom

text.en: Dua 6 narrated on the authority of the Prophet(peace and blessings be upon him and his family)-Iqbal Aamal

segments.arabic: سُبُّوحٌ قُدُّوسٌ رَبُّ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَ الرُّوحِ
segments.transliteration: subuwhu quduwsu rabu almalayikati wa alruwhi

translation.en: "Sacred Holy Lord of the angels and the Spirit!

segments.arabic: سُبُّوحٌ قُدُّوسٌ رَبُّ الرُّوحِ وَ الْعَرْشِ
segments.transliteration: subuwhu quduwsu rabu alruwhi wa alarshi

translation.en: Sacred Holy Lord of the Spirit and the Throne!

segments.arabic: سُبُّوحٌ قُدُّوسٌ رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرَضِينَ
segments.transliteration: subuwhu quduwsu rabu alsamawati wa alaaradina

translation.en: Sacred Holy Lord of the heavens and the earths!

segments.arabic: سُبُّوحٌ قُدُّوسٌ رَبُّ الْبِحَارِ وَ الْجِبَالِ
segments.transliteration: subuwhu quduwsu rabu albihari wa aljibali

translation.en: Sacred Holy Lord of the seas and the mountains!

segments.arabic: سُبُّوحٌ قُدُّوسٌ يُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الْحِيتَانُ وَ الْهَوَامُّ وَ السِّبَاعُ فِي الْآكَامِ
segments.transliteration: subuwhu quduwsu yusabihu lahu alhitanu wa alhawamu wa alsibau fi alakami

translation.en: Sacred Holy whom the fish, the pests and the beasts in the jungles glorify.

segments.arabic: سُبُّوحٌ قُدُّوسٌ سَبَّحَتْ لَهُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ الْمُقَرَّبُونَ
segments.transliteration: subuwhu quduwsu sabahat lahu almalayikatu almuqarabuna

translation.en: Sacred Holy whom the nearby-stationed angels glorify.

segments.arabic: سُبُّوحٌ قُدُّوسٌ عَلَا فَقَهَرَ وَ خَلَقَ فَقَدَرَ
segments.transliteration: subuwhu quduwsu ala faqahara wa khalaqa faqadara

translation.en: Sacred Holy He is Sublime thus subdues. Creates thus He is Powerful!

segments.arabic: سُبُّوحٌ سُبُّوحٌ سُبُّوحٌ سُبُّوحٌ سُبُّوحٌ سُبُّوحٌ سُبُّوحٌ قُدُّوسٌ قُدُّوسٌ قُدُّوسٌ قُدُّوسٌ قُدُّوسٌ قُدُّوسٌ قُدُّوسٌ
segments.transliteration: subuwhu subuwhu subuwhu subuwhu subuwhu subuwhu subuwhu quduwsu quduwsu quduwsu quduwsu quduwsu quduwsu quduwsu

translation.en: Sacred! Sacred! Sacred! Sacred! Sacred! Sacred! Sacred! Sacred! Holy! Holy! Holy! Holy! Holy! Holy! Holy!
Surely you are the best forgiver

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلَى آلِهِ وَ
segments.transliteration: sali alay muhamadi wa alay alihi wa

translation.en: I ask You to bestow Your Blessings on Muhammad and his Progeny (MGB),

segments.arabic: اغفر لي وارحمني. حقا أنت! الأبدي ، المطلق! "
segments.transliteration: aghfr ly warhmny. hqa ant! alabdy , almtlq! "

translation.en: forgive me and have Mercy on me. Indeed You are the One! The Eternal, Absolute!”.

text.en: 8. Dua - Old books of Companions of Holy Prophet(sawa)-Iqbal

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كَانَ الشَّكَّ فِي أَنَّ لَيْلَةَ الْقَدْرِ فِيهَا أَوْ فِيمَا تَقَدَّمَهَا وَاقِعٌ فَإِنَّهُ فِيكَ وَ فِي وَحْدَانِيَّتِكَ وَ تَزْكِيَتِكَ الْأَعْمَالَ
segments.transliteration: allahuma ain kana alshaka fi aana laylata alqadri fiha aaw fima taqadamaha waqiu fainahu fika wa fi wahdaniatika wa tazkiatika alaamala

translation.en: “O‟ my God! Even though there is some doubt about whether this night or the previous one is the Night of Destiny, there is no doubt about Your being one and only and that You purify the deeds.

segments.arabic: زَائِلٌ وَ فِي أَيِّ اللَّيَالِي تَقَرَّبَ مِنْكَ الْعَبْدُ
segments.transliteration: zayilu wa fi aayi allayali taqaraba minka alabdu

translation.en: You would not push away Your servant on any night that he seeks closeness to You, and You accept him.

segments.arabic: لَمْ تُبْعِدْهُ وَ قَبِلْتَهُ وَ أَخْلَصَ فِي سُؤَالِكَ لَمْ تَرُدَّهُ وَ أَجَبْتَهُ وَ عَمِلَ الصَّالِحَاتِ شَكَرْتَهُ وَ رَفَعَ إِلَيْكَ مَا يُرْضِيكَ ذَخَرْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: lam tubidhu wa qabiltahu wa aakhlasa fi suaalika lam tarudahu wa aajabtahu wa amila alsaalihati shakartahu wa rafaa ailayka ma yurdika dhakhartahu

translation.en: You do not reject him if he is sincere in what he asks and You would fulfill his request. You thank him if he does good deeds. And You would save any deeds he sends up that please You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَأَمِدَّنِي فِيهَا بِالْعَوْنِ عَلَى مَا يُزْلِفُ لَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahuma faamidani fiha bialawni alay ma yuzlifu ladayka

translation.en: O‟ my God! Please give me assistance regarding what would bring me closer to You.

segments.arabic: فِيهِ الْقُرْبَى إِلَيْكَ وَ أَسْبِغْ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ فِي الدَّارَيْنِ سَعْيِي
segments.transliteration: fihi alqurbay ailayka wa aasbigh mina alamali fi aldaarayni sayi

translation.en: Please grab me and lead me towards what would bring me closer to You. And increase my efforts for both worlds.

segments.arabic: وَ رَقِّ لِي مِنْ جُودِكَ بِخَيْرَاتِهَا عَطِيَّتِي وَ أَبْتِرْ عَيْلَتِي مِنْ ذُنُوبِي بِالتَّوْبَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa raqi li min judika bikhayratiha atiati wa aabtir aylati min dhunubi bialtawbati

translation.en: And make the goods You grant me in this month better for me. And cut me off from my sins by means of repentance.

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ خَطَايَايَ بِسَعَةِ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ اغْفِرْ لِي فِي هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ وَ لِوَالِدَيَّ وَ لِجَمِيعِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ غُفْرَانَ مُتَنَزِّهٍ عَنْ عُقُوبَةِ الضُّعَفَاءِ رَحِيمٍ بِذَوِي الْفَاقَةِ وَ الْفُقَرَاءِ جَادٍ عَلَى عَبِيدِهِ شَفِيقٍ بِخُضُوعِهِمْ وَ ذِلَّتِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa min khatayaya bisaati alrahmati wa aghfir li fi hadhihi allaylati wa liwalidaya wa lijamii almuminina wa almuminati ghufrana mutanazihi an uqubati alduafai rahimi bidhawi alfaqati wa alfuqarai jadi alay abidihi shafiqi bikhuduihim wa dhilatihim

translation.en: And cut me off from my mistakes by Your Extensive Mercy. And please forgive me, my parents, all the believing men and women on this night. Forgiveness of one who is free from the punishment of the weak, Merciful to the ones in privation and poverty- Forgiving to his servants- Most kind to their humbleness and debasement.

segments.arabic: رَفِيقٍ لَا تَنْقُصُهُ الصَّدَقَةُ عَلَيْهِمْ وَ لَا يُفْقِرُهُ مَا يُغْنِيهِمْ مِنْ صَنِيعِهِ
segments.transliteration: rafiqi la tanqusuhu alsadaqatu alayhim wa la yufqiruhu ma yughnihim min saniihi

translation.en: Friend whose bounties do not diminish by bestowing on them, and whose wealthiness is not affected by His making them wealthy.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اقْضِ دَيْنِي وَ دَيْنَ كُلِّ مَدْيُونٍ
segments.transliteration: allahuma aqdi dayni wa dayna kuli madyuni

translation.en: O‟ my God! Please pay back all my debts and that of all who are in debt.

segments.arabic: وَ فَرِّجْ عَنِّي وَ عَنْ كُلِّ مَكْرُوبٍ وَ أَصْلِحْنِي وَ أَهْلِي وَ وُلْدِي
segments.transliteration: wa farij aniy wa an kuli makrubi wa aaslihni wa aahli wa wuldi

translation.en: Please relieve my grief and that of all who are grief-stricken, improve my affairs as well as the affairs of my wife and children.

segments.arabic: وَ أَصْلِحْ كُلَّ فَاسِدٍ وَ انْفَعْ مِنِّي وَ اجْعَلْ فِي الْحَلَالِ الطِّيبِ الْهَنِي‌ءِ الْكَثِيرِ السَّابِغِ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ عَيْشِي وَ مِنْهُ لِبَاسِي وَ فِيهِ مُنْقَلَبِي
segments.transliteration: wa aaslih kula fasidi wa anfa miniy wa ajal fi alhalali altiybi alhanii alkathiri alsaabighi min rizqika ayshi wa minhu libasi wa fihi munqalabi

translation.en: And improve all mixed up affairs to benefit me. Also grant me legitimate, pure and delicious sustenance, clothes, and provisions for my afterlife.

segments.arabic: وَ اقْبِضْ عَنِ الْمَحَارِمِ يَدِي مِنْ غَيْرِ قَطْعٍ وَ لَا شَلٍّ وَ لِسَانِي مِنْ غَيْرِ خَرَسٍ وَ أُذُنِي مِنْ غَيْرِ صَمَمٍ وَ عَيْنِي مِنْ غَيْرِ عَمًى وَ رِجْلِي مِنْ غَيْرِ زَمَانَةٍ وَ فَرْجِي مِنْ غَيْرِ إِحْمَالٍ وَ بَطْنِي مِنْ غَيْرِ وَجَعٍ وَ سَائِرِ أَعْضَائِي مِنْ غَيْرِ خَلَلٍ
segments.transliteration: wa aqbid ani almaharimi yadi min ghayri qati wa la shali wa lisani min ghayri kharasi wa audhuni min ghayri samami wa ayni min ghayri amay wa rijli min ghayri zamanati wa farji min ghayri aihmali wa batni min ghayri wajai wa sayiri aadayiy min ghayri khalali

translation.en: Cut my hands off of forbidden things without cutting them or making them crippled, or making me dumb, or making me deaf, or making me blind, or making me crippled, or making me impotent, or given me a stomach-ache, or making my other organs defective.

segments.arabic: وَ أردني [أَوْرِدْنِي‌] عَلَيْكَ يَوْمَ وُقُوفِي بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ خَالِصاً مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ نَقِيّاً مِنَ الْعُيُوبِ لَا أَسْتَحْيِي مِنْكَ بِكُفْرَانِ نِعْمَةٍ وَ لَا إِقْرَارٍ بِشَرِيكٍ لَكَ فِي الْقُدْرَةِ وَ لَا بِإِرْهَاجٍ فِي فِتْنَةٍ وَ لَا تَوَرُّطٍ فِي دِمَاءٍ مُحْرِمَةٍ وَ لَا بَيْعَةٍ أُطَوِّقُهَا عُنُقِي لِأَحَدٍ مِمَّنْ فَضَّلْتَهُ بِفَضِيلَةٍ وَ لَا وُقُوفٍ تَحْتَ رَايَةِ غُدَرَةٍ وَ لَا اسْوِدَادِ [أَسْوَدِ] الْوَجْهِ بِالْأَيْمَانِ الْفَاجِرَةِ وَ الْعُهُودِ الْخَائِنَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa ardny [aawridni] alayka yawma wuqufi bayna yadayka khalisaa mina aldhunubi naqiaa mina aluyubi la aastahyi minka bikufrani nimati wa la aiqrari bishariki laka fi alqudrati wa la biairhaji fi fitnati wa la tawaruti fi dimai muhrimati wa la bayati autawiquha unuqi liaahadi miman fadaltahu bifadilati wa la wuqufi tahta rayati ghudarati wa la aswidadi [aaswadi] alwajhi bialaaymani alfajirati wa aluhudi alkhayinati

translation.en: Please let me enter to see You on the Day I shall stand in front of You while I am free of sins, free of faults, not ashamed of You, for having denied Your Blessings, having never confessed to anyone being a partner with You in Your Power, not having started any sedition, having never fallen into any ditch of unduly shed blood, not having placed anyone‟s yoke on my neck whom You have honored somehow, not having stood under any deceitful flags, and not having turned colors due to false oaths and betrayal of pledges.

segments.arabic: وَ أَنِلْنِي مِنْ تَوْفِيقِكَ وَ هُدَاكَ مَا نَسْلُكُ بِهِ سُبُلَ طَاعَتِكَ وَ رِضَاكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
segments.transliteration: wa aanilni min tawfiqika wa hudaka ma nasluku bihi subula taatika wa ridaka ya aarhama alraahimina.

translation.en: Please give me enough of Your success and guidance to be able to follow the path of Your Obedience and pleasure, O‟ the Most Compassionate, Most Merciful.”

subcategory: Ramadan - Amal For Laylat ul Qadr

name: Dua for 22nd night of ramadan

segments.arabic: يَا سَالِخَ ٱلنَّهَارِ مِنَ ٱللَّيْلِ فَإِذَا نَحْنُ مُظْلِمُونَ
segments.transliteration: ya salikha alnnahari min allayli fa'idha nahnu mu¨limuna

translation.en: O He Who draws forth daylight from night, and we are then in the dark,

segments.arabic: وَمُجْرِيَ ٱلشَّمْسِ لِمُسْتَقَرِّهَا بِتَقْدِيرِكَ يَا عَزِيزُ يَا عَلِيمُ
segments.transliteration: wa mujriya alshshamsi limustaqarriha bitaqdirika ya `azizu ya `alimu

translation.en: Who causes the sun to run on to a term appointed for it; that is the ordinance of You, O Mighty, O Knowing,

segments.arabic: وَمُقَدِّرَ ٱلْقَمَرِ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa muqaddira alqamari manazila hatta `ada kal`urjuni alqadimi

translation.en: and Who ordained for the moon stages until it becomes again as an old dry palm branch!
O Light of every light!
O ultimate goal of all desires!
O Source of all graces!
O Allah! O All-beneficent!
O Allah! O Holy!

segments.arabic: يَا احَدُ يَا وَاحِدُ يَا فَرْدُ
segments.transliteration: ya ahadu ya wahidu ya fardu

translation.en: O One and Only! O One! O Single!

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
To You are the Most Excellent Names,
the most elevated examples,
greatness, and bounties.

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَانْ تَجْعَلَ ٱسْمِي فِي هٰذِهِ ٱللَّيْلَةِ فِي ٱلسُّعَدَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala ismi fi hadhihi allaylati fi alssu`ada'i

translation.en: include my name with the list of the happiest ones,
add my soul to the martyrs,
record my good deeds in the most exalted rank,
decide my offense to be forgiven,

segments.arabic: وَانْ تَهَبَ لِي يَقِيناً تُبَاشِرُ بِهِ قَلْبِي
segments.transliteration: wa an tahaba li yaqinan tubashiru bihi qalbi

translation.en: grant me certitude that fills in my heart
and faith that removes doubt from me,
make me feel satisfied with that which You decide for me,
grant us reward in this world
and reward in the Hereafter,
save us from the torment of the burning Fire,

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Dua for 23rd night of ramadan

translation.en: O Lord of the Grand Night

segments.transliteration: wa ja`ilaha khayran min alfi shahrin

translation.en: Who decided it to be better than one thousand months!
O Lord of night, day,
mountains, oceans,
darkness, light,
the earth, and the heavens!
O Maker! O Fashioner!
O All-tender! O All-favorer!
O Allah! O All-beneficent!
O Allah! O Self-Subsisting!
O Allah! O wonderful Originator!

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
To You are the Most Excellent Names,
the most elevated examples,
greatness, and bounties.

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Dua for 24th night of ramadan

translation.en: O Cleaver of the daybreak,
appointer of the night for stillness
and the sun and the moon for reckoning!
O Almighty! O All-knowing!
O Lord of favors, munificence,
power, might,
grace, bestowal,
majesty, and honor!
O Allah! O All-beneficent!

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا فَرْدُ يَا وِتْرُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya fardu ya witru

translation.en: O Allah! O Single! O Singular!

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا ظَاهِرُ يَا بَاطِنُ

translation.en: O Allah! O Evident! O Immanent!

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ
segments.transliteration: ya hayyu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: O Ever-living! There is no god save You.
To You are the Most Excellent Names,
the most elevated examples,
greatness, and bounties.

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Dua for 25th night of ramadan

translation.en: O He Who makes night a covering,
makes daylight for seeking livelihood,
makes the earth an expanse,
and mountains bulwarks!
O Allah! O Dominant!
O Allah! O Omnipotent!
O Allah! O All-hearing!
O Allah! O Nigh!
O Allah! O Responding!

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
To You are the Most Excellent Names,
the most elevated examples,
greatness, and bounties.

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

and reward in the Hereafter,

translation.en: turning to You, and success to that to which You led Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, peace be upon him and them.

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Dua for 26th night of ramadan

translation.en: O Maker of night and daylight two portents!
O He Who makes dark the portent of night
and makes the portent of the daylight sight-giving
so that you may seek favor and pleasure from Him!
O He Who expounds everything with clear expounding!
O All-glorious! O All-donor!
O Allah! O All-magnanimous!

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
To You are the Most Excellent Names,
the most elevated examples,
greatness, and bounties.

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

and reward in the Hereafter,
save us from the torment of the burning Fire,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي فِيهَا ذِكْرَكَ وَشُكْرَكَ وَٱلرَّغْبَةَ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni fiha dhikraka wa shukraka walrraghbata ilayka

translation.en: and confer upon us at this night Your mentioning, thanking You, desiring for You,

segments.arabic: وَٱلإِنَابَةَ وَٱلتَّوْفِيقَ لِمَا وَفَّقْتَ لَهُ مُحَمَّداً وَآلَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wal-inabata walttawfiqa lima waffaqta lahu muhammadan wa ala muhammadin `alayhi wa `alayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: turning to You, and success to that to which You led Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, peace be upon him and them.

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Dua for 27th night of ramadan

translation.en: O Spreader of the shade
and if You willed, You could make it still,
then You have made the sun its pilot,
then You withdraw it to Us, a gradual withdrawal!
O Lord of magnanimity, conferral,
greatness, and bounties!
There is no god save You!
You are the Knower of the hidden and the witnessed,
the All-beneficent, the All-merciful!
There is no god save You.
O All-holy! O (Source of) Peace!
O Grantor of security! O Dominant!
O Mighty! O Omnipotent!
O All-great! O Allah!

segments.arabic: يَا خَالِقُ يَا بَارِئُ يَا مُصَوِّرُ
segments.transliteration: ya khaliqu ya bari'u ya musawwiru

translation.en: O Creator! O Maker! O Fashioner!

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
To You are the Most Excellent Names,
the most elevated examples,
greatness, and bounties.

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

and reward in the Hereafter,

segments.transliteration: warzuqni fiha dhikraka wa shukraka walrraghbata ilayka

translation.en: turning to You, and success to that to which You led Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, peace be upon him and them.

text.en:
According to narrations, it is recommended to bathe oneself at the
twenty-seventh night of Ramadan. It has been also narrated that Imam
Ali ibn al-Husayn Zayn al-’Abidin (a.s.) used to repeat the following
supplicatory prayer throughout this night:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنِي التَّجافِي عَنْ دارِ الغُرورِ ، وَالاِنابَةَ إِلى دارِ الخُلُودِ وَالاِسْتِعْدادِ لِلْمَوْتِ قَبْلَ حُلُولِ الفَوْتِ

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Dua for 28th night of ramadan

translation.en: O He Who commits the night to the custody of the atmosphere,
stores light in the heavens,

segments.arabic: وَمَانِعَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ انْ تَقَعَ عَلَىٰ ٱلارْضِ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa mani`a alssama'i an taqa`a `ala al-ardi illa bi'idhnihi

translation.en: prevents the heavens from falling on the earth except by His permission,
and prevents them from vanishing!
O All-knowing! O All-great!
O All-forgiving! O Everlasting!
O Allah! O Inheritor (of all things)!
O Resurrector of those in graves!

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
To You are the Most Excellent Names,
the most elevated examples,
greatness, and bounties.

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala ismi fi hadhihi allaylati fi alssu`ada'i

translation.en: include my name with the list of the happiest ones,
add my soul to the martyrs,
record my good deeds in the most exalted rank,
decide my offense to be forgiven,

segments.arabic: وَانْ تَهَبَ لِي يَقِيناً تُبَاشِرُ بِهِ قَلْبِي

translation.en: turning to You, and success to that to which You led Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, peace be upon him and them.

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Dua for 29th night of ramadan

translation.en: O He Who makes the night overlap the day
and makes the day overlap the night!
O All-knowing! O All-wise!
O Lord of lords
and the Master of masters!
There is no god save You.

segments.arabic: يَا اقْرَبَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
segments.transliteration: ya aqraba ilayya min habli alwaridi

translation.en: You are nearer to me than my life-vein.

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
To You are the Most Excellent Names,
the most elevated examples,
greatness, and bounties.

segments.transliteration: warzuqni fiha dhikraka wa shukraka walrraghbata ilayka

translation.en: and confer upon us at this night Your mentioning, thanking You, desiring for You,

segments.arabic: وَٱلإِنَابَةَ وَٱلتَّوْفِيقَ لِمَا وَفَّقْتَ لَهُ مُحَمَّداً وَآلَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wal-inabata walttawfiqa lima waffaqta lahu muhammadan wa ala muhammadin `alayhi wa `alayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: turning to You, and success to that to which You led Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, peace be upon him and them.

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Dua for 30th night of ramadan

translation.en: All praise be to Allah. There is no partner with Him.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِكَرَمِ وَجْهِهِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi kama yanbaghi likarami wajhihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah as is suiting the nobility of His Face,

segments.transliteration: wa `izzi jalalihi wa kama huwa ahluhu

translation.en: the might of His Majesty, and as it befits Him.
O All-holy! O Light!
O Light of holiness!
O Glorified! O ultimate goal of glorification!
O All-beneficent! O Doer of mercy!
O Allah! O All-knowing!
O All-big! O Allah!
O All-aware! O All-majestic!

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا سَمِيعُ يَا بَصِيرُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya sami`u ya basiru

translation.en: O Allah! O All-hearing! O All-seeing!

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
To You are the Most Excellent Names,
the most elevated examples,
greatness, and bounties.

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ انْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَانْ تَجْعَلَ ٱسْمِي فِي هٰذِهِ ٱللَّيْلَةِ فِي ٱلسُّعَدَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala ismi fi hadhihi allaylati fi alssu`ada'i

translation.en: include my name with the list of the happiest ones,
add my soul to the martyrs,
record my good deeds in the most exalted rank,
decide my offense to be forgiven,

segments.arabic: وَانْ تَهَبَ لِي يَقِيناً تُبَاشِرُ بِهِ قَلْبِي
segments.transliteration: wa an tahaba li yaqinan tubashiru bihi qalbi

translation.en: grant me certitude that fills in my heart
and faith that removes doubt from me,
make me feel satisfied with that which You decide for me,
grant us reward in this world
and reward in the Hereafter,
save us from the torment of the burning Fire,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي فِيهَا ذِكْرَكَ وَشُكْرَكَ وَٱلرَّغْبَةَ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni fiha dhikraka wa shukraka walrraghbata ilayka

translation.en: and confer upon us at this night Your mentioning, thanking You, desiring for You,

segments.arabic: وَٱلإِنَابَةَ وَٱلتَّوْفِيقَ لِمَا وَفَّقْتَ لَهُ مُحَمَّداً وَآلَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wal-inabata walttawfiqa lima waffaqta lahu muhammadan wa ala muhammadin `alayhi wa `alayhimu alssalamu

translation.en: turning to You, and success to that to which You led Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, peace be upon him and them.

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Other Aamal in 21st night of ramadan

text.en:
Al-Kaf’ami has quoted Sayyid Ibn Baqi as saying that it is
recommended to say the following supplicatory prayer at the twenty-
first night of Ramadan:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah: (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَاقْسِمْ لِي حِلْماً يَسُدّ عَنّي بَابَ الجَهْلِ،
segments.transliteration: waqsim li hilman yasuddu `anni baba aljahli

translation.en: And decide for me forbearance that blocks the door to ignorance against me,

segments.arabic: وَهُدَىً تَمُنّ بِهِ عَلَيّ مِنْ كُلّ ضَلالَةٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa hudan tamunn bihi `alayya min kulli dalalatin

translation.en: And guidance that You confer upon me against any item of straying off,

segments.arabic: وَغِنَىً تَسُدّ بِهِ عَنّي بَابَ كُلّ فَقْرٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa ghinan tasudd bihi `anni baba kull faqrin

translation.en: And affluence that blocks the door to all poverty against me,

segments.arabic: وَقُوّةً تَرُدّ بِهَا عَنّي كُلّ ضَعْفٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa quwwatan tarudd biha `anni kulla da`fin

translation.en: And power due to which You repel any weakness from me,

segments.arabic: وَعِزّاً تُكْرِمُنِي بِهِ عَنْ كُلّ ذُلّ،

translation.en: And might with which You honor me against all humiliation,

segments.arabic: وَرِفْعَةً تَرْفَعُنِي بِهَا عَنْ كُلّ ضَعَةٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa rif`atan tarfa`uny biha `an kulli da`atin

translation.en: And sublimity through which You exalt me against all humbleness,

segments.arabic: وَأَمْناً تَرُدّ بِهِ عَنّي كُلّ خَوْفٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa amnan tarudd bihi `anni kulla khawfin

translation.en: And security through which You protect me against any fear,

segments.arabic: وَعَافِيَةً تَسْتُرُنِي بِهَا عَنْ كُلّ بَلاءٍ،

translation.en: And well-being by which You cover me against any ailment,

segments.arabic: وَعِلْماً تَفْتَحُ لِي بِهِ كُلّ يَقِينٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa `ilman taftahu li bihi kulla yaqinin

translation.en: And knowledge due to which You open before me all certitude,

segments.arabic: وَيَقِيناً تُذْهِبُ بِهِ عَنّي كُلّ شَكّ،
segments.transliteration: wa yaqinan tudhhibu bihi `anni kulla shakkin

translation.en: And certitude due to which You remove from me any dubiosity,

segments.arabic: وَدُعَاءً تَبْسُطُ لِي بِهِ الإِجَابَةَ فِي هذِهِ اللَيْلَةِ وَفِي هذِهِ السَّاعَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wa du`a‘an tabsutu li bihi al-ijabata fi hadhihi allaylati wa fi hadhihi alssa`ati

translation.en: And prayer through which You expand Your response to me at this very night and at this very hour,
This very hour, this very hour, this very hour, O the All-generous,

segments.arabic: وَخَوْفاً تَنْشُرُ لِي بِهِ كُلّ رَحْمَةٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa khawfan tanshuru li bihi kull rahmatin

translation.en: And apprehension due to which You spread over me all items of mercy,

segments.arabic: وَعِصْمَةً تَحُولُ بِهَا بَيْنِي وَبيْنَ الذّنُوبِ
segments.transliteration: wa `ismatan tahulu biha bayny wa bina aldhdhunubi

translation.en: And shelter due to which You intervene between my sins and me,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى أُفْلِحَ بِهَا عِنْدَ المَعْصومِينَ عِنْدَكَ

translation.en: So that I shall succeed in the view of the Infallible ones with You,
Out of Your mercy, O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en:
It has been narrated that Ali ibn Hammad visited Imam Ja’far al-
Sadiq(a.s.) at the twenty-first night of Ramadan. “Have you bathed
yourself, Hammad?” asked the Imam. “Yes, I have,” answered
Hammad. The Imam (a.s.) then asked him to stand by him so as to
imitate him in offering prayers. Hammad did. When they finished all
the prayers, the Imam (a.s.) began to supplicate and Hammad listened
and prayed for response. When dawn rose, the Imam (a.s.) declared
the adhan (call to prayer), uttered the iqamah (the prefatory part of
prayers), and then summoned one of his servants to participate in the
prayer. They all stood behind the Imam (a.s.) who led their
congregational Fajr (dawn) Prayer reciting Surahs al-Faatehah and al-
Qadr in the first unit and Surahs al-Faatehah and al-Tawheed in the
second. When he finished the post-prayer litanies and doxologies,
praising Him, venerating Him, thanking Him, invoking His blessings
upon the Holy Prophet and his Household, and praying Him for the
good of all the believing men and women as well as all the Muslims,
Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.) prostrated himself. The companions could not
hear anything except the Imam’s breaths for a long time. Hammad
narrated: I could then hear him saying the following:

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلوبِ وَالْأَبْصارِ،
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta muqalliba alqulubi wa alabsari,

translation.en: There is no god save You, the Transformer of hearts and sights

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خالِقَ الْخَلقِ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta khaliqa alkhalqi

translation.en: There is no god save You, the Creator of the creatures,
While You do not need them.

segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta mubdiia alkhalqi

translation.en: There is no god save You, the Originator of the creation.

segments.transliteration: wa la yanqusu min mulkika shay‘un,

translation.en: And nothing of creation decreases any of Your Kingdom.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ بَاعِثَ مَنْ فِي الْقُبورِ،
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta ba`itha man fy alquburi,

translation.en: There is no god save You, the Resurrector of those who are in graves.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ مُدَبِّرَ الْأُمورِ،
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta mudabbira alaumuri,

translation.en: There is no god save You, the Manager of all affairs.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ دَيَّانَ وَجَبَّارَ الْجَبابِرَةِ.
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta dayyana wa jabbara aljababirati.

translation.en: There is no god save You, the Master and the most Omnipotent of all those who claim omnipotence.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ مُجْرِيَ الْمَاءِ في الصَّخْرَةِ الصَّمَّاءِ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta mujriya alma‘i fy alssakhrati alssamma‘i,

translation.en: There is no god save You. It is You Who causes water to flow in hard rocks.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ مُجْرِيَ الْمَاءِ في النَّباتِ،
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta mujriya alma‘i fy alnnabati,

translation.en: There is no god save You. It is You Who causes water to flow in plants.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ مُكَوِّنَ طَعْمِ الثِّمارِ،
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta mukuuina ta`mi alththimari,

translation.en: There is no god save You, the Maker of the flavors of fruits.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ مُحْصِيَ عَدَدِ الْقَطْرِ وَما تَحْمِلُهُ السَّحابُ،
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta muhsiya `adadi alqatri wa ma tahmiluhu alssahabu,

translation.en: There is no god save You. It is You Who keeps count of the number of the drops of rain and what is loaded by the clouds.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ مُحْصِيَ عَدَدِ ما تَجْري بِهِ الرِّياحُ في الْهَواءِ،
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta muhsiya `adadi ma tajry bihi alrriiahu fy alhawa‘i,

translation.en: There is no god save You. It is You Who keeps count of the number of what the wind carry in the air.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ مُحْصِيَ مَا فِي الْبِحَارِ مِنْ رَطْبٍ وَيابِسٍ،
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta muhsiya ma fiy albihari min ratbin wa yabisin,

translation.en: There is no god save You. It is You Who keeps count of what is there in oceans—the wet and the dry.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ مُحْصِيَ ما يَدُبُّ في ظُلُمَاتِ الْبِحَارِ وَفِي أَطْباقِ الثَّرى.
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta muhsiya ma yadubbu fy zulumati albihari wa fy atbaqi alththari.

translation.en: There is no god save You. It is You Who keeps count of whatever creeps in the darknesses of oceans and in the layers of the earth.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذي سَمَّيْتَ بِهِ نَفْسَكَ،
segments.transliteration: as-aluka biasmika alladhy sammayta bihi nafsaka,

translation.en: I beseech You by Your Name that You have used for Yourself

segments.arabic: أَوِ اسْتَأْثَرْتَ بِهِ عَلٰى عِلْمِ الْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ،

translation.en: Or You have stored for Yourself in the hidden knowledge of You.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ سَمَّاكَ بِهِ أَحَدٌ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa as-aluka bikulli asmin sammaka bihi ahadun min khalqika,

translation.en: And I beseech You by every name that is ascribed to You by any of Your created beings:

segments.arabic: مِنْ نَبِيٍّ أَوْ صِدّيقٍ أَوْ شَهيدٍ أَوْ أَحَدٍ مِنْ مَلَائِكَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: min nabiiiin aw siddiqin aw shahidin aw ahadin min malaiikatika,

translation.en: Such as the Prophets, the veracious ones, the martyrs, or any of Your angels.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذي إِذا دُعِيْتَ بِهِ أَجَبْتَ،
segments.transliteration: wa as-aluka biasmika alladhy idha du`ita bihi ajabta,

translation.en: And I beseech You by Your Name that You answer anyone who beseeches You by it,
And You respond to anyone who asks You by it.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّكَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ صَلَواتُكَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَبَرَكاتُكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa as-aluka bihaqqika `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi salawatuka `alayhim wa barakatuka,

translation.en: And I beseech You in the name of the duty that is incumbent upon Muhammad and his Household—Your blessings and benedictions be upon them—toward You,
And by the duty that You have made incumbent upon Yourself toward them,
And through which You granted them Your favors,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ

translation.en: (please) bless Muhammad, Your servant and Your Messenger:
The caller to You by Your permission,
And Your incandescent lantern from among Your servants
In Your lands and Your heavens,
And he whom You made mercy for the peoples,
And light through whom the believers have obtained their light;
He this conveyed to us the good tidings about Your abundant reward
And also warned us against Your painful chastisement.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّهُ قَد جَاءَ بِالْحَقِّ مِنْ عِنْدِ الْحَقِّ وَصَدَّقَ الْمُرْسَلينَ،
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annahu qad ja‘a bialhaqqi min `indi alhaqqi wa saddaqa almursalina,

translation.en: I bear witness that he carried to us the truth from the True God, and he verified the Messengers.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ الَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوهُ ذَائِقُو الْعَذَابِ الْأَلِيمِ.
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna alladhina kadhdhabuhu dhaiiqw al`adhabi alalimi.

translation.en: And I bear witness that those who belied him shall certainly taste the painful chastisement.

segments.arabic: أَسْألُكَ يا اللهُ يا اَللهُ يا اَللهُ،
segments.transliteration: as-aluka ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu,

translation.en: I beseech You, O Allah; O Allah; O Allah;

segments.arabic: يا رَبَّاهُ يا رَبَّاهُ يا رَبَّاهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya rabbahu ya rabbahu ya rabbahu,

translation.en: O our God; O our God; O our God;

segments.arabic: يا سَيِّدي يا سَيِّدي يا سَيِّدي،
segments.transliteration: ya sayyidy ya sayyidy ya sayyidi,

translation.en: O my Master; O my Master; O my Master;

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلَايَ يَا مَوْلَايَ يَا مَوْلَايَ،
segments.transliteration: ya mawlaia ya mawlaia ya mawlaia,

translation.en: O my Lord; O my Lord; O my Lord.

segments.arabic: أَسْألُكَ فَي هَذِهِ الْغَداةِ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as-aluka fy hadhihi alghadaati an tusallia `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You in this early morning to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَني مِنْ أَوْفَرِ عِبادِكَ وَسَائِلِيْكَ نَصِيْباً،
segments.transliteration: wa an taj`alany min awfari `ibadika wa saiilika nasibaan,

translation.en: And to include me with Your servants and beseechers upon whom You confer the most abundant of Your rewards,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَمُنَّ عَلَيَّ بِفَكَاكِ رَقَبَتي مِنَ النَّارِ،
segments.transliteration: wa an tamunna `alayya bifakaki raqabaty mina alnnari,

translation.en: And to confer upon me with releasing me from Hellfire,
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِجَمِيْعِ ما سَأَلْتُكَ وَمَا لَمْ أَسْأَلْكَ مِنْ عَظِيْمِ جَلَالِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as-aluka bijami`i ma saaltuka wa ma lam asalka min `azimi jalalika,

translation.en: And I beseech You to settle for me all that which I asked from You and also all that which I did not ask from You; that which belongs to Your splendid majesty,
That which I would ask from You if I knew it,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi,

translation.en: (and I beseech You to) send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَأْذَنَ لِفَرَجِ مَنْ بِفَرَجِهِ فَرَجُ أَوْلِيائِكَ وَأَصْفِيائِكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa an tadhana lifaraji man bifarajihi faraju awliya’ika wasfiiaiika min khalqika,

translation.en: And to permit the Relief of him whose relief achieves the relief of Your intimate servants and Your select ones from among Your created beings,

segments.transliteration: wa bihi tubidu alzzalimina wa tuhlikuhum,

translation.en: And through whom You will terminate and eradicate the oppressors.
(Please) hasten that, O the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطِنِي سُؤْلِي يَا ذَا ٱلْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرامِ
segments.transliteration: wa a`tiny su´ly ya dhaljalali walikrami

translation.en: And (please) grant me my requests, O the Lord of majesty and honor,

segments.arabic: في جَميعِ ما أَسَأَلْتُكَ لِعاجِلِ الدُّنْيا وَآجِلِ الْآخِرَةِ.
segments.transliteration: fy jami`i ma saltuka li`ajili alddunia wa ajili alakhirati.

translation.en: As regarding all that which I have asked You from my needs for this worldly life and the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيَّ مِنْ حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ،
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa aqrabu ilayya min habli aluariidi,

translation.en: O He Who is nearer to me than my life-vein:
(Please) overlook my slips,
And revive me through settling my needs.

segments.arabic: يَا خَالِقِي وَيَا رَازِقي وَيَا بَاعِثِي،
segments.transliteration: ya khaliqy wa ya raziqy wa ya ba`ithi,

translation.en: O my Creator; O the Source of my sustenance; O my Resurrector;

segments.transliteration: wa ya muhiy `izamy wa hiya ramimun,

translation.en: O He Who shall give life to my bones when they are rotten:

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: (Please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَ ٱسْتَجِبْ لِي دُعَائِي يَا أَرْحَمَ الرّاحِمينَ.
segments.transliteration: wastajib ly du`aiy ya arhama alrrahimina.

translation.en: And respond to my prayer; O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en:
This long supplicatory prayer has been mentioned by Sayyid Ibn
Tawus in his book of Iqbal al-A’mal.
Al-Kulayni has narrated that Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (a.s.) used
to supplicate Almighty Allah at the twenty-first and twenty-third
nights of Ramadan up to midnight. After that, he would offer prayers.

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: General Aamal for last 10 Nights

text.en:
As for the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.), it has been narrated that he used
to bathe himself at each of the last ten nights of Ramadan.

Being the best time of I’tikaf (the ritual seclusion in places of
worship for practicing acts of worship), it is highly recommended to
practice the ritual I’tikaf at the last ten nights of Ramadan, for this
deed brings about an abundant reward. According to narrations, its
reward is as same as the reward of two times of Hajj and two times of
‘Umrah. In this regard, it is reported that the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.),
at the last ten nights of Ramadan, used to confine himself to the
mosque where a dome made of camel hair would be erected for him
while he would roll up his bed and prepare himself for worship.

It is worth mentioning that at the twenty-first night of Ramadan, the
sadnesses of the Shi’ah should be shown. At the twenty-first night of
Ramadan, AH 40, Imam Ali ibn Abi-Talib, Ameer al-Momineen -
peace be upon him - departed life as martyr. It is narrated that fresh
blood would be found under any rock that was lifted at that night. The
same thing happened at the night of Imam al-Husayn’s martyrdom.

Shaykh al-Mufid says: At this night, it is highly recommended, as
frequently as possible, to invoke Almighty Allah’s blessings upon the
Holy Prophet and his Household and to invoke His curse upon those
who have wronged the Ahl al-Bayt and upon the killer of Imam
AliAmeer al-Momineen.
وقالَ المفيد (رض) : ينبغي الاكثار في هذه اللّيلة مِن الصلاة عَلى مُحَمَّد وآل مُحَمَّد والجّد في اللّعن عَلى ظالمي آل مُحَمَّد عليهم‌السلام واللّعن عَلى قاتل أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام

اليَوم الحادي والعِشرون : يَوم شهادة أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام وَمِن المناسب أن يزار عليه‌السلام في هذا اليَوم والكلمات الَّتي نطق بها الخضر عليه‌السلام في هذا اليَوم وهِيَ كزيارة لَهُ عليه‌السلام فيهِ

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: The Last Night of ramadan

text.en: هِيَ لَيلَة كثيرة البركات وفيها أعمال :
First: It is recommended to bathe oneself at this night.

Second: It is recommended to <ref=3:1235>Ziyarat of Imam hussain</ref>
 (a.s.)

Third: It is recommended to recite Surahs <ref=1:6>al-An’am</ref>, 
<ref=1:18>al-Kahf</ref>, and <ref=1:36>Yasin</ref>. It is also recommended to repeat
the following imploration one hundred times:

translation.en: I seek the forgiveness of Allah and I repent before Him.

text.en:
Fourth: It is recommended to say the following supplicatory prayer
that is reported by al-Kulayni from Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.):

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ هٰذَا شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ ٱلَّذِي انْزَلْتَ فِيهِ ٱلْقُرْآنَ وَقَدْ تَصَرَّمَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma hadha shahru ramadana alladhi anzalta fihi alQur'ana wa qad tasarrama

translation.en: O Allah, this month of Ramadhan in which You revealed the Qur'an is about to come to its end.

segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu biwajhika alkarimi ya rabbi

translation.en: I seek refuge with Your Noble Face, O Lord,

segments.arabic: انْ يَطْلُعَ ٱلْفَجْرُ مِنْ لَيْلَتِي هٰذِهِ
segments.transliteration: an yatlu`a alfajru min laylati hadhihi

translation.en: that it dawns tonight
or the month of Ramadhan elapses

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ قِبَلِي تَبِعَةٌ اوْ ذَنْبٌ تُرِيدُ انْ تُعَذِّبَنِي بِهِ يَوْمَ الْقَاكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laka qibali tabi`atun aw dhanbun turidu an tu`adhdhibani bihi yawma alqaka

translation.en: but I am still liable to an offense or a sin that You want to punish me for committing it when I will meet You.

text.en:
Fifth: It is recommended to say the previously mentioned
supplicatory prayer that begins with the following:

translation.en: O the Director of all affairs;
O the Resurrector of all those in graves;
O He Who causes oceans to flow;
O He Who made the iron pliant for (Prophet) David;

segments.transliteration: s’aali a’laa muh’aamadin wa aali muh’ammad

translation.en: (Please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
And do for me (mention your legitimate desires)

text.en:
It is recommended to bid farewell to the month of Ramadan
through the supplicatory prayers dedicated to this purpose and
mentioned by al-Kulayni, al-Saduq, al-Mufid, al-Tusi, and Sayyid Ibn
Tawus - may Allah be pleased with them all. Yet, the best farewell
prayer in this respect may be the forty-fifth supplication of al-Sahifah
al-Kamilah al-Sajjadiyyah, which begins with the following statement:

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ يَا مَنْ لا يَرْغَبُ فِي الْجَزَاءِ،

translation.en: 1.O God, O He who desires no repayment!
2.O He who shows no remorse at bestowal!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يُكَافِئُ عَبْدَهُ عَلَى السَّوآءِ،
segments.transliteration: wa yaa mal-laa yukaafi-u a'b-dahoo a'laas-sawaaa-i

translation.en: 3.O He who rewards not His servant tit for tat!
4.Your kindness is a new beginning, Your pardon gratuitous bounty,

segments.transliteration: wa u'qoobatuka a'd-l wa qaz'aaaw-uka kheearah

translation.en: 5.Your punishment justice, Your decree a choice for the best!

segments.arabic: إنْ أَعْطَيْتَ لَمْ تَشُبْ عَطَآءَكَ بِمَنٍّ،
segments.transliteration: in aa'-t'ay-ta lam tashub a't'aaa-aka biman

translation.en: 6.If You bestowest, You stainest not Your bestowal with obligation,

segments.arabic: وَإنْ مَنَعْتَ لَمْ يَكُنْ مَنْعُكَ تَعَدِّيا

translation.en: 7.and if You withholdest, You withholdest not in transgression.

segments.arabic: تَشْكُرُ مَنْ شَكَرَكَ وَأَنْتَ أَلْهَمْتَهُ شُكْرَكَ،
segments.transliteration: tash-kuru man shkaraka wa anta al-ham-tahoo shuk-rak

translation.en: 8.You showest gratitude to him who thanks You, while You hast inspired him to thank You.

segments.arabic: وَتُكَافِئُ مَنْ حَمِدَكَ وَأَنْتَ عَلَّمْتَهُ حَمْدَكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa tukaafi-u man h'amidaka wa anta a'l-lam-tahoo h'am-dak

translation.en: 9.You rewardest him who praises You, while though You hast taught him Your praise.

segments.arabic: تَسْتُرُ عَلَى مَنْ لَوْ شِئْتَ فَضَحْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa tas-turu a'laa mal-law shi-ta faz'ah'-tah

translation.en: 10.You coverest him whom, if You willed, You wouldst expose,

segments.arabic: وَتَجُودُ عَلَى مَنْ لَوْ شِئْتَ مَنَعْتَهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa tajoodu a'laa mal-law shi-ta manaa'-tah

translation.en: 11.and You art generous toward him from whom, if You willed, You wouldst withhold.
12.Both are worthy of Your exposure and withholding,

segments.arabic: غَيْرَ أَنَّكَ بَنَيْتَ أَفْعَالَكَ عَلَى التَّفَضُّلِ،

translation.en: 13.but You hast founded Your acts upon gratuitous bounty,
14.channelled Your power into forbearance,
15.received him who disobeyed You with clemency,

segments.transliteration: wa am-hal-ta man qas'ada linaf-sihee biz'-z'ul-m

translation.en: 16.and disregarded him who intended wrongdoing against himself.

segments.arabic: تَسْتَنْظِرُهُمْ بِأناتِكَ إلى الإنَابَةِ وَتَتْرُكُ مُعَاجَلَتَهُمْ إلَى التَّوْبَةِ
segments.transliteration: tastanz'iruhum bi naatika ilaal-inaabah wtat-ruku mua'ajalatahum ilaat-taw-bah

translation.en: 17.You awaitest their turning back without haste and refrainest from rushing them toward repentance,
18.so that the perisher among them may not perish because of You
19.and the wretched may not be wretched through Your favour,
20.but only after Your prolonged excusing him
21.and successive arguments against him,
22.as an act of generosity through Your pardon, O Generous,
23.and an act of kindliness through Your tenderness, O Clement!
24.It is You who hast opened for Your servants a door
25.to Your pardon, which You hast named 'repentance'.

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَ عَلَى ذلِكَ البَابِ دَلِيلاً مِنْ وَحْيِكَ

translation.en: 26.You hast placed upon that door a pointer from Your revelation,

segments.arabic: لِئَلاَّ يَضِلُّوا عَنْهُ فَقُلْتَ تَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ :
segments.transliteration: li-al-laa yaz'il-loo a'n-hoo faqul-ta tabaaraka as-muka:

translation.en: 27.lest they stray from it: You hast said (blessed is Your Name),

segments.arabic: (تُوبُوا إلَى الله تَوْبَةً نَصُوحاً عَسَى رَبُّكُمْ

translation.en: 28."Repent toward God with unswerving repentance! It may be that Your Lord
29.will acquit of your evil deeds and will admit you into
30.gardens beneath which rivers flow,
31.upon the day when God will not degrade the Prophet

segments.arabic: وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا مَعَهُ نُورُهُمْ يَسْعَى بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَبِأَيْمَانِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wal-lad'eena aaamanoo maa'hoo nooruhum yas-a'a bay-na ay-deehim wabiay-maanihim

translation.en: 32.and those who have faith along with him, their light running before them and on their right hands,

segments.arabic: يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا أَتْمِمْ لَنا نُورَنَا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا
segments.transliteration: yaqooloona rab-banaaa at-mim lanaa nooranaa wagh-fir lanaaa

translation.en: 33.and they say: 'Our Lord, complete for us our light, and forgive us!
34.Surely You art powerful over everything" (66:8).

segments.arabic: فَمَا عُذْرُ مَنْ أَغْفَلَ دُخُولَ ذلِكَ الْمَنْزِلِ
segments.transliteration: famaa u'd'-ru man agh-fala dukhoola d'alikal-manzili

translation.en: 35.What is the excuse of him who remains heedless of entering that house
36.after the opening of the door and the setting up of the pointer?

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ الَّذِي زِدْتَ فِي السَّوْمِ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ لِعِبَادِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa antal-lad'ee zit-ta fis-saw-mi a'laa naf-sika lii'baadika

translation.en: 37.It is You who hast raised the price against Yourself to the advantage of Your servants,
38.desiring their profit in their trade with You,

segments.transliteration: wa faw-zahum bil-wifaadati a'lay-ka waz-zeeaadati mink

translation.en: 39.their triumph through reaching You, and their increase on account of You,
40.for You hast said (blessed is Your Name and high art You exalted),
41."Whoso brings a good deed shall have ten the like of it,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ جَاءَ بِالسَّيِّئَةِ فَلاَ يُجْزى إلاّ مِثْلَهَا)
segments.transliteration: waman jaaa-a bis-say-yi-ati falaa yuj-zaaa il-laa mith-lahaa)

translation.en: 42.and whoso brings an evil deed shall only be recompensed the like of it" (6:160).

segments.arabic: وَقُلْتَ: (مَثَلُ الَّذِينَ يُنْفِقُونَ أَمْوَالَهُمْ فِي سَبِيلِ الله كَمَثَلِ حَبَّة
segments.transliteration: wa qul-t: (mathalul-lad'eena yunfiqoona am-waalahum fee sabeelil-laahee kamathali h'ab-batin

translation.en: 43.You hast said, "The likeness of those who expend their wealth in the way of God is as the likeness of a grain of corn

segments.arabic: أَنْبَتَتْ سَبْعَ سَنَابِلَ فِي كُلِّ سُنْبُلَة مَائَةُ حَبَّة
segments.transliteration: ambatat sab-a' sanaabila fee kul-li sumbulatim-mia-atu h'ab-bati

translation.en: 44.that sprouts seven ears, in every ear a hundred grains;
45.so God multiplies unto whom He wills" (2:261).

segments.arabic: وَقُلْتَ: (مَنْ ذَا الَّذِيْ يُقْرِضُ الله قَرْضاً حَسَنَاً

translation.en: 46.You hast said, "Who is he that will lend to God a good loan,
47.and He will multiply it for him manifold" (2:245)?

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَنْزَلْتَ مِنْ نَظَائِرِهِنَّ فِي الْقُرْآنِ مِنْ تَضَاعِيفِ الْحَسَنَاتِ،
segments.transliteration: wa maaa anzal-ta min naz'aaa-irihin-na fil-qur-aaani min taz'aae'efil-h'asanaat

translation.en: 48.And You hast sent down in the Qur'an similar verses on the multiplying of good deeds.

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ الَّذِي دَلَلْتَهُمْ بِقَوْلِكَ مِنْ غَيْبِكَ وَتَرْغِيْبِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa antal-lad'ee dalal-tahum biqaw-lika min ghay-bika wa tar-gheebika

translation.en: 49.It is You who hast pointed them through Your speech from Your Unseen and Your encouragement

segments.arabic: الَّذِي فِيهِ حَظُّهُمْ عَلَى مَا لَوْ سَتَرْتَهُ عَنْهُمْ
segments.transliteration: lad'ee feehee h'az'-z'uhum a'laa maa law satar-tahoo a'n-hum

translation.en: 50.in which lies their good fortune toward that which - hadst You covered it from them

segments.arabic: لَمْ تُدْرِكْهُ أَبْصَارُهُمْ وَلَمْ تَعِـهِ أَسْمَاعُهُمْ
segments.transliteration: lam tud-rik-hooo ab-s'aaruhum- wa lam tai'heee as-maau'hum

translation.en: 51.their eyes would not have perceived, their ears would not have heard,
52.and their imaginations would not have grasped,

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتَ: (اذْكُرُونِي أَذْكُرْكُمْ وَاشْكُرُوا لِيْ وَلا تَكْفُرُونِ)
segments.transliteration: faqul-ta: (ud'-kurooneee ad'-kur-kum- wa ash-kuroo lee wa laa tak-furoon)

translation.en: 53.for You hast said, "Remember Me and I will remember you be thankful to Me, and be you not thankless towards Me" (2:152)!
54.You hast said, "If you are thankful, surely I will increase you,
55.but if you are thankless, My chastisement is surely terrible" (14:7);
56.And You hast said, "Supplicate Me and I will respond to you,
57.surely those who wax too proud to worship Me
58.shall enter Gehenna utterly abject" (40:60).

segments.transliteration: fasam-may-ta dua'aa-aka i'baadah wa tar-kahoo as-tik-baaraa

translation.en: 59.Hence You hast named supplicating You 'worship' and refraining from it 'waxing proud',

segments.arabic: وَتَوَعَّدْتَ عَلَى تَرْكِهِ دُخُولَ جَهَنَّمَ دَاخِرِينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa tawaa'-a't-ta a'laa tar-kihee dukhoola jahan-nama daakhireen

translation.en: 60.and You hast threatened that the refraining from it would yield entrance into Gehenna in utter abjection.
61.So they remember You for Your kindness, they thank You for Your bounty,
62.they supplicate You by Your command,
63.and they donate for You in order to seek Your increase;

segments.transliteration: wa feehaa kaanat najaatuhum min ghaz'abik

translation.en: 64.in all this lies their deliverance from Your wrath
65.and their triumph through Your good pleasure.

segments.arabic: وَلَوْ دَلَّ مَخْلُوقٌ مَخْلُوقاً مِنْ نَفْسِهِ

translation.en: 66.Were any creature himself to direct another creature

segments.arabic: عَلَى مِثْلِ الَّذِيْ دَلَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ عِبَادَكَ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: a'laa mith-lil-lad'ee dalal-ta a'lay-hee i'baadaka minka

translation.en: 67.to the like of that to which You Yourself hast directed Your servants,
68.he would be described by beneficence,
69.qualified by kindness, and praised by every tongue.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ مَا وُجِدَ فِي حَمْدِكَ مَذْهَبٌ،
segments.transliteration: falakal-h'am-du maa wujida fee h'am-dika mad'-hab

translation.en: 70.So to You belongs praise as long as there is found a way to praise You

segments.arabic: وَمَا بَقِيَ لِلْحَمْدِ لَفْظٌ تُحْمَدُ بِهِ وَمَعْنىً يَنْصَرفُ إلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: wa maa baqee lil-h'am-di laf-z'un tuh'-madu bihee wa maa'-nana yans'arifu ilay-h

translation.en: 71.and as long as there remains for praising words by which You may be praised and meanings which may be spent in praise!

segments.arabic: يَـا مَنْ تَحَمَّدَ إلَى عِبَـادِهِ بِالإِحْسَـانِ وَالْفَضْل،
segments.transliteration: yaa man tah'am-mada ilaa i'baadihee bil-ih'-saani wal-faz'-li

translation.en: 72.O He who shows Himself praiseworthy to His servants through beneficence and bounty,
73.flooding them with kindness and graciousness!

segments.arabic: مَا أَفْشَى فِيْنَا نِعْمَتَكَ وَأَسْبَغَ عَلَيْنَا مِنَّتَكَ،
segments.transliteration: maaa af-shaa feenaa nia'-mataka? wa as-bagha a'lay-naa min-nataka

translation.en: 74.How much Your favour has been spread about among us, Your kindness lavished upon us,
75.and Your goodness singled out for us!
76.You hast guided us to Your religion which You hast chosen,
77.Your creed with which You art pleased,
78.and Your path which You hast made smooth,

segments.arabic: وَبَصَّرْتَنَا الزُّلْفَةَ لَدَيْكَ وَالوُصُولَ إلَى كَـرَامَتِكَ.
segments.transliteration: wa bas'-s'ar-tanaaz-zul-fata laday-ka wal-wus'oola ilaa karaamatik

translation.en: 79.and You hast shown us proximity to You and arrival at Your generosity!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ وَأَنْتَ جَعَلْتَ مِنْ صَفَـايَـا تِلْكَ الْوَظَائِفِ
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma wa anta jaa'l-ta min s'afaayaa til-kal-waz'aaa-ifi

translation.en: 80.O God, You hast appointed among the choicest of those duties
81.and the most special of those obligations

segments.arabic: شَهْرَ رَمَضَانَ الَّذِي اخْتَصَصْتَهُ مِنْ سَائِرِ الشُّهُورِ،

translation.en: 82.the month of Ramadan, which You hast singled out from other months,
83.chosen from among all periods and eras,
84.and preferred over all times of the year

segments.arabic: بِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ وَالنُّورِ،

translation.en: 85.through the Qur'an and the Light which You sent down within it,
86.the faith which You multiplied by means of it,
87.the fasting which You obligated therein,
88.the standing in prayer which You encouraged at its time,
89.and the Night of Decree which You magnified therein,

segments.arabic: الَّتِي هِيَ خَيْرٌ مِنْ أَلْفِ شَهْر،

translation.en: 90.the night which is "better than a thousand months" (97:3).

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ آثَرْتَنَا بِهِ عَلَى سَائِرِ الأُمَمِ

translation.en: 91.Through it You hast preferred us over the other communities
92.and through its excellence You hast chosen us to the exclusion of the people of the creeds.
93.We fasted by Your command in its daylight,
94.we stood in prayer with Your help in its night,

segments.arabic: مُتَعَرِّضِينَ بِصِيَامِهِ وَقِيَامِهِ لِمَا عَرَّضْتَنَا لَهُ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: mutaa'r-riz'eena bis'eeaamihee waqeeaamihee limaa a'r-raz'-tanaa lahoo mir-rah'-matik

translation.en: 95.presenting ourselves by its fasting and its standing to the mercy which You hast held up before us,
96.and we found through it the means to Your reward.

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ الْمَليءُ بِمَا رُغِبَ فِيهِ إلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa antal-malee-u bimaa rughiba feeheee ilay-k

translation.en: 97.And You art full of what is sought from You,
98.munificent with what is asked of Your bounty,
99.and near to him who strives for Your nearness.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ أَقَامَ فِينَا هَذَا الشَّهْرُ مَقَامَ حَمْد
segments.transliteration: wa qad aqaama feenaa had'aash-shah-ru maqaama h'am-d

translation.en: 100.This month stood among us in a standing place of praise,
101.accompanied us with the companionship of one approved,
102.and profited us with the most excellent profit of the world's creatures.

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ قَدْ فَارَقَنَا عِنْدَ تَمَامِ وَقْتِهِ وَانْقِطَاعِ مُدَّتِهِ وَوَفَاءِ عَدَدِهِ،
segments.transliteration: thum-ma qad faaraqanaa i'nda tamaami waq-tihee wanqit'aai' mud-datihee wa wafaaa-i a'dadih

translation.en: 103.Then it parted from us at the completion of its time, the end of its term, and the fulfilment of its number.

segments.arabic: فَنَحْنُ مُوَدِّعُوهُ وِدَاعَ مَنْ عَزَّ فِرَاقُهُ عَلَيْنَا
segments.transliteration: fanah'-nu muwad-diu'whoo wadaaa' man- a'z-za firaaquhoo a'lay-naa

translation.en: 104.So we bid farewell to it with the farewell of one whose parting pains us,

segments.transliteration: wa gham-manaa wa aw-h'ashanaa ans'iraafhoo a'n-naa

translation.en: 105.whose leaving fills us with gloom and loneliness,
106.and to whom we have come to owe a safeguarded claim,
107.an observed inviolability, and a discharged right.
108.We say: Peace be upon You,

segments.arabic: يَا شَهْرَ اللهِ الأكْبَرَ، وَيَا عِيْدَ أَوْلِيَائِهِ.
segments.transliteration: yaa shah-ral-laahil-ak-bar wa yaa e'eda aw-leeaaa-ih

translation.en: 109.O greatest month of God! O festival of His friends!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَـا أكْرَمَ مَصْحُـوب مِنَ الأوْقَاتِ،

translation.en: 110.Peace be upon You, O most noble of accompanying times!

segments.arabic: وَيَا خَيْرَ شَهْر فِي الأيَّامِ وَالسَّاعَاتِ.
segments.transliteration: wa yaa khay-ra shah-rin fil-ay-yaami was-saaa'at

translation.en: 111.O best of months in days and hours!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ شَهْر قَرُبَتْ فِيهِ الآمالُ
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka min shah-rin qarubat feehil-aaamaal

translation.en: 112.Peace be upon You, month in which expectations come near
113.and good works are scattered about!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ قَرِين جَلَّ قَدْرُهُ مَوْجُوداً،
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka min qareen jal-la qad-ruhoo maw-joodaa

translation.en: 114.Peace be upon You, comrade who is great in worth when found

segments.arabic: وَأَفْجَعَ فَقْدُهُ مَفْقُوداً، وَمَرْجُوٍّ آلَمَ فِرَاقُهُ.
segments.transliteration: wa af-jaa' faq-duhoo maf-qoodaa wa mar-joo-win aaalama firaaquh

translation.en: 115.and who torments through absence when lost, anticipated friend whose parting gives pain!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ أَلِيف آنَسَ مُقْبِلاً فَسَرَّ
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka min aleef aaanasa muq-bilana fasar

translation.en: 116.Peace be upon You, familiar who brought comfort in coming, thus making happy,
117.who left loneliness in going, thus giving anguish!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ مُجَاوِر رَقَّتْ فِيهِ الْقُلُوبُ، وَقَلَّتْ فِيهِ الذُّنُوبُ.
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka mim-mujaawirin raq-qat feehil-quloob wa qal-lat feehid'-d'unoob

translation.en: 118.Peace be upon You, neighbour in whom hearts became tender and sins became few!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ نَاصِر أَعَانَ عَلَى الشَّيْطَانِ
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka min naas'irin aa'ana a'laash-shay-t'aan

translation.en: 119.Peace be upon You, helper who aided against Satan,
120.companion who made easy the paths of good-doing!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مَا أكْثَرَ عُتَقَاءَ اللهِ فِيكَ
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-k maaa ak-thara u'taqaaa-al-laahee feek

translation.en: 121.Peace be upon You - How many became freedmen of God within You!

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَسْعَدَ مَنْ رَعَى حُرْمَتَكَ بكَ!.
segments.transliteration: wa maaa as-a'da mar-raa'a h'ur-mataka bik

translation.en: 122.How happy those who observed the respect due to You!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مَا كَانَ أَمْحَاكَ لِلذُّنُوبِ،
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka maa kaana am-h'aaka lild'-d'unoob

translation.en: 123.Peace be upon You - How many the sins You erased!
124.How many the kinds of faults You covered over!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مَا كَانَ أَطْوَلَكَ عَلَى الْمُجْرِمِينَ،
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka maa kaana at'-walaka a'laal-muj-rimeen

translation.en: 125.Peace be upon You - How drawn out wert You for the sinners!
126.How awesome wert You in the hearts of the faithful!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ شَهْر لا تُنَافِسُهُ الأيَّامُ.

translation.en: 127.Peace be upon You, month with which no days compete!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ شَهْر هُوَ مِنْ كُلِّ أَمْر سَلاَمٌ.
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka min shah-rin huwa min kul-li am-rin salaam

translation.en: 128.Peace be upon You, month which is peace in all affairs!
129.Peace be upon You, You whose companionship is not disliked,
130.You whose friendly mixing is not blamed!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ كَمَا وَفَدْتَ عَلَيْنَا بِالْبَرَكَاتِ،
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka kamaa wafat-ta a'lay-naa bil-barakaat

translation.en: 131.Peace be upon You, just as You hast entered upon us with blessings
132.and cleansed us of the defilement of offenses!
133.Peace be upon You - You art not bid farewell in annoyance
134.nor is Your fasting left in weariness!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ مَطْلُوبِ قَبْلَ وَقْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka min mat'-loobin qab-la waq-tih

translation.en: 135.Peace be upon You, object of seeking before Your time,
136.object of sorrow before Your passing!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ كَمْ مِنْ سُوء صُرِفَ بِكَ عَنَّا
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-k kam min sooo-in s'urifa bika a'n-naa

translation.en: 137.Peace be upon You - How much evil was turned away from us through You!

segments.arabic: وَكَمْ مِنْ خَيْر أُفِيضَ بِكَ عَلَيْنَا.
segments.transliteration: a'n-naa wa kam min khay-rin ufeez'a bika a'lay-naa

translation.en: 138.How much good flowed upon us because of You!
139.Peace be upon You and upon the Night of Decree

segments.arabic: الَّتِي هِيَ خَيْرٌ مِنْ أَلْفِ شَهْر.

translation.en: 140.which is "better than a thousand months" (97:3)!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ ما كَانَ أَحْرَصَنَا بِالأمْسِ عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka maa kaana ah'-ras'anaa bil-am-si a'lay-k

translation.en: 141.Peace be upon You - How much we craved You yesterday!
142.How intensely we shall yearn for You tomorrow!

segments.arabic: أَلسَلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَى فَضْلِكَ الَّذِي حُرِمْنَاهُ ،

translation.en: 143.Peace be upon You and upon Your bounty which has now been made unlawful to us
144.and upon Your blessings gone by which have now been stripped away from us!

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إنَّا أَهْلُ هَذَا الشَّهْرِ الِّذِي شَرَّفْتَنَا بِهِ
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma in-naaa ah-lu had'aash-shah-ril-lad'ee shar-raf-tanaa bihee

translation.en: 145.O God, we are the people of this month. Through it You hast ennobled us

segments.arabic: وَوَفّقتَنَا بِمَنِّكَ لَهُ حِينَ جَهِلَ الاَشْقِيَا وَقْتَهُُ
segments.transliteration: wa waf-faq-tanaa biman-nika lahoo h'eena jahilal-ash-qeeaaa-u waq-tah

translation.en: 146.and given us success because of Your kindness, while the wretched are ignorant of its time.
147.Made unlawful to them is its bounty because of their wretchedness.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ وَلِيُّ مَا اثَرْتَنَا بِهِ مِنْ مَعْرِفَتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa anta walee-yu maaa aaathar-tanaa bihee mim-maa'-rifatihee

translation.en: 148.You art the patron of the knowledge of it by which You hast preferred us,
149.and its prescribed practices to which You hast guided us.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ تَوَلَّيْنَا بِتَوْفِيقِكَ صِيَامَهُ وَقِيَامَهُ عَلى تَقْصِير،
segments.transliteration: wa qad t-tawal-lay-naa bitaw-feeqika s'eeaamahoo waqeeaamahoo a'laa taq-s'eer

translation.en: 150.We have undertaken, through Your giving success, its fasting and its standing in prayer, but with shortcomings,
151.and we have performed little of much.
152.O God, so to You belongs praise, in admission of evil doing

segments.arabic: وَاعْتِرَافاً بِالإضَاعَةِ، وَلَك مِنْ قُلُوبِنَا عَقْدُ النَّدَمِ،
segments.transliteration: waa'-tiraafam-bil-iz'aaa'h wa laka min quloobinaa a'q-dun-nadam

translation.en: 153.and confession of negligence, and to You belongs remorse firmly knitted in our hearts
154.and seeking of pardon sincerely uttered by our tongues.

segments.arabic: فَاْجُرْنَا عَلَى مَا أَصَابَنَا فِيهِ مِنَ التَّفْرِيطِ
segments.transliteration: fa'-jur-naa a'laa maaa ss'aabanaa feehee minat-taf-reet'i

translation.en: 155.Reward us, in spite of the neglect that befell us in this month,

segments.arabic: أَجْرَاً نَسْتَدْركُ بِهِ الْفَضْلَ الْمَرْغُوبَ فِيهِ،

translation.en: 156.with a reward through which we may reach the bounty desired from it

segments.arabic: وَنَعْتَاضُ بِهِ مِنْ أَنْوَاعِ الذُّخْرِ الْمَحْرُوصِ عَلَيْهِ ،
segments.transliteration: wa naa'-taaz'u bihee min anwaai'd'-d'ukh-ril-mah'-roos'i a'lay-h

translation.en: 157.and win the varieties of its craved stores!

segments.arabic: وَأَوْجِبْ لَنَا عُذْرَكَ عَلَى مَا قَصَّرْنَا فِيهِ مِنْ حَقِّكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa aw-jib lanaa u'd'-raka a'laa maa qas'-s'ar-naa feehee min h'aq-qik

translation.en: 158.Make incumbent upon us Your pardon for our falling short of Your right in this month

segments.arabic: وَابْلُغْ بِأَعْمَارِنَا مَا بَيْنَ أَيْديْنَا مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ الْمُقْبِلِ،
segments.transliteration: wa ab-lugh bi a'-maarinaa maa bay-na ay-deenaa min shah-ri ramaz'aanal-muq-bil

translation.en: 159.and make our lives which lie before us reach the coming month of Ramadan!
160.Once You hast made us reach it, help us perform
161.the worship of which You art worthy,

segments.arabic: وَأَدِّنَا إلَى الْقِيَامِ بِمَا يَسْتَحِقُّهُ مِنَ الطَّاعَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa ad-dinaaa ilaal-qeeaami bimaa yas-tah'iq-quhoo minat'-t'aaa'h

translation.en: 162.cause us to undertake the obedience which You deservest,
163.and grant us righteous works

segments.arabic: مَا يَكون دَرَكاً لِحَقِّكَ فِي الشَّهْرَيْنِ مِنْ شُهُورِ الدَّهْرِ.
segments.transliteration: maa yakwnu darakal-lih'aq-qika feesh-shah-ray-ni min shuhoorid-dah-r

translation.en: 164.that we may fulfil Your right in these two months of the months of time.

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ وَمَا أَلْمَمْنَا بِهِ فِي شَهْرِنَا هَذَا مِنْ لَمَم أَوْ إثْم،
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma wa maaa al-mam-naa bihee fee shah-rinaa had'aa mil-lamamin aw ith-m

translation.en: 165.O God, as for the small and large sins which we have committed in this our month,

segments.arabic: أَوْ وَاقَعْنَا فِيهِ مِنْ ذَنْبِ وَاكْتَسَبْنَا فِيهِ مِنْ خَطِيئَة
segments.transliteration: aw waaqaa'-naa feehee min d'ambin wak-tasab-naa feehee min khat'ee-ah

translation.en: 166.the misdeeds into which we have fallen, and the offenses which we have earned

segments.arabic: عَلَى تَعَمُّد مِنَّا أو عَلى نِسيانٍ ظَلَمنا فيه أنفُسَنا أَوِ انْتَهَكْنَا بِهِ حُرْمَةً مِنْ غَيْرِنَا
segments.transliteration: a'laa taa'm-mudim-min-naaa aw a'laa nis-yaan z'alam-naa feeheee anfusanaa awi antahak-naa bihee h'ur-matam-min ghay-rinaa

translation.en: 167.purposefully or in forgetfulness, wronging ourselves thereby or violating the respect due to others,

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ وَاسْتُرْنَا بِسِتْرِكَ،
segments.transliteration: fas'al-li a'laa muh'am-madiw-wa aaalih was-tur-naa bisit-rik

translation.en: 168.bless Muhammad and his Household, cover us over with Your covering,
169.pardon us through Your pardoning,
170.place us not before the eyes of the gloaters because of that,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَبْسُطْ عَلَيْنَا فِيهِ أَلْسُنَ الطَّاعِنينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa laa tab-sut' a'lay-naa feeheee al-sunat'-t'aai'neen

translation.en: 171.stretch not toward us the tongues of the defamers,
172.and employ us in that which will alleviate and expiate

segments.arabic: لِمَا أَنْكَرْتَ مِنَّا فِيهِ بِرَأْفَتِكَ الَّتِي لاَ تَنْفَدُ،
segments.transliteration: limaaa ankar-ta min-naa feeh biraa-fatikal-latee laa tanfad

translation.en: 173.whatever You disapprovest from us within it through Your clemency which does not run out,
174.and Your bounty which does not diminish!
175.O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
176.redress our being afflicted by our month,

segments.transliteration: wa baarik lanaa fee yaw-mi e'edinaa wafit'-rinaa

translation.en: 177.bless us in this day of our festival and our fast-breaking,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْهُ مِنْ خَيْرِ يَوْم مَرَّ عَلَيْنَا أَجْلَبِهِ لِعَفْو، وَأَمْحَاهُ لِذَنْبِ،
segments.transliteration: waj-a'l-hoo min khay-ri yaw-mim-mar-ra a'lay-naaa aj-labihee lia'f-wiw-wa am-h'aahoo lid'amb

translation.en: 178.make it one of the best of days that have passed over us, the greatest in attracting Your pardon, and the most effacing toward sins,

segments.arabic: وَاغْفِرْ لَنا ما خَفِيَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِنَا وَمَا عَلَنَ.
segments.transliteration: wagh-fir lanaa maa khafeea min d'unoobinaa wa maa a'lan

translation.en: 179.and forgive us our sins, both the concealed and the public!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ اسلَخْنَا بِانْسِلاَخِ هَذَا الشَّهْرِ مِنْ خَطَايَانَا
