segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma as-lakh-naa binsilaakhi had'aash-shah-ri min khat'aayaanaa

translation.en: 180.O God, with the passing of this month make us pass forth from our offenses,
181.with its departure make us depart from our evil deeds,
182.and appoint us thereby among its most felicitous people,

segments.arabic: وَأَجْزَلِهِمْ قِسَمَاً فِيـهِ وَأَوْفَـرِهِمْ حَظّاً مِنْـهُ.
segments.transliteration: wa aj-zalihim qis-man feeh wa aw-farihim h'az'-z'am-min-h

translation.en: 183.the most plentiful of them in portion, and the fullest of them in share!

segments.arabic: أللّهُمَّ وَمَنْ رَعَى حَقّ هَذَا الشَّهْرِ حَقَّ رِعَايَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma waman- raa'a h'aq-qa had'aash-shah-ri h'aq-qa ria'ayatih

translation.en: 184.O God, when any person observes this month as it should be observed,

segments.arabic: وَحَفِظَ حُرْمَتَهُ حَقَّ حِفْظِهَا وَقَامَ بِحُدُودِهِ حَقَّ قِيَامِهَا،
segments.transliteration: wa h'afiz'a h'ur-matahoo h'aq-qa h'if-z'ihaa wa qaama bih'udoodihee h'aq-qa qeeaamihaa

translation.en: 185.safeguards its inviolability as it should be safeguarded, attends to its bounds as they should be attended to,

segments.arabic: وَأتَّقَى ذُنُوبَهُ حَقَّ تُقَاتِهَا أَوْ تَقَرَّبَ إلَيْكَ بِقُرْبَة
segments.transliteration: wa at-taqaa d'unoobahoo h'aq-qa tuqaatihaa aw taqar-raba ilay-ka biqur-batin

translation.en: 186.fears its misdeeds as they should be feared, or seeks nearness to You with any act of nearness-seeking

segments.arabic: أَوْجَبَتْ رِضَاكَ لَهُ وَعَطَفَتْ رَحْمَتَكَ عَلَيْهِ،
segments.transliteration: aw-jabat riz'aaka lah wa a't'afat rah'-mataka a'lay-h

translation.en: 187.which makes incumbent upon him Your good pleasure and bends toward him Your mercy,
188.give to us the like [of that] from Your wealth
189.and bestow it upon us in multiples through Your bounty,

segments.arabic: فَإنَّ فَضْلَكَ، لا يَغِيْضُ وَإنَّ خَـزَائِنَكَ لا تَنْقُصُ، بَـلْ تَفِيضُ
segments.transliteration: fa in-na faz'-laka laa yagheez' wa in-na khazaaa-inaka laa tanqus'u bal tafeez'

translation.en: 190.for Your bounty does not diminish, Your treasuries do not decrease but overflow,

segments.transliteration: wa in-na maa'adina ih'-saanika laa taf-naa

translation.en: 191.the mines of Your beneficence are not exhausted,
192.and Your bestowal is the bestowal full of delight!
193.O God, bless Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: وَاكْتُبْ لَنَا مِثْلَ أجُورِ مَنْ صَامَهُ
segments.transliteration: wak-tub lanaa mith-la ujoori man s'aamahooo

translation.en: 194.and write for us the like of the wages of him who fasted in it

segments.arabic: أَوْ تَعَبَّدَ لَكَ فِيْهِ إلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ.
segments.transliteration: aw taa'b-bada laka feeheee ilaa yaw-mil-qeeaamah

translation.en: 195.or worshipped You within it until the Day of Resurrection!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ إنَّا نَتُوبُ إلَيْكَ فِي يَوْمِ فِطْرِنَا
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma in-naa natoobu ilay-ka fee yaw-mi fit'-rinaa

translation.en: 196.O God, we repent to You in our day of fast-breaking,
197.which You hast appointed for the faithful a festival and a joy

segments.arabic: وَلأِهْلِ مِلَّتِكَ مَجْمَعاً وَمُحْتشداً مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْب أَذْنَبْنَاهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa liah-li mil-latika maj-maa'w-wamuh'-tashadaa min kul-li d'ambin ad'-nab-naah

translation.en: 198.and for the people of Your creed a time of assembly and gathering, from every misdeed we did,

segments.arabic: أَوْ سُوْء أَسْلَفْنَاهُ، أَوْ خَاطِرِ شَرٍّ أَضْمَرْنَاهُ،
segments.transliteration: aw sooo-in as-laf-naah aw khaat'iri shar-rin az'-mar-naah

translation.en: 199.ill work we sent ahead, or evil thought we secretly conceived,

segments.arabic: تَوْبَةَ مَنْ لاَ يَنْطَوِيْ عَلَى رُجُوع إلَى ذَنْب
segments.transliteration: taw-bata mal-laa yant'awee a'laa rujooi'n ilaa d'amb

translation.en: 200.the repentance of one who does not harbour a return to sin

segments.transliteration: wa laa yau'wdu baa'-dahaa fee khat'ee-ah

translation.en: 201.and who afterwards will not go back to offense,

segments.arabic: تَوْبَةً نَصوحاً خَلَصَتْ مِنَ الشَّكِّ وَالارْتِيَابِ،

translation.en: 202.an unswerving repentance rid of doubt and wavering.

segments.arabic: فَتَقَبَّلْهَا مِنَّا وَارْضَ عَنَّا وَثَبِّتنَا عَلَيْهَا.
segments.transliteration: fataqab-bal-haa min-naa war-z'a a'n-naa wa thab-bit-naa a'lay-haa

translation.en: 203.So accept it from us, be pleased with us, and fix us within it!
204.God, provide us with fear of the threatened punishment

segments.arabic: وَشَوْقَ ثَوَابِ الْمَوْعُودِ حَتّى نَجِدَ لَذَّةَ مَا نَدْعُوكَ بِهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa shaw-qa thawaabil-maw-u'wd h'at-taa najid lad'-d'ata maa nad-u'wka bih

translation.en: 205.and yearning for the promised reward, so that we may find the pleasure of that for which we supplicate You
206.and the sorrow of that from which we seek sanctuary in You!

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْنَا عِنْدَكَ مِنَ التَّوَّابِيْنَ الَّذِينَ أَوْجَبْتَ لَهُمْ مَحَبَّتَكَ،
segments.transliteration: waj-a'l-naa i'ndaka minat-taw-waabeenal-lad'eena aw-jab-ta lahum mah'ab-batak

translation.en: 207.And place us with You among the repenters, those upon whom You hast made Your love obligatory

segments.arabic: وَقَبِلْتَ مِنْهُمْ مُرَاجَعَةَ طَاعَتِكَ، يَا أَعْدَلَ الْعَادِلِينَ.
segments.transliteration: wa qabil-ta min-hum muraajaa'ta t'aaa'tik yaaa aa'-dalal-a'adileen

translation.en: 208.and from whom You hast accepted the return to obeying You! O Most Just of the just!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ تَجَاوَزْ عَنْ آبآئِنَا وَأُمَّهَاتِنَا وَأَهْلِ دِيْنِنَا جَمِيعاً
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma tajaawaz a'n aaabaaa-inaa wa um-mahaatinaa wa ah-li deeninaa jameea'

translation.en: 209.O God, show forbearance toward our fathers and our mothers and all the people of our religion,

segments.arabic: مَنْ سَلَفَ مِنْهُمْ وَمَنْ غَبَرَ إلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ.
segments.transliteration: man salafa min-hum waman ghabara ilaa yaw-mil-qeeaamah

translation.en: 210.those who have gone and those who will pass by, until the Day of Resurrection!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد نَبِيِّنَا وَآلِهِ،
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma s'al-li a'laa muh'am-madin-nabee-yinaa wa aaalihee

translation.en: 211.O God, bless our prophet Muhammad and his Household,
212.as You hast blessed Your angels brought nigh,
213.bless him and his Household,
214.as You hast blessed Your prophets sent out,

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى عِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa s'al-li a'lay-hee wa aaalihee kamaa s'al-lay-ta a'laa i'baadikas'-s'aalih'een

translation.en: 215.bless him and his Household, as You hast blessed Your righteous servants

segments.arabic: وَأَفْضَلَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ يَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa af-z'al min d'alika yaa rab-bal-a'alameena

translation.en: 216.- and better than that, O Lord of the worlds!

segments.transliteration: s'alaatan tab-lughunaa barakatuhaa wa yanaalunaa naf-u'haa

translation.en: 217.a blessing whose benediction will reach us, whose benefit will attain to us,
218.and through which our supplication may be granted!
219.You art the most generous of those who are beseeched,
220.the most sufficient of those in whom confidence is had,

segments.transliteration: wa aa'-t'aa man su-ila min faz'-lih

translation.en: 221.the most bestowing of those from whom bounty is asked,

segments.transliteration: wa anta a'laa kul-li shay-in qadeer

translation.en: You art powerful over everything!

text.en:
Sayyid Ibn Tawus has reported Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) as
saying: Whoever bids farewell to the month of Ramadan with the
following supplicatory prayer, Almighty Allah will forgive him before
it dawns and will confer upon him with the bliss of submission before
Him (i.e. Almighty Allah):

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ لا تَجْعَلْهُ آخِرَ العَهْدِ من صِيَامِي لِشَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma la taj`alhu akhira al`ahdi mn siyamy lishahri ramazana

translation.en: O Allah: (please) do not decide my observance of fasting in this month of Ramazan to be the last of my(life's) observance of fasting.

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ يَطْلُعَ فَجْرُ هذِهِ اللّيْلَةِ إِلاَّ وَقَدْ غَفَرْتَ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika an yatlu`a fajru hadhihi allaylati illa wa qad ghafarta le

translation.en: I take refuge with Thee lest the dawn of this night breaks forth without me having been positively forgiven.

text.en: غفر الله تعالى له قَبلَ أن يصبح ورزقه الإنابة إِليهِ

Sayyid Ibn Tawus and Shaykh al-Saduq have both narrated the
following on the authority of Jabir ibn ‘Abdullah al-Ansari:
I visited the Messenger of Allah (a.s.) on the last Friday of
Ramadan. As he saw me, he said: O Jabir, this is the last Friday of
Ramadan. You should thus bid farewell to it by saying the following:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لا تَجْعَلُهُ آخِرَ العَهْدِ مِنْ صِيامِنا إِيّاهُ فَإِنْ جَعَلْتَهُ فَاجْعَلْنِي مَرْحُوما وَلا تَجْعَلْنِي مَحْرُوماً

text.en:
340
Verily, whoever says this supplicatory prayer will win one of the
two good things; either attaining the next Ramadan or having the
forgiveness and mercy of Almighty Allah.

Sayyid Ibn Tawus and al-Kaf’ami have reported the Holy Prophet
(s.a.w.a.) as saying, “At the last night of Ramadan, one may offer a
prayer consisting of ten units at each of which Surah <ref=1:1>al-Fatehah</ref>
 is
recited once and Surah <ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 repeated ten times. In the
genuflection of the prayer (ruku’) and prostration (sujud), the
following doxology may be repeated ten times:

segments.arabic: سُبْحانَ الله وَالحَمْدُ للهِ وَلا إِلهَ إِلاّ الله وَالله أَكْبَرُ.

text.en:
After each couple of units, one may say the Tashahhud and Taslim
statements. After the accomplishment of the ten units, one may say the
Taslim statement and repeat ISTEGFAAR one thousand times
After that, one may prostrate and say the following:

segments.arabic: يا حَي يا قَيُّومُ ، يا ذا الجَلالِ وَالاِكْرامِ ، يا رَحْمنَ الدُّنْيا وَالآخرَةِ وَرَحِيمَهُما ، يا أرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ ، يا ألهَ الأوَّلِينَ وَالآخِرِينَ ، إِغْفِرْ لَنا ذُنُوبَنا ، وَتَقَبَّلْ مِنّا صَلاتَنا وَصِيامَنا وَقِيامَنا.

text.en:
The Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) then continues, “I swear by Him Who
has sent me with the truth as prophet, Archangel Gabriel has reported
to me from Archangel Seraph who directly reports from Almighty
Allah that one who offers that prayer will not raise his head from
prostration before Almighty Allah forgives him, accepts his acts
during the month of Ramadan, and overlooks his sins... etc.”

It is worth mentioning that other narrations have confirmed that this
prayer is offered at the Night of ‘Id al-Fitr (i.e. the first night of
Shawwal) with a little difference in the form of the supplicatory
prayer.

segments.arabic: إِغْفِرْ لَنا ذُنُوبَنا إلى آخر الدُّعاء : إِغْفِرْ لِي ذُنُوبِي وَتَقَبَّلْ صَوْمِي وَصَلاتِي وَقِيامِي

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Dua for 30th day of ramadan

text.en:
For the last day of Ramadan, Sayyid Ibn Tawus has mentioned a
supplicatory prayer that begins with:

segments.arabic:
اللّهُمَّ انَّكَ أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ لا إِلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، تَفَضَّلْتَ عَلَيْنا فَهَدَيْتَنا، وَ مَنَنْتَ عَلَيْنا فَعَرَّفْتَنا، وَ احْسَنْتَ إِلَيْنا فَاعَنْتَنا عَلى‌ أَداءِ مَا افْتَرَضْتَ عَلَيْنا مِنْ صِيامِ شَهْرِكَ شَهْرِ رَمَضانَ.

فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ بِمَحامِدِكَ كُلِّها عَلى‌ جَمِيعِ نَعْمائِكَ كُلِّها، حَتّى‌ يَنْتَهِيَ الْحَمْدُ الى‌ ما تُحِبُّ وَ تَرْضى‌ وَ هذا آخِرَ يَوْمٍ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضانَ فَاذا انْقَضى فَاخْتِمْهُ لَنا بِالسَّعادَةِ وَ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ، وَ الرِّزْقِ الْواسِعِ الْكَثِيرِ الطَّيِّبِ، الَّذِي لا حِسابَ فِيهِ وَ لا عَذابَ عَلَيْهِ،  وَ الْبَرَكَةِ وَ الْفَوْزِ بِالْجَنَّةِ، وَ الْعِتْقِ مِنَ النَّارِ، وَ لا تَجْعَلْهُ آخِرَ الْعَهْدِ مِنْهُ، وَ أَهلهُ عَلَيْنا، بِأَفْضَلِ الْخَيْرِ وَ الْبَرَكَةِ[1] وَ السُّرُورِ عَلَيَّ، وَ عَلى‌ أَهْلِي وَ والِدِي وَ ذُرِّيَّتِي يا كَرِيمُ.

اللَّهُمَّ هذا شَهْرُ رَمَضانَ الَّذِي انْزَلْتَ فِيهِ الْقُرْآنَ هُدىً لِلنَّاسِ وَ بَيِّناتٍ مِنَ الْهُدى‌ وَ الْفُرْقانِ وَ قَدْ تَصَرَّمَ، فَأَعُوذُ بِوَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيمِ أَنْ تَغِيبَ الشَّمْسُ مِنْ هذا الْيَوْمِ، أَوْ يَطْلُعَ الْفَجْرُ مِنْ هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ، وَ لَكَ قِبَلِي ذَنْبٌ أَوْ تَبِعَةٌ، تُرِيدُ أَنْ تُعَذِّبَنِي عَلَيْها[2] يَوْمَ أَلْقاكَ.

أَيْ مُلَيِّنَ الْحَدِيدِ لِداوُدَ، أَيْ كاشِفَ الْكَرْبِ الْعَظِيمِ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ، صَلِّ عَلى‌ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلى‌ أَهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ هَبْ لِي فَكاكَ رَقَبَتِي مِنَ النَّارِ وَ كُلَّ تَبِعَةٍ وَ ذَنْبٍ لَكَ قِبَلِي، وَ اخْتِمْ لِي بِالرِّضا وَ الْجَنَّةَ.

يا اللَّهُ يا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ، صَلِّ عَلى‌ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلى‌ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ الْمُبارَكِينَ الْأَخْيارِ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً.

text.en:
n most cases, the recitation of the Holy Qur’an is accomplished on
the thirtieth of Ramadan; therefore, it is highly advisable to read the
supplicatory prayer No. 42 of al-Sahifah al-Kamilah al-Sajjadiyyah

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إِنّك أعنْتنِي على ختْمِ كِتابِك الّذِي أنْزلْتهُ نُوراً
segments.transliteration: allahumma innaka a'ntani `ala khat-mi kitabikalladhi anzal-tahu nura

translation.en: O Allah, You have helped me complete Your Book, which You sent down as a light

segments.arabic: وجعلْتهُ مُهيْمِناً على كُلِّ كِتابٍ أنزلْتهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ja'l-tahu muhay-minan `ala kulli kitabin anazal-tah

translation.en: appointed as a guardian over every book You have sent down,
preferring it over every narrative which You have recounted,

segments.arabic: وفُرْقاناً فرقْت بِهِ بيْن حلالِك وحرامِك
segments.transliteration: wa fur-qanana faraq-ta bihi bay-na halalika wa haramik

translation.en: a separator, through which You have separated Your lawful from Your unlawful,

segments.arabic: وقُرْآناً أعْربْت بِهِ عنْ شرائِعِ أحْكامِك
segments.transliteration: wa qur-anan a'-rab-ta bihi `an shara-ii' ah-kamik

translation.en: a Qur’an, through which You have made plain the approaches to Your ordinances,
a book, which You have distinguished very distinctly for Your servants,

segments.arabic: ووحْياً أنْزلْتهُ على نبِيِّك مُحمّدٍ صلواتُك عليْهِ وآلِهِ تنْزِيلاً
segments.transliteration: wa wah-yan anzal-tahu `ala nabi-yika muhammadin salawatuka `alay-hi wa alihi tanzila

translation.en: a revelation, which You have sent down, a sending down, upon Your prophet Muhammad (Your blessings be upon him and his Household).

segments.arabic: وجعلْتهُ نُوراً نهْتدِي مِنْ ظُلمِ الضّلالةِ والْجهالةِ بِاتِّباعِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ja'l-tahu nurannah-tadi min zulamid-dalalati wal-jahalati bit-tibai'h

translation.en: You appointed it a light through following which we may be guided from the shadows of error and ignorance,

segments.arabic: وشِفاءً لِمنْ أنْصت بِفهْمِ التّصْدِيقِ إِلى اسْتِماعِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa shifa-alliman ansata bifah-mit-tas-diqi ila as-timai'h

translation.en: a healing for him who turns ear toward hearing it with the understanding of attestation,

segments.arabic: ومِيزان قِسْطٍ لا يحِيفُ عنِ الْحقِّ لِسانُهُ

translation.en: a just balance whose tongue does not incline away from truth,

segments.arabic: ونُور هُدًى لا يطْفأُ عنِ الشّاهِدِين بُرْهانُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa nura hudana la yat-fa `anish-shahidina bur-hanuh

translation.en: a light of guidance whose proof is not extinguished before the witnesses,

segments.arabic: وعلم نجاةٍ لا يضِلُّ منْ أمّ قصْد سُنّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa `alama najatin la yadillu man amma qas-da sunnatih

translation.en: and a guidepost of deliverance, so that he who repairs straight way to its prescription will not go astray and

segments.arabic: ولا تنالُ أيْدِي الْهلكاتِ منْ تعلّق بِعُرْوةِ عِصْمتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la tanalu aydy al-halakati man ta`allaqa bi-`urwati `ismatih

translation.en: he who clings to its preservation's handhold will not be touched by the hands of disasters.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ فإِذْ أفدْتنا الْمعُونة على تِلاوتِهِ

translation.en: O Allah, since You have given us help to recite it

segments.transliteration: wa sahhal-ta jawasia al-sinatina bihus-ni i'baratih

translation.en: made smooth the roughness of our tongues through the beauty of its expression,
place us among those who observe it as it should be observed,

segments.arabic: ويدِينُ لك بِاعْتِقادِ التّسْلِيمِ لِمُحْكمِ آياتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa yadinu laka bi`tiqadit-tas-limi limuh-kami ayatih

translation.en: serve You by adhering in submission to the firm text of its verses, and

segments.arabic: ويفْزعُ إِلى الإِقْرارِ بمُتشابِهِهِ ومُوضحاتِ بيِّناتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa yaf-za`u ilal-iq-rari bamutashabihihi wamudahati bay-yinatih

translation.en: seek refuge in admitting both its ambiguous parts and the elucidations of its clear signs

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إِنّك أنْزلْتهُ على نبِيِّك مُحمّدٍ صلّى اللّهُ عليْهِ وآلِهِ مُجْملاً
segments.transliteration: allahumma innaka anzal-tahu `ala nabi-yika muhammadin sallallahu `alay-hi wa alihi muj-mala

translation.en: O Allah, You sent it down upon Your prophet Muhammad (Allah bless him and his household) in summary form
inspired him with the science of its wonders to complement it,
made us the heirs of its knowledge as interpreters,
made us to surpass him who is ignorant of its knowledge, and

segments.arabic: وقوّيْتنا عليْهِ لِترْفعنا فوْق منْ لمْ يُطِقْ حمْلهُ
segments.transliteration: wa qaw-way-tana `alay-hi litar-fa'na faw-qa mallam yutiq ham-lah

translation.en: gave us strength over it to raise us above those not able to carry it.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ فكما جعلْت قُلُوبنا لهُ حملةً
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama ja'l-ta qulubana lahu hamalah

translation.en: O Allah, just as You have appointed our hearts as its carriers and
made known to us through Your mercy its nobility and excellence,

segments.arabic: فصلِّ على مُحمّدٍ الْخطِيبِ بِهِ وعلى آلِهِ الْخُزّانِ لهُ
segments.transliteration: fasalli `ala muhammadinl-khatibi bihi wa `ala alihil-khuz-zani lah

translation.en: so also bless Muhammad, its preacher, and his Household, its guardians, and

segments.arabic: واجْعلْنا مِمّنْ يعْترِفُ بِأنّهُ مِنْ عِنْدِك حتّى
segments.transliteration: waj-`al-na mimmay-ya'-tarifu bi nnahu min i'ndika hat-ta

translation.en: place us among those who confess that it has come from You, lest
doubt about attesting to it assail us,

segments.arabic: ولا يخْتلِجنا الزّيْغُ عنْ قصْدِ طرِيقِهِ

translation.en: or deviation from its straightforward path shake us
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household and
make us one of those who hold fast to its cord,

segments.arabic: ويأْوِي مِن الْمُتشابِهاتِ إِلى حِرْزِ معْقِلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ya-wi minal-mutashabihati ila hir-zi ma'-qilih

translation.en: seek haven from its ambiguities in its fortified stronghold,
rest in the shadow of its wing,
find guidance in the brightness of its morning,
follow the shining of its disclosure,
acquire light from its lamp, and
beg not guidance from any other

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ وكما نصبْت بِهِ مُحمّداً علماً لِلدّلاةِ عليْك
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa kama nasab-ta bihi muhammadana `alamallild-dalati `alay-k

translation.en: O Allah, just as through it You have set up Muhammad as a guidepost to point to You and

segments.transliteration: wa an-haj-ta bi alihi subular-rida ilay-k

translation.en: through his Household You have made clear Your good pleasure's roads to You,
so also bless Muhammad and his Household and
make the Qur’an

segments.arabic: وسِيلةً لنا إِلى أشْرفِ منازِلِ الْكرامةِ

translation.en: our mediation to the noblest stations of Your honor,

segments.arabic: وسُلّماً نعْرُجُ فِيهِ إِلى محلِّ السّلامةِ

translation.en: a ladder by which we may climb to the place of safety,

segments.arabic: وسبباً نُجْزى بِهِ النّجاة فِي عرْصةِ الْقِيامةِ

translation.en: a cause for our being repaid with deliverance at the Plain of Resurrection, and

segments.arabic: وذرِيعةً نقْدُمُ بِها على نعِيمِ دارِ الْمُقامةِ

translation.en: a means whereby we may reach the bliss of the House of Permanence
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,
lessen for us through the Qur’an the weight of heavy sins,
give to us the excellent qualities of the pious, and

segments.arabic: واقْفُ بِنا آثار الّذِين قامُوا لك بِهِ آناء اللّيْلِ وأطْراف النّهارِ
segments.transliteration: waq-fu bina atharalladhina qamu laka bihie ana-allay-li wa at-rafannahar

translation.en: make us follow the tracks of those who stood before You in the watches of the night and the ends of the day, such that You

segments.arabic: حتّى تُطهِّرنا مِنْ كُلِّ دنسٍ بِتطْهِيرِهِ

translation.en: purify us from every defilement through its purification and
make us to follow the tracks of those
Who have taken illumination from its light

segments.arabic: ولمْ يُلْهِهِمُ الأملُ عنِ الْعملِ فيقْطعهُمْ بِخُدعِ غُرُورِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yul-hihimul-amalu `anil-`amali fayaq-ta'hum bikhudai' ghururih

translation.en: and whom expectation has not distracted from works, cutting them off through its delusions' deceptions!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household and
appoint the Qur’an for us
an intimate in the shadows of nights and

segments.arabic: ومِنْ نزغاتِ الشّيْطانِ وخطراتِ الْوساوِسِ حارِساً

translation.en: a guardian against the instigations of SATAN and confusing thoughts,

segments.arabic: ولأقْدامِنا عنْ نقْلِها إِلى الْمعاصِي حابِساً

translation.en: for our feet an obstruction from passing to acts of disobedience,

segments.arabic: ولألْسِنتِنا عنِ الْخوْضِ فِي الْباطِلِ مِنْ غيْرِ ما آفةٍ مُخْرِساً
segments.transliteration: wa lial-sinatina `anil-khaw-di fil-batili min ghay-ri ma afatimmukh-risa

translation.en: for our tongues a silencer without blight preventing a plunge into falsehood,
for our limbs a restrainer from committing sins, and

segments.arabic: ولِما طوتِ الْغفْلةُ عنّا مِنْ تصفُّحِ الأعْتِبارِ ناشِراً
segments.transliteration: wa lima tawatil-ghaf-latu `anna min tasaf-fuhili`tibari nashira

translation.en: for the scrutiny of heedfulness rolled up in heedlessness an unroller,

segments.arabic: حتّى تُوصِل إِلى قُلُوبِنا فهْم عجائِبِهِ وزواجِر أمْثالِهِ الّتِي ضعُفتِ الْجِبالُ الرّواسِي على صلابتِها عنِ احْتِمالِهِ
segments.transliteration: hat-ta tusila ila qulubina fah-ma `aja-ibihi wa zawajira am-thalihillati da`ufatil-jibalur-rawasi `ala salabatiha `ani ah-timalih

translation.en: Such that You attach to our hearts the understanding of the Qur’an's wonders and its restraining similitudes which immovable mountains in all their solidity were too weak to carry!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household and
through the Qur’an make permanent the rightness of our outward selves,

segments.arabic: واحْجُبْ بِهِ خطراتِ الْوساوِسِ عنْ صِحّةِ ضمائِرِنا

translation.en: veil the ideas of confusing thoughts from the soundness of our innermost minds,

segments.arabic: واغْسِلْ بِهِ درن قُلُوبِنا وعلائِق أوْزارِنا
segments.transliteration: wagh-sil bihi darana qulubina wa `ala-iqa aw-zarina

translation.en: wash away the dirt of our hearts and the ties of our heavy sins,
gather our scattered affairs,

segments.arabic: وارْوِ بِهِ فِي موْقِفِ الْعرْضِ عليْك ظمأ هواجِرِنا
segments.transliteration: war-wi bihi fi maw-qifil-`ar-di `alay-ka zama hawajirina

translation.en: quench the thirst of our burning heat in the standing place of the presentation to You, and

segments.arabic: واكْسُنا بِهِ حُلل الأمانِ يوْم الْفزعِ الأكْبرِ فِي نُشُورِنا
segments.transliteration: wak-suna bihi hulalal-amani yaw-mal-fazai'l-ak-bari fi nushurina

translation.en: clothe us in the robes of security on the Day of the Greatest Terror at our uprising!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household and

segments.arabic: واجْبُرْ بِالْقُرْآنِ خلّتنا مِنْ عدمِ الإِمْلاقِ

translation.en: through the Qur’an redress our lack—our destitution in poverty—

segments.arabic: وسُقْ إِليْنا بِهِ رغد الْعيْشِ وخِصْب سعةِ الأرْزاقِ
segments.transliteration: wa suq ilay-na bihi raghadal-`ay-shi wakhis-ba sa'til-ar-zaq

translation.en: drive toward us the comforts of life and an abundance of plentiful provisions,

segments.arabic: وجنِّبْنا بِهِ الضّرائِب الْمذْمُومة ومدانِي الأخْلاقِ

translation.en: turn aside blameworthy character traits and base moral qualities, and

segments.arabic: واعْصِمْنا بِهِ مِنْ هُوّةِ الْكُفْرِ ودواعِي النِّفاقِ
segments.transliteration: wa'-sim-na bihi min hu-watil-kuf-ri wa dawae’ennifaq

translation.en: preserve us from the pit of unbelief and the motives for hypocrisy,
such that the Qur’an may be

segments.arabic: لنا فِي الْقِيامةِ إِلى رِضْوانِك وجِنانِك قائِداً
segments.transliteration: lana fil-qiamati ila rid-wanika wa jinanika qa-ida

translation.en: for us at the resurrection a leader to Your good pleasure and Your gardens,

segments.arabic: ولنا فِي الدُّنْيا عنْ سُخْطِك وتعدِّي حُدُودِك ذائِداً
segments.transliteration: wa lana fid-dunya `an sukh-tika wa ta'd-di hududika dha-ida

translation.en: for us in this world a protector against Your displeasure and transgressing Your bounds,

segments.arabic: ولِما عِنْدك بِتحْلِيلِ حلالِهِ وتحْرِيمِ حرامِهِ شاهِداً
segments.transliteration: wa lima i'ndaka bitah-lili halalihi watah-rimi haramihi shahida

translation.en: and for what is with You a witness by its declaring lawful the lawful and its declaring unlawful the unlawful!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household and

segments.arabic: وهوِّنْ بِالْقُرْآنِ عِنْد الْموْتِ على أنْفُسِنا

translation.en: through the Qur’an make easy for our souls at death
the distress of the driving,
the effort of the moaning,
and the succession of the rattling,

segments.arabic: (إِذا بلغتِ النُّفُوسُ التّراقِي وقِيل منْ راقٍ)

translation.en: “when souls reach the throats and it is said, ‘Where is the enchanter?’”

segments.arabic: وتجلّى ملكُ الْموْتِ لِقبْضِها مِنْ حُجُبِ الْغُيُوبِ

translation.en: when the angel of death discloses himself to seize them from behind the veils of unseen things,

segments.arabic: ورماها عن قوْسِ الْمنايا بِأسْهُمِ وحْشةِ الْفِراقِ
segments.transliteration: wa ramaha `an qaw-sil-manaya bi s-humi wah-shatil-firaq

translation.en: letting loose at them from the bow of destinies the arrows of the terror of lonesome separation, and

segments.arabic: وداف لها مِنْ ذُعافِ الْموْتِ كأْساً مسْمُومة الْمذاقِ
segments.transliteration: wa dafa laha min dhu`aafil-maw-ti ka-sammas-mumatal-madhaq

translation.en: mixing for them from sudden death a cup poisoned to the taste; and

segments.arabic: ودنا مِنّا إِلى الآخِرةِ رحِيلٌ وانْطِلاقٌ

translation.en: when departure and release for the hereafter come close to us,
works become collars around the necks, and

segments.arabic: وكانتِ الْقُبورُ هِي الْمأْوى إِلى مِيقاتِ يوْمِ التّلاقِ
segments.transliteration: wa kanatil-qubwru hial-ma-wa ila miqati yaw-mit-talaq

translation.en: the graves become the haven until the appointed time of the Day of Encounter!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وبارِكْ لنا فِي حُلُولِ دارِ الْبِلى وطُولِ الْمُقامةِ بيْن أطْباقِ الثّرى
segments.transliteration: wa barik lana fi hululi daril-bila wa tulil-muqamati bay-na at-baqith-thara

translation.en: make blessed for us the arrival at the house of decay and the drawn out residence between the layers of the earth,

segments.arabic: واجْعلِ الْقُبور بعْد فِراقِ الدُّنْيا خيْر منازِلِنا

translation.en: appoint the graves, after separation from this world, the best of our way stations,

segments.arabic: وافْسحْ لنا بِرحْمتِك فِي ضِيقِ ملاحِدِنا
segments.transliteration: waf-sah lana birah-matika fi diqi malahidina

translation.en: make roomy for us through Your mercy the narrowness of our tombs, and

segments.arabic: ولا تفْضحْنا فِي حاضِرِ الْقِيامةِ بِمُوبِقاتِ آثامِنا
segments.transliteration: wa la taf-dah-na fi hadiril-qiamati bimubiqati athamina

translation.en: disgrace us not among those present at the Resurrection through our ruinous sins!

segments.arabic: وارْحمْ بِالْقُرآنِ فِي موْقِفِ الْعرْضِ عليْك ذُلّ مقامِنا
segments.transliteration: war-ham bil-qurani fi maw-qifil-`ar-di `alay-ka dhulla maqamina

translation.en: Through the Qur’an have mercy upon the lowliness of our station at the standing place of presentation to You,

segments.arabic: وثبِّتْ بِهِ عِنْد اضْطِرابِ جِسْرِ جهنّم يوْم الْمجازِ عليْها زلل أقْدامِنا
segments.transliteration: wa thab-bit bihi i'nda ad-tirabi jis-ri jahannama yaw-mal-majazi `alay-ha zalala aq-damina

translation.en: make firm the slips of our feet during the shaking of the bridge across hell on the day of passage over it,

segments.arabic: ونوِّرْ بِهِ قبْل الْبعْثِ سُدف قُبُورِنا
segments.transliteration: wa naw-wir bihi qab-lal-ba'-thi sudafa quburina

translation.en: illuminate the darkness of our graves before the Uprising, and

segments.arabic: ونجِّنا بِهِ مِنْ كُلِّ كرْبٍ يوْم الْقِيامةِ وشدائِدِ أهْوالِ يوْمِ الطّآمّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa naj-jina bihi min kulli kar-bi-yaw-mal-qiamati wa shada-idi ah-wali yaw-mit-tammah

translation.en: deliver us from every distress on the Day of Resurrection and from the hardships of terrors on the Day of Disaster!

segments.arabic: وبيِّضْ وجُوهنا يوْم تسْودُّ وُجُوهُ الظّلمةِ فِي يوْمِ الْحسْرةِ والنّدامةِ
segments.transliteration: wa bay-yid wjuhana yaw-ma tas-wad-du wujuhuz-zalamati fi yaw-mil-has-rati wannadamah

translation.en: Whiten our faces on the day when the faces of wrongdoers are blackened during the Day of Regret and Remorse,

segments.arabic: واجْعلْ لنا فِي صُدُ رِ الْمُؤْمِنِين وُدّاً

translation.en: appoint love for us in the breasts of the faithful, and
make not life for us troublesome!

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ صلِّ على مُحمّدٍ عبْدِك ورسُولِك كما بلّغ رِسالتك
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin `ab-dika warasulika kama ballagha risalatak

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad, Your servant and Your messenger, just as He delivered Your message,
executed Your command,
and counseled Your servants!

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ اجْعلْ نبِيّنا صلواتُك عليْهِ وعلى آلِهِ يوْم الْقِيامةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma aj-`al nabi-yana salawatuka `alay-hi wa'la alihi yaw-mal-qiamati

translation.en: O Allah, on the Day of Resurrection make our Prophet (Your blessings be upon him and his Household)
the nearest of the prophets to You in seat,
the ablest of them before You with intercession,
the greatest of them with You in measure, and
the most eminent of them with You in rank!

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ صلِّ على مُحمّدٍ وآلِ مُحمّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
ennoble his edifice,
magnify his proof, make
weighty his balance,
accept his intercession,
bring near his mediation,
whiten his face,
complete his light, and
raise his degree!
Make us live according to his Sunnah,
make us die in his creed,
take us on his road,
make us travel his path,
place us among the people who obey him,
muster us in his band,
lead us to up his pool,
and give us to drink of his cup!
And bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: صلاةً تُبلِّغُهُ بِها أفْضل ما يأْمُلُ مِنْ خيْرِك وفضْلِك وكرامتِك
segments.transliteration: salatan tuballighuhu biha af-dala ma ya-mulu min khay-rika wafad-lika wakaramatik

translation.en: with a blessing through which You wilt take him to the most excellent of Your good, Your bounty, and Your generosity for which he hopes!

segments.arabic: إِنّك ذُو رحْمةٍ واسِعةٍ وفضْلٍ كرِيمٍ

translation.en: You are Possessor of boundless mercy and generous bounty.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ اجْزِهِ بِما بلّغ مِنْ رِسالاتِك

translation.en: O Allah, repay him for Your messages which he delivered,
Your signs which he passed on,
the good counsel he gave to Your servants, and
the struggle he undertook in Your way,
with the best You have repaid any of
Your angels brought nigh and
Your prophets sent out and chosen!

segments.arabic: والسّلامُ عليْه وعلى آلِهِ الطّيِّبِين الطّاهِرِين ورحْمةُ اللّهِ وبركاتُهُ

translation.en: And upon him and his Household, the good, the pure, be peace, Allah's mercy, and His blessings!

text.en:
It is also optional to say the following brief supplicatory prayer that
is reported by Shaykh al-Tusi from Imam AliAmeer al-
Momineen(a.s.):

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اشْرَحْ بِالْقُرْآنِ صَدْرِي ، وَاسْتَعْمِلْ بِالْقُرْآنِ بَدَنِي ، وَنَوّرْ بِالْقُرْآنِ بَصَرِي ، وَاطْلِقْ بِالْقُرْآنِ لِسانِي ، وَأَعِنِّي عَلَيْهِ ما أَبْقَيْتَنِي فَإِنَّهُ لا حَوْلَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إِلاّ بِكَ.

text.en:
It is recommended, too, to say the following supplicatory prayer
that is reported from Imam AliAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.):

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ إِخْباتَ المُخْبِتِينَ ، وَإِخْلاصَ المُوقِنِينَ ، وَمُرافَقَةَ الاَبْرارِ ، وَاسْتِحْقاقَ حَقائِقِ الاِيْمانِ ، وَالغَنِيمَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ بِرٍّ ، وَالسَّلامَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ إِثْمٍ ، وَوُجُوبَ رَحْمَتِكَ ، وَعَزائِمَ مَغْفِرَتِكَ ، وَالفَوْزَ بِالجَنَّةِ ، وَالنَّجاةَ مِنَ النّار

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Dua for last Friday of ramadan

text.en: It is recommended to perform Ghusl on each of the last 10 nights

Sayyid Ibn Tawus and Shaykh al-Saduq have both narrated the following on the authority of Jabir ibn `Abdullah al-Ansari:I visited the Messenger of Allah (a.s) on the last Friday of Ramazan. As he saw me, he said, “Jabir: This is the last Friday of Ramazan. You should thus bid it farewell by saying the following:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ لا تَجْعَلهُ آخِرَ العَهْدِ مِنْ صِيَامِنَا إِيَّاهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma la taj`alhu akhira al`ahdi min siyamina iyyahu

translation.en: O Allah: (please) do not make it the last of our fasting in this month;

segments.arabic: فَإِنْ جَعَلْتَهُ فَاجْعَلْنِي مَرْحُوماً وَلا تَجْعَلْنِي مَحْرُوماً.
segments.transliteration: fa-in ja`altahu faj`alny marhuman wa la taj`alny mahruman

translation.en: but if You decide so, then (please) make me enjoy (Your) mercy and do not make me deprived (of it)

text.en: Verily, anyone who says this supplication will win one of the two good things; either attaining the next Ramazan or having the forgiveness and mercy of Almighty Allah.”

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Farewell Duas of ramadan

text.en:
Sixth: It is recommended to bid farewell to the month of Ramadan
through the supplicatory prayers dedicated to this purpose and
mentioned by al-Kulayni, al-Saduq, al-Mufid, al-Tusi, and Sayyid Ibn
Tawus - may Allah be pleased with them all. Yet, the best farewell
prayer in this respect may be the forty-fifth supplication of al-Sahifah
al-Kamilah al-Sajjadiyyah, which begins with the following statement:

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ يَا مَنْ لا يَرْغَبُ فِي الْجَزَاءِ،

translation.en: 1.O God, O He who desires no repayment!
2.O He who shows no remorse at bestowal!

segments.arabic: وَيَا مَنْ لاَ يُكَافِئُ عَبْدَهُ عَلَى السَّوآءِ،
segments.transliteration: wa yaa mal-laa yukaafi-u a'b-dahoo a'laas-sawaaa-i

translation.en: 3.O He who rewards not His servant tit for tat!
4.Your kindness is a new beginning, Your pardon gratuitous bounty,

segments.transliteration: wa u'qoobatuka a'd-l wa qaz'aaaw-uka kheearah

translation.en: 5.Your punishment justice, Your decree a choice for the best!

segments.arabic: إنْ أَعْطَيْتَ لَمْ تَشُبْ عَطَآءَكَ بِمَنٍّ،
segments.transliteration: in aa'-t'ay-ta lam tashub a't'aaa-aka biman

translation.en: 6.If You bestowest, You stainest not Your bestowal with obligation,

segments.arabic: وَإنْ مَنَعْتَ لَمْ يَكُنْ مَنْعُكَ تَعَدِّيا

translation.en: 7.and if You withholdest, You withholdest not in transgression.

segments.arabic: تَشْكُرُ مَنْ شَكَرَكَ وَأَنْتَ أَلْهَمْتَهُ شُكْرَكَ،
segments.transliteration: tash-kuru man shkaraka wa anta al-ham-tahoo shuk-rak

translation.en: 8.You showest gratitude to him who thanks You, while You hast inspired him to thank You.

segments.arabic: وَتُكَافِئُ مَنْ حَمِدَكَ وَأَنْتَ عَلَّمْتَهُ حَمْدَكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa tukaafi-u man h'amidaka wa anta a'l-lam-tahoo h'am-dak

translation.en: 9.You rewardest him who praises You, while though You hast taught him Your praise.

segments.arabic: تَسْتُرُ عَلَى مَنْ لَوْ شِئْتَ فَضَحْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa tas-turu a'laa mal-law shi-ta faz'ah'-tah

translation.en: 10.You coverest him whom, if You willed, You wouldst expose,

segments.arabic: وَتَجُودُ عَلَى مَنْ لَوْ شِئْتَ مَنَعْتَهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa tajoodu a'laa mal-law shi-ta manaa'-tah

translation.en: 11.and You art generous toward him from whom, if You willed, You wouldst withhold.
12.Both are worthy of Your exposure and withholding,

segments.arabic: غَيْرَ أَنَّكَ بَنَيْتَ أَفْعَالَكَ عَلَى التَّفَضُّلِ،

translation.en: 13.but You hast founded Your acts upon gratuitous bounty,
14.channelled Your power into forbearance,
15.received him who disobeyed You with clemency,

segments.transliteration: wa am-hal-ta man qas'ada linaf-sihee biz'-z'ul-m

translation.en: 16.and disregarded him who intended wrongdoing against himself.

segments.arabic: تَسْتَنْظِرُهُمْ بِأناتِكَ إلى الإنَابَةِ وَتَتْرُكُ مُعَاجَلَتَهُمْ إلَى التَّوْبَةِ
segments.transliteration: tastanz'iruhum bi naatika ilaal-inaabah wtat-ruku mua'ajalatahum ilaat-taw-bah

translation.en: 17.You awaitest their turning back without haste and refrainest from rushing them toward repentance,
18.so that the perisher among them may not perish because of You
19.and the wretched may not be wretched through Your favour,
20.but only after Your prolonged excusing him
21.and successive arguments against him,
22.as an act of generosity through Your pardon, O Generous,
23.and an act of kindliness through Your tenderness, O Clement!
24.It is You who hast opened for Your servants a door
25.to Your pardon, which You hast named 'repentance'.

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَ عَلَى ذلِكَ البَابِ دَلِيلاً مِنْ وَحْيِكَ

translation.en: 26.You hast placed upon that door a pointer from Your revelation,

segments.arabic: لِئَلاَّ يَضِلُّوا عَنْهُ فَقُلْتَ تَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ :
segments.transliteration: li-al-laa yaz'il-loo a'n-hoo faqul-ta tabaaraka as-muka:

translation.en: 27.lest they stray from it: You hast said (blessed is Your Name),

segments.arabic: (تُوبُوا إلَى الله تَوْبَةً نَصُوحاً عَسَى رَبُّكُمْ

translation.en: 28."Repent toward God with unswerving repentance! It may be that Your Lord
29.will acquit of your evil deeds and will admit you into
30.gardens beneath which rivers flow,
31.upon the day when God will not degrade the Prophet

segments.arabic: وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا مَعَهُ نُورُهُمْ يَسْعَى بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَبِأَيْمَانِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wal-lad'eena aaamanoo maa'hoo nooruhum yas-a'a bay-na ay-deehim wabiay-maanihim

translation.en: 32.and those who have faith along with him, their light running before them and on their right hands,

segments.arabic: يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا أَتْمِمْ لَنا نُورَنَا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا
segments.transliteration: yaqooloona rab-banaaa at-mim lanaa nooranaa wagh-fir lanaaa

translation.en: 33.and they say: 'Our Lord, complete for us our light, and forgive us!
34.Surely You art powerful over everything" (66:8).

segments.arabic: فَمَا عُذْرُ مَنْ أَغْفَلَ دُخُولَ ذلِكَ الْمَنْزِلِ
segments.transliteration: famaa u'd'-ru man agh-fala dukhoola d'alikal-manzili

translation.en: 35.What is the excuse of him who remains heedless of entering that house
36.after the opening of the door and the setting up of the pointer?

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ الَّذِي زِدْتَ فِي السَّوْمِ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ لِعِبَادِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa antal-lad'ee zit-ta fis-saw-mi a'laa naf-sika lii'baadika

translation.en: 37.It is You who hast raised the price against Yourself to the advantage of Your servants,
38.desiring their profit in their trade with You,

segments.transliteration: wa faw-zahum bil-wifaadati a'lay-ka waz-zeeaadati mink

translation.en: 39.their triumph through reaching You, and their increase on account of You,
40.for You hast said (blessed is Your Name and high art You exalted),
41."Whoso brings a good deed shall have ten the like of it,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ جَاءَ بِالسَّيِّئَةِ فَلاَ يُجْزى إلاّ مِثْلَهَا)
segments.transliteration: waman jaaa-a bis-say-yi-ati falaa yuj-zaaa il-laa mith-lahaa)

translation.en: 42.and whoso brings an evil deed shall only be recompensed the like of it" (6:160).

segments.arabic: وَقُلْتَ: (مَثَلُ الَّذِينَ يُنْفِقُونَ أَمْوَالَهُمْ فِي سَبِيلِ الله كَمَثَلِ حَبَّة
segments.transliteration: wa qul-t: (mathalul-lad'eena yunfiqoona am-waalahum fee sabeelil-laahee kamathali h'ab-batin

translation.en: 43.You hast said, "The likeness of those who expend their wealth in the way of God is as the likeness of a grain of corn

segments.arabic: أَنْبَتَتْ سَبْعَ سَنَابِلَ فِي كُلِّ سُنْبُلَة مَائَةُ حَبَّة
segments.transliteration: ambatat sab-a' sanaabila fee kul-li sumbulatim-mia-atu h'ab-bati

translation.en: 44.that sprouts seven ears, in every ear a hundred grains;
45.so God multiplies unto whom He wills" (2:261).

segments.arabic: وَقُلْتَ: (مَنْ ذَا الَّذِيْ يُقْرِضُ الله قَرْضاً حَسَنَاً

translation.en: 46.You hast said, "Who is he that will lend to God a good loan,
47.and He will multiply it for him manifold" (2:245)?

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَنْزَلْتَ مِنْ نَظَائِرِهِنَّ فِي الْقُرْآنِ مِنْ تَضَاعِيفِ الْحَسَنَاتِ،
segments.transliteration: wa maaa anzal-ta min naz'aaa-irihin-na fil-qur-aaani min taz'aae'efil-h'asanaat

translation.en: 48.And You hast sent down in the Qur'an similar verses on the multiplying of good deeds.

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ الَّذِي دَلَلْتَهُمْ بِقَوْلِكَ مِنْ غَيْبِكَ وَتَرْغِيْبِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa antal-lad'ee dalal-tahum biqaw-lika min ghay-bika wa tar-gheebika

translation.en: 49.It is You who hast pointed them through Your speech from Your Unseen and Your encouragement

segments.arabic: الَّذِي فِيهِ حَظُّهُمْ عَلَى مَا لَوْ سَتَرْتَهُ عَنْهُمْ
segments.transliteration: lad'ee feehee h'az'-z'uhum a'laa maa law satar-tahoo a'n-hum

translation.en: 50.in which lies their good fortune toward that which - hadst You covered it from them

segments.arabic: لَمْ تُدْرِكْهُ أَبْصَارُهُمْ وَلَمْ تَعِـهِ أَسْمَاعُهُمْ
segments.transliteration: lam tud-rik-hooo ab-s'aaruhum- wa lam tai'heee as-maau'hum

translation.en: 51.their eyes would not have perceived, their ears would not have heard,
52.and their imaginations would not have grasped,

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتَ: (اذْكُرُونِي أَذْكُرْكُمْ وَاشْكُرُوا لِيْ وَلا تَكْفُرُونِ)
segments.transliteration: faqul-ta: (ud'-kurooneee ad'-kur-kum- wa ash-kuroo lee wa laa tak-furoon)

translation.en: 53.for You hast said, "Remember Me and I will remember you be thankful to Me, and be you not thankless towards Me" (2:152)!
54.You hast said, "If you are thankful, surely I will increase you,
55.but if you are thankless, My chastisement is surely terrible" (14:7);
56.And You hast said, "Supplicate Me and I will respond to you,
57.surely those who wax too proud to worship Me
58.shall enter Gehenna utterly abject" (40:60).

segments.transliteration: fasam-may-ta dua'aa-aka i'baadah wa tar-kahoo as-tik-baaraa

translation.en: 59.Hence You hast named supplicating You 'worship' and refraining from it 'waxing proud',

segments.arabic: وَتَوَعَّدْتَ عَلَى تَرْكِهِ دُخُولَ جَهَنَّمَ دَاخِرِينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa tawaa'-a't-ta a'laa tar-kihee dukhoola jahan-nama daakhireen

translation.en: 60.and You hast threatened that the refraining from it would yield entrance into Gehenna in utter abjection.
61.So they remember You for Your kindness, they thank You for Your bounty,
62.they supplicate You by Your command,
63.and they donate for You in order to seek Your increase;

segments.transliteration: wa feehaa kaanat najaatuhum min ghaz'abik

translation.en: 64.in all this lies their deliverance from Your wrath
65.and their triumph through Your good pleasure.

segments.arabic: وَلَوْ دَلَّ مَخْلُوقٌ مَخْلُوقاً مِنْ نَفْسِهِ

translation.en: 66.Were any creature himself to direct another creature

segments.arabic: عَلَى مِثْلِ الَّذِيْ دَلَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ عِبَادَكَ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: a'laa mith-lil-lad'ee dalal-ta a'lay-hee i'baadaka minka

translation.en: 67.to the like of that to which You Yourself hast directed Your servants,
68.he would be described by beneficence,
69.qualified by kindness, and praised by every tongue.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ مَا وُجِدَ فِي حَمْدِكَ مَذْهَبٌ،
segments.transliteration: falakal-h'am-du maa wujida fee h'am-dika mad'-hab

translation.en: 70.So to You belongs praise as long as there is found a way to praise You

segments.arabic: وَمَا بَقِيَ لِلْحَمْدِ لَفْظٌ تُحْمَدُ بِهِ وَمَعْنىً يَنْصَرفُ إلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: wa maa baqee lil-h'am-di laf-z'un tuh'-madu bihee wa maa'-nana yans'arifu ilay-h

translation.en: 71.and as long as there remains for praising words by which You may be praised and meanings which may be spent in praise!

segments.arabic: يَـا مَنْ تَحَمَّدَ إلَى عِبَـادِهِ بِالإِحْسَـانِ وَالْفَضْل،
segments.transliteration: yaa man tah'am-mada ilaa i'baadihee bil-ih'-saani wal-faz'-li

translation.en: 72.O He who shows Himself praiseworthy to His servants through beneficence and bounty,
73.flooding them with kindness and graciousness!

segments.arabic: مَا أَفْشَى فِيْنَا نِعْمَتَكَ وَأَسْبَغَ عَلَيْنَا مِنَّتَكَ،
segments.transliteration: maaa af-shaa feenaa nia'-mataka? wa as-bagha a'lay-naa min-nataka

translation.en: 74.How much Your favour has been spread about among us, Your kindness lavished upon us,
75.and Your goodness singled out for us!
76.You hast guided us to Your religion which You hast chosen,
77.Your creed with which You art pleased,
78.and Your path which You hast made smooth,

segments.arabic: وَبَصَّرْتَنَا الزُّلْفَةَ لَدَيْكَ وَالوُصُولَ إلَى كَـرَامَتِكَ.
segments.transliteration: wa bas'-s'ar-tanaaz-zul-fata laday-ka wal-wus'oola ilaa karaamatik

translation.en: 79.and You hast shown us proximity to You and arrival at Your generosity!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ وَأَنْتَ جَعَلْتَ مِنْ صَفَـايَـا تِلْكَ الْوَظَائِفِ
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma wa anta jaa'l-ta min s'afaayaa til-kal-waz'aaa-ifi

translation.en: 80.O God, You hast appointed among the choicest of those duties
81.and the most special of those obligations

segments.arabic: شَهْرَ رَمَضَانَ الَّذِي اخْتَصَصْتَهُ مِنْ سَائِرِ الشُّهُورِ،

translation.en: 82.the month of Ramadan, which You hast singled out from other months,
83.chosen from among all periods and eras,
84.and preferred over all times of the year

segments.arabic: بِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ وَالنُّورِ،

translation.en: 85.through the Qur'an and the Light which You sent down within it,
86.the faith which You multiplied by means of it,
87.the fasting which You obligated therein,
88.the standing in prayer which You encouraged at its time,
89.and the Night of Decree which You magnified therein,

segments.arabic: الَّتِي هِيَ خَيْرٌ مِنْ أَلْفِ شَهْر،

translation.en: 90.the night which is "better than a thousand months" (97:3).

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ آثَرْتَنَا بِهِ عَلَى سَائِرِ الأُمَمِ

translation.en: 91.Through it You hast preferred us over the other communities
92.and through its excellence You hast chosen us to the exclusion of the people of the creeds.
93.We fasted by Your command in its daylight,
94.we stood in prayer with Your help in its night,

segments.arabic: مُتَعَرِّضِينَ بِصِيَامِهِ وَقِيَامِهِ لِمَا عَرَّضْتَنَا لَهُ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: mutaa'r-riz'eena bis'eeaamihee waqeeaamihee limaa a'r-raz'-tanaa lahoo mir-rah'-matik

translation.en: 95.presenting ourselves by its fasting and its standing to the mercy which You hast held up before us,
96.and we found through it the means to Your reward.

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ الْمَليءُ بِمَا رُغِبَ فِيهِ إلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa antal-malee-u bimaa rughiba feeheee ilay-k

translation.en: 97.And You art full of what is sought from You,
98.munificent with what is asked of Your bounty,
99.and near to him who strives for Your nearness.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ أَقَامَ فِينَا هَذَا الشَّهْرُ مَقَامَ حَمْد
segments.transliteration: wa qad aqaama feenaa had'aash-shah-ru maqaama h'am-d

translation.en: 100.This month stood among us in a standing place of praise,
101.accompanied us with the companionship of one approved,
102.and profited us with the most excellent profit of the world's creatures.

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ قَدْ فَارَقَنَا عِنْدَ تَمَامِ وَقْتِهِ وَانْقِطَاعِ مُدَّتِهِ وَوَفَاءِ عَدَدِهِ،
segments.transliteration: thum-ma qad faaraqanaa i'nda tamaami waq-tihee wanqit'aai' mud-datihee wa wafaaa-i a'dadih

translation.en: 103.Then it parted from us at the completion of its time, the end of its term, and the fulfilment of its number.

segments.arabic: فَنَحْنُ مُوَدِّعُوهُ وِدَاعَ مَنْ عَزَّ فِرَاقُهُ عَلَيْنَا
segments.transliteration: fanah'-nu muwad-diu'whoo wadaaa' man- a'z-za firaaquhoo a'lay-naa

translation.en: 104.So we bid farewell to it with the farewell of one whose parting pains us,

segments.transliteration: wa gham-manaa wa aw-h'ashanaa ans'iraafhoo a'n-naa

translation.en: 105.whose leaving fills us with gloom and loneliness,
106.and to whom we have come to owe a safeguarded claim,
107.an observed inviolability, and a discharged right.
108.We say: Peace be upon You,

segments.arabic: يَا شَهْرَ اللهِ الأكْبَرَ، وَيَا عِيْدَ أَوْلِيَائِهِ.
segments.transliteration: yaa shah-ral-laahil-ak-bar wa yaa e'eda aw-leeaaa-ih

translation.en: 109.O greatest month of God! O festival of His friends!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَـا أكْرَمَ مَصْحُـوب مِنَ الأوْقَاتِ،

translation.en: 110.Peace be upon You, O most noble of accompanying times!

segments.arabic: وَيَا خَيْرَ شَهْر فِي الأيَّامِ وَالسَّاعَاتِ.
segments.transliteration: wa yaa khay-ra shah-rin fil-ay-yaami was-saaa'at

translation.en: 111.O best of months in days and hours!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ شَهْر قَرُبَتْ فِيهِ الآمالُ
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka min shah-rin qarubat feehil-aaamaal

translation.en: 112.Peace be upon You, month in which expectations come near
113.and good works are scattered about!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ قَرِين جَلَّ قَدْرُهُ مَوْجُوداً،
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka min qareen jal-la qad-ruhoo maw-joodaa

translation.en: 114.Peace be upon You, comrade who is great in worth when found

segments.arabic: وَأَفْجَعَ فَقْدُهُ مَفْقُوداً، وَمَرْجُوٍّ آلَمَ فِرَاقُهُ.
segments.transliteration: wa af-jaa' faq-duhoo maf-qoodaa wa mar-joo-win aaalama firaaquh

translation.en: 115.and who torments through absence when lost, anticipated friend whose parting gives pain!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ أَلِيف آنَسَ مُقْبِلاً فَسَرَّ
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka min aleef aaanasa muq-bilana fasar

translation.en: 116.Peace be upon You, familiar who brought comfort in coming, thus making happy,
117.who left loneliness in going, thus giving anguish!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ مُجَاوِر رَقَّتْ فِيهِ الْقُلُوبُ، وَقَلَّتْ فِيهِ الذُّنُوبُ.
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka mim-mujaawirin raq-qat feehil-quloob wa qal-lat feehid'-d'unoob

translation.en: 118.Peace be upon You, neighbour in whom hearts became tender and sins became few!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ نَاصِر أَعَانَ عَلَى الشَّيْطَانِ
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka min naas'irin aa'ana a'laash-shay-t'aan

translation.en: 119.Peace be upon You, helper who aided against Satan,
120.companion who made easy the paths of good-doing!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مَا أكْثَرَ عُتَقَاءَ اللهِ فِيكَ
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-k maaa ak-thara u'taqaaa-al-laahee feek

translation.en: 121.Peace be upon You - How many became freedmen of God within You!

segments.arabic: وَمَا أَسْعَدَ مَنْ رَعَى حُرْمَتَكَ بكَ!.
segments.transliteration: wa maaa as-a'da mar-raa'a h'ur-mataka bik

translation.en: 122.How happy those who observed the respect due to You!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مَا كَانَ أَمْحَاكَ لِلذُّنُوبِ،
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka maa kaana am-h'aaka lild'-d'unoob

translation.en: 123.Peace be upon You - How many the sins You erased!
124.How many the kinds of faults You covered over!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مَا كَانَ أَطْوَلَكَ عَلَى الْمُجْرِمِينَ،
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka maa kaana at'-walaka a'laal-muj-rimeen

translation.en: 125.Peace be upon You - How drawn out wert You for the sinners!
126.How awesome wert You in the hearts of the faithful!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ شَهْر لا تُنَافِسُهُ الأيَّامُ.

translation.en: 127.Peace be upon You, month with which no days compete!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ شَهْر هُوَ مِنْ كُلِّ أَمْر سَلاَمٌ.
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka min shah-rin huwa min kul-li am-rin salaam

translation.en: 128.Peace be upon You, month which is peace in all affairs!
129.Peace be upon You, You whose companionship is not disliked,
130.You whose friendly mixing is not blamed!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ كَمَا وَفَدْتَ عَلَيْنَا بِالْبَرَكَاتِ،
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka kamaa wafat-ta a'lay-naa bil-barakaat

translation.en: 131.Peace be upon You, just as You hast entered upon us with blessings
132.and cleansed us of the defilement of offenses!
133.Peace be upon You - You art not bid farewell in annoyance
134.nor is Your fasting left in weariness!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ مَطْلُوبِ قَبْلَ وَقْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka min mat'-loobin qab-la waq-tih

translation.en: 135.Peace be upon You, object of seeking before Your time,
136.object of sorrow before Your passing!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ كَمْ مِنْ سُوء صُرِفَ بِكَ عَنَّا
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-k kam min sooo-in s'urifa bika a'n-naa

translation.en: 137.Peace be upon You - How much evil was turned away from us through You!

segments.arabic: وَكَمْ مِنْ خَيْر أُفِيضَ بِكَ عَلَيْنَا.
segments.transliteration: a'n-naa wa kam min khay-rin ufeez'a bika a'lay-naa

translation.en: 138.How much good flowed upon us because of You!
139.Peace be upon You and upon the Night of Decree

segments.arabic: الَّتِي هِيَ خَيْرٌ مِنْ أَلْفِ شَهْر.

translation.en: 140.which is "better than a thousand months" (97:3)!

segments.arabic: أَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ ما كَانَ أَحْرَصَنَا بِالأمْسِ عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: as-salaamu a'lay-ka maa kaana ah'-ras'anaa bil-am-si a'lay-k

translation.en: 141.Peace be upon You - How much we craved You yesterday!
142.How intensely we shall yearn for You tomorrow!

segments.arabic: أَلسَلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَى فَضْلِكَ الَّذِي حُرِمْنَاهُ ،

translation.en: 143.Peace be upon You and upon Your bounty which has now been made unlawful to us
144.and upon Your blessings gone by which have now been stripped away from us!

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إنَّا أَهْلُ هَذَا الشَّهْرِ الِّذِي شَرَّفْتَنَا بِهِ
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma in-naaa ah-lu had'aash-shah-ril-lad'ee shar-raf-tanaa bihee

translation.en: 145.O God, we are the people of this month. Through it You hast ennobled us

segments.arabic: وَوَفّقتَنَا بِمَنِّكَ لَهُ حِينَ جَهِلَ الاَشْقِيَا وَقْتَهُُ
segments.transliteration: wa waf-faq-tanaa biman-nika lahoo h'eena jahilal-ash-qeeaaa-u waq-tah

translation.en: 146.and given us success because of Your kindness, while the wretched are ignorant of its time.
147.Made unlawful to them is its bounty because of their wretchedness.

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ وَلِيُّ مَا اثَرْتَنَا بِهِ مِنْ مَعْرِفَتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa anta walee-yu maaa aaathar-tanaa bihee mim-maa'-rifatihee

translation.en: 148.You art the patron of the knowledge of it by which You hast preferred us,
149.and its prescribed practices to which You hast guided us.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ تَوَلَّيْنَا بِتَوْفِيقِكَ صِيَامَهُ وَقِيَامَهُ عَلى تَقْصِير،
segments.transliteration: wa qad t-tawal-lay-naa bitaw-feeqika s'eeaamahoo waqeeaamahoo a'laa taq-s'eer

translation.en: 150.We have undertaken, through Your giving success, its fasting and its standing in prayer, but with shortcomings,
151.and we have performed little of much.
152.O God, so to You belongs praise, in admission of evil doing

segments.arabic: وَاعْتِرَافاً بِالإضَاعَةِ، وَلَك مِنْ قُلُوبِنَا عَقْدُ النَّدَمِ،
segments.transliteration: waa'-tiraafam-bil-iz'aaa'h wa laka min quloobinaa a'q-dun-nadam

translation.en: 153.and confession of negligence, and to You belongs remorse firmly knitted in our hearts
154.and seeking of pardon sincerely uttered by our tongues.

segments.arabic: فَاْجُرْنَا عَلَى مَا أَصَابَنَا فِيهِ مِنَ التَّفْرِيطِ
segments.transliteration: fa'-jur-naa a'laa maaa ss'aabanaa feehee minat-taf-reet'i

translation.en: 155.Reward us, in spite of the neglect that befell us in this month,

segments.arabic: أَجْرَاً نَسْتَدْركُ بِهِ الْفَضْلَ الْمَرْغُوبَ فِيهِ،

translation.en: 156.with a reward through which we may reach the bounty desired from it

segments.arabic: وَنَعْتَاضُ بِهِ مِنْ أَنْوَاعِ الذُّخْرِ الْمَحْرُوصِ عَلَيْهِ ،
segments.transliteration: wa naa'-taaz'u bihee min anwaai'd'-d'ukh-ril-mah'-roos'i a'lay-h

translation.en: 157.and win the varieties of its craved stores!

segments.arabic: وَأَوْجِبْ لَنَا عُذْرَكَ عَلَى مَا قَصَّرْنَا فِيهِ مِنْ حَقِّكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa aw-jib lanaa u'd'-raka a'laa maa qas'-s'ar-naa feehee min h'aq-qik

translation.en: 158.Make incumbent upon us Your pardon for our falling short of Your right in this month

segments.arabic: وَابْلُغْ بِأَعْمَارِنَا مَا بَيْنَ أَيْديْنَا مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ الْمُقْبِلِ،
segments.transliteration: wa ab-lugh bi a'-maarinaa maa bay-na ay-deenaa min shah-ri ramaz'aanal-muq-bil

translation.en: 159.and make our lives which lie before us reach the coming month of Ramadan!
160.Once You hast made us reach it, help us perform
161.the worship of which You art worthy,

segments.arabic: وَأَدِّنَا إلَى الْقِيَامِ بِمَا يَسْتَحِقُّهُ مِنَ الطَّاعَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa ad-dinaaa ilaal-qeeaami bimaa yas-tah'iq-quhoo minat'-t'aaa'h

translation.en: 162.cause us to undertake the obedience which You deservest,
163.and grant us righteous works

segments.arabic: مَا يَكون دَرَكاً لِحَقِّكَ فِي الشَّهْرَيْنِ مِنْ شُهُورِ الدَّهْرِ.
segments.transliteration: maa yakwnu darakal-lih'aq-qika feesh-shah-ray-ni min shuhoorid-dah-r

translation.en: 164.that we may fulfil Your right in these two months of the months of time.

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ وَمَا أَلْمَمْنَا بِهِ فِي شَهْرِنَا هَذَا مِنْ لَمَم أَوْ إثْم،
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma wa maaa al-mam-naa bihee fee shah-rinaa had'aa mil-lamamin aw ith-m

translation.en: 165.O God, as for the small and large sins which we have committed in this our month,

segments.arabic: أَوْ وَاقَعْنَا فِيهِ مِنْ ذَنْبِ وَاكْتَسَبْنَا فِيهِ مِنْ خَطِيئَة
segments.transliteration: aw waaqaa'-naa feehee min d'ambin wak-tasab-naa feehee min khat'ee-ah

translation.en: 166.the misdeeds into which we have fallen, and the offenses which we have earned

segments.arabic: عَلَى تَعَمُّد مِنَّا أو عَلى نِسيانٍ ظَلَمنا فيه أنفُسَنا أَوِ انْتَهَكْنَا بِهِ حُرْمَةً مِنْ غَيْرِنَا
segments.transliteration: a'laa taa'm-mudim-min-naaa aw a'laa nis-yaan z'alam-naa feeheee anfusanaa awi antahak-naa bihee h'ur-matam-min ghay-rinaa

translation.en: 167.purposefully or in forgetfulness, wronging ourselves thereby or violating the respect due to others,

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ وَاسْتُرْنَا بِسِتْرِكَ،
segments.transliteration: fas'al-li a'laa muh'am-madiw-wa aaalih was-tur-naa bisit-rik

translation.en: 168.bless Muhammad and his Household, cover us over with Your covering,
169.pardon us through Your pardoning,
170.place us not before the eyes of the gloaters because of that,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَبْسُطْ عَلَيْنَا فِيهِ أَلْسُنَ الطَّاعِنينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa laa tab-sut' a'lay-naa feeheee al-sunat'-t'aai'neen

translation.en: 171.stretch not toward us the tongues of the defamers,
172.and employ us in that which will alleviate and expiate

segments.arabic: لِمَا أَنْكَرْتَ مِنَّا فِيهِ بِرَأْفَتِكَ الَّتِي لاَ تَنْفَدُ،
segments.transliteration: limaaa ankar-ta min-naa feeh biraa-fatikal-latee laa tanfad

translation.en: 173.whatever You disapprovest from us within it through Your clemency which does not run out,
174.and Your bounty which does not diminish!
175.O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
176.redress our being afflicted by our month,

segments.transliteration: wa baarik lanaa fee yaw-mi e'edinaa wafit'-rinaa

translation.en: 177.bless us in this day of our festival and our fast-breaking,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْهُ مِنْ خَيْرِ يَوْم مَرَّ عَلَيْنَا أَجْلَبِهِ لِعَفْو، وَأَمْحَاهُ لِذَنْبِ،
segments.transliteration: waj-a'l-hoo min khay-ri yaw-mim-mar-ra a'lay-naaa aj-labihee lia'f-wiw-wa am-h'aahoo lid'amb

translation.en: 178.make it one of the best of days that have passed over us, the greatest in attracting Your pardon, and the most effacing toward sins,

segments.arabic: وَاغْفِرْ لَنا ما خَفِيَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِنَا وَمَا عَلَنَ.
segments.transliteration: wagh-fir lanaa maa khafeea min d'unoobinaa wa maa a'lan

translation.en: 179.and forgive us our sins, both the concealed and the public!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ اسلَخْنَا بِانْسِلاَخِ هَذَا الشَّهْرِ مِنْ خَطَايَانَا
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma as-lakh-naa binsilaakhi had'aash-shah-ri min khat'aayaanaa

translation.en: 180.O God, with the passing of this month make us pass forth from our offenses,
181.with its departure make us depart from our evil deeds,
182.and appoint us thereby among its most felicitous people,

segments.arabic: وَأَجْزَلِهِمْ قِسَمَاً فِيـهِ وَأَوْفَـرِهِمْ حَظّاً مِنْـهُ.
segments.transliteration: wa aj-zalihim qis-man feeh wa aw-farihim h'az'-z'am-min-h

translation.en: 183.the most plentiful of them in portion, and the fullest of them in share!

segments.arabic: أللّهُمَّ وَمَنْ رَعَى حَقّ هَذَا الشَّهْرِ حَقَّ رِعَايَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma waman- raa'a h'aq-qa had'aash-shah-ri h'aq-qa ria'ayatih

translation.en: 184.O God, when any person observes this month as it should be observed,

segments.arabic: وَحَفِظَ حُرْمَتَهُ حَقَّ حِفْظِهَا وَقَامَ بِحُدُودِهِ حَقَّ قِيَامِهَا،
segments.transliteration: wa h'afiz'a h'ur-matahoo h'aq-qa h'if-z'ihaa wa qaama bih'udoodihee h'aq-qa qeeaamihaa

translation.en: 185.safeguards its inviolability as it should be safeguarded, attends to its bounds as they should be attended to,

segments.arabic: وَأتَّقَى ذُنُوبَهُ حَقَّ تُقَاتِهَا أَوْ تَقَرَّبَ إلَيْكَ بِقُرْبَة
segments.transliteration: wa at-taqaa d'unoobahoo h'aq-qa tuqaatihaa aw taqar-raba ilay-ka biqur-batin

translation.en: 186.fears its misdeeds as they should be feared, or seeks nearness to You with any act of nearness-seeking

segments.arabic: أَوْجَبَتْ رِضَاكَ لَهُ وَعَطَفَتْ رَحْمَتَكَ عَلَيْهِ،
segments.transliteration: aw-jabat riz'aaka lah wa a't'afat rah'-mataka a'lay-h

translation.en: 187.which makes incumbent upon him Your good pleasure and bends toward him Your mercy,
188.give to us the like [of that] from Your wealth
189.and bestow it upon us in multiples through Your bounty,

segments.arabic: فَإنَّ فَضْلَكَ، لا يَغِيْضُ وَإنَّ خَـزَائِنَكَ لا تَنْقُصُ، بَـلْ تَفِيضُ
segments.transliteration: fa in-na faz'-laka laa yagheez' wa in-na khazaaa-inaka laa tanqus'u bal tafeez'

translation.en: 190.for Your bounty does not diminish, Your treasuries do not decrease but overflow,

segments.transliteration: wa in-na maa'adina ih'-saanika laa taf-naa

translation.en: 191.the mines of Your beneficence are not exhausted,
192.and Your bestowal is the bestowal full of delight!
193.O God, bless Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: وَاكْتُبْ لَنَا مِثْلَ أجُورِ مَنْ صَامَهُ
segments.transliteration: wak-tub lanaa mith-la ujoori man s'aamahooo

translation.en: 194.and write for us the like of the wages of him who fasted in it

segments.arabic: أَوْ تَعَبَّدَ لَكَ فِيْهِ إلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ.
segments.transliteration: aw taa'b-bada laka feeheee ilaa yaw-mil-qeeaamah

translation.en: 195.or worshipped You within it until the Day of Resurrection!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ إنَّا نَتُوبُ إلَيْكَ فِي يَوْمِ فِطْرِنَا
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma in-naa natoobu ilay-ka fee yaw-mi fit'-rinaa

translation.en: 196.O God, we repent to You in our day of fast-breaking,
197.which You hast appointed for the faithful a festival and a joy

segments.arabic: وَلأِهْلِ مِلَّتِكَ مَجْمَعاً وَمُحْتشداً مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْب أَذْنَبْنَاهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa liah-li mil-latika maj-maa'w-wamuh'-tashadaa min kul-li d'ambin ad'-nab-naah

translation.en: 198.and for the people of Your creed a time of assembly and gathering, from every misdeed we did,

segments.arabic: أَوْ سُوْء أَسْلَفْنَاهُ، أَوْ خَاطِرِ شَرٍّ أَضْمَرْنَاهُ،
segments.transliteration: aw sooo-in as-laf-naah aw khaat'iri shar-rin az'-mar-naah

translation.en: 199.ill work we sent ahead, or evil thought we secretly conceived,

segments.arabic: تَوْبَةَ مَنْ لاَ يَنْطَوِيْ عَلَى رُجُوع إلَى ذَنْب
segments.transliteration: taw-bata mal-laa yant'awee a'laa rujooi'n ilaa d'amb

translation.en: 200.the repentance of one who does not harbour a return to sin

segments.transliteration: wa laa yau'wdu baa'-dahaa fee khat'ee-ah

translation.en: 201.and who afterwards will not go back to offense,

segments.arabic: تَوْبَةً نَصوحاً خَلَصَتْ مِنَ الشَّكِّ وَالارْتِيَابِ،

translation.en: 202.an unswerving repentance rid of doubt and wavering.

segments.arabic: فَتَقَبَّلْهَا مِنَّا وَارْضَ عَنَّا وَثَبِّتنَا عَلَيْهَا.
segments.transliteration: fataqab-bal-haa min-naa war-z'a a'n-naa wa thab-bit-naa a'lay-haa

translation.en: 203.So accept it from us, be pleased with us, and fix us within it!
204.God, provide us with fear of the threatened punishment

segments.arabic: وَشَوْقَ ثَوَابِ الْمَوْعُودِ حَتّى نَجِدَ لَذَّةَ مَا نَدْعُوكَ بِهِ،
segments.transliteration: wa shaw-qa thawaabil-maw-u'wd h'at-taa najid lad'-d'ata maa nad-u'wka bih

translation.en: 205.and yearning for the promised reward, so that we may find the pleasure of that for which we supplicate You
206.and the sorrow of that from which we seek sanctuary in You!

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْنَا عِنْدَكَ مِنَ التَّوَّابِيْنَ الَّذِينَ أَوْجَبْتَ لَهُمْ مَحَبَّتَكَ،
segments.transliteration: waj-a'l-naa i'ndaka minat-taw-waabeenal-lad'eena aw-jab-ta lahum mah'ab-batak

translation.en: 207.And place us with You among the repenters, those upon whom You hast made Your love obligatory

segments.arabic: وَقَبِلْتَ مِنْهُمْ مُرَاجَعَةَ طَاعَتِكَ، يَا أَعْدَلَ الْعَادِلِينَ.
segments.transliteration: wa qabil-ta min-hum muraajaa'ta t'aaa'tik yaaa aa'-dalal-a'adileen

translation.en: 208.and from whom You hast accepted the return to obeying You! O Most Just of the just!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ تَجَاوَزْ عَنْ آبآئِنَا وَأُمَّهَاتِنَا وَأَهْلِ دِيْنِنَا جَمِيعاً
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma tajaawaz a'n aaabaaa-inaa wa um-mahaatinaa wa ah-li deeninaa jameea'

translation.en: 209.O God, show forbearance toward our fathers and our mothers and all the people of our religion,

segments.arabic: مَنْ سَلَفَ مِنْهُمْ وَمَنْ غَبَرَ إلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ.
segments.transliteration: man salafa min-hum waman ghabara ilaa yaw-mil-qeeaamah

translation.en: 210.those who have gone and those who will pass by, until the Day of Resurrection!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّد نَبِيِّنَا وَآلِهِ،
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma s'al-li a'laa muh'am-madin-nabee-yinaa wa aaalihee

translation.en: 211.O God, bless our prophet Muhammad and his Household,
212.as You hast blessed Your angels brought nigh,
213.bless him and his Household,
214.as You hast blessed Your prophets sent out,

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى عِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa s'al-li a'lay-hee wa aaalihee kamaa s'al-lay-ta a'laa i'baadikas'-s'aalih'een

translation.en: 215.bless him and his Household, as You hast blessed Your righteous servants

segments.arabic: وَأَفْضَلَ مِنْ ذَلِكَ يَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa af-z'al min d'alika yaa rab-bal-a'alameena

translation.en: 216.- and better than that, O Lord of the worlds!

segments.transliteration: s'alaatan tab-lughunaa barakatuhaa wa yanaalunaa naf-u'haa

translation.en: 217.a blessing whose benediction will reach us, whose benefit will attain to us,
218.and through which our supplication may be granted!
219.You art the most generous of those who are beseeched,
220.the most sufficient of those in whom confidence is had,

segments.transliteration: wa aa'-t'aa man su-ila min faz'-lih

translation.en: 221.the most bestowing of those from whom bounty is asked,

segments.transliteration: wa anta a'laa kul-li shay-in qadeer

translation.en: You art powerful over everything!

text.en:
Sayyid Ibn Tawus has reported Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) as
saying: Whoever bids farewell to the month of Ramadan with the
following supplicatory prayer, Almighty Allah will forgive him before
it dawns and will confer upon him with the bliss of submission before
Him (i.e. Almighty Allah):

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ لا تَجْعَلْهُ آخِرَ العَهْدِ من صِيَامِي لِشَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma la taj`alhu akhira al`ahdi mn siyamy lishahri ramazana

translation.en: O Allah: (please) do not decide my observance of fasting in this month of Ramazan to be the last of my(life's) observance of fasting.

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ يَطْلُعَ فَجْرُ هذِهِ اللّيْلَةِ إِلاَّ وَقَدْ غَفَرْتَ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika an yatlu`a fajru hadhihi allaylati illa wa qad ghafarta le

translation.en: I take refuge with Thee lest the dawn of this night breaks forth without me having been positively forgiven.

text.en: غفر الله تعالى له قَبلَ أن يصبح ورزقه الإنابة إِليهِ
Shaykh al-Kulayniy, in his book of „al-Kafi‟ has reported on the authority of Abu-Basir that Imam al-Sadiq (a.s)instructed that the following supplication for bidding the month of Ramadan farewell:

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إنَّكَ قُلْتَ فِي كِتابِكَ الْمُنْزَلِ:
segments.transliteration: allahumma innaka qulta fiy kitabika almunzali:

translation.en: O Allah: You have said in Your revealed Book:
“The month of Ramadhan in which the Quran was revealed…”
And this month of Ramadhan
is about to slip away.
I thus beseech You in the name of Your Noble Face,
And Your Perfect Words,

segments.arabic: إنْ كانَ بَقِيَ عَلَيَّ ذَنْبٌ لَمْ تَغْفِرْهُ لي
segments.transliteration: in kana baqia `alayya dhanbun lam taghfirhu li

translation.en: If I am still liable to a sin that You have not yet forgiven
or You want to punish me for it,
or to retaliate upon me because of it,

segments.arabic: أنْ لا يَطْلُعَ فَجْرُ هَذِهِ اللَيْلَةِ
segments.transliteration: an la yatlu`a fajru hadhihii allaylati

translation.en: (I beseech You that) before dawn of this night rises
And before this moth elapses
(please) forgive it for me;
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
O Allah: all praise be to You in all expressions of praise—
The first and the last expressions;
Expressions that You have said about Yourself,
And expressions that have been used by the created beings;
The beings that are diligent, selected,
Revering their mention of You,
And their thanking You,
Whom You helped carry out Your duty that is incumbent upon them,
From among the varieties of Your creatures;
Such as the Favorite Angels,
The Prophets, the Messengers,
And the other varieties who speak of Your praise
And glorify You from among all the creatures.
(Praise be to You for) You have allowed us to witness the month of Ramadhan,
While we are covered by Your graces
And we are enjoying Your bounties and favors
And Your evident conferrals.
For all that, the ultimate praise be to You,
Praise that is perpetual and ceaseless
And endless and eternal and everlasting
Praise that never ends evermore.
Splendid be the praising of You,

segments.arabic: أعَنْتَنا عَلَيْهِ حَتّى قَضَيْنا صِيامَهُ وَقِيامَهُ

translation.en: For You have helped us accomplish our fasting and acts of worship in this month,

segments.arabic: مِنْ صَلاةٍ وَما كانَ مِنّا فيهِ مِنْ بِرٍّ
segments.transliteration: min salatin wama kana minna fihi min birrin

translation.en: Including prayers and whatever good deed that we have done during this month
As well as all praise and mention of You.
O Allah: (please) accept all that from us with the most excellent of Your approval
And Your overlooking and Your pardoning
And Your excusing and Your forgiving
And the actuality of Your pleasure

segments.arabic: حَتّى تُظْفِرَنا فِيهِ بِكُلِّ خَيْرٍ مَطْلوبٍ
segments.transliteration: hatta tuzhfirana fihi bikulli khayrin matlubin

translation.en: So that You may make us win all good turns that is besought
And the abundant share from any gifted bestowal
And that You save us from any dangerous matter,
Or any anticipated misfortune
Or any committed sin.

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ إنّي أسْألُكَ بِعَظيمِ ما سَألَكَ بِهِ أحَدٌ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inny asaluka bi`azhimi ma sa-alaka bihi ahadun min khalqika

translation.en: O Allah: I beseech You in the name of the greatest of all these by which any of Your servants have besought You,
Including Your Noble Names,
And the excellent praising of You
And private supplication to You

segments.arabic: أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: That You may send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَأنْ تَجْعَلَ شَهْرَنا هَذا أعْظَمَ شَهْرِ رَمَضانَ مَرَّ عَلَيْنا
segments.transliteration: wa-an taj`ala shahrana hadha a`zhama shahri Ramadhana marra `alayna

translation.en: And You may decide this month of Ramadhan to be the greatest month in blessings that we have ever witnessed
Since we were sent down to this world,
As regarding protection of my religion,
And redemption of myself
And settlement of my needs
And that You may accept my intercession to You concerning Your settlement of my requests
And Your perfecting Your graces upon me
And Your keeping evil away from me
And Your dressing me with well-being during this month,

segments.arabic: وَأنْ تَجْعَلَني بِرَحْمَتِكَ مِمَّنْ خِرْتَ لَهُ لَيْلَةَ الْقَدْرِ
segments.transliteration: wan taj`alany birahmatika mimman khirta lahu laylata alqadri

translation.en: And that You may include me, out of Your mercy, with those whom You allowed to obtain the benefits of the Grand Night

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَها لَهُ خَيْراً مِنْ ألْفِ شَهْرٍ
segments.transliteration: waja`altaha lahu khayran min alfi shahrin

translation.en: And those for whom You have decided this Night to be better than one thousand months,
As regarding obtaining its vastest rewards,
And its noblest gifts
And approving praiseworthiness
And obtaining long lifetime
And perpetuity of comfort.
O Allah: I also beseech You in the name of Your mercy and Your beneficence
And Your pardon and Your graces
And Your majesty and Your eternal favoring and conferral

segments.arabic: أنْ لا تَجْعِلَهُ آخِرَ الْعَهْدِ مِنّا لِشَهْرِ رَمَضانَ
segments.transliteration: an la taj`ilahu akhira al`ahdi minna lishahri Ramadhana

translation.en: That You may not decide this month of Ramadhan to be the last one in our lifetime;

segments.arabic: حَتّى تُبَلِّغَناهُ مِنْ قابِلٍ عَلى أحْسَنِ حالٍ
segments.transliteration: hatta tuballighanahu min qabilin `ala ahsani halin

translation.en: Rather, You may decide us to catch the coming month of Ramadhan while we enjoy the best of manners

segments.arabic: وَتُعَرِّفَني هِلالَهُ مَعَ النّاظِرِينَ إلَيْهِ وَالْمُعْتَرِفينَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: watu`arrifany hilalahu ma`a alnnazhirina ilayhi walmu`tarifina lahu

translation.en: And that You may decide us to see the new moon of the next month of Ramadhan by including me with those who will see it and realize its value
While I am enjoying the best wellbeing
And the most blissful of Your bounties
And the most expansive of Your mercy
And the most abundant of the share of Your sustenance that You decide for me.

segments.arabic: يا رَبِّيَ الَّذي لَيْسَ لي رَبٌّ غَيْرُهُ
segments.transliteration: ya rabbia alladhy laysa ly rabbun ghayruhu

translation.en: O my Lord save Whom I have no lord;

segments.arabic: لا يَكونُ هَذا الوَداعُ مِنّي لَهُ وَداعَ فَناءٍ
segments.transliteration: la yakunu hadha aluada`u minny lahu wada`a fana‘in

translation.en: (please) do not decide that this words of bidding the month of Ramadhan farewell to be the last farewell after which there will be my termination
And do not decide this time to be the last of my meeting the month of Ramadhan;

segments.arabic: حَتّى تُرِيَنّيهِ مِنْ قابِلٍ في أوْسَعِ النِّعَمِ وأفْضَلِ الرَّجاءِ
segments.transliteration: hatta turiannihi min qabilin fy awsa`i alnni`ami wafdali alrraja‘i

translation.en: Rather, You may decide that You will enable me to witness the coming Ramadhan while I am enjoying the most expansive graces and attaining the best of my hopes
And I am loyal to You in the most faithful manner.
Verily, You are the Hearer of prayers.
O Allah: (please) respond to my prayer,
And have mercy upon my acquiescence and submission before You
As well as my humbleness and reliance upon You,
While I am totally subservient to You;
I hope success and wellbeing

segments.arabic: وَلا تَشْريفاً وَلا تَبْليغاً إلاَّ بِكَ وَمِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wala tashrifan wala tablighan illa bika waminka

translation.en: And honoring and attainment of my hopes from none save You and through none save You;
So, (please) do this favor to me—
Splendid be the praising of You,
And sacred be Your Names—

segments.arabic: بِتَبْليغي شَهْرَ رَمَضانَ وَأنا مُعافىً مِنْ كُلِّ مَكْروهٍ وَمَحْذورٍ
segments.transliteration: bitablighy shahra Ramadhana wana mu`afan min kulli makruhin wamahdhurin

translation.en: By allowing me to witness the (coming) month of Ramadhan while I am delivered from any apprehensive and fearful matter
And from all misfortunes.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذي أعانَنا عَلى صِيامِ هَذا الشَّهْرِ وَقِيامِهِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhy a`anana `ala syami hadhaalshshahri waqyamihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has helped us observe fasting during this month and do acts of worship
Until I am witnessing the last night of this month.

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Completion of Quran

text.en: Completion (Khatm) of Al-Quran - Sahifa Sajjadiya

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إِنّك أعنْتنِي على ختْمِ كِتابِك الّذِي أنْزلْتهُ نُوراً
segments.transliteration: allahumma innaka a'ntani `ala khat-mi kitabikalladhi anzal-tahu nura

translation.en: O Allah, You have helped me complete Your Book, which You sent down as a light

segments.arabic: وجعلْتهُ مُهيْمِناً على كُلِّ كِتابٍ أنزلْتهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ja'l-tahu muhay-minan `ala kulli kitabin anazal-tah

translation.en: appointed as a guardian over every book You have sent down,
preferring it over every narrative which You have recounted,

segments.arabic: وفُرْقاناً فرقْت بِهِ بيْن حلالِك وحرامِك
segments.transliteration: wa fur-qanana faraq-ta bihi bay-na halalika wa haramik

translation.en: a separator, through which You have separated Your lawful from Your unlawful,

segments.arabic: وقُرْآناً أعْربْت بِهِ عنْ شرائِعِ أحْكامِك
segments.transliteration: wa qur-anan a'-rab-ta bihi `an shara-ii' ah-kamik

translation.en: a Qur’an, through which You have made plain the approaches to Your ordinances,
a book, which You have distinguished very distinctly for Your servants,

segments.arabic: ووحْياً أنْزلْتهُ على نبِيِّك مُحمّدٍ صلواتُك عليْهِ وآلِهِ تنْزِيلاً
