segments.transliteration: wa wah-yan anzal-tahu `ala nabi-yika muhammadin salawatuka `alay-hi wa alihi tanzila

translation.en: a revelation, which You have sent down, a sending down, upon Your prophet Muhammad (Your blessings be upon him and his Household).

segments.arabic: وجعلْتهُ نُوراً نهْتدِي مِنْ ظُلمِ الضّلالةِ والْجهالةِ بِاتِّباعِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ja'l-tahu nurannah-tadi min zulamid-dalalati wal-jahalati bit-tibai'h

translation.en: You appointed it a light through following which we may be guided from the shadows of error and ignorance,

segments.arabic: وشِفاءً لِمنْ أنْصت بِفهْمِ التّصْدِيقِ إِلى اسْتِماعِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa shifa-alliman ansata bifah-mit-tas-diqi ila as-timai'h

translation.en: a healing for him who turns ear toward hearing it with the understanding of attestation,

segments.arabic: ومِيزان قِسْطٍ لا يحِيفُ عنِ الْحقِّ لِسانُهُ

translation.en: a just balance whose tongue does not incline away from truth,

segments.arabic: ونُور هُدًى لا يطْفأُ عنِ الشّاهِدِين بُرْهانُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa nura hudana la yat-fa `anish-shahidina bur-hanuh

translation.en: a light of guidance whose proof is not extinguished before the witnesses,

segments.arabic: وعلم نجاةٍ لا يضِلُّ منْ أمّ قصْد سُنّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa `alama najatin la yadillu man amma qas-da sunnatih

translation.en: and a guidepost of deliverance, so that he who repairs straight way to its prescription will not go astray and

segments.arabic: ولا تنالُ أيْدِي الْهلكاتِ منْ تعلّق بِعُرْوةِ عِصْمتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la tanalu aydy al-halakati man ta`allaqa bi-`urwati `ismatih

translation.en: he who clings to its preservation's handhold will not be touched by the hands of disasters.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ فإِذْ أفدْتنا الْمعُونة على تِلاوتِهِ

translation.en: O Allah, since You have given us help to recite it

segments.transliteration: wa sahhal-ta jawasia al-sinatina bihus-ni i'baratih

translation.en: made smooth the roughness of our tongues through the beauty of its expression,
place us among those who observe it as it should be observed,

segments.arabic: ويدِينُ لك بِاعْتِقادِ التّسْلِيمِ لِمُحْكمِ آياتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa yadinu laka bi`tiqadit-tas-limi limuh-kami ayatih

translation.en: serve You by adhering in submission to the firm text of its verses, and

segments.arabic: ويفْزعُ إِلى الإِقْرارِ بمُتشابِهِهِ ومُوضحاتِ بيِّناتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa yaf-za`u ilal-iq-rari bamutashabihihi wamudahati bay-yinatih

translation.en: seek refuge in admitting both its ambiguous parts and the elucidations of its clear signs

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إِنّك أنْزلْتهُ على نبِيِّك مُحمّدٍ صلّى اللّهُ عليْهِ وآلِهِ مُجْملاً
segments.transliteration: allahumma innaka anzal-tahu `ala nabi-yika muhammadin sallallahu `alay-hi wa alihi muj-mala

translation.en: O Allah, You sent it down upon Your prophet Muhammad (Allah bless him and his household) in summary form
inspired him with the science of its wonders to complement it,
made us the heirs of its knowledge as interpreters,
made us to surpass him who is ignorant of its knowledge, and

segments.arabic: وقوّيْتنا عليْهِ لِترْفعنا فوْق منْ لمْ يُطِقْ حمْلهُ
segments.transliteration: wa qaw-way-tana `alay-hi litar-fa'na faw-qa mallam yutiq ham-lah

translation.en: gave us strength over it to raise us above those not able to carry it.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ فكما جعلْت قُلُوبنا لهُ حملةً
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama ja'l-ta qulubana lahu hamalah

translation.en: O Allah, just as You have appointed our hearts as its carriers and
made known to us through Your mercy its nobility and excellence,

segments.arabic: فصلِّ على مُحمّدٍ الْخطِيبِ بِهِ وعلى آلِهِ الْخُزّانِ لهُ
segments.transliteration: fasalli `ala muhammadinl-khatibi bihi wa `ala alihil-khuz-zani lah

translation.en: so also bless Muhammad, its preacher, and his Household, its guardians, and

segments.arabic: واجْعلْنا مِمّنْ يعْترِفُ بِأنّهُ مِنْ عِنْدِك حتّى
segments.transliteration: waj-`al-na mimmay-ya'-tarifu bi nnahu min i'ndika hat-ta

translation.en: place us among those who confess that it has come from You, lest
doubt about attesting to it assail us,

segments.arabic: ولا يخْتلِجنا الزّيْغُ عنْ قصْدِ طرِيقِهِ

translation.en: or deviation from its straightforward path shake us
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household and
make us one of those who hold fast to its cord,

segments.arabic: ويأْوِي مِن الْمُتشابِهاتِ إِلى حِرْزِ معْقِلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ya-wi minal-mutashabihati ila hir-zi ma'-qilih

translation.en: seek haven from its ambiguities in its fortified stronghold,
rest in the shadow of its wing,
find guidance in the brightness of its morning,
follow the shining of its disclosure,
acquire light from its lamp, and
beg not guidance from any other

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ وكما نصبْت بِهِ مُحمّداً علماً لِلدّلاةِ عليْك
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa kama nasab-ta bihi muhammadana `alamallild-dalati `alay-k

translation.en: O Allah, just as through it You have set up Muhammad as a guidepost to point to You and

segments.transliteration: wa an-haj-ta bi alihi subular-rida ilay-k

translation.en: through his Household You have made clear Your good pleasure's roads to You,
so also bless Muhammad and his Household and
make the Qur’an

segments.arabic: وسِيلةً لنا إِلى أشْرفِ منازِلِ الْكرامةِ

translation.en: our mediation to the noblest stations of Your honor,

segments.arabic: وسُلّماً نعْرُجُ فِيهِ إِلى محلِّ السّلامةِ

translation.en: a ladder by which we may climb to the place of safety,

segments.arabic: وسبباً نُجْزى بِهِ النّجاة فِي عرْصةِ الْقِيامةِ

translation.en: a cause for our being repaid with deliverance at the Plain of Resurrection, and

segments.arabic: وذرِيعةً نقْدُمُ بِها على نعِيمِ دارِ الْمُقامةِ

translation.en: a means whereby we may reach the bliss of the House of Permanence
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,
lessen for us through the Qur’an the weight of heavy sins,
give to us the excellent qualities of the pious, and

segments.arabic: واقْفُ بِنا آثار الّذِين قامُوا لك بِهِ آناء اللّيْلِ وأطْراف النّهارِ
segments.transliteration: waq-fu bina atharalladhina qamu laka bihie ana-allay-li wa at-rafannahar

translation.en: make us follow the tracks of those who stood before You in the watches of the night and the ends of the day, such that You

segments.arabic: حتّى تُطهِّرنا مِنْ كُلِّ دنسٍ بِتطْهِيرِهِ

translation.en: purify us from every defilement through its purification and
make us to follow the tracks of those
Who have taken illumination from its light

segments.arabic: ولمْ يُلْهِهِمُ الأملُ عنِ الْعملِ فيقْطعهُمْ بِخُدعِ غُرُورِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yul-hihimul-amalu `anil-`amali fayaq-ta'hum bikhudai' ghururih

translation.en: and whom expectation has not distracted from works, cutting them off through its delusions' deceptions!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household and
appoint the Qur’an for us
an intimate in the shadows of nights and

segments.arabic: ومِنْ نزغاتِ الشّيْطانِ وخطراتِ الْوساوِسِ حارِساً

translation.en: a guardian against the instigations of SATAN and confusing thoughts,

segments.arabic: ولأقْدامِنا عنْ نقْلِها إِلى الْمعاصِي حابِساً

translation.en: for our feet an obstruction from passing to acts of disobedience,

segments.arabic: ولألْسِنتِنا عنِ الْخوْضِ فِي الْباطِلِ مِنْ غيْرِ ما آفةٍ مُخْرِساً
segments.transliteration: wa lial-sinatina `anil-khaw-di fil-batili min ghay-ri ma afatimmukh-risa

translation.en: for our tongues a silencer without blight preventing a plunge into falsehood,
for our limbs a restrainer from committing sins, and

segments.arabic: ولِما طوتِ الْغفْلةُ عنّا مِنْ تصفُّحِ الأعْتِبارِ ناشِراً
segments.transliteration: wa lima tawatil-ghaf-latu `anna min tasaf-fuhili`tibari nashira

translation.en: for the scrutiny of heedfulness rolled up in heedlessness an unroller,

segments.arabic: حتّى تُوصِل إِلى قُلُوبِنا فهْم عجائِبِهِ وزواجِر أمْثالِهِ الّتِي ضعُفتِ الْجِبالُ الرّواسِي على صلابتِها عنِ احْتِمالِهِ
segments.transliteration: hat-ta tusila ila qulubina fah-ma `aja-ibihi wa zawajira am-thalihillati da`ufatil-jibalur-rawasi `ala salabatiha `ani ah-timalih

translation.en: Such that You attach to our hearts the understanding of the Qur’an's wonders and its restraining similitudes which immovable mountains in all their solidity were too weak to carry!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household and
through the Qur’an make permanent the rightness of our outward selves,

segments.arabic: واحْجُبْ بِهِ خطراتِ الْوساوِسِ عنْ صِحّةِ ضمائِرِنا

translation.en: veil the ideas of confusing thoughts from the soundness of our innermost minds,

segments.arabic: واغْسِلْ بِهِ درن قُلُوبِنا وعلائِق أوْزارِنا
segments.transliteration: wagh-sil bihi darana qulubina wa `ala-iqa aw-zarina

translation.en: wash away the dirt of our hearts and the ties of our heavy sins,
gather our scattered affairs,

segments.arabic: وارْوِ بِهِ فِي موْقِفِ الْعرْضِ عليْك ظمأ هواجِرِنا
segments.transliteration: war-wi bihi fi maw-qifil-`ar-di `alay-ka zama hawajirina

translation.en: quench the thirst of our burning heat in the standing place of the presentation to You, and

segments.arabic: واكْسُنا بِهِ حُلل الأمانِ يوْم الْفزعِ الأكْبرِ فِي نُشُورِنا
segments.transliteration: wak-suna bihi hulalal-amani yaw-mal-fazai'l-ak-bari fi nushurina

translation.en: clothe us in the robes of security on the Day of the Greatest Terror at our uprising!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household and

segments.arabic: واجْبُرْ بِالْقُرْآنِ خلّتنا مِنْ عدمِ الإِمْلاقِ

translation.en: through the Qur’an redress our lack—our destitution in poverty—

segments.arabic: وسُقْ إِليْنا بِهِ رغد الْعيْشِ وخِصْب سعةِ الأرْزاقِ
segments.transliteration: wa suq ilay-na bihi raghadal-`ay-shi wakhis-ba sa'til-ar-zaq

translation.en: drive toward us the comforts of life and an abundance of plentiful provisions,

segments.arabic: وجنِّبْنا بِهِ الضّرائِب الْمذْمُومة ومدانِي الأخْلاقِ

translation.en: turn aside blameworthy character traits and base moral qualities, and

segments.arabic: واعْصِمْنا بِهِ مِنْ هُوّةِ الْكُفْرِ ودواعِي النِّفاقِ
segments.transliteration: wa'-sim-na bihi min hu-watil-kuf-ri wa dawae’ennifaq

translation.en: preserve us from the pit of unbelief and the motives for hypocrisy,
such that the Qur’an may be

segments.arabic: لنا فِي الْقِيامةِ إِلى رِضْوانِك وجِنانِك قائِداً
segments.transliteration: lana fil-qiamati ila rid-wanika wa jinanika qa-ida

translation.en: for us at the resurrection a leader to Your good pleasure and Your gardens,

segments.arabic: ولنا فِي الدُّنْيا عنْ سُخْطِك وتعدِّي حُدُودِك ذائِداً
segments.transliteration: wa lana fid-dunya `an sukh-tika wa ta'd-di hududika dha-ida

translation.en: for us in this world a protector against Your displeasure and transgressing Your bounds,

segments.arabic: ولِما عِنْدك بِتحْلِيلِ حلالِهِ وتحْرِيمِ حرامِهِ شاهِداً
segments.transliteration: wa lima i'ndaka bitah-lili halalihi watah-rimi haramihi shahida

translation.en: and for what is with You a witness by its declaring lawful the lawful and its declaring unlawful the unlawful!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household and

segments.arabic: وهوِّنْ بِالْقُرْآنِ عِنْد الْموْتِ على أنْفُسِنا

translation.en: through the Qur’an make easy for our souls at death
the distress of the driving,
the effort of the moaning,
and the succession of the rattling,

segments.arabic: (إِذا بلغتِ النُّفُوسُ التّراقِي وقِيل منْ راقٍ)

translation.en: “when souls reach the throats and it is said, ‘Where is the enchanter?’”

segments.arabic: وتجلّى ملكُ الْموْتِ لِقبْضِها مِنْ حُجُبِ الْغُيُوبِ

translation.en: when the angel of death discloses himself to seize them from behind the veils of unseen things,

segments.arabic: ورماها عن قوْسِ الْمنايا بِأسْهُمِ وحْشةِ الْفِراقِ
segments.transliteration: wa ramaha `an qaw-sil-manaya bi s-humi wah-shatil-firaq

translation.en: letting loose at them from the bow of destinies the arrows of the terror of lonesome separation, and

segments.arabic: وداف لها مِنْ ذُعافِ الْموْتِ كأْساً مسْمُومة الْمذاقِ
segments.transliteration: wa dafa laha min dhu`aafil-maw-ti ka-sammas-mumatal-madhaq

translation.en: mixing for them from sudden death a cup poisoned to the taste; and

segments.arabic: ودنا مِنّا إِلى الآخِرةِ رحِيلٌ وانْطِلاقٌ

translation.en: when departure and release for the hereafter come close to us,
works become collars around the necks, and

segments.arabic: وكانتِ الْقُبورُ هِي الْمأْوى إِلى مِيقاتِ يوْمِ التّلاقِ
segments.transliteration: wa kanatil-qubwru hial-ma-wa ila miqati yaw-mit-talaq

translation.en: the graves become the haven until the appointed time of the Day of Encounter!
O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وبارِكْ لنا فِي حُلُولِ دارِ الْبِلى وطُولِ الْمُقامةِ بيْن أطْباقِ الثّرى
segments.transliteration: wa barik lana fi hululi daril-bila wa tulil-muqamati bay-na at-baqith-thara

translation.en: make blessed for us the arrival at the house of decay and the drawn out residence between the layers of the earth,

segments.arabic: واجْعلِ الْقُبور بعْد فِراقِ الدُّنْيا خيْر منازِلِنا

translation.en: appoint the graves, after separation from this world, the best of our way stations,

segments.arabic: وافْسحْ لنا بِرحْمتِك فِي ضِيقِ ملاحِدِنا
segments.transliteration: waf-sah lana birah-matika fi diqi malahidina

translation.en: make roomy for us through Your mercy the narrowness of our tombs, and

segments.arabic: ولا تفْضحْنا فِي حاضِرِ الْقِيامةِ بِمُوبِقاتِ آثامِنا
segments.transliteration: wa la taf-dah-na fi hadiril-qiamati bimubiqati athamina

translation.en: disgrace us not among those present at the Resurrection through our ruinous sins!

segments.arabic: وارْحمْ بِالْقُرآنِ فِي موْقِفِ الْعرْضِ عليْك ذُلّ مقامِنا
segments.transliteration: war-ham bil-qurani fi maw-qifil-`ar-di `alay-ka dhulla maqamina

translation.en: Through the Qur’an have mercy upon the lowliness of our station at the standing place of presentation to You,

segments.arabic: وثبِّتْ بِهِ عِنْد اضْطِرابِ جِسْرِ جهنّم يوْم الْمجازِ عليْها زلل أقْدامِنا
segments.transliteration: wa thab-bit bihi i'nda ad-tirabi jis-ri jahannama yaw-mal-majazi `alay-ha zalala aq-damina

translation.en: make firm the slips of our feet during the shaking of the bridge across hell on the day of passage over it,

segments.arabic: ونوِّرْ بِهِ قبْل الْبعْثِ سُدف قُبُورِنا
segments.transliteration: wa naw-wir bihi qab-lal-ba'-thi sudafa quburina

translation.en: illuminate the darkness of our graves before the Uprising, and

segments.arabic: ونجِّنا بِهِ مِنْ كُلِّ كرْبٍ يوْم الْقِيامةِ وشدائِدِ أهْوالِ يوْمِ الطّآمّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa naj-jina bihi min kulli kar-bi-yaw-mal-qiamati wa shada-idi ah-wali yaw-mit-tammah

translation.en: deliver us from every distress on the Day of Resurrection and from the hardships of terrors on the Day of Disaster!

segments.arabic: وبيِّضْ وجُوهنا يوْم تسْودُّ وُجُوهُ الظّلمةِ فِي يوْمِ الْحسْرةِ والنّدامةِ
segments.transliteration: wa bay-yid wjuhana yaw-ma tas-wad-du wujuhuz-zalamati fi yaw-mil-has-rati wannadamah

translation.en: Whiten our faces on the day when the faces of wrongdoers are blackened during the Day of Regret and Remorse,

segments.arabic: واجْعلْ لنا فِي صُدُ رِ الْمُؤْمِنِين وُدّاً

translation.en: appoint love for us in the breasts of the faithful, and
make not life for us troublesome!

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ صلِّ على مُحمّدٍ عبْدِك ورسُولِك كما بلّغ رِسالتك
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin `ab-dika warasulika kama ballagha risalatak

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad, Your servant and Your messenger, just as He delivered Your message,
executed Your command,
and counseled Your servants!

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ اجْعلْ نبِيّنا صلواتُك عليْهِ وعلى آلِهِ يوْم الْقِيامةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma aj-`al nabi-yana salawatuka `alay-hi wa'la alihi yaw-mal-qiamati

translation.en: O Allah, on the Day of Resurrection make our Prophet (Your blessings be upon him and his Household)
the nearest of the prophets to You in seat,
the ablest of them before You with intercession,
the greatest of them with You in measure, and
the most eminent of them with You in rank!

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ صلِّ على مُحمّدٍ وآلِ مُحمّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
ennoble his edifice,
magnify his proof, make
weighty his balance,
accept his intercession,
bring near his mediation,
whiten his face,
complete his light, and
raise his degree!
Make us live according to his Sunnah,
make us die in his creed,
take us on his road,
make us travel his path,
place us among the people who obey him,
muster us in his band,
lead us to up his pool,
and give us to drink of his cup!
And bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: صلاةً تُبلِّغُهُ بِها أفْضل ما يأْمُلُ مِنْ خيْرِك وفضْلِك وكرامتِك
segments.transliteration: salatan tuballighuhu biha af-dala ma ya-mulu min khay-rika wafad-lika wakaramatik

translation.en: with a blessing through which You wilt take him to the most excellent of Your good, Your bounty, and Your generosity for which he hopes!

segments.arabic: إِنّك ذُو رحْمةٍ واسِعةٍ وفضْلٍ كرِيمٍ

translation.en: You are Possessor of boundless mercy and generous bounty.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ اجْزِهِ بِما بلّغ مِنْ رِسالاتِك

translation.en: O Allah, repay him for Your messages which he delivered,
Your signs which he passed on,
the good counsel he gave to Your servants, and
the struggle he undertook in Your way,
with the best You have repaid any of
Your angels brought nigh and
Your prophets sent out and chosen!

segments.arabic: والسّلامُ عليْه وعلى آلِهِ الطّيِّبِين الطّاهِرِين ورحْمةُ اللّهِ وبركاتُهُ

translation.en: And upon him and his Household, the good, the pure, be peace, Allah's mercy, and His blessings!

subcategory: Ramadan - Aamal and Duas of The Last 10 Night

name: Short Duas for the Days of ramadan

text.en:
It has been narrated on the authority of Ibn ‘Abbas that the Holy
Prophet (s.a.w.a.) referred to the great merits and rewards of observing
fast on each day of Ramadan. He also mentioned supplicatory prayers
that are dedicated to each of these days with the merits and rewards of
saying them. Let us hereby mention these supplicatory prayers only:
The First Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ صِيامِي فِيْهِ صِيامَ الصَّائِمِينَ ، وَقِيامِي فِيْهِ  قِيامَ القائِمِينَ ، وَنَبِّهْنِي فِيْهِ عَنْ نَوْمَةِ الغافِلِينَ ، وَهَبْ لِي جُرْمِي فِيهِ  يا ألهَ العالَمِينَ ، وَاعْفُ عَنِّي يا عافِيا عَنِ المُجْرِمِينَ.

text.en: The Second Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ قَرِّبْنِي فِيْهِ إِلى مَرْضاتِكَ ، وَجَنِّبْنِي فِيْهِ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ وَنَقِماتِكَ ، وَوَفِّقْنِي فِيْهِ لِقِرأَةِ آياتِكَ ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ يا أرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

text.en: The Third Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنِي فِيْهِ الذِّهْنَ وَالتَّنْبِيهَ ، وَباعِدْنِي فِيْهِ مِنَ السَّفاهَةِ وَالتَّمْويهِ ، وَاجْعَلْ لِي نَصِيبا مِنْ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ تُنْزِلُ فِيْهِ بِجُودِكَ ، يا أَجْوَدَ الاَجْوَدِينَ.

text.en: The Fourth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ قَوِّنِي فِيْهِ عَلئ إِقامَةِ أَمْرِكَ ، وَأَذِقْنِي فِيْهِ حَلاوَةَ ذِكْرِكَ ، وَأَوْزِعْنِي فِيْهِ لاَداءِ شُكْرِكَ بِكَرَمِكَ ، وَاحْفَظْنِي فِيْهِ  بِحِفْظِكَ وَسَترِكَ ، يا أبْصَرَ النَّاظِرِينَ.

text.en: The Fifth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي فِيْهِ مِنْ المُسْتَغْفِرِينَ ، واجْعَلْنِي فِيْهِ مِنْ عِبادِكَ الصَّالِحينَ ، واجْعَلْنِي فِيْهِ مِنْ أَوْلِيائِكَ المُقَرَّبِينَ ، بَرَأْفَتِكَ يا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

text.en: The Sixth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لاتَخْذُلْنِي فِيْهِ لِتَعَرُّضِ مَعْصِيَتِكَ ، وَلا تَضْرِبْنِي بِسِياطِ نَقْمَتِكَ ،وَزَحْزِحْنِيِ فِيْهِ مِنْ مُوجِباتِ سَخَطِكَ ، بِمَنِّكَ وَأَيادِيكَ يا مُنْتَهى رَغْبَةِ الرَّاغِبِينَ.

text.en: The Seventh Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي فِيْهِ عَلى صِيامِهِ وَقِيامِهِ ، وَجَنِّبْنِي فِيْهِ مِنْ هَفَواتِهِ وَآثامِهِ ، وَارْزُقْنِي فِيْهِ ذِكْرَكَ بِدَوامِهِ ، بِتَوْفِيقِكَ يا هادِيَ المُضِلِّينَ.

text.en: The Eighth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنِي فِيْهِ رَحْمَةَ الاَيْتامِ ، وَإِطْعامَ الطَّعامِ ، وَإِفْشاءَ السَّلامُ ، وَصُحْبَةَ الكِرامِ ، بِطَوْلِكَ يا مَلْجَأَ الامِلِينَ

text.en: The Ninth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ لِي فِيْهِ نَصِيبا مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ الواسِعَةِ ، وَاهْدِنِي فِيْهِ لِبَراهِينِكَ السَّاطِعَةِ ، وَخُذْ بِناصِيَتِي إِلى مَرْضاتِكَ الجامِعَةِ ، بِمَحَبَّتِكَ يا أَمَلَ المُشْتاقِينَ.

text.en: The Tenth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي فِيْهِ مِنْ المُتَوَكِّلِينَ عَلَيْكَ ، وَاجْعَلْنِي فِيْهِ مِنْ الفائِزِينَ لَدَيْكَ ، وَاجْعَلْنِي فِيْهِ مِنْ المُقَرَّبِينَ إِلَيْكَ ، بِإحْسانِكَ يا غايَةَ الطَّالِبِينَ.

text.en: The Eleventh Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ حَبِّبْ إلى فِيْهِ الاِحْسانَ ، وَكَرِّهْ إلى فِيْهِ الفُسُوقَ وَالعِصْيانَ ، وَحَرِّمْ عَلَيَّ فِيْهِ السَّخَطَ وَالنِّيرانَ ، بِعَوْنِكَ يا غِياثَ المُسْتَغِيثِينَ.

text.en: The Twelfth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ زَيِّنِّي فِيْهِ بِالسِّتْرِ وَالعَفافِ ، وَاسْتُرْنِي فِيْهِ بِلِباسِ القُنُوعِ وَالكَفافِ ، وَاحْمِلْنِي فِيْهِ عَلى العَدْلِ وَالاِنْصافِ ، وَآمِنِّي فِيْهِ مِنْ كُلِّ ما أَخافُ بِعِصْمَتِكَ يا عِصْمَةَ الخائِفِينَ.

text.en: The Thirteenth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ طَهِّرْنِي فِيْهِ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ وَالاَقْذارِ ، وَصَبِّرْنِي فِيْهِ عَلى كائِناتِ الاَقْدارِ ، وَوَفِّقْنِي فِيْهِ لِلتُّقى وَصُحْبَةِ الاَبْرارِ ، بِعَوْنِكَ يا قُرَّةَ عَيْنِ المَساكِينِ.

text.en: The Fourteenth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لا تؤاخِذْنِي فِيْهِ بِالعَثَراتِ ، وَأَقِلْنِي فِيْهِ مِنَ الخَطايا وَالهَفَواتِ ، وَلا تَجْعَلْنِي فِيْهِ غَرَضا لِلْبَلايا وَالآفاتِ ، بِعِزَّتِكَ يا عِزَّ المُسْلِمِينَ.

text.en: The Fifteenth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنِي فِيْهِ طاعَةَ الخاشِعِينَ ، وَاشْرَحْ فِيْهِ صَدْرِي بِإنابَةِ المُخْبِتِينَ ، بِأَمانِكَ يا أَمانَ الخائِفِينَ.

text.en: The Sixteenth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَفِّقْنِي فِيْهِ لِمُوافَقَةِ الاَبْرارِ ، وَجَنِّبْنِي فِيهِ مُرافَقَةَ الاَشْرارِ ، وَآوِنِي فِيْهِ بِرَحْمَتِكَ إِلى دارِ [١] القَرارِ ، بِإِلهِيَّتِكَ يا ألهَ العالَمِينَ.

text.en: The Seventeenth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيْهِ لِصالِحِ الاَعْمالِ ، وَاقْضِ لِي فِيْهِ الحَوائِجَ وَالامالِ يا مَنْ لا يَحْتاجُ إِلى التَّفْسِيرِ وَالسُّؤالِ ، يا عالِماً بِما فِي صُدُورِ العالَمِينَ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ الطِّاهِرِينَ

text.en: The Eighteenth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ نَبِّهْنِي فِيْهِ لِبَرَكاتِ أَسْحارِهِ ، وَنَوِّرْ فِيْهِ قَلْبِي بِضِياءِ أَنْوارِهِ ، وَخُذْ بِكُلِّ أَعْضائِي إِلى اتِّباعِ آثارِهِ ، بِنُورِكَ يا مُنِّورَ قُلُوبِ العارِفِين.

text.en: The Nineteenth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَفِّرْ فِيْهِ حَظِّي مِنْ بَرَكاتِهِ ، وَسَهِّلْ سَبِيلِي إِلى خَيْراتِهِ ، وَلا تَحْرِمْنِي قَبُولَ حَسَناتِهِ ، يا هادِيا إِلى الحَقِّ المُبِينِ.

text.en: The Twentieth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي فِيْهِ أَبْوابَ الجِنانِ ، وَأَغْلِقْ عَنِّي فِيْهِ أَبْوابَ النِّيْرانِ ، وَوَفِّقْنِي فِيْهِ لِتِلاوَةِ القُرْآنِ ، يا مُنْزِلَ السَّكِينَةِ فِي قُلُوبِ المُؤْمِنِينَ.

text.en: The Twenty-First Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ لِي فِيْهِ إِلى مَرْضاتِكَ دَلِيلا ، وَلا تَجْعَلْ لِلْشَّيْطانِ فِيْهِ عَلَيَّ سَبِيلاً وَاجْعَلْ الجَنَّةَ لِي مَنْزِلاً وَمَقِيلاً ، يا قاضِيَ حَوائِج الطَّالِبِينَ.

text.en: The Twenty-Second Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي فِيْهِ أَبْوابَ فَضْلِكَ ، وَأَنْزِلْ عَلَيَّ فِيْهِ بَرَكاتِكَ ، وَوَفِّقْنِي فِيْهِ لِمُوجِباتِ مَرْضاتِكَ ، وَأَسْكِنِّي فِيْهِ بَحْبُوحاتِ جَنَّاتِكَ ، يا مُجِيبَ دَعْوَةِ المُضْطَرِّينَ.

text.en: The Twenty-Third Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْسِلْنِي فِيْهِ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ ، وَطَهِّرْنِي فِيْهِ مِنَ العُيُوبِ ، وَامْتَحِنْ قَلْبِي فِيْهِ بِتَقْوى القُلُوبِ ، يا مُقِيلَ عَثَراتِ المُذْنِبِينَ.

text.en: The Twenty-Fourth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ فِيْهِ ما يُرْضِيكَ ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِمّا يُؤْذِيكَ ،وَأَسْأَلُكَ التَّوْفِيقَ فِيْهِ لاَنْ اُطِيعَكَ وَلا أَعْصِيكَ ، يا جَوادَ السَّائِلِينَ.

text.en: The Twenty-Fifth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي فِيْهِ مُحِبّا لاَوْلِيآئِكَ ، وَمُعادِيا لاَعْدائِكَ ، مُسْتَنّا بِسُنَّةِ خاتَمِ أَنْبِيائِكَ ، يا عاصِمَ قُلُوبِ النَّبِيِّينَ.

text.en: The Twenty-Sixth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ سَعْيِي فِيْهِ مَشْكُوراً ، وَذَنْبِي فِيْهِ مَغْفُوراً ، وَعَمَلِي فِيْهِ مَقْبُولاً ، وَعَيْبِي فِيْهِ مَسْتُوراً ، يا أسْمَعَ السَّامِعِينَ.

text.en: The Twenty-Seventh Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنِي فِيْهِ فَضْلَ لَيْلَةِ القَدْرِ ، وَصَيِّرْ اُمُورِي فِيْهِ مِنَ العُسْرِ إِلى اليُسْرِ ، وَاقْبَلْ مَعاذِيرِي ، وَحُطَّ عَنِّي الذَّنْبَ وَالوِزْرَ ، يا رَؤُوفاً بِعِبادِهِ الصَّالِحِينَ.

text.en: The Twenty-Eighth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَفِّرْ حَظِّي فِيْهِ مِنَ النَّوافِلِ ، وَأَكْرِمْنِي فِيْهِ بِإِحْضارِ المَسائِلِ ، وَقَرِّبْ فِيْهِ [١] وَسِيلَتِي إِليكَ مِنْ بَيْنِ الوَسائِلِ ، يا مَنْ لا يَشْغَلُهُ إِلْحاحُ المُلِحِّينَ.

text.en: The Twenty-Ninth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ غَشِّنِّي فِيْهِ بِالرَّحْمَةِ ، وَارْزُقْنِي فِيْهِ التَّوْفِيقَ وَالعِصْمَةَ وَطَهِّرْ قَلْبِي مِنْ غَياهِبِ التُّهْمَةِ ، يا رَحِيماً بِعِبادِهِ المُؤْمِنِينَ.

text.en: The Thirtieth Day Supplication

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ صِيامِي فِيْهِ بِالشُّكْرِ وَالقَبُولِ عَلى ما تَرْضاهُ وَيَرْضاهُ الرَّسُولُ مُحْكَمَةً فُرُوعَهُ بِالاُصُولِ ، بِحَقِّ سَيِّدِنا مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ ، وَالحَمْدُ للهِ رَبِّ العالَمِين.

text.en:
Books of supplicatory prayers have disagreed about the order of
some supplicatory prayers and acts of worship. To me, I do not render
such narrations considerable; therefore, I have not referred to them.
For instance, al-Kaf’ami has mentioned the twenty-seventh day
supplicatory to be said on the twenty-ninth of Ramadan. It is not
improbable to say the supplicatory prayer on the twenty-third of
Ramadan, according to the doctrine of Shi’ism.

First: It is recommended to postpone breaking one’s fast later than
the Isha’ Prayer unless one is too weak to keep fasting or one is being
waited by people to break the fasting altogether, in an invitation for
example.

Second: It is recommended to begin breaking the fast with utterly
legally gotten food, especially dates. This act doubles the reward of
the prayer to four hundred folds. It is also advisable to break the fast
with dates, ripe dates, candy, sugar-candy, and warm water.

Third: It is recommended to say the familiar supplicatory prayers of
breaking the fast, such as the following:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ صُمْتُ وَ عَلَى رِزْقِكَ أَفْطَرْتُ وَ عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ
segments.transliteration: Allaahumma Laka S'umtu Wa A'laa Rizqika Aft'artuwa A'layka Tawawkkaltu

translation.en: O my Allah, for Thee, I fast, and with the food Thou gives me I break the fast, and I rely on Thee.

text.en:
One who says this supplicatory prayer will be awarded, by
Almighty Allah, the rewards of all those who observe fasting on that
day.

Sayyid ibn Tawus in (iqbal) and al-Kaf’ami have narrated the supplicatory
prayer that begins with:
This supplicatory prayer also brings about a great merit.

It has been narrated that Imam Ali(a.s.) used to say the following
supplicatory prayer when he would break his fasting:

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ صُمْنَا وَ عَلَى رِزْقِكَ أَفْطَرْنَا فَتَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
segments.transliteration: Bismillah Alaahumma Laka S'umnaa Wa A'laa Rizqika Aft'arnaa Fa—Taqabbal Minnaa Innaka Antas Samee—U'l'a'leem

translation.en: In the name of Allah, O Allah, we fast, and with the food Thou gives us we break the fast, an obligation we fulfill, and Thou art Hearer, Knower

text.en:
Fourth: It is recommended to say the following imploration for
forgiveness at the first bite of the food with which the fasting is
broken:

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ الله الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِ يا واسِعَ المَغْفِرَةِ اغْفِرْ لِي
segments.transliteration: Bismillahir Rah'maanir Rah'eem Yaa Waasi—A'l Maghfirati Igfir Lee

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficient, the Merciful, O He whose indulgence is boundless, forgive me

text.en:
Forgiveness of Almighty Allah is the reward of those who say this
imploration.

A Hadith reads: Almighty Allah releases from Hellfire one million
persons at the last hour of every day in Ramadan; therefore, pray Him
to include you with these released ones.

Fifth: It is recommended to recite Surah <ref=1:97>al-Qadr</ref> at breaking the
fast.

Sixth: It is recommended to give alms at the time of breaking the
fast and to offer food to the other fasters even if with a single date and
a drink of water. oncerning this, the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) is
reported to have said, “Verily, anyone who offers food for a faster in
Ramadan will have the same reward that is decided for the faster
without having any amount of his reward reduced and will have the same reward of acting good deeds according to the power of that
food.”

Allamah al-Hilli, in al-Risalah al-Sa’diyyah, has narrated that
Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq(a.s.) said, “As for any believer who feeds
another believer with a single bite of food in Ramadan, Almighty
Allah will decide for him the reward of manumitting thirty believing
slaves and will decide to respond to his prayers.”

name: 11th of dhul-qa'dah: Birth of Imam Ali Ridha (as)

text.en: RITES TO BE PERFORMED BEFORE ZIYARAH OF IMAM RIDHA (PEACE BE UPON HIM)
When you intend to visit Imam al-Rida (peace be upon him) in Tus, you may bathe yourself before you leave your house (at your hometown) and say the following words:

translation.en: O Allah, (please) cleanse me, cleanse my heart,
expand my breast,

segments.arabic: وَأَجْرِ عَلَىٰ لِسَانِي مِدْحَتَكَ وَٱلثَّنَاءَ عَلَيْكَ

translation.en: and let Your praise and eulogy flow out from my tongue;

segments.arabic: فإِنَّهُ لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'innahu la hawla wa la quwwata illa bika

translation.en: since indeed there is neither might nor power except with You.

segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`alhu li tahuran wa shifa'an

translation.en: O Allah, (please) establish it as a means of cleansing and healing for me.

text.en: Say the following supplicatory words as you leave your house:

translation.en: In the name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
In the Name of Allah (I begin), in Allah (I trust),

segments.arabic: وَإِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَىٰ ٱبْنِ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ila allahi wa ila ibni rasuli allahi

translation.en: to Allah and towards the son of Allah’s Messenger (I trun my face).
Allah is Sufficient unto me and on Allah do I rely.

segments.transliteration: allahumma ilayka tawajjahtu wa ilayka qasadtu

translation.en: O Allah, I have set out to You, directed toward You,
and desired for what You have in possession.

text.en: When you go out of your house, you may stop at the door and say the following supplicatory words:

translation.en: O Allah, to You am I turning my face

segments.arabic: وَعَلَيْكَ خَلَّفْتُ أَهْلِي وَمَالِي وَمَا خَوَّلْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa `alayka khallaftu ahli wa mali wa ma khawwaltani

translation.en: and with You do I keep my family members, my property, and everything with which You have allowed me to behave.
I have trusted in You; so, do not disappoint me.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يُخَيِّبُ مَنْ أَرَادَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yukhayyibu man aradahu

translation.en: O He Who saves those who trust in Him from disappointment
and He Who does not give up those whom He safeguards.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and guard me under Your custody,
since nothing that You guard may be ruined.

text.en: When you arrive there safely, Allah willing, and you intend to visit the Imam (peace be upon him), you may bathe yourself and say the following words meanwhile:

segments.transliteration: allahumma tahhirni wa tahhir li qalbi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) cleanse me, cleanse my heart for me,
expand my breast,

segments.arabic: وَأَجْرِ عَلَىٰ لِسَانِي مِدْحَتَكَ وَمَحَبَّتَكَ وَٱلثَّنَاءَ عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ajri `ala lisani midhatika wa mahabbataka walththana'a `alayka

translation.en: and let Your praise, eulogy, and love flow out from my tongue;
since indeed there is no power except with You.
I know for sure that the basis of my faith
is to submit to Your decree, to keep to the traditions of Your Prophet,
and to bear witness to all Your creatures.

segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`alhu li shifa'an wa nuran

translation.en: O Allah, (please) make it curative and light for me.
You verily have power over all things.

text.en: FIRST FORM OF ZIYARAH
This form of ziyarah, according to Shaykh al-Saduq’s book of man-la-yahduruhul-faqih, is as follows:
You may put on the purest and cleanest of your clothes, walk barefooted with tranquility and submission, and mention Almighty Allah in your heart, repeating the following statements:

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great.
There is no god save Allah.
All glory be to Allah.
All praise be to Allah.

text.en: While entering the sacred shrine, you may say the following words:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin), in Allah (I trust),
and the course of Allah’s Messenger (I follow),
peace be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah,
One and Only God and having no partner.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna muhammadan `abduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: And I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger
and `Ali is Allah’s most intimate servant.

text.en: You may then walk towards the tomb to stop there, face it, and say the following words:

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah,
One and Only God and having no partner.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna muhammadan `abduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: And I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger,
the chief of the past and the coming generations,
and the chief of the Prophets and Messengers.
O Allah, (please) bless Muhammad,
Your servant, messenger, prophet,
and the chief of all Your creatures,

segments.arabic: صَلاَةً لاَ يَقْوَىٰ عَلَىٰ إِحْصَائِهَا غَيْرُكَ

translation.en: with such blessings that none can calculate save You.
O Allah, (please) bless the Commander of the Faithful
`Ali the son of Abi-Talib,
Your servant and the brother of Your Messenger,
whom You have selected on the basis of Your knowledge

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَهُ هَادِياً لِمَنْ شِئْتَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ja`altahu hadiyan liman shi'ta min khalqika

translation.en: and thus made lead (to the truth) whomever You willed amongst Your creatures
and made the guide to those whom You sent with Your messages,
the establisher of the true religion owing to Your justice,
the decisive judge among Your creatures,
and the prevalent over all that.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayhi wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him.
O Allah, (please) send blessings on Fatimah
the daughter of Your Prophet,
the wife of Your friend,
the mother of the two grandsons al-Hasan and al-Husayn
the two chiefs of the youth of Paradise;
(she is) the genuinely pure, the immaculate, the purified,
the pious, the perfect, the pleased, the pristine,
and the doyenne of all the women of Paradise,

segments.arabic: صَلاَةً لاَ يَقْوَىٰ عَلَىٰ إِحْصَائِهَا غَيْرُكَ

translation.en: (bless her) with such blessings that none can count except You.
O Allah, (please) send blessings upon al-Hasan and al-Husayn,
the two grandsons of Your Prophet,
the two chiefs of the youth of Paradise,
the two who establish authority among Your creatures,
who guide to those whom You sent with Your messages,
who manage the religious affairs on the basis of Your justice,
and who judge on the basis of Your decrees among Your creatures.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon `Ali the son of al-Husayn,
Your servant who undertakes Your mission among Your creatures,
who guides to those whom You sent with Your messages,
who manages the religious affairs on the basis of Your justice,
who judges according to Your decrees among Your creatures,
and who is the prime of all worshippers.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings on Muhammad the son of `Ali,
Your servant and Your representative in Your lands,
who split asunder the knowledge of the Prophets.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلصَّادِقِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala ja`fari bni muhammadin alssadiqi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Ja`far the son of Muhammad,
Your servant, the authority of Your religion,
Your argument against all of Your creatures,
the veracious, and the dutiful.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Musa the son of Ja`far,
Your righteous servant,
Your spokesman among Your creatures,
who speaks with Your judgment,
and who is the argument against Your created beings.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَليِّ بْنِ مُوسَىٰ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon `Ali the son of Musa,
the cordial, the well-pleased,
the servant of You, the authority of Your religion,
who undertakes the mission with Your justice,

segments.arabic: وَٱلدَّاعِي إِلَىٰ دِينِكَ وَدِينِ آبَائِهِ ٱلصَّادِقِينَ
segments.transliteration: waldda`i ila dinika wa dini aba'ihi alssadiqina

translation.en: who calls to the religion of You and of his veracious fathers;

segments.arabic: صَلاَةً لاََ يَقْوَىٰ عَلَىٰ إِحْصَائِهَا غَيْرُكَ

translation.en: (bless him) with such blessings that none can count except You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad the son of `Ali,
Your servant, Your authority,
who undertakes the mission by Your command
and calls to Your path.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَليِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessing upon `Ali the son of Muhammad,
Your servant and the authority of Your religion.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon al-Hasan the son of `Ali
who carries out Your commands,
who undertakes the mission among Your creatures,
Your argument who acts on behalf of Your Prophet,
Your witness on Your creatures,
the exclusively endued with Your honor,

segments.transliteration: aldda`i ila ta`atika wa ta`ati rasulika

translation.en: and the caller to the obedience to You and to Your Messenger.
Your blessings be upon them all.
O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Your argument and authority
who undertakes the mission among Your creatures
with such blessing that is perfect, ever-increasing, and everlasting
due to which You may hasten his Relief,
grant him victory,

segments.transliteration: wa taj`aluna ma`ahu fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: and include us with him in this world and the Hereafter.
O Allah, I am seeking nearness to You through bearing love for them,
and I am loyal to their loyalists and enemy of their enemies.
So (please) provide me in their names the goodness of this world and the Hereafter

segments.arabic: وَٱصْرِفْ عَنِّي بِهِمْ شَرَّ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ

translation.en: and fend off from me the evils of this world and the Hereafter
as well as the horrors of the Resurrection Day.

text.en: You may then sit to the side of the Imam’s head and say the following words:

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s friend.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s argument.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُورَ ٱللَّهِ فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya nura allahi fi zulumati al-ardi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s light in the darkness of the earth.
Peace be upon you, O pillar of the religion.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha adama safwati allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Adam the choice of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha nuhin nabiyyi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Noah the prophet of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha ibrahima khalili allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Abraham the intimate friend of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِسْمَاعيلَ ذَبيحِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha isma`ila dhabihi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Ishmael the slain for the sake of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ كَلِيمِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha musa kalimi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Moses the spoken by Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيسَىٰ رُوحِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Jesus the spirit of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha muhammadin rasuli allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Muhammad the messenger of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of the Commander of the Faithful
`Ali the authority of Allah
and the successor of the Messenger of the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Fatimah the luminous lady.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ ٱلْحَسَنِ وَٱلْحُسَيْنِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of al-Hasan and al-Husayn
the two chiefs of the youth of Paradise.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عَليِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ زَيْنِ ٱلْعَابِدِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha `aliyyi bni alhusayni zayni al`abidina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of `Ali the son of al-Husayn the adornment of the worshippers.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Muhammad the son of `Ali
the splitter of the knowledge of the past and the last generations.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha ja`fari bni muhammadin

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Ja`far the son of Muhammad
the veracious and dutiful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha musa bni ja`farin

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Musa the son of Ja`far.
Peace be upon you, O ever-truthful and martyr.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْوَصِيُّ ٱلْبَارُّ ٱلتَّقِيُّ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O dutiful and pious successor.
I bear witness that you performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rate (and alms),
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,

segments.arabic: وَعَبَدْتَ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصاً حَتَّىٰ أَتَاكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
segments.transliteration: wa `abadta allaha mukhlisan hatta ataka alyaqinu

translation.en: and serve Allah sincerely until death came upon you.
Peace be upon you, O Abu’l-Hasan.
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

text.en: You may then throw yourself on the tomb and say the following supplicatory prayer:

translation.en: O Allah, for Your sake alone have I set out from my homeland
and covered many countries in the hope of winning Your mercy;

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تُخَيِّبْنِي وَلاَ تَرُدَّنِي بِغَيْرِ قَضَاءِ حَاجَتِي
segments.transliteration: fala tukhayyibni wa la taruddani bighayri qada'i hajati

translation.en: so, (please) do not disappoint me and do not make me return without having my needs settled (by You),

segments.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْ تَقَلُّبِي عَلَىٰ قَبْرِ ٱبْنِ أَخِي رَسُولِكَ
segments.transliteration: warham taqallubi `ala qabri ibni akhi rasulika

translation.en: and have mercy upon my turning over on the tomb of the son of Your Prophet’ brother,
Your blessings be upon him and his Household.

segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi ya mawlaya

translation.en: May my father and mother be ransoms for you, O my master.
I have come to you visiting and getting to you,
seeking protection against all that which I have committed against myself
and overburdened my back with.
So, (please) be my intercessor with Allah
on the day of my poverty and neediness,
for you enjoy with Allah a praiseworthy position
and you are worthy of regard with Him.

text.en: You may then raise your right hand towards the sky, stretch out your left hand on the tomb, and say the following supplicatory prayer:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِحُبِّهِمْ وَبِوِلاَيَتِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ataqarrabu ilayka bihubbihim wa biwilayatihim

translation.en: O Allah, I do seek nearness to You through bearing love for them and being loyal to them;

segments.arabic: أَتَوَلَّىٰ آخِرَهُمْ بِمَا تَوَلَّيْتُ بِهِ أَوَّلَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: atawalla akhirahum bima tawallaytu bihi awwalahum

translation.en: I am loyal to the last of them in the same way as I am loyal to the first

segments.transliteration: wa abra'u min kulli walijatin dunahum

translation.en: and I repudiate any adherence to any one other than them.
O Allah, pour curses on those who have altered Your bounty,
suspected Your Prophet,
denied Your signs,
scoffed at Your Imam,

segments.arabic: وَحَمَلُوٱ ٱلنَّاسَ عَلَىٰ أَكْتَافِ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa hamalu alnnasa `ala aktafi ali muhammadin

translation.en: and placed the burden of the people upon the shoulders of Muhammad’s Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِٱلْلَّعْنَةِ عَلَيْهِمْ

translation.en: O Allah, I do seek nearness to You through invoking curse on these peoples (i.e. the enemies of the Holy Prophet’s Household)

segments.arabic: وَٱلْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْهُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ يَا رَحْمٰنُ
segments.transliteration: walbara'ati minhum fi alddunya wal-akhirati ya rahmanu

translation.en: and disavowing them in this world and the Hereafter, O All-beneficent Lord.

text.en: You may turn to the side of the Imam’s feet and say the following words:

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا ٱلْحَسَنِ

translation.en: Allah’s blessings be upon you, O Abu’l-Hasan.
Allah’s blessings be upon your soul and body.
You did act patiently and you are veracious and believed.

segments.arabic: قَتَلَ ٱللَّهُ مَنْ قَتَلَكَ بِٱلأَيْدِي وَٱلأَلْسُنِ
segments.transliteration: qatala allahu man qatalaka bil-aydi wal-alsuni

translation.en: May Allah kill those who killed you with hands and tongues.

text.en: Then supplicate fervently pronouncing la'nah (anathema) on the killers of Ameerul Momineen, Imam Hasan, Imam Hussain (peace be upon them) and those who shed the blood of the family of the Prophet (peace and blessings upon him and his family).

It is worth mentioning that invocation of Almighty Allah’s curse on the enemies of the Holy Imams can be said in any language or form. However, the most appropriate form may be the following, which is quoted from some validly reported supplications:

translation.en: O Allah, pour curses on the slayers of the Commander of the Faithful,
the slayers of al-Hasan and al-Husayn, peace be upon them,
and the slayers of the members of Your Prophet’s Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعَنْ أَعْدَاءَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَقَتَلَتَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma il`an a`da'a ali muhammadin wa qatalatahum

translation.en: O Allah, curse the enemies and slayers of Muhammad’s family members,
add up chastisement to the chastisement that You decide for them,
add up humility to the humility that You decide for them,
add up disgrace to the disgrace that You decide for them,
and add up ignominy to the ignominy that You decide for them.
O Allah, thrust them into Hellfire with disdainful thrusting,
cast them down in the painful torment of You with violent casting,

segments.transliteration: wahshurhm wa atba`ahum ila jahannama zumaran

translation.en: and drive them and their followers to Hell in groups.

text.en:
You may then return to the side of the Imam’s head and offer a two-unit prayer in which you may recite Surah <ref=1:36>Yasin</ref>
 after Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 in one unit and Surah <ref=1:55>al-Rahman</ref>
 after Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 in the other.
You may also pray and implore Almighty Allah as earnestly as possible.
You may also pray for yourself, your parents, and your brothers and sisters-in-faith as much as you can.
You may stay at the side of the Imam’s head as long as you wish, offering all your prayers there.
DUA (SUPPLICATION) AFTER ZIYARAH OF IMAM RIDHA (PEACE BE UPON HIM)

In the book of Tuhfat al-Za'ir, Shaykh al-Mufid states that it is recommended to say the following supplicatory prayer after accomplishing the prayer of visiting Imam al-Rida’s (peace be upon him) tomb:

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You, O Allah
Who is permanent in His kingdom,
self-subsisting in His almightiness,
obeyed in His authority,
unique in His pride,
one and only in the perpetuity of His intransience,
fair with His creatures,
knowing of His issue,
and noble in delaying His punishment.
O my God, my requests are aimed at You
and my hopes are addressed to You exclusively.

segments.transliteration: wa kulla ma waffaqtani min khayrin

translation.en: As to all items of goodness that You have granted me the success to attain,
it is You Who is my guide to them and my path towards them.
O Omnipotent Who cannot be thwarted by requests!

segments.arabic: يَا مَلِيّاً يَلْجَأُ إِلَيْهِ كُلُّ رَاغِبٍ
segments.transliteration: ya maliyyan yalja'u ilayhi kullu raghibin

translation.en: O All-encompassing to Whom desirous ones resort!
I have been always endued with bounties from You
and accustomed to receive conferrals and generosity from You.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِٱلْقُدْرَةِ ٱلنَّافِذَةِ فِي جَمِيعِ ٱلأَشْيَاءِ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bilqudrati alnnafidhati fi jami`i al-ashya'i

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the omnipotence to which all things are applicable,

segments.arabic: وَقَضَائِكَ ٱلْمُبْرَمِ ٱلَّذِي تَحْجُبُهُ بِأَيْسَرِ ٱلدُّعَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa qada'ika almubrami alladhi tahjubuhu bi-aysari alddu`a'i

translation.en: in the name of Your unstoppable decree that You may stop by the simplest entreaty,

segments.arabic: وَبِٱلنَّظْرَةِ ٱلَّتِي نَظَرْتَ بِهَا إِلَىٰ ٱلْجِبَالِ فَتَشَامَخَتْ
segments.transliteration: wa bilnnazrati allati nazarta biha ila aljibali fatashamakhat

translation.en: and in the name of the look with which You looked at the mountains and they thus towered,
at the layers of the earth and they thus flattened,
at the heavens and they thus rose,
and at the seas and they thus gushed;

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ جَلَّ عَنْ أَدَوَاتِ لَحَظَاتِ ٱلْبَشَرِ
segments.transliteration: ya man jalla `an adawati lahazati albashari

translation.en: O He Who is too Majestic to have the human beings’ organs of sight
and Who is too Subtle to be comprehended by the finest line of thinking.

segments.arabic: لاََ تُحْمَدُ يَا سَيِّدِي إِلاَّ بِتَوْفيقٍ مِنْكَ يَقْتَضِي حَمْداً
segments.transliteration: la tuhmadu ya sayyidi illa bitawfiqin minka yaqtadi hamdan

translation.en: Whenever You, O my master, are praised, this is due to a bestowal of success that You grant and that requires (us) to praise You for it.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُشْكَرُ عَلَىٰ أَصْغَرِ مِنَّةٍ إِلاَّ ٱسْتَوْجَبْتَ بِهَا شُكْراً
segments.transliteration: wa la tushkaru `ala asghari minnatin illa istawjabta biha shukran

translation.en: Whenever You are thanked for the least of Your favors, this requires (us) to thank You for this thanking of ours for You.
Then, at what time can Your bounties be calculated, O my God,
or can Your errands be recompensed, O my Lord,
or can Your favors be paid off, O my Master?
It is one of Your bounties that praisers praise You
and it is one of Your thankworthy acts that thanksgivers thank You.
You are also the trusted for pardoning sins,
the One Who stretches the wing of Your covering on the wrongdoers,
and the One Who relieves from harm with Your Hand.

segments.arabic: فَكَمْ مِنْ سَيِّئَةٍ أَخْفَاهَا حِلْمُكَ حَتَّىٰ دَخِلَتْ
segments.transliteration: fakam min sayyi'atin akhfaha hilmuka hatta dakhilat

translation.en: Too many have been the sins that Your forbearance concealed until they became hidden

segments.arabic: وَحَسَنَةٍ ضَاعَفَهَا فَضْلُكَ حَتَّىٰ عَظُمَتْ عَلَيْهَا مُجَازَاتُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa hasanatin da`afaha fadluka hatta `azumat `alayha mujazatuka

translation.en: and too many are the good deeds that Your favoring multiplied until Your reward for them became massive.

segments.arabic: جَلَلْتَ أَنْ يُخَافَ مِنْكَ إِلاَّ ٱلْعَدْلُ
segments.transliteration: jalalta an yukhafa minka illa al`adlu

translation.en: You are too Majestic for us to anticipate anything from You save justice

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يُرْجَىٰ مِنْكَ إِلاَّ ٱلإِحْسَانُ وَٱلْفَضْلُ
segments.transliteration: wa an yurja minka illa al-ihsanu walfadlu

translation.en: and to desire for anything from You save good turn and favoring.
So, (please) endue me with the favors that are incumbent upon You on the basis of Your graciousness

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَخْذُلْنِي بِمَا يَحْكُمُ بِهِ عَدْلُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la takhdhulni bima yahkumu bihi `adluka

translation.en: and do not disappoint me of that which is required by Your justice.

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي لَوْ عَلِمَتِ ٱلأَرْضُ بِذُنُوبِي لَسَاخَتْ بِي
segments.transliteration: sayyidi law `alimat al-ardu bidhunubi lasakhat bi

translation.en: My Master, if the earth knew about my sins, it would swallow me;
if mountains knew about them, they would collapse on me;
if heavens knew about them, they would snatch me;
and if oceans knew about them, they would down me!
My Master! My Master! My Master!
My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!
Frequent has been my standing up in Your hospitability;

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَحْرِمْنِي مَا وَعَدْتَ ٱلْمُتَعَرِّضِينَ لِمَسْأَلَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: fala tahrimni ma wa`adta almuta`arridina limas'alatika

translation.en: so, (please) do not deprive me of that which You have promised those who present themselves for praying You.
O Well-known by the cognitive ones!
O Served by the worshippers!
O Thanked by the thanksgivers!
O Present in the sessions of the mindful ones!
O Praised by the praisers of Him!
O Nearby to those who seek for Him!
O Described by those who profess His Oneness!
O Dearest of those who love Him!
O Aide of those who require Him!
O Purpose of those who turn to Him frequently!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْغَيْبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya man la ya`lamu alghayba illa huwa

translation.en: O He save Whom none knows the hidden!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يَصْرِفُ ٱلسُّوءَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yasrifu alssu'a illa huwa

translation.en: O He save Whom none fends off evil!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يُدَبِّرُ ٱلأَمْرَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yudabbiru al-amra illa huwa

translation.en: O He save Whom none manages the affairs!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذَّنْبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yaghfiru aldhdhanba illa huwa

translation.en: O He save Whom none forgives sins!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يَخْلُقُ ٱلْخَلْقَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yakhluqu alkhalqa illa huwa

translation.en: O He save Whom none creates the created beings!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يُنَزِّلُ ٱلْغَيْثَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yunazzilu alghaytha illa huwa

translation.en: O He save Whom none brings down rain!
Pour down blessings upon Muhammad and Muhammad’s Household
and forgive me, O best of all forgivers.
O my Lord, I do implore for Your forgiveness timidly.
I implore for Your forgiveness hopefully.
I implore for Your forgiveness turning to You frequently.
I implore for Your forgiveness desiring for You.
I implore for Your forgiveness, fearing You.
I implore for Your forgiveness obediently.
I implore for Your forgiveness having faith in You.
I implore for Your forgiveness professing of You.
I implore for Your forgiveness sincerely.
I implore for Your forgiveness piously.
I implore for Your forgiveness, having full trust in You.
I implore for Your forgiveness, showing submission to You.
I implore for Your forgiveness, dedicating all my acts to You
and fleeing from You towards You.
So, (please) pour down blessings upon Muhammad and Muhammad’s Household
and accept my and my parents’ repentance

segments.arabic: بِمَا تُبْتَ وَتَتُوبُ عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: bima tubta wa tatubu `ala jami`i khalqika

translation.en: through the means by which You did and will accept the repentance of all Your creatures.
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!
O He Who is called the All-forgiving, the All-merciful.
O He Who is called the All-forgiving, the All-merciful.
O He Who is called the All-forgiving, the All-merciful.
Pour down blessings upon Muhammad and Muhammad’s Household,
accept my repentance,
purify my deed,
appreciate my efforts,
have mercy upon my imploration,
do not interdict my voice,
and do not frustrate my prayers.
O Aide of those who seek aid!

segments.transliteration: wa abligh a'immati salami wa du`a'i

translation.en: And (please) convey my salutations and my prayers to my Leaders,

segments.transliteration: wa shaffi`hum fi jami`i ma sa'altuka

translation.en: accept their intercession for me with You in all of that which I have asked You for,

segments.arabic: وَأَوْصِلْ هَدِيَّتِي إِلَيْهِمِ كَمَا يَنْبَغي لَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa awsil hadiyyati ilayhim kama yanbaghi lahum

translation.en: deliver my present to them in a way befitting their status,

segments.arabic: وَزِدْهُمْ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ مَا يَنْبَغِي لَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa zid-hum min dhalika ma yanbaghi laka

translation.en: and multiply that for them in a way befitting You
with such folds that cannot be counted by anyone other than You.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah the All-High and All-great.
May Allah bless the purest of the Messengers
Muhammad and his Immaculate Household.

text.en: SECOND ZIYAARAT OF IMAM REZA (A.S.)

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِلَيْكَ اَخْرُجُ وَ اِلَيْكَ اَتَوَجَّهُ وَ بِكَ آمَنْتُ وَ عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَ بِكَ اسْتَعَنْتُ وَ اِلٰى مَشَاهِدِ اَوْلِيَآئِكَ وَ اَصْفِيَآئِكَ قَصَدْتُ وَ اِلَيْكَ رَغِبْتُ فَصَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدِۨ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ وَ بَلِّغْنِيْ اَمَلِيْ وَ رَجَآئِيْ فِيْ زِيَارَتِيْ اِيَّاهُمْ وَ قَصْدِيْ اِلَيْهِمْ فِيْ خَيْرٍ وَ عَافِيَةٍ وَ سِتْرٍ وَ سَلَامَةٍ وَ اَمْنٍ وَ كِفَايَةٍ وَ رُدَّنِيْ مَقْبُوْلًا مَبْرُوْرًا مَاْجُوْرًا مَوْفُوْرًا سَعِيْدًا غَانِمًا وَ ارْزُقْنِي الْعَوْدَ اَللّٰهُمَّ مَا اَبْقَيْتَنِيْ فَلَا تَجْعَلْهُ اٰخِرَ الْعَهْدِ لِزِيَارَةِ مَشَاهِدِهِمْ وَ مَعَارِجِهِمْ اِنَّكَ اَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ.‏
segments.transliteration: allaahumma elayka akhrojo wa elayka atawajjaho wa beka aamanto wa a’layka tawakkalto wa bekas ta-a’nto wa elaa mashaa-hede awleyaaa-eka wa as-feyaaa-eka qasad-to wa elayka raghibto fa-salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadenit taahereena wa balligh-nee amalee wa rajaaa-ee feezeyaaratee iyyaahum wa qasdee elayhim fee khayrin wa a’afeyatin wa sitrin wa salaamatin wa amnin wa kefaayatin wa ruddanee maqboolan mabrooran maajooran mawfooran sa-e’edan ghaaneman war zuqnil a’wda allaahumma maa abqaytanee falaa taj-a’lho aakheral a’hde le-zeyaarate mashaaa-hedehim wa ma-a’arejehim innaka arhamur raahemeen.

translation.en: O Allah! I leave towards You, and to You I turn my face, and I believe in You, and upon You I put my trust, and from You I pray for aid, and towards the shrines of Your vicegerents and Your choosen ones I have moved, and towards You I desire earnestly, then send blessings upon Muhammad and the pure progeny of Muhammad, and help me attain my hope, and make me attain my desire in my visitation to them, and my intention to them in goodness and welfare, and protection, and safety, and security, and adequacy, and return me with accepted (ziyaarat), approved, renumerated, abundant, happy, gaining, and bestow upon me the favor of returning to visit. O Allah! As long as You keep me alive then do not make this to be my last visit to their tombs and their aspirations, surely You are Most Merciful.

text.en: It is obligatory to take the ceremonial bath on reaching the city then in the way one should invoke Almighty Allah as much as possible saying سُبْحَانَ اللهِ‏ (Glory be to Allah), اَلْـحَمْدُ لِلهِ‏ (All praise to Allah), اَللهُ اَكْبَرُ (Allah is the Greatest) and لَا اِلٰہَ اِلَّا اللہُ (There is no god but Allah). It is better to recite the following:

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ وَ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ وَ اللهُ اَكْبَرُ لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّۃَ اِلَّا بِاللہِ الْعَلِیِّ الْعَظِیْمِ وَ صَلَّي اللهُ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدِۨ النَّبِيِّ وَ عَلٰی اٰلِہِ الطَّیِّبِیْنَ الطَّاہِرِیْنَ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِیْمًا.
segments.transliteration: subhaanal laahe wal hamdo lillaahe wa laa elaaha illal laaho wal laaho akbaro laa hawla wa laa quwwata illaa billaahil a’liyyil a’zeeme wa sallal laaho a’laa mohammadenin nabiyye wa a’laa aalehit tayyebeenat taahereena wa sallama tasleemaa.

translation.en: All glory be to Allah, all praise be to Allah, there is no god save Allah, Allah is the Greatest, there is neither might nor power save with Allah, the All-High the All-Great, and blessing of Allah be upon Muhammad, the Prophet, and his pure and immaculate progeny and send upon them benedictions.[15]

text.en: On reaching near the holy shrine of Imam Reza (a.s.) recite the following ziyaarat:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْعَلَمُ الْهَادِيْ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْوَصِيُّ الزَّكِيُّ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْاِمَامُ الْبَرُّ التَّقِيُّ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْعَلَمُ الْمُطَهَّرُ مِنَ الذُّنُوْبِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وِعَآءَ حُكْمِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَيْبَةَ سِرِّ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْحَافِظُ لِوَحْيِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْمُسْتَوْفِيْ فِيْ طَاعَةِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْمُتَرْجِمُ لِكِتَابِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الدَّاعِيْ اِلٰى تَوْحِيْدِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْمُعَبِّرُ لِمُرَادِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْمُحَلِّلُ لِحَلَالِ اللهِ وَ الْمُحَرِّمُ لِحَرَامِ اللهِ وَ الدَّاعِيْ اِلٰى دِيْنِ اللهِ وَ الْمُعْلِنُ لِاَحْكَامِ اللهِ وَ الْفَاحِصُ عَنْ مَعْرِفَةِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا اَبَا الْحَسَنِ اَشْهَدُ يَا مَوْلَايَ اَنَّكَ حُجَّةُ اللهِ وَ اَمِيْنُهٗ وَ صَفْوَةُ اللهِ وَ حَبِيْبُهٗ وَ خِيَرَةُ اللهِ مِنْ خَلْقِهٖ وَ حُجَّتُهٗ عَلٰى عِبَادِهٖ اَشْهَدُ اَنَّهٗ مَنْ وَالَاكَ فَقَدْ وَالَى اللهَ وَ مَنْ عَادَاكَ فَقَدْ عَادَى اللهَ وَ مَنِ اسْتَمْسَكَ بِكَ وَ بِالْاَئِمَّةِ مِنْ آبَائِكَ وَ وُلْدِكَ فَقَدِ اسْتَمْسَكَ بِالْعُرْوَةِ الْوُثْقٰى‏ وَ اَشْهَدُ اَنَّكُمْ كَلِمَةُ التَّقْوٰى وَ اَعْلَامُ الْهُدٰى وَ نُوْرٌ لِسَائِرِ الْوَرٰی.
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka ayyohal a’lamul haadee. assalaamo a’layka ayyohal wasiyyuz zakiyy. assalaamo a’layka ayyohal emaamul barrut taqiyy. assalaamo a’layka ayyohal a’lamul motahharo menaz zonoob. assalaamo a’alayka yaa we-a’aa-a hukmil laah. assalaamo a’layka yaa a’ybata sirril laah. assalaamo a’layka ayyohal haafezo le-wahyil laah. assalaamo a’layka ayyohal mustawfee fee taa-a’til laah. assalaamo a’layka ayyoahal motarjemo le-ketaabil laah. assalaamo a’layka ayyohad daa-e’e elaa tawheedil laah. assalaamo a’layka ayyohal mo-a’bbero le-moraadil laah. assalaamo a’layka ayyohal mohallelo le-halaalil laah wal moharremo le-haraamil laah wad daa-e’e elaa deenil laah wal mo’leno le-ahkaamil laah wal faaheso a’n ma’refatil laah assalaamo a’layka yaa abal hasan ash-hado yaa mawlaaya annaka hujjatul laahe wa ameenohu wa safwatul laahe wa habeebohu wa kheyaratul laahe min khalqehi wa hujjatohu a’laa e’baadehi ash-hado annahu man waalaaka faqad waalal laah wa man a’adaaka faqad a’adal laah wa manis tamsaka beka wa bil-aimmate min aaabaa-eka wa wuldeka faqadis tamsaka bil-u’rwatil wusqaa wa ash-hado annakum kalematut taqwaa wa a-a’laamul hodaa wa noorun le-saa-eril waraa.

translation.en: Peace be on you, O guiding epitome. Peace be on you, O pure successor (of the Prophet). Peace be on you, O dutiful and pious leader. Peace be on you, O purified from sins. Peace be on you, O containers of judgement of Allah. Peace be on you, O the store of secret of Allah. Peace be on you, O the protector of the revealation of Allah. Peace be on you, O the complete in the obedience of Allah. Peace be on you, O the interpretor of the Book of Allah. Peace be on you, O the caller to the Oneness of Allah. Peace be on you, O the conveyer of the intention of Allah. Peace be on you, O the analyser of the lawful of Allah and the prohibitor of the unlawful of Allah, and the caller towards the religion of Allah, and the proclaimer of the laws of Allah, and the examiner of the recognition of Allah. Peace be on you O Abal Hasan! I testify, O my master! That surely You are the vicegerent of Allah, and His trustee, and choisest of Allah, and His beloved, and elite of Allah from His creation, and His argument upon His servants. I testify that surely whoever declares loyalty to you has in fact declared loyalty to Allah, and whoever shows enmity towards you has in fact shown enmity towards Allah, and whoever adhered to you and to the imams from your forefathers, and your son then surely he has grasped to the firmest hand, and epitomes of guidance, and light for all the creatures.

text.en: Then after kissing the holy grave recite:

segments.arabic: بِاَبِيْ اَنْتَ وَ اُمِّيْ اَيُّهَا الصِّدِّيْقُ الشَّهِيْدُ بِاَبِيْ اَنْتَ وَ اُمِّيْ يَا ابْنَ اَمِيْرِ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَ سَيِّدِ الْوَصِيِّيْنَ وَ اِمَامِ الْمُسْلِمِيْنَ وَ حُجَّةِ اللهِ عَلَى الْخَلْقِ اَجْمَعِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: be-abee anta wa ummee ayyohas siddeeqush shaheedo be-abee anta wa ummee yabna ameeril moameneena wa sayyedul wasiyyeena wa emaamil muslemeena wa hujjatil laahe a’lal khalqe ajmae’ena.

translation.en: I swear by my father and mother O truthful martyr, I swear by my father and mother O son of the Commander of the Faithful, the chief of the successors, the leader of the Muslims, and the proof of Allah upon all the creatures.

text.en: Then perform two unit of salaat near the grave and while bidding farewell recite the following:

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلَايَ يَا اَبَا الْحَسَنِ يَا مَوْلَايَ اَيُّهَا الرِّضَا اَتَيْتُكَ زَآئِرًا وَ اَشْهَدُ اَنَّكَ خَيْرُ مَزُوْرٍ بَعْدَ آبَآئِكَ وَ اَفْضَلُ مَقْصُوْدٍ وَ اَشْهَدُ اَنَّ مَنْ زَارَكَ فَقَدْ وَصَلَ رَسُوْلَ اللهِ وَ اَبْهَجَ فَاطِمَةَ سَيِّدَةَ نِسَآءِ الْعَالَمِيْنَ وَ نَالَ مِنَ اللهِ الْفَوْزَ الْعَظِيْمَ فَلَا جَعَلَهُ اللهُ اٰخِرَ الْعَهْدِ مِنْ زِيَارَتِكَ وَ اِتْيَانِ مَشْهَدِكَ وَ رَزَقَنِيَ الْعَوْدَ ثُمَّ الْعَوْدَ اِلَيْكَ آمِيْنَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: yaa mawlaaya yaa abal hasane yaa mawlaaya ayyohar rezaa ataytoka zaaa-eran wa ash-hado annaka khayro mazoorin ba’da aabaaa-eka wa afzalo maqsoodin wa ash-hado anna man zaaraka faqad wasala rasoolal laahe wa abhaja faatemata sayyedata nesaaa-il a’alameena wa naala menal laahil fawzal a’zeema falaa ja-a’lahul laaho aakheral a’hde min zeyaarateka wa ityaane mash-hadeka wa razaqaneyal a’wda summal a’wda elayka aameena rabbal a’alameena.

translation.en: O my master! O Abul Hasan! O my master! O devoted one, I have come to visit you, and I testify that surely visiting you is good after your forefathers, and the most excellent besought one, and I testify that one who visits you has indeed respected the Messenger of Allah, and rejoiced Faatemah, the leader of the women of the worlds, and achieved the great victory from Allah, then may Allah not make this my last visit to you, and coming to your shrine, and grant me more and more chances to re-visit you, respond, O Lord of the worlds![16]

text.en: THIRD FORM OF ZIYARAH
After taking ceremonial bath for ziyaarat, recite the following ziyaarat near the holy grave while standing:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ اللهِ وَ ابْنَ وَلِيِّهٖ، اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُـجَّةَ اللهِ وَ ابْنَ حُـجَّتِهٖ وَ اَبَا حُـجَجِهٖ، اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا اِمَامَ الْهُدٰى وَ الْعُرْوَةَ الْوُثْقٰى وَ رَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهٗ. اَشْهَدُ اَنَّكَ مَضَيْتَ عَلٰى مَا مَضٰى عَلَيْهِ آبَاؤُكَ الطَّاهِرُوْنَ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ، لَمْ تُؤْثِرْ عَمًى عَلٰى هُدًى، وَ لَمْ تَمِلْ مِنْ حَقٍّ اِلٰى بَاطِلٍ، وَ اَنَّكَ قَدْ نَصَحْتَ لِلهِ وَ لِرَسُولِهٖ، وَ اَدَّيْتَ الْاَمَانَةَ، فَـجَزَاكَ اللهُ عَنِ الْاِسْلَامِ وَ اَهْلِهٖ خَيْرَ الْـجَزَآءِ. اَتَيْتُكَ بِاَبِيْ وَ اُمِّيْ زَآئِرًا عَارِفًا بِـحَقِّكَ، مُوَالِيًا لِاَوْلِيَآئِكَ، مُعَادِيًا لِاَعْدَآئِكَ، فَاشْفَعْ لِيْ عِنْدَ رَبِّكَ جَلَّ وَ عَزَّ.
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waliyyal laahe wabna waliyyehi, assalaamo a’layka yaa hujjatal laahe wabna hujjatehi wa abaa hojajehi, assalaamo a’layka yaa emaamal hodaa wal u’rwatal wusqaa wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatoh. ash-hado annaka mazayta a’laa maa mazaa a’layhe aaabaa-okat taaheroona a’layhemus salaamo, lam toa-sir a’man a’lal hodaa, wa lam tamil min haqqin elaa baatelin, wa annaka qad nasah-ta lillaahe wa le-rasoolehi, wa addaytal amaanata, fa-jazaakal laaho a’nil islaame wa ahlehi khayral jazaaa. ataytoka be-abee wa ummee zaaa-eran a’arefan be-haqqeka, mowaaleyan le-awleyaaa-eka, mo-a’adeyan le-a’adaaa-eka, fash-fa’ lee i’nda rabbeka jalla wa a’zza.

translation.en: Peace be on you, O Allah’s authority and son of His authority. Peace be on you, O Allah’s argument and father of His argument. Peace be on you, O leader of guidance and firmest handle. Allah’s mercy and blessings be on you. I bear witness that you passed away carrying the same principles on which your immaculate fathers had passed away. Allah’s blessings be on them. You never preferred blindness to guidance, and never slanted from right to wrong. And you acted for the sake of Allah and His Messenger sincerely and fulfilled the trust. May Allah reward you on behalf of Islam and its embracers with the most favorable reward. I have come to you – I swear by my father and mother – visiting you, recognizing your right, declaring loyalty to your loyalists, and showing enmity towards your enemies. So, intercede for me with your Lord, Majestic and Mighty.[17]

text.en: then kiss the grave while touching it, put your cheek on it. Then say at the head:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلَايَ يَا ابْنَ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ وَ رَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهٗ، اَشْهَدُ اَنَّكَ الْاِمَامُ الْهَادِيْ، وَ الْمُوَالِي الرَّاشِدُ، وَ الْوَلِيُّ الْمُجَاهِدُ، وَ اَبْرَاُ اِلَى اللهِ تَعَالٰى مِنْ اَعْدَآئِكَ، وَ اَتَقَرَّبُ اِلَى اللهِ بِمُوَالَاتِكَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْكَ وَ رَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهٗ.
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa mawlaaya yabna rasoolil laahe wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatoh, ash-hado annakal emaamul haadee, wal mowaalir raashedo, wal waliyyul mojaahedo wa abra-o elal laae ta-a’alaa min a-a’daaa-eka, wa ataqarrabo elal laahe be-mowaalaateka sallal laaho a’layka wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatoh.

translation.en: Peace be on you, O my master, O son of Allah’s Messenger. Allah’s mercy and blessings be on you. I bear witness that verily you are the guiding leader and the directing saint. I repudiate your enemies in the presence of Allah and seek nearness to Allah through declaring loyalty to you. May Allah bless you. Allah’s mercy and blessings be on you.

text.en: Then perform two unit of salaat and after that perform as many salaat and then revert to the position of holy feet and invoke whatever is your need. When you want to bid farewell, return and stand near the holy grave and recite the following:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلَايَ يَا اَبَا الْحَسَنِ، اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ابْنَ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ وَ رَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهٗ، اَسْتَوْدِعُكَ اللهَ وَ اَقْرَاُ عَلَيْكَ السَّلَامَ، اٰمَنَّا بِاللهِ وَ بِمَا جِئْتَ بِهٖ وَ دَلَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ، اَللّٰهُمَّ اكْتُبْنَا مَعَ الشَّاهِدِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa mawlaaya yaa abal hasan, assalaamo a’layka yabna rasoolil laahe wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatoh, astawde-o’kal laaha wa aqra-o a’laykas salaam, aamannaa bil-laahe wa bemaa jea-ta behi wa dalalta a’layhe, allaahummak tubnaa ma-a’sh shaahedeen.

translation.en: Peace be on you O Abal Hasan, Peace be on you O the son of Prophet of Allah, Allah’s mercy and blessings be on you. I entrust you to Allah and I salute you, I believe in Allah and in that which they (the prophets) brought from Him, in that unto which they guided. O Allah! Include me among the testifiers.

text.en: FOURTH FORM OF ZIYARAH - ZIYARAH JAWADIYYAH

Late Allama Majlisi (r.a.) reports that he found a ziyarah in some old treatises (which is from the earliest Ulema and written in 746 A.H.) which is reproduced as it is; This ziyarah has been narrated by Imam Jawad (peace be upon him), son of Imam Ridha (peace be upon him):

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِىِّ اللهِ وَ ابْنَ اَوْلِيَآئِهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا سَفِيْرَ اللهِ وَ ابْنَ سُفَرَآئِهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waliyyal laahe wabna awleyaaa-eh assalaamo a’layka yaa safeeral laahe wabna sofaraaa-eh

translation.en: Peace be on the friend of Allah and the son of His friends Peace be on you, O ambassador of Allah and the son of His ambassadors

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُـجَّةَ اللهِ وَ ابْنَ حُـجَجِهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُوْرَ اللهِ فِىْ ظُلُمَاتِ الْاَرْضِ وَ ابْنَ اَنْوَارِهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waliyyal laahe wabna awleyaaa-eh assalaamo a’layka yaa safeeral laahe wabna sofaraaa-eh

translation.en: Peace be on you O proof of Allah and son of His proofs Peace be on you, O light of Allah in the dark earth and the son of His lights

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَمُوْدَ الدِّيْنِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ الْاَنْبِیَآءِ وَ الْمُرْسَلِیْنَ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa a’moodad deen assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresal anbeyaaa-e wal mursaleen

translation.en: Peace be on you, O pillar of religion Peace be on you, O heir of the Prophets and the Messengers

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ نَجِيِّ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa aadama safwatil laah assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa noohin najiyyil laah

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Adam, the one chosen by Allah Peace be on you, O inheritor of Nuh, the confidant of Allah

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ اِبْرَاهِيْمَ خَلِيْلِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ اِسْمَاعِيْلَ ذَبِيْحِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa ibraaheema khaleelil laah

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Ibrahim, the friend of Allah Peace be on you, O inheritor of Ismaaeel, the one to be sacrificed for Allah

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوْسٰى كَلِيْمِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيْسٰى رُوْحِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa moosaa kaleemil laah assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa e’esaa roohil laah

translation.en: Peace be on you O inheritor of Moosa, the one who conversed with Allah Peace be on you, O inheritor of Eesaa, the spirit of Allah

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ (حَبِيْبِ اللهِ وَ) رَسُوْلِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: ssalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa mohammadin (habeebil laahe wa) rasoolil laah

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Muhammad, (the beloved of Allah and) the Prophet of Allah

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ اَمِيْرِ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ اَبِيْ طَالِبٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ وَلِيِّ اللهِ وَ وَصِيِّ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa ameeril moameneena a’liyibne abee taalebin a’layhis salaamo waliyyil laahe wa wasiyye rasoolil laah

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of the Commander of the Faithful, Ali Ibn Abi Taalib, peace of Allah be on him, the friend of Allah, and the successor to the Prophet of Allah

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ فَاطِمَةَ الزَّهْرَآءِ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَآءِ الْعَالَمِيْنَ بِنْتِ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa faatemataz zahraaa-e sayyedate nesaaa-il a’alameena binte rasoolil laah

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Fatima al-Zahra, leader of the women of the Universe, daughter of the Prophet of Allah

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ الْحَسَنِ وَ الْحُسَيْنِ سَيِّدَيْ شَبَابِ اَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ (وَ سِبْطَيْ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ)
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresal hasane wal husaine sayyeday shabaabe ahlil jannate (wa sibtay rasoolil laah)

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of al-Hasan and al-Husain, the two leaders of all the youths in Paradise (and two grandsons of the Prophet of Allah)

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ سَيِّدِ السَّاجِدِيْنَ وَ زَيْنِ الْعَابِدِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa a’liyy ibnil husaine sayyedas saajedeena wa zaynil a’abedeen

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Ali ibn al-Husain, the leader of the prostrating ones and the adornment of the worshippers

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ بَاقِرِ عِلْمِ الْاَوَّلِيْنَ وَ الْآخِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa mohammad ibne a’liyyin baaqere i’lmil awwaleena wal aakhereen

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Muhammad ibn Ali, the one who splits knowledge of the first and last ones

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الصَّادِقِ الْبَارِّ التَّقِيِّ الْاَمِيْنِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa ja’far ibne mohammadenis saadeqil baarrit taqiyyil ameen
