segments.transliteration: yaa shaame-khan fee bo’dehi yaa ra-oofan fee rahmatehi yaa mohyeyal amwaate yaa mukhrejan nabaate yaa zahral laajeena yaa jaaral mustajeereena yaa asma-a’s saame-e’ena yaa absaran naazereena yaa sareekhal mustasrekheena yaa e’maada man laa e’maada lahu yaa sanada man laa sanada lahu yaa zukhra man laa zukhra lahu yaa hirzaz zo-a’faaa-e yaa kanzal foqaraaa-e yaa a’zeemar rajaaa-e yaa munqezal gharqaa yaa mohyeyal mawtaa yaa amaanal khaaa-efeena yaa elaahal a’alameena yaa saane-a’ kulle masnoo-i’n yaa jaabera kulle kaseerin yaa saaheba kulle ghareebin yaa moonesa kulle waheedin yaa qareeban ghayra ba-e’edin yaa shaahe-dan ghayra ghaaa-eb yaa ghaaleban ghayra maghloobin yaa hayyo heena laa hayya yaa mohayeyal mawtaa yaa hayyo laa elaaha illaa anta badee-u’s samaawaate wal arze antal qaaa-emo a’laa kulle nafsin bemaa kasabat as-aloka an tosalleya a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin salaatan turzeehim wa tukhteehim (takhteehim) wa toballeghohum aqsaa rezaaka wa an tarhama zullee bayna yadayka wa tazarro-e’e elayka wa wahshatee menan naase wa unsee beka yaa kareemo tasaddaq a’layya fee haazehis saa-a’te be-rahmatin min i’ndeka tahdee behaa qalbee wa tajma-o’ behaa amree wa talummo behaa sha’see wa tobayyezo behaa wajhee wa tukremo behaa maqaamee wa tahutto behaa a’nnee wizree wa taghfero behaa maa mazaa min zonoobee wa ta’semonee behaa feemaa baqeya min u’mree wa tas-ta’melonee fee zaaleka kullehi be-taa-a’teka wa maa yurzeeka a’nnee wa takhtemo a’malee be-ahsanehi wa taj-a’lo lee sawaabahul jannata wa tas-loko bee sabeelas saaleheena wa to-e’enonee a’laa saalehe maa a-a’taytanee wa laa tushmit bee haasedan wa laa a’duwwan wa laa takilnee elaa nafsee tarfata a’ynin abadan wa laa aqalla min zaaleka wa laa aksara yaa rabbal a’alameen.

translation.en: O Sublime in His distance! O Kind in His mercy! O giver of life to the dead! O Bringer forth of plants! O Asylum of the refugees! O Protector of those who seek protection! O Most Hearing of the hearers! O Most Seeing of the viewers! O Succor of the grieved! O Support of the unsupported! O Holder of the holdless! O Supplier of those who lack supplies! O Shelter for the weak! O Treasure for the poor! O He Who is greatly hoped! O Rescuer of the drowned! O He Who causes the dead to live again! O Protection for the frightened! O Lord of the worlds! O He Who Makes all things made! O He Who sets all things broken! O Companion for all stranger! O Intimate to those alone! O One who is close without being far! O One who is present, not absent! O triumphant without being [ever] defeated! O Alive when there is no one living (but Him). O One who gives life to the dead. O Ever-living! there is no deity save You, the originator of the heavens and the earth, You watch every soul as to what it earns! I beseech You that You send blessings upon Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad, blessing which makes them happy and transcend, and they can attain Your ultimate happiness, and that You have mercy on my humiliation in front of You, on my earnest imploring to You, on my loneliness among people, and on my amiability with You. O All-generous! Endue me at this very hour with mercy from You by which You tranquilize my heart, bring together my affairs, reunite my scattering, whiten my face, confer honor on my status, relieve me from my burdens, forgive my past sins, protect me against sinning in the rest of my lifetime, employ me in my entire lifetime in acts of obedience to You and acts that bring about Your pleasure, seal my deeds with the best of them, decide Paradise to be my reward for that, lead me to the path of the righteous, help me do well with the virtuous of what You have given me, never make one who envies me gloat at my misfortune, and my enemy, and never leave me alone with my own affairs even for a winking of an eye or less or more than that. O Lord of the worlds!

text.en: Then supplicate whatever you want. Return to head side of the holy grave and say:

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ زُرْتُ هٰذَا الْاِمَامَ مُقِرًّا بِاِمَامَتِهٖ مُعْتَقِدًا لِفَرْضِ طَاعَتِهٖ فَقَصَدْتُ مَشْهَدَهٗ بِذُنُوْبِيْ وَعُيُوْبِيْ وَ مُوْبِقَاتِ آثَامِيْ وَكَثْرَةِ سَيِّئَاتِيْ وَ خَطَايَايَ وَ مَا تَعْرِفُهٗ مِنِّيْ مُسْتَجِيْرًا بِعَفْوِكَ مُسْتَعِيْذًا بِحِلْمِكَ لَاجِئًا اِلٰى رُكْنِكَ عَآئِذًا بِرَافَتِكَ مُسْتَشْفِعًا بِوَلِيِّكَ وَ ابْنِ اَوْلِيَآئِكَ وَصَفِيِّكَ وَ ابْنِ اَصْفِيَآئِكَ وَ اَمِيْنِكَ وَ ابْنِ اُمَنَائِكَ وَ خَلِيْفَتِكَ وَ ابْنِ خُلَفَآئِكَ الَّذِيْنَ جَعَلْتَهُمُ الْوَسِيْلَةَ اِلٰى رَحْمَتِكَ وَ رِضْوَانِكَ وَالذَّرِيْعَةَ اِلٰى رَافَتِكَ وَ غُفْرَانِكَ. اَللّٰهُمَّ وَ اُوْلٰی حَاجَاتِيْ اِلَيْكَ اَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي مَا سَلَفَ مِنْ ذُنُوْبِيْ عَلٰى كَثْرَتِهَا وَ اَنْ تَعْصِمَنِيْ فِيْمَا بَقِيَ مِنْ عُمْرِيْ وَ تُطَهِّرَ دِيْنِيْ مِمَّا يُدَنِّسُهٗ وَ يَشِيْنُهٗ وَ يُزْرِيْ بِهٖ وَ تَحْمِيَهٗ مِنَ الرَّيْبِ وَ الشَّكِّ وَ الْفَسَادِ وَ الشِّرْكِ وَ تُثَبِّتَنِيْ عَلٰى طَاعَتِكَ وَ طَاعَةِ رَسُوْلِكَ وَ ذُرِّيَّتِهِ النُّجَبَآءِ السُّعَدَآءِ صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَ رَحْمَتُكَ وَ سَلَامُكَ وَ بَرَكَاتُكَ وَتُحْيِيَنِيْ مَا اَحْيَيْتَنِيْ عَلٰى طَاعَتِهِمْ وَ تُمِيْتَنِيْ اِذَا اَمَتَّنِيْ عَلٰى طَاعَتِهِمْ وَ اَنْ لَا تَمْحُوَ مِنْ قَلْبِي مَوَدَّتَهُمْ وَ مَحَبَّتَهُمْ وَ بُغْضَ اَعْدَآئِهِمْ وَ مُرَافَقَةَ اَوْلِيَآئِهِمْ وَ بِرَّهُمْ. وَ اَسْاَلُكَ يَا رَبِّ اَنْ تَقْبَلَ ذٰلِكَ مِنِّيْ وَ تُحَبِّبَ اِلَيَّ عِبَادَتَكَ وَ تُبَغِّضَ اِلَيَّ مَعَاصِيَكَ وَتَرْزُقَنِيْ تَوْبَةً نَصُوْحًا تَرْضَاهَا وَ نِيَّةً تَحْمَدُهَا وَ عَمَلًا صَالِحًا تَقْبَلُهٗ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا ارْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: allahumma innee zurto haazal emaama moqirran be emaamatehi mo’taqedan le-farze taa-a’tehi fa-qasad-to mash-hadahu be- zonoobee wa o’yoobee wa moo-beqaate aasaamee wa kasrate sayye-aatee wa khataayaaya wa maa ta’refohu minnee mustajeeran be-a’fweka musta-e’ezan be-hilmeka laa-je-an elaa rukneka a’aa-edzan be-raafateka mustash-fe-a’n be-waliyyeka wab ne awle-yaaa-eka wa safiyyeka wab ne asfe-yaaa-eka wa ameeneka wab ne omanaaa-eka wa khaleefateka wab ne khola-faaa-ekal lazeena ja-a’ltahomul waseelata elaa rahmateka wa rizwaaneka waz zaree-a’ta elaa raa-fateka wa ghufraaneka. allaahumma wa oolaa haajaatee elayka an taghfera lee maa salafa min zonoobee a’laa kasratehaa wa an ta’semanee feemaa baqeya min u’mree wa to-tahera deenee mimmaa yodannesohu wa yasheenohu wa yuzree behi wa tahmeyahu menar raybe wash shakke wal fasaade wash shirke wa tosabbetanee a’laa taa-a’teka wa taa-a’te rasooleka wa zurriyyatehin nojabaaa-is so-a’daaa-e salawaatoka a’layhim wa rahmatoka wa salaamoka wa barakaatoka wa toh-yeyanee maaa ahyaytanee a’laa taa-a’tehim wa tomeetanee ezaa amattanee a’laa taa-a’tehim wa an laa tamhowa min qalbee mawaddatahum wa mahabbatahum wa bughza a-a’adaaa-ehim wa moraafaqata awleyaaa-ehim wa birrahum. wa as-aloka yaa rabbe an taqabbala zaaleka minnee wa tohabbeba elayya e’baadataka wa tobagh-gheza elayya ma-a’a-seyaka wa tarzoqanee tawbatan nasoohan tarzaahaa wa niyyatan tahmadohaa wa a’malan saalehan taqbalohu be rahmateka yaa arhamar raahemeen.

translation.en: O Allah! I am visiting this Imam confessing his Imamate and believing in the obligation of the obedience to him; therefore, I have betaken myself to his shrine in spite of all of my sins, defects, the perils of my wrongdoings, my numerous misdeeds and faults, and whatsoever You know about me; taking shelter in Your amnesty, seeking refuge of Your forbearance, resorting to Your asylum, seeking the protection of Your compassion, seeking the intercession of Your vicegerent and the son of Your vicegerent, Your choicest servant and the son of Your choicest servants, Your trustee and the son of Your trustees, and Your representative and the son of Your representatives, whom You have made the means to approach Your mercy and pleasure and the channels to Your compassion and forgiveness. O Allah! My first needs from You is that I implore You to forgive all of my previous sins although they are numerous, to protect me (against sinning) in my coming lifetime, to purify my religion from whatsoever stains, disgraces, or degrades it, to save it from suspect, doubt, corruption, and blasphemy, to make me stand firm on the obedience to You, to Your Messenger, and to his Progeny, the pure and happy, may Your blessings be upon them as well as Your mercy, peace, and favors, to make me live as long as You grant me life on the obedience to them, to make me die, when You decide so, on the obedience to them, and not to erase from my heart my love and affection for them, my aversion to their enemies, my companionship of their adherents, and my acting piously towards them. I also beseech You, O my Lord, to accept all that from me, to endear my worshipping You to myself, to make me loathe acts of disobedience to You, and to grant me a sincere repentance that You accept, an intention that You praise, and righteous deed that You admit, by Your mercy, O the most Merciful of the mercifuls.

text.en: While bidding farewell stand in front of the Zareeh keeping back towards Qiblah, say:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا اَمِيْنَ اللهِ فِيْ اَرْضِهٖ وَ حُجَّتَہٗ عَلٰی خَلْقِہٖ وَ خَازِنَ عِلْمِہٖ وَ مَوْضِعَ سِرِّہٖ وَ بَابَ اَمْرِہٖ وَ نَہْیِہٖ وَ صِرَاطَہُ الْمُسْتَقِیْمَ سَلَامَ مُوَدِّعٍ وَ لَا سَئِمٍ وَ لَا قَالٍ وَ لَا مَالٍّ وَ رَحْمَۃُ اللہِ وَ بَرَكَاتُہٗ. اَللّٰہُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اجْعَلْ غُدُوَّنَا مَقْرُوْنًا بِالتَّوَكُّلِ عَلَیْكَ وَ رَوَاحَنَا عَنْكَ مَوْصُوْلًا بِالنَّجَاحِ مِنْكَ وَ دُعَآئَنَا لَكَ مَقْرُوْنًا بِحُسْنِ الْاِجَابَۃِ وَ خُضُوْعَنَا بَیْنَ یَدَیْكَ دَاعِیًا اِلٰی رَحْمَتِكَ وَ اعْتِرَافِنَا بِذُنُوْبِنَا شَفِیْعًا اِلٰی عَفْوِكَ وَ ارْزُقْنَا الْعَوْدَ اِلٰی زِیَارَتِہٖ ثُمَّ الْعَوْدَ اِلَیْہِ بِرَحْمَتِكَ یَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِیْنَ. اَللّٰہُمَّ لَا تَجْعَلْہُ اٰخِرَ الْعَہْدِ مَنَّا لِزِیَارَۃِ سَیِّدَنَا وَ اِمَامِنَا الْمَفْرُوْضِ طَاعَتِہٖ عَلَیْنَا وَ ارْزُقْنَا زِیَارَتَہٗ اَبَدًامَا اَبْقَیْتَنَا اِنَّكَ ذُوْ الْفَضْلِ الْعَظِیْمِ وَ الْمَنِّ الْجَسِیْمِ وَ صَلَّی اللہُ عَلٰی سَیِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِہِ الطَّاہِرِیْنَ.
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa ameenal laahe fee arzehi wa hujjatahu a’laa khalqehi wa khaazena i’lmehi wa mawze-a’ sirrehi wa baaba amrehi wa nahyehi wa seraatehul mustaqeema salaama mowadde-i’n wa laa sa-emin wa laa qaalin wa laa maallin wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatoh. allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin waj a’l ghoduwwanaa maqroonan bit-tawakkole a’layka wa rawaahanaa a’nka mawsoolan bin-najaahe minka wa do-a’aa-anaa laka maqroonan be-husnil ejaabate wa khozoo-a’naa bayna yadayka daa-e’yan elaa rahmateka wa’ teraafenaa be-zonoobenaa sha-fee-a’n elaa a’fweka war zuqnal a’wda elaa zeyaaratehi summal a’wda elayhe be-rahmateka yaa arhamar raahemeen. allaahumma laa taj-a’lho aakheral a’hde minnaa le-zeyaarate sayyedanaa wa emaamanal mafrooze taa-a’tehi a’laynaa war zuqnaa zeyaaratahu abadan maa abqaytanaa innaka zool fazlil a’zeeme wal mannil jaseeme wa sallal laaho a’laa sayyedenaa mohammadin wa aalehit taahereen.

translation.en: Peace be on you, O the trusted one of Allah on His earth, His proof on His creatures, and a treasurer of His knowledge, and repository of His secrets, and door of what is deemed lawful and what is deemed unlawful by Him, and His straight path, I send my farewell greetings to you for if I leave it is not because I am tired or that I wish to leave or that I dislike. May the mercy and blessings of Allah be on you. O Allah! Send blessings upon Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad. And make our coming to you effective trust upon You, and our leaving from you correlated success from You, and our prayers for you effective with good acceptance, and our humiliation in front to You is answer towards Your mercy, and our confession of our sins is intercessor towards Your pardon, and grant us the opportunity to visit again and again for his visitation. By Your mercy, O Most Merciful of all. O Allah! Do not make this our last visitation of our master and our Imam whose obedience is obligatory on us, grant us a chance to visit him for as long as we are alive, for You verily the Lord of great favouring and plentiful conferral. And blessings of Allah be upon our master Muhammad and his pure progeny.[36]

text.en: ziyaarat of imam-e-zamana (a.t.f.s.) inside the shrine of imam reza (A.S.) In this chapter Ziyaarat of Hazrat Baqiyatullah Imam-e-Zamana (a.t.f.s.) to be recited inside the shrine of Imam Reza (a.s.) is mentioned:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکَ یَا صَاحِبَ الزَّمَانِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکَ یَا خَلِیْفَۃَ الرَّحْمٰنِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکَ یَا شَرِیْکَ الْقُرْآنِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکَ یَا قَاطِعَ الْبُرْهَانِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکَ یَا اِمَامَ الْاِنْسِ وَالْجَآنِّ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ وَ عَلٰی اٰبَآئِكَ الطَّیِّبِیْنَ وَ اَجْدَادِكَ الطَّاہِرِیْنَ الْمَعْصُوْمِیْنَ وَ رَحْمَۃُ اللہِ وَ بَرَكَاتُہٗ.
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa saahebaz zamaan assalaamo a’layka yaa khaleefatar rahmaan assalaamo a’layka yaa shareekal qur-aaan assalaamo a’layka yaa qaate-a’l burhaan assalaamo a’layka yaa emaamal inse wal jaaan assalaamo a’layka wa a’laa aabaaa-ekat tayyebeena wa ajdaadekat taahereenal ma’soomeena wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatoh.

translation.en: Peace be on you, O king of times. Peace be on you, O caliph of the Beneficent. Peace be on you, O companion of Qur’an. Peace be on you, O decisive argument. Peace be on you, O Imam of men and jinn. Peace be on you, and on your immaculate fathers, pure and infallible forefathers. May the mercy and blessings of Allah be on you.[37]

text.en: Wednesday ziyarat of Imam Ridha (as)

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَى الرِّضَا الْمُرْتَضٰى سَـمِيِّ سَيِّدِ الْوَصِيِّيْنَ وَ اِمَامِ الْمُتَّقِيْنَ خَلِيْفَةِ الرَّحْمٰنِ وَ اِمَامِ اَهْلِ الْقُرْآنِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’lar rezal murtazaa samiyye sayyedil wasiyyeen wa emaamil muttaqeen khaleefatir rahmaane wa emaame ahlil qur-aane

translation.en: Peace be upon al-Reza, the well-pleased, exalted chief of the Prophet’s successor, and leader of the pious ones, representative of the Beneficent, and leader of the people of the Holy Quran,

segments.arabic: وَ صَاحِبِ التَّاْوِيْلِ وَ مَعْدِنِ الْفُرْقَانِ وَ حَامِلِ التَّوْرَاةِ وَ الْاِنْـجِيْلِ وَ اِفْنَآءِ الْـخَبِيْثَاتِ وَ الْاَبَاطِيْلِ وَ الْقَائِلِ الْفَاعِلِ
segments.transliteration: wa saahebit taaweele wa ma’denir furqaan wa haamelit tawraate wal injeele wa ifnaaa-il khabeesaate wal abaateele wal qaa-elil faa-e’le

translation.en: the man of true interpretation, core of distinction (between the right and the wrong), the bearer of the Torah and the Gospel, destructor of the mischiefs and the vanities, instructor and doer (of action),

segments.arabic: وَ الْـحَاكِمِ الْعَادِلِ وَ الصَّادِقِ وَ الْـحَاكِمِ الْعَادِلِ وَ الصَّادِقِ الْبَرِّ وَ الْـحَائِزِ الْفَخْرِ جَدُّهٗ سَيِّدُ النَّبِيِّيْنَ وَ اَبُوْهُ سَيِّدُ الْوَصِيِّيْنَ وَ اِلَيْهِ مَآبُ الْاَوَّلِيْنَ وَ الْآخِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wal haakemil a’adele was saadeqil barre wal haa-ezil fakhre jaddohu sayyedun nabiyyeena wa abooho sayyedul wasiyyeena wa elayhe ma-aaabul awwaleena wal aakhereena

translation.en: the evenhanded judge, the truthful good doer, the possessor of the honour, his grandfather is the chief of the messengers, and his father is the chief of the Prophet’s successor, and to him is the place of return for the first and the last.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا اَبَا الْـحَسَنِ عَلِيَّ بْنَ مُوسَى الرِّضَا وَ رَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهٗ اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُـحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلٰى اٰلِ مُـحَمَّدٍ وَ كَمَا اَكْرَمْتَهٗ بِـمُحَمَّدٍ رَسُوْلِكَ وَ جَعَلْتَهٗ فِيْ الْـحَقِّ دَلِيْلَكَ فَدَعَا اِلٰى سَبِيْلِكَ بِالْـحِكْمَةِ وَ الْمَوْعِظَةِ الْـحَسَنَةِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa abal hasane a’liyy ibne moosar rezaa wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatohu allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa a’laa aale mohammadin wa kamaa akramtahu be-mohammadin rasooleka wa ja-a’ltahu fil haqqe daleelaka fa-da-a’a elaa sabeeleka bil-hikmate wal maw-e’zatil hasanate

translation.en: Peace be on you, O Abal Hasan Ali, son of Moosa al-Reza and mercy of Allah and his blessings. O Allah! Send blessings upon Muhammad and on the progeny of Muhammad, and like You have honoured him with Muhammad, Your Prophet and appointed him as Your truthful guide, then he called towards Your path with wisdom and fair exhortation,

segments.arabic: فَاَكْمِلْ لَهُ الْعَهْدَ وَ تَـمِّمْ لَهُ الْوَعْدَ وَ اَيِّدْهُ وَ ذُرِّيَّتَهٗ وَ اَوْلِيَآئَهٗ بِالنَّصْرِ وَ الْـجُنْدِ لِيُخَلِّصَ الدِّيْنَ بِالْـجِدِّ فَيَعْمَلَ فِيْ ذٰلِكَ بِالْـجَهْدِ وَ يُصَيِّرَ لَكَ الدِّيْنَ خَالِصًا وَ الْـحَمْدَ تَامًّا
segments.transliteration: fa-akmil lahul a’hda wa tammim lahul wa’da wa ayyidho wa zurriyyatahu wa awleyaaa-ohu bin-nasre wal junde le-yokhallesad deena bil-jidde fa-ya’mala fee zaaleka bil-jahde wa yosayyera lakad deena khaalesan wal hamda taam-man

translation.en: then complete for him the promise, then complete for him the covenant and finish for him the promise, and support him and his progeny and his friends with victory and army to purify the religion with devotion, then act in it with exertion so he renders for Your pure religion and complete praise.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَيْهِ حَيًّا وَ مَيِّتًا وَ عَـجِّلْ فَرَجَنَا بِهٖ وَ بِالْوَصِيِّ مِنْ بَعْدِهٖ وَ انْصُرْهُ عَلٰى اَهْلِ طَاعَةِ الشَّيْطَانِ وَ اَعْزِزْ بِهِ الْاِيْـمَانَ وَ اَذْلِلْ بِهِ الشَّيْطَانَ.‏
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’layhe hayyan wa mayyetan wa a’jjil farajanaa behi wa bil-wasiyye min ba’dehi wan surho a’laa ahle taa-a’tish shaytaane wa a-a’ziz behil eemaana wa azlil behish shaytaana.

translation.en: O Allah! Send blessings upon him when he is alive and when he dies, and expediate our relief by him and the vicegerent after him, and help him against the people of Satan, and through him honour the belief and degrade the Satan.

text.en: Bidding Farewell to Imam al-Rida
When you intend to leave and bid farewell to the Imam, you may say the same form, which has been cited for bidding farewell to the Holy Prophet (s). This form is as follows:

segments.arabic: لاَ جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ آخِرَ تَسْلِيمِي عَلَيْكَ

translation.en: Allah may not decide this compliment of me to be the last.

text.en: You may then add the following words:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waliyya allahi wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you, O Allah’s authority.
O Allah, (please) do not decide this visit

segments.arabic: مِنْ زِيَارَتِي ٱبْنَ نَبِيِّكَ وَحُجَّتَكَ عَلَىٰ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: min ziyarati ibna nabiyyika wa hujjataka `ala khalqika

translation.en: to be the last of my visit to the son of Your Prophet and Your argument against Your creatures.
Include me with him in Your Paradise
and involve me with him and with his group
with the martyrs and the righteous ones;
and excellent the companionship of these is.
I entrust you with Allah, ask Him to keep you under His custody,
and invoke His blessings upon you.
We believe in Allah, in the Messenger,

segments.transliteration: wa bima ji'ta bihi wa dalalta `alayhi

translation.en: and in whatever you have come with and instructed.
So, (please) write us down with those who bear witness.

text.en: Ziyarat Rajabia
Salawaat (Invocation of Blessings) on Imam Ali Ridha (peace be upon him)
Earth Spreading Day
The date when the earth was spread on the water where the Holy Ka`bah is now situated
1.Fasting is highly recommended on this day. It is counted amongst the four most important fasts of the year.
According to a narration, to observe fasting on this day is equal to seventy year fasting and erases the sins of seventy years.
2.Perform Ghusl,

3. Offer, in the morning, a Salat consisting of two units, reciting in the each unit Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 once and repeating Surah <ref=1:91>Al-Shams</ref>
 five times.
After completion, the following litany is said:

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَليِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: There is no power and no strength except with Allah, the Most High, the All-great.

text.en: Then, one may pray to Almighty Allah for granting his needs and then say the following :

translation.en: O He Who overlooks slips, (please) overlook my slip.
O He Who responds to prayers, (please) respond to my prayer.
O He Who hears all sounds, (please) listen to mine,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْنِي وَتَجَاوَزْ عَنْ سَيِّئَاتِي وَمَا عِنْدِي
segments.transliteration: warhamni wa tajawaz `an sayyi'ati wa ma `indi

translation.en: have mercy on me, and excuse my wrongdoings and whatever I have committed.
O Lord of majesty and honor!

text.en: 4.In Misbah al-Mutahajjid, Shaykh al-Tusi has mentioned that it is recommended to say the following prayer on this day:

translation.en: O Allah Who spread the Ka`bah,
split the kernel,
removes troubles,
and relieves from all distresses!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ فِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ مِنْ أَيَّامِكَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka fi hadha alyawmi min ayyamika

translation.en: I beseech You on this day, which is one of Your days
whose standing You have deemed great,
whom You have given preference,
and whom You have put as trust with the believers
and as means to approaching to You;
and [I beseech You] in the name of Your ample mercy
to send blessings to Muhammad,
Your servant that You have selected in the Nigh Covenant
on the Meeting Day,
the splitter of all joined things
and the caller to all truths,
and to his Household, the pure,
the guides, the lanterns,
the pillars of the Omnipotent (Lord),
and the supervisors on Paradise and Hell,

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطِنَا فِي يَوْمِنَا هٰذَا مِنْ عَطَائِكَ ٱلْمَخْزوُنِ
segments.transliteration: wa a`tina fi yawmina hadha min `ata'ika almakhzuni

translation.en: to give us on this day from Your stored gifts,
gifts that are neither interrupted nor prohibited

segments.arabic: تَجْمَعُ لَنَا بِهِ ٱلتَّوْبَةَ وَحُسْنَ ٱلأَوْبَةِ
segments.transliteration: tajma`u lana bihi alttawbata wa husna al-awbati

translation.en: by which You join for us both repentance and acceptable return [to You].
O He Who is the best of all supplicated ones
and the most generous of all hoped ones!
O All-sufficer! O All-true!
O He Whose grace is gentle!
(Please) treat me gracefully with Your graciousness,
make me feel happy with Your pardon,
aid me with Your support,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُنْسِنِي كَريمَ ذِكْرِكَ بِوُلاَةِ أَمْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la tunsini karima dhikrika biwulati amrika

translation.en: never make me inattentive of Your noble mention through Your Representatives
and the keepers of Your secret,
protect me against the vicissitudes of time
up to the day of resurrection and raising (the dead to life),
and make Your Representatives attend at the hour of the departure of my souls,
the time of my entry to my grave,
when my deed will be interrupted
and my lifetime will come to its end.
O Allah, (please) remember me all over the stages of trial
when I will reside between the layers of the earth
and the forgetful people will forget me.
Allow me to dwell in the abode of eternity,
settle me in the residence of honor,
make me of the companions of Your intimate servants
and the people of Your choice and selection,
bless me by meeting You,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي حُسْنَ ٱلْعَمَلِ قَبْلَ حُلُولِ ٱلأَجَلِ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni husna al`amali qabla hululi al-ajali

translation.en: and grant me good-doing before the end of my lifetime,

segments.transliteration: bari'an min alzzalali wa su'i alkhatali

translation.en: making me free from slips and foolish doing.

segments.transliteration: allahumma wa awridni hawda nabiyyika muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, allow me to enter the Pool of Your Prophet, Muhammad,
Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household,
allow me to drink from it a quenching drink
that is palatable and salubrious

segments.arabic: لاَ أَظْمَأُ بَعْدَهُ وَلاَ أُحَلَّؤُ وِرْدَهُ
segments.transliteration: la azma'u ba`dahu wa la uhalla'u wirdahu

translation.en: after which I will never be thirsty, I will never be prevented from reaching it,
and I will never be disallowed to approach it.
Make for me the best nourishment

segments.transliteration: wa awfa mi`adin yawma yaqumu al-ashhadu

translation.en: and the most fulfilling promise on the day when the Witnesses will rise.
O Allah, curse the tyrants from the past and the last generations
who usurped the dues of Your Representatives.
O Allah, demolish their posts,
annihilate their allies and their assistants,
and hasten their perdition,
seize their estates,
make narrow their ways,
and curse their helpers and aides.
Allah, (please) hasten the relief of Your Representatives,
restore to them their usurped rights,
cause their Riser to prevail with the truth,
and make him support Your religion
and carry out Your commandments about Your enemies.
O Allah, make the angels of victory surround him

segments.transliteration: wa bima alqayta ilayhi min al-amri

translation.en: and so are the commandments that You addressed to him
at the Destiny Night
so that he will punish Your enemies on behalf of You until You are pleased,

segments.arabic: وَيَعوُدَ دينُكَ بِهِ وَعَلىٰ يَدَيْهِ جَدِيداً غَضّاً
segments.transliteration: wa ya`uda dinuka bihi wa `ala yadayhi jadidan ghaddan

translation.en: Your religion will recover its freshness and bloom at his hands,
he will clean the truth with thorough cleaning,
and he will reject the wrong with absolute rejection.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلىٰ جَمِيعِ آبَائِهِ

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to him and to all of his forefathers,
include us with his companions and group,
and resurrect us during his return

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ نَكُونَ فِي زَمَانِهِ مِنْ أَعْوَانِهِ
segments.transliteration: hatta nakuna fi zamanihi min a`wanihi

translation.en: so that we will live in his age and become of his helpers.
O Allah, make us catch up his advent,
make us witness his days,
bless him, and convey to us his greetings.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayhi wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him.

text.en: Repentance and Desire Salat

The month of Dhu’l-Qa`dah (Zilqad) is the first of the Sacred Months to which Almighty Allah has referred in the Holy Qur'¡n. Sayyid Ibn Tawoos defines this month as the month of responding to the prayers in hardships.

It is narrated from the Holy Prophet (Peace be upon him and his progeny) that it is recommended to offer this salaat on Sunday in the month of Dhil Qa'da .Reference to this salaat: Mafateeh Al Jinan by Shiekh Abbas Qummi (page 247),
Benefits in narrations:
Sins will be forgiven and repentance will be accepted.
Allah (swt) will make liabilities to others cleared and when will die with faith (Iman).
Religion will be intact. Grave will be widened and enlightened.
Parents will be pleased and Allah (swt) will forgive parents and children and will give more wealth.
The Angel of Death will be gentle when taking the soul.
A'maal the month of Dhil Qa'da It is recommended to do Ghusl & Wudhoo ( only Ghusl is insufficient)
Recite a 4 rakat ( 2 X 2) Salaat on any /all Sunday's in Zilqaad month. at any time during the day.
In every Unit/Rakat recite :
<ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
three times :<ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
<ref=1:113>Al-Falaq</ref>
<ref=1:114>Al-Nas</ref>
After Salaam 70 times Istigfaar saying,

translation.en: I seek the forgiveness of Allah and I repent before Him.

text.en: finally, the following statement is said:

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَليِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wala quwwata illa billahil aliyy'al azeem

translation.en: There is no power and no strength except with Allah, the Most High, the All-great.

text.en: After that, the following supplicatory prayer is said

translation.en: O Almighty! O All-forgiving!

segments.arabic: ٱغْفِرْ لِي ذُنُوبِي وَذُنُوبَ جَمِيعِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤمِنَاتِ
segments.transliteration: ighfir le dhunubi wa dhunuba jameea al mumeneena wal mumnenaati

translation.en: (Please) forgive my sins and the sins of all believing men and women,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ إِلاَّ انْتَ
segments.transliteration: Fa inna hu la yaghfiru aldhunuba illa anta

translation.en: for none can forgive sins save You.

text.en: From the 1st of Zilqada to 10th of Zilhijja are also the days of Arbaeen-e-Kalimiyyah.
These are the forty days when Nabi Musa (as) went on Mount Tur for Munajat from Allah (swt).
Initially it was to be for 30 days, another 10 days were added to make it 40 days as mentioned in Sura A’araaf - Aayat 143.
During these days recitation of 'LAA ILAAHA ILLALLAAH ' is mustahab and very much stressed. (Source: Tazkiye Nafs by Ayatullah Misbah Yazdi)
Fasting for 3 Consecutive days Thursday Friday & Saturday has immense rewards in months of Zilqad, Zilhajj, Moharram

The fifteenth night of Dhu’l-Qa’dah is a blessed night at which
Almighty Allah observes His faithful servants with the eye of mercy.
According to a tradition that is reported from the Holy Prophet
(s.a.w.a.), one who practices acts of worship at this night will have the
reward of one hundred fasters who confine themselves to mosques and
who have never disobeyed Almighty Allah. Accordingly, it is highly
advisable to seize this excellent opportunity and practice acts of
worship and obedience, offer prayers, and pray Almighty Allah for
granting one’s needs. In this respect, it has been narrated that
Almighty Allah will respond to one who prays Him for any need at
this night.

On the twenty-third of Dhu’l-Qa’dah, AH 200, <ref=3:1240>Ziyarat Of Imam Ali Ridha(as)</ref>
 departed life, according to some narrations. Hence, it is
familiar to visit his tomb on this day whether from nearby or from far
off. In this respect, Sayyid Ibn Tawus, in Iqbal al-A’mal, says that he
has seen in the book of some non-Arab scholars that it is
recommended to visit the holy tomb of Imam al-Rida(a.s.) on the
twenty-third of Dhu’l-Qa’dah from nearby or from far off by one of
the familiar forms of Ziyarah or any other form.
On this day, Prophet Abraham (a.s.) was born.On this day too, yet according to the narration of the two Shaykhs, Imam AliAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.) married Lady Fatimah al-Zahra’(a.s.).
A number of devotional acts may be practiced on this blessed day:
First: It is recommended to observe fasting on this day, for its reward is equal to the reward of eighty-month worship.

Second: It is recommended to offer Salat Fatimah. According to Shaykh al-Tusi, this prayer consists of four units each couple of which are offered separately. At each unit, Surah al-Faatehah is recited once and Surah al-Tawheed repeated fifty times. After the Taslim statement, the famous Tasbih al-Zahra’ litany is done. Thereafter, the following doxology is said:

translation.en: Glory be to the Lord of Honor and Sublime Authority.
Glory be to the Lord of Majesty and Exalted Greatness.
Glory be to the Lord of eternal, splendid sovereignty.

segments.arabic: سُبحَانَ مَنْ يَرَىٰ أَثَرَ ٱلَّنمْلِ فِي ٱلصَّفَا
segments.transliteration: subhana man yara athara alnnamli fi alssafa

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who makes out the footprints of the ant on the stone.

segments.arabic: سُبحَانَ مَنْ يَرَىٰ وَقْعَ ٱلطَّيْرِ فِي ٱلْهَوَاءِ
segments.transliteration: subhana man yara waq`a alttayri fi alhawa'i

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who knows the exact time and place of the bird dipping down through the air.

segments.arabic: سُبحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ هٰكَذَا لاَ هكَذَا غَيْرُهُ
segments.transliteration: subhana man huwa hakadha la hakadha ghayruhu

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who is like this and no one other than Him is like this.

text.en:
Third: It is recommended to offer a two unit prayer half an hour before midday. At each unit, Surah al-Faatehah is recited once and Surah al-Tawheed, <ref=1:2:255-257>Ayat Al-Kursi</ref>
, and <ref=1:97>Surah Al-Qadr</ref>
 repeated ten times each.
4.One who fears an oppressor and says the following words on this day:

translation.en: Sufficient, sufficient, sufficient,
unto my prayer is Your knowledge with my status.

text.en: will be saved, by Almighty Allah
Dua after Moon sighting - Iqbal Aamal:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ انَّ هذا هِلالٌ عَظَّمْتَ شَهْرَهُ، وَ شَرَّفْتَ قَدْرَهُ، وَ اعْلَنْتَ ذِكْرَهُ، وَ اعْلَيْتَ امْرَهُ، وَ مَدَحْتَ عَشْرَهُ، وَ جَعَلْتَ فِيهِ تَأْدِيَةَ الْمَناسِكِ، وَ سَعادَةَ الْعابِدِ وَ النّاسِكِ.

translation.en: “O‟ my God! This is the crescent moon of the month which You have exalted. You honored it, declared it, raised it, praised its first ten days, and established ceremonies during it with prosperity for the worshippers.

segments.arabic: وَ كَمَّلْتَ فِيهِ كَشْفَ الْوِلايَةِ الْمُهِمَّةِ عَلَى الأُمَّةِ وَ زَوالَ الْغُمَّةِ، بِما جَرى‌ فِي الْغَدِيرِ ثامِنَ عَشْرِهِ، وَ إِظْهارِ اللَّهِ جَلَّ جَلالُهُ لِسِرِّهِ حَتّى‌ صارَ لِلدِّينِ كَمالًا وَ تَماماً، وَ لِلِاسْلامِ عَقْداً وَ عَهْداً وَ نِظاماً، فَقُلْتَ جَلَّ جَلالُكَ‌ «الْيَوْمَ أَكْمَلْتُ لَكُمْ دِينَكُمْ وَ أَتْمَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ نِعْمَتِي وَ رَضِيتُ لَكُمُ الْإِسْلامَ دِيناً»

translation.en: You unveiled the Trusteeship to the nation and removed the sorrows during what happened in Al-Ghadir in the eighth year. The Almighty God made His Secret public and perfected the religion. You said, “This day have I perfected your religion for you, completed My favor upon you, and have chosen for you Islam as your religion.”1

segments.arabic: وَ خَصَصْتَ هذَا الشَّهْرَ بِيَوْمِ الْمُباهِلَةِ، الَّذِي اظْهَرْتَ حُجَّةَ الإِيمانِ عَلَى الْكُفْرِ إِظْهاراً مُبِيناً، وَ وَهَبْتَ لِلَّذِينَ باهَلْتَ بِهِمْ مَقاماً مَكِيناً. وَ اوْدَعْتَ فِي هذا الشَّهْرِ مِنَ الأَسْرارِ وَ الْمَبارِّ ما يَأْتِي ذِكْرُ بَعْضِهِ بِصَحِيحِ الأَخْبارِ وَ صَرِيحِ الاعْتِبارِ،

translation.en: You also made this month especial with the Invocation Day on which You clearly showed the true faith to the atheists and bestowed a noble rank on those who prepared for it. You also placed other goods and secrets in it that shall be explained with clear narrations and sound reasons.

segments.arabic: وَ جَعَلْتَهُ تَسْلِيَةً عَمّا يَأْتِي بَعْدَهُ مِنْ شَهْرِ الامْتِحانِ، فَبَدَأْتَ بالإِحْسانِ وَ الامْتِنانِ قَبْلَ التَّشْرِيفِ بِالرِّضا بِالْبَلْوى‌ الزَّائِدَةِ فِي جِهادِ اهْلِ الْعُدْوانِ.

translation.en: You also established it as a month in preparation for the next month being the month of trial. You started with Kindness and Favors after we encounter the contentment with manifold calamities that occurred in fighting the enemies.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَكَما عَرَّفْتَنا بِشَرَفِ هذِهِ الْعَوائِدِ وَ دَعَوْتَنا الَى الضِّيافَةِ الى‌ مُقَدَّسِ تِلْكَ الْمَوائِدِ،

translation.en: O‟ my God!You honored us with the knowledge of these blessings and invited us to the party in which these tables are spread.

segments.arabic:
فَطَهِّرْنا تَطْهِيراً نَصْلَحُ بِهِ لِمُوافَقَةِ اهْلِ الطَّهارَةِ وَ مُرافَقَةِ فَضْلِ الْبِشارَةِ.

وَ هَبْ لَنا فِيهِ ما يَعْجُزُ مِنْهُ مَنْطِقُ اهْلِ الْعِبارَةِ،

translation.en: Please purify us such that we may deserve to be in the company of the pure ones and receive the favor of Your Glad Tidings. Please bestow on us what even the eloquent speakers are unable to express.

segments.arabic: وَ هَبْ لَنا فِيهِ ما يَعْجُزُ مِنْهُ مَنْطِقُ اهْلِ الْعِبارَةِ، وَ لِيَكُونَ فَوائِدُ رَحْمَتِكَ وَ مَوائِدُ ضِيافَتِكَ صافِيَةً مِنَ الأَكْدارِ، وَ مَصُونَةً عَنْ خَطَرِ الْآصارِ، وَ مُناسِبَةً لِابْتِدائِكَ بِالنَّوالِ‌ قَبْلَ السُّؤَالِ.وَ ابْدَأْ فِي ذلِكَ بِمَنْ يَسْتَفْتِحُ بِالْبِدايَةِ أَبْوابَ الْفَلاحِ وَ النَّجاحِ، وَ اشْرِكْ مَعَنا مَنْ يُعِيننا امْرُهُ،

translation.en: The benefits of Your Mercy and Tablespread are free of impurities, protected from danger of sins, and is in line with bestowing before asking. Please start with those who first open the gates of prosperity and salvation, and let the people we care for be partners with us in this.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْمَعْ قُلُوبَنا عَلَى الصَّلاحِ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ يا ارْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

translation.en: Please unite our hearts in what is good with Your Mercy! O‟ the Most Compassionate, Most Merciful.”

text.en: Aamal of the Night of Arafah

This blessed night is the night of praying for granting all requests. Repentance at this night is accepted, prayers responded, and acts of worship and obedience achieve the reward of one hundred and seventy years of worship. The devotional acts at this night are as follows:
First: It is recommended to say the following supplicatory prayer. It is narrated that Almighty Allah will forgive one who says this supplicatory prayer at the ‘Arafat Night or Friday nights:

translation.en: O Allah Who witnesses all secrets of hearts,
Who is the object of all complaints,
Who knows all hidden things,
and Who is the aim of all needs!
O He Who instigates favoring on the Servants!
O He Who is All-generous in pardoning!
O He Who is All-excellent in overlooking!
O All-magnanimous!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لا يُوَارِي مِنْهُ لَيْلٌ دَاجٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yuwari minhu laylun dajin<

translation.en: O He Who cannot be concealed by the covering darkness of night,
the roaring clamor of oceans,
the skies along with their constellations,
or the thunderous murk.
O He with Whom the entire murk is light,
I beseech You in the name of the brightness of Your Noble Face

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي تَجَلَّيْتَ بِهِ لِلْجَبَلِ فَجَعَلْتَهُ دَكّاً
segments.transliteration: alladhi tajallayta bihi liljabali faja`altahu dakkan<

translation.en: through which You manifested Your glory to the mountain; so, You made it crumble
and (Prophet) Moses fell down in a swoon,

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي رَفَعْتَ بِهِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ بِلاَ عَمَدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi rafa`ta bihi alssamawati bila`amadin<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which You raised the heavens without any pillars

segments.arabic: وَسَطَحْتَ بِهِ ٱلارْضَ عَلَىٰ وَجْهِ مَاءٍ جَمَدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa satahta bihi al-arda `ala wajhi ma'in jamadin<

translation.en: and by which You flattened the earth on the surface of solid water,
in the name of Your Name—the concealed, the stored,
the scribed, and the pure,
which You answer any one who beseeches You in its name
and grant any one who asks You his request,
in the name of Your Name; the Praised, Holy, and Demonstrative,

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي هُوَ نُورٌ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ نُورٍ

translation.en: which is light over the entire light,
which is light made of light,
and from which all lights take their brightness;
if it reaches the earth, it will be rent asunder,
if it reaches the heavens, they will be opened,
and if it reaches the throne, it will quiver;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي تَرْتَعِدُ مِنْهُ فَرَائِصُ مَلائِكَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi tarta`idu minhu fara'isu mala'ikatika<

translation.en: and in the name of Your Name from the fear of which the muscles of Your angels tremble.

segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bihaqqi jabra'ila wa mika'ila wa israfila<

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of [Archangels] Gabriel, Michael, and Seraph,
in the name of Muhammad, the Divinely-chosen Prophet,
peace be upon him, his Household,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala jami`i al-anbiya'i wa jami`i almala'ikati<

translation.en: and all prophets and angels;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱلاِﹾسْمِ ٱلَّذِي مَشَىٰ بِهِ ٱلْخِضْرُ عَلَىٰ قُلَلِ ٱلْمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa bilismi alladhi masha bihi alkhidru `ala qulali alma'i<

translation.en: in the name of the Name through which al-Khadir could walk on waters

segments.arabic: كَمَا مَشَىٰ بِهِ عَلَىٰ جَدَدِ ٱلارْضِ

translation.en: just as he used to walk on lands;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي فَلَقْتَ بِهِ ٱلبَحْرَ لِمُوسَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi falaqta bihi albahra limusa<

translation.en: in the name of You Name through which You caused the sea to cleave asunder for Moses,
You drowned Pharaoh and his people,

segments.arabic: وَانْجَيْتَ بِهِ مُوسَىٰ بْنَ عِمْرَانَ وَمَنْ مَعَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa anjayta bihi musa bna `imrana wa man ma`ahu<

translation.en: and saved Moses, the son of `Imran, and those who accompanied him;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ مُوسَىٰ بْنُ عِمْرَانَ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi musa bnu `imrana<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which Moses, the son of `Imran, besought You
from the right slope of the Mount;

segments.arabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْتَ لَهُ وَالْقَيْتَ عَلَيْهِ مَحَبَّةً مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: fastajabta lahu wa alqayta `alayhi mahabbatan minka<

translation.en: so, You responded to him and cast down upon him love from You;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي بِهِ احْيَا عِيسَىٰ بْنُ مَرْيَمَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi bihi ahya `isa bnu maryama almawta<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which Jesus, the son of Mary, brought life to the dead,
could speak while he was a child in the cradle,
and healed the blind and the leprous by Your permission;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ حَمَلَةُ عَرْشِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi hamalatu `arshika<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which the bearers of Your Throne besought You

segments.transliteration: wa jabra'ilu wa mika'ilu wa israfilu<

translation.en: and so did Gabriel, Michael, Seraph,

segments.arabic: وَحَبِيبُكَ مُحَمَّدٌ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa habibuka muhammadun salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi<

translation.en: Muhammad Your most beloved one (peace be upon him and upon his Household)
Your favorite angels,
Your messaged Prophets,

segments.arabic: وَعِبَادُكَ ٱلصَّالِحُونَ مِنْ اهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلارَضِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa `ibaduka alssalihuna min ahli alssamawati wal-aradina<

translation.en: and Your righteous servants from among the inhabitants of the heavens and the layers of the earth;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ ذُو ٱلنُّونِ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi dhu alnnuni<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which Dhu’l-Nun (Prophet Jonah) besought You

segments.arabic: إِذْ ذَهَبَ مُغَاضِباً فَظَنَّ انْ لَنْ تَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: idh dhahaba mughadiban fazanna an lan taqdira `alayhi<

translation.en: when he departed in wrath: he imagined that You had no power over him,

segments.arabic: فَنَادَىٰ فِي ٱلظُّلُمَاتِ انْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ
segments.transliteration: fanada fi alzzulumati an la ilaha illa anta subhanaka<

translation.en: but he cried through the depths of darkness, “There is no god but You. Glory be to You.
I was indeed one of those who are wrong!”

segments.transliteration: fastajabta lahu wa najjaytahu min alghammi<

translation.en: So, You responded to him and delivered him from the grief
and thus do You deliver the believers;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ٱلَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ دَاوُودُ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika al`azimi alladhi da`aka bihi dawudu<

translation.en: in the name of Your Great Name by which David besought You

segments.arabic: وَخَرَّ لَكَ سَاجِداً فَغَفَرْتَ لَهُ ذَنْبَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa kharra laka sajidan faghafarta lahu dhanbahu<

translation.en: and as he fell down prostrating himself to You, You rectified it for him;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي دَعَتْكَ بِهِ آسِيَةُ ٱمْرَاةُ فِرْعَوْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`atka bihi asiyatu imra'atu fir`awna<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which ªsiyah, the wife of Pharaoh, besought You,

segments.arabic: إِذْ قَالَتْ: ”رَبِّ ٱبْنِ لِي عِنْدَكَ بَيْتاً فِي ٱلْجَنَّةِ
segments.transliteration: idh qalat rabbi ibni li `indaka baytan fi aljannati<

translation.en: saying, “My Lord! Build for me a house with You in Paradise,
deliver me from Pharaoh and his doing,
and deliver me from the unjust people.”
So, You responded to her prayer;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي دَعَاكَ بِهِ ايُّوبُ إِذْ حَلَّ بِهِ ٱلْبَلاَءُ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi ayyubu idh halla bihi albala'u<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which (Prophet) Job besought You after misfortune had befallen him;

segments.transliteration: fa`afaytahu wa ataytahu ahlahu wa mithlahum ma`ahum<

translation.en: so, You healed him and gave him his family and the like of them with them:
a mercy from You and a reminder to the worshippers;

segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi ya`qubu<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which (Prophet) Jacob besought You;

segments.arabic: فَرَدَدْتَ عَلَيْهِ بَصَرَهُ وَقُرَّةَ عَيْنِهِ يُوسُفَ وَجَمَعْتَ شَمْلَهُ
segments.transliteration: faradadta `alayhi basarahu wa qurrata `aynihi yusufa wa jama`ta shamlahu<

translation.en: so, You returned to him his sight and the delight of his heart, Joseph, and You reunified him.

segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi sulaymanu<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which (Prophet) Solomon besought You;

segments.arabic: فَوَهَبْتَ لَهُ مُلْكاً لاَ يَنْبَغِي لاحَدٍ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ
segments.transliteration: fawahabta lahu mulkan la yanbaghi li'ahadin min ba`dihi<

translation.en: So, You gifted him kingdom that none else should never gain,
for You are verily the Granter of bounties;

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي سَخَّرْتَ بِهِ ٱلْبُرَاقَ لِمُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi sakhkharta bihi alburaqa limuhammadin<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which You subdued the Buraq to Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi wa sallama<

translation.en: peace and blessings be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ تَعَالَىٰ: ”سُبْحَانَ ٱلَّذِي اسْرَىٰ بِعَبْدِهِ لَيْلاً
segments.transliteration: idh qala ta`ala subhana alladhi asra bi`abdihi laylan<

translation.en: as Almighty Allah says, “Glory be to Him Who made His servant to go on a night

segments.arabic: مِنَ ٱلْمَسْجِدِ ٱلْحَرَامِ إِلَىٰ ٱلْمَسْجِدِ ٱلاقْصَىٰ“
segments.transliteration: min almasjidi alharami ila almasjidi al-aqsa<

translation.en: from the Sacred Mosque to the remote mosque.”

segments.arabic: وَقَوْلُهُ: ”سُبْحَانَ ٱلَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa qawluhu subhana alladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinina<

translation.en: He also says, “Glory be to Him Who made this subservient to us and we were not able to do it.
Surely, to our Lord we must return;”

segments.arabic: وَبِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي تَنَزَّلَ بِهِ جَبْرَائِيلُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi tanazzala bihi jabra'ilu `alamuhammadin<

translation.en: in the name of Your Name by which (Archangel) Gabriel used to ascend to Muhammad,
peace be upon him and his Household;

segments.transliteration: wa bismika alladhi da`aka bihi adamu<

translation.en: and in the name of Your Name by which Adam besought You;

segments.transliteration: faghafarta lahu dhanbahu wa askantahu jannataka<

translation.en: so, You rectified him and allowed him to dwell in Your Paradise.
I beseech You in the name of the Great Qur'an,
in the name of Muhammad, the Seal of the Prophets,
in the name of Abraham,
in the name of Your Judgment on the Day of the Administration of Justice,
in the name of the Scales when they shall be set up,
the Scrolls when they shall be laid open,

segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi alqalami wa ma jara<

translation.en: the Pen and whatever has been decided,
and the Tablet and whatever it has recorded;

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّ ٱلاِﹾسْمِ ٱلَّذِي كَتَبْتَهُ عَلَىٰ سُرَادِقِ ٱلْعَرْشِ
segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi alismi alladhi katabtahu `ala suradiqi al`arshi<

translation.en: in the name of the Name that You had inscribed on the pavilion of the Divine Throne
two thousand years before You created the beings, the world,
the sun, and the moon.

segments.arabic: وَاشْهَدُ انْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu<

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah,
alone without having any partner,
and that Muhammad is his servant and messenger.

segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bismika almakhzuni fi khaza'inika<

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of Your Name that is hoarded in Your stores,

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي ٱسْتَاثَرْتَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ

translation.en: You have kept in the knowledge of the Unseen with You

segments.arabic: لَمْ يَظْهَرْ عَلَيْهِ احَدٌ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ

translation.en: and it has not been shown to any of Your creatures,
be him a favorite angel,
a missioned Prophet,
or a chosen servant.

segments.arabic: وَاسْالُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي شَقَقْتَ بِهِ ٱلْبِحَارَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bismika alladhi shaqaqta bihi albihara<

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of Your Name by which You rent asunder the oceans,
the mountains rose,
and night and day follow each other,

segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi alssab`i almathani walqur'ani al`azimi<

translation.en: in the name of the seven of the oft-repeated verses and the Grand Qur'an,
in the name of the noble, recording angels,

segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi ta-ha wa ya-sin wa kaf-ha-ya-`ayn-sad<

translation.en: in the name of Ta-Ha, Ya-Sin, Kaf-Ha-Ya-`Ayn-Sad,
Ha-Mim-`Ayn-Sin-Qaf,
and in the name of the Torah of Moses,
the Gospel of Jesus,
the Psalms of David,
the Furqan (Criterion) of Muhammad,
peace be upon him, his Household,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala jami`i alrrusuli wa bahiyyan sharahiyyan<

translation.en: and all the messengers and bahiyya sharahiyya.([1])

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اسْالُكَ بِحَقِّ تِلْكَ ٱلْمُنَاجَاةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bihaqqi tilka almunajati<

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of this confidential talk

segments.arabic: ٱلَّتِي كَانَتْ بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَ مُوسَىٰ بْنِ عِمْرَانَ
segments.transliteration: allati kanat baynaka wa bayna musa bni `imrana<

translation.en: which took place between You and Moses, the son of `Imran,
on the Mount Tur Sayna',

segments.arabic: وَاسْالُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي عَلَّمْتَهُ مَلَكَ ٱلْمَوْتِ لِقَبْضِ ٱلارْوَاحِ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bismika alladhi `allamtahu malaka almawti liqabdi al-arwahi<

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of Your Name which You taught the Angel of Death so that he would be able to grasp the souls,

segments.arabic: وَاسْالُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي كُتِبَ عَلَىٰ وَرَقِ ٱلزَّيْتُونِ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bismika alladhi kutiba `ala waraqi alzzaytuni<

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of Your Name which was written on the leaves of olive-trees;
so, fires subdued to these leaves

segments.transliteration: faqulta ya naru kuni bardan wa salaman<

translation.en: after You said, “O fire! Be a comfort and peace,”

segments.arabic: وَاسْالُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي كَتَبْتَهُ عَلَىٰ سُرَادِقِ ٱلْمَجْدِ وَٱلْكَرَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka bismika alladhi katabtahu `ala suradiqi almajdi walkaramati<

translation.en: and I beseech You in the name of Your Name that You wrote on the canopies of Glory and Dignity.
O He Who cannot be annoyed by any beseecher
He Who cannot be influenced by any reward (that He presents)!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ بِهِ يُسْتَغَاثُ وَإِلَيْهِ يُلْجَا
segments.transliteration: ya man bihi yustaghathu wa ilayhi yulja'u<

translation.en: O He Whose refuge is taken and to Whom resort is made!
I beseech You in the name of the Seats of Honor belonging to Your Throne,
the utmost of mercy in Your Book,
Your All-great Name,
Your All-high majesty,
and Your most high, perfect Words.

segments.transliteration: allahumma rabba alrriyahi wa ma dharat<

translation.en: O Allah, Lord of winds and whatever they scatter far,
Lord of the sky and whatever it covers,
the Lord of the earth and whatever it carries,
the Lord of the devils and whomever they mislead,
and the Lord of the oceans and wherever they flow.

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّ كُلِّ حَقٍّ هُوَ عَلَيْكَ حَقٌّ
segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi kulli haqqin huwa `alayka haqqun<

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of everything that enjoys a right with You,
in the name of the favorite angels,
the angels managing the spirits, the cherubim,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ لَكَ بِٱللَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ لاَ يَفْتُرُونَ
segments.transliteration: walmusabbihina laka billayli walnnahari la yafturuna<

translation.en: and the angels praising You night and day without showing sluggishness,
in the name of Abraham, Your intimate friend,

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّ كُلِّ وَلِيٍّ يُنَادِيكَ بَيْنَ ٱلصَّفَا وَٱلْمَرْوَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqi kulli waliyyin yunadika bayna alssafawalmarwati<

translation.en: and in the name of each and every saint who calls You between Safa and Marwah
and You respond to his/her prayer.

segments.arabic: يَا مُجِيبُ اسْالُكَ بِحَقِّ هٰذِهِ ٱلاسْمَاءِ وَبِهٰذِهِ ٱلدَّعَوَاتِ
segments.transliteration: ya mujibu as'aluka bihaqqi hadhihi al-asma'i wa bihadhihi aldda`awati<

translation.en: O Responsive Lord! I beseech You in the name of all these names and all these prayers

segments.arabic: انْ تَغْفِرَ لَنَا مَا قَدَّمْنَا وَمَا اخَّرْنَا
segments.transliteration: an taghfira lana ma qaddamna wa ma akhkharna<

translation.en: to forgive us all our past and coming sins,

segments.transliteration: wa ma asrarna wa ma a`lanna<

translation.en: including the secret and the open,

segments.transliteration: wa ma abdayna wa ma akhfayna<

translation.en: the hidden and the public,

segments.transliteration: wa ma anta a`lamu bihi minna<

translation.en: and those whom You know better than we do.
Verily, You have power over all things.
[Respond] in the name of Your mercy, O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
O He Who guards all strangers!
O He Who brings entertainment to all lonely ones!
O He Who is the power of all the weak!
O He Who is the support of all the persecuted!
O He Who bestows upon all the deprived!
O He Who brings entertainment to all the lonesome!
O He Who is the company of all those on journeys!
O He Who is the pillar of all the present!

segments.transliteration: ya ghafira kulli dhanbin wa khati'atin<

translation.en: O He Who forgives all sins and offenses!
O He Who is the aid of all those begging aid!
O He Who is the relief of all those pleading for relief!
O He Who relieves the calamity of those inflicted with calamities!
O He Who alleviate the distress of the distressed ones!
O He Who is the Originator of the heavens and the layers of the earth!
O He Who is the utmost hope of the seekers!
O He Who responds to the prayers of the troubled!
O He Who is the most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
O Lord of the worlds!
O Master of the Judgment Day!
O most Magnanimous of all those who act magnanimously!
O most Generous of all those who act generously!
O most Hearing of all those who can hear!
O most Seeing of all those who can see!
O most Powerful of all those who have power!

segments.arabic: ٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُغَيِّرُ ٱلنِّعَمَ
segments.transliteration: ighfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tughayyiru alnni`ama<

translation.en: (Please) forgive my sins that change the bounties

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُورِثُ ٱلنَّدَمَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati turithu alnnadama<

translation.en: And forgive me my sins that bring about remorse,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُورِثُ ٱلسَّقَمَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati turithu alssaqama<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that result in ailment,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَهْتِكُ ٱلْعِصَمَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tahtiku al`isama<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that tear safeguards,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَرُدُّ ٱلدُّعَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati taruddu alddu`a'a<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that repel prayers,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَحْبِسُ قَطْرَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tahbisu qatra alssama'i<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that withhold the drops of the sky,

segments.arabic: وَاغْفِرْ لِي الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُعَجِّلُ الفَناءِ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tu`ajjilu alfana'a<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that hasten extinction,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَجْلِبُ ٱلشَّقَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tajlibu alshshaqa'a<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that beget misery,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُظْلِمُ ٱلْهَوَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tuzlimu alhawa'a<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that darken the atmospheres,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَكْشِفُ ٱلْغِطَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati takshifu alghita'a<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that disclose the coverings,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي لاَ يَغْفِرُهَا غَيْرُكَ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati la yaghfiruhaghayruka ya allahu<

translation.en: forgive me my sins that none can forgive save You, O Allah,

segments.arabic: وَٱحْمِلْ عَنِّي كُلَّ تَبِعَةٍ لاحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wahmil `anni kulla tabi`atin li'ahadin min khalqika<

translation.en: bear from me every offensive that I have made against any of Your creatures,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ امْرِي فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً وَيُسْراً
segments.transliteration: waj`al li min amri farajan wa makhrajan wa yusran<

translation.en: make all my affairs reach at relief, exit, and easiness,
make Your tranquility ascend on my chest,

segments.arabic: وَرَجَاءَكَ فِي قَلْبِي حَتَّىٰ لاَ ارْجُوَ غَيْرَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa raja'aka fi qalbi hatta la arjuwa ghayraka<

translation.en: and make hope in You ascend on my heart so that I shall never hope for anyone save You.
O Allah, (please) safeguard me, heal me in all my situations,
be my companion at nights and days,

segments.transliteration: wa min bayni yadayya wa min khalfi<

translation.en: be ahead of me, behind me,
from my right side, from my left side,

segments.transliteration: wa min fawqi wa min tahti<

translation.en: from above me, and from beneath me,
make easy all the ways for me,
make excellent facilitation for me,
do not disappoint me in hardships,
guide me, O Best of all guides,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَكِلْنِي إِلَىٰ نَفْسِي فِي ٱلامُورِ
segments.transliteration: wa la takilni ila nafsi fi al-umuri<

translation.en: do not leave me alone in all my affairs,
make me receive all pleasures,
and make me return to my family with prosperity, success,
and gladness in the present and in the future.
Verily, You have power over all things.
(Please) bestow upon me with Your favors,
expand for me the most favorable of Your sustenance,
apply me to the obedience to You,
redeem me from Your chastisement and Fire,

segments.arabic: وَٱقْلِبْنِي إِذَا تَوَفَّيْتَنِي إِلَىٰ جَنَّتِكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: waqlibni idha tawaffaytani ila jannatika birahmatika<

translation.en: and when You grasp my soul, lead me to Your Paradise, by Your mercy.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوَالِ نِعْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min zawali ni`matika<

translation.en: O Allah, I seek Your protection against confiscation of Your graces,
against alternation of Your conferral of wellbeing on me,
against the befalling of Your punishment,
and against the ensuing of Your chastisement.

segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min jahdi albala'i<

translation.en: I seek Your protection against arduous hardships,
against coming about of misery,
against evil end results,
against my enemies’ gloating over my grief,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَا يَنْزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri ma yanzilu min alssama'i<

translation.en: against the evil of everything that ascends from the heavens,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِي ٱلْكِتَابِ ٱلْمُنْزَلِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri ma fi alkitabi almunzali<

translation.en: and against the evils mentioned in the Revealed Book.
O Allah, (please) do not include me with the evil ones,
do not include me with the people of Hellfire,
do not deprive me of the companionship of the upright people,
grant me a pleasant lifetime,

segments.transliteration: wa tawaffani wafatan tayyibatan tulhiquni bil-abrari<

translation.en: decide for me a kind of death due to which You will join me to the Pious Ones,
and confer upon me with the companionship of the Prophets

segments.arabic: فِي مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِنْدَ مَلِيكٍ مُقْتَدِرٍ

translation.en: in the seat of honesty with the All-powerful King.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ حُسْنِ بَلاَئِكَ وَصُنْعِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma laka alhamdu `ala husni bala'ika wa sun`ika<

translation.en: O Allah, all praise be to You for Your pleasant trials and deeds to us.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ ٱلإِسْلاَمِ وَٱتِّبَاعِ ٱلسُّنَّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu `ala al-islami wattiba`i alssunnati<

translation.en: All praise be to You for my being Muslim and for my following the Prophet’s traditions.
O my Lord, as You have guided them (i.e. the pious)
and taught them Your Book, (please) guide us and teach us.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ حُسْنِ بَلاَئِكَ وَصُنْعِكَ عِنْدِي خَاصَّةً
segments.transliteration: wa laka alhamdu `ala husni bala'ika wa sun`ika `indi khassatan<

translation.en: All praise be to You for Your pleasant trials and deeds to me in private,
as You created me, gifted me an excellent form,
taught me, gifted me excellent erudition,
guided me, and gifted me excellent guidance.

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ إِنْعَامِكَ عَلَيَّ قَدِيماً وَحَدِيثاً
segments.transliteration: falaka alhamdu `ala in`amika `alayya qadiman wa hadithan<

translation.en: So, all praise be to You for Your favors that You conferred upon me in the past and in the present.

segments.arabic: فَكَمْ مِنْ كَرْبٍ يَا سَيِّدِي قَدْ فَرَّجْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: fakam min karbin ya sayyidi qad farrajtahu<

translation.en: Too many are the agonies that You, my Master, relieved.

segments.arabic: وَكَمْ مِنْ غَمٍّ يَا سَيِّدِي قَدْ نَفَّسْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa kam min ghammin ya sayyidi qad naffastahu<

translation.en: Too many are the distresses that You, my Master, eased.

segments.arabic: وَكَمْ مِنْ هَمٍّ يَا سَيِّدِي قَدْ كَشَفْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa kam min hammin ya sayyidi qad kashaftahu<

translation.en: Too many are the sufferings that You, my Master, alleviated.

segments.arabic: وَكَمْ مِنْ بَلاَءٍ يَا سَيِّدِي قَدْ صَرَفْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa kam min bala'in ya sayyidi qad saraftahu<

translation.en: Too many are the hardships from which You, my Master, saved me.

segments.arabic: وَكَمْ مِنْ عَيْبٍ يَا سَيِّدِي قَدْ سَتَرْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa kam min `aybin ya sayyidi qad satartahu<

translation.en: Too many are the defects that You, my Master, covered.
So, all praise be to You for all conditions,
in every place and time,
every circumstance and situation,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala hadhihi alhali wa kulli halin<

translation.en: and for the current condition and all conditions.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْنِي مِنْ افْضَلِ عِبَادِكَ نَصِيباً

translation.en: O Allah, (please) shower upon me the best share of every good thing

segments.arabic: فِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ مِنْ خَيْرٍ تَقْسِمُهُ
segments.transliteration: fi hadha alyawmi min khayrin taqsimuhu<

translation.en: that You decide for Your servants on this day,
such as harm that You decide to hold off,
evil that You decide to ward off,
ordeal that You decide to deter,
grace that You decide to grant,
item of mercy that You decide to distribute,
and item of wellbeing that You decide to cover up (on one of Your servants),
for You verily have power over all things,
in Your hands lie the hoards of the heavens and the earth,
You are verily the One, the All-generous, and the Best Bestower,
You are the One Whose beseechers are not rejected,
and You are the One Who never disappoint those who put hope in Him,
the One Who is never influenced by the rewards that He bestows upon anyone,
and the One Whose possessions never run out;
rather, You always increase in quantity, excellent gift,
conferrals, and magnanimity.

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي مِنْ خَزَائِنِكَ ٱلَّتِي لاَ تَفْنَىٰ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni min khaza'inika allati la tafna<

translation.en: (Please) bestow upon me from Your hoards that never come to an end
and from Your expansive mercy.
Your conferral shall never be confined
and You have power over all things;
in the name of Your mercy; O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en: Second: Recite the following 10 tasbeehaat a thousand times:

translation.en: Glory be to Him Whose Throne is in the heavens.
Glory be to Him Whose dominion is on the earth.
Glory be to Him Whose decree is in the graves.
Glory be to Him Whose ways are in oceans.
Glory be to Him Whose authority is (clearly shown) in Hellfire.
Glory be to Him Whose mercy is in Paradise.
Glory be to Him Whose justice is on the Resurrection Day.
Glory be to Him Who raised the skies.
Glory be to Him Who expanded the earth.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱلَّذِي لَا مَلْجَأَ وَلَا مَنْجَا مِنْهُ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ

translation.en: Glory be to Him save Whom there is no shelter and no salvation.

text.en: Third: Shaykh al-Tusi, Sayyid Ibn Tawus, al-Kaf`ami, and Sayyid Ibn Baqi have recorded that it is recommended to say the following prayer on Fridays and at Friday nights and on the day and night of `Arafat (the ninth of Dhu’l-Hijjah).The supplication below is as quoted from Shaykh al-Tusi’s book of al-Misbah:

translation.en: O Allah, One may call up, prepare,
ready oneself, and stand prepared
for purpose of coming to a creature
in the hope of gaining his aid
and asking for his gift and present.
As for myself, to You—O my Lord—I make my preparations and readiness
hoping for Your pardon
and asking for Your gift and present.
So, (please) do not disappoint my entreaty.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ يَخِيبُ عَلَيْهِ سَائِلٌ

translation.en: O He Who never disappoints His beseechers
and Whose prizes never decrease His ample-giving!

segments.arabic: فَإنّي لَمْ آتِكَ ثِقَةً بِعَمَلٍ صَالِحٍ عَمِلْتُهُ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni lam atika thiqatan bi`amalin salihin `amiltuhu

translation.en: I have not come to You with confidence of a righteous deed that I have done
nor have I had any hope in a grant of any creature.

segments.arabic: اتَيْتُكَ مُقِرّاً عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي بِٱلإسَاءَةِ وَٱلظُّلْمِ

translation.en: Rather, I have come to You professing myself to be evildoer and transgressor

segments.arabic: مُعْتَرِفاً بِانْ لاَ حُجَّةَ لِي وَلاَ عُذْرَ
segments.transliteration: mu`tarifan bi-an la hujjata li wa la `udhra

translation.en: and confessing that I lack any pretext or excuse.
I have come to You hoping for Your great pardon
due to which You have pardoned the wrongdoers.

segments.arabic: فَلَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ طُولُ عُكُوفِهِمْ عَلِي عَظِيمِ ٱلْجُرْمِ

translation.en: Hence, their long-lasting retirement to their grave offenses has not prevented You
from turning to them with mercy.
O He Whose mercy is huge
and Whose pardon is great;

segments.arabic: يَا عَظيـمُ يَا عَظيـمُ يَا عَظيـمُ

translation.en: O All-great, O All-great, O All-great;
nothing can repel Your rage except Your forbearance

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يُنْجِي مِنْ سَخَطِكَ إِلاَّ ٱلتَّضَرُّعُ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yunji min sakhatika illa alttadarru`u ilayka

translation.en: and nothing can save from Your wrath except imploring earnestly to You.
So, my God, (please) grant me a relief

segments.arabic: بِٱلْقُدْرَةِ ٱلَّتِي تُحْيِي بِهَا مَيْتَ ٱلْبِلاَدِ
segments.transliteration: bilqudrati allati tuhyi biha mayta albiladi

translation.en: in the name of the power through which You restore to life the derelict lands,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُهْلِكْنِي غَمّاً حَتَّىٰ تَسْتَجِيبَ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa la tuhlikni ghamman hatta tastajiba li

translation.en: and do not cause me to perish out of grief until You respond to me
and show me signs of Your response to my prayers.

segments.arabic: وَاذِقْنِي طَعْمَ ٱلْعَافِيَةِ إلَىٰ مُنَتَهَىٰ اجَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa adhiqni ta`ma al`afiyati ila muntaha ajali

translation.en: (please) Make me taste the flavor of wellbeing up to the end of my lifetime,
do not make my enemies gloat over me,
do not give them a hand over me,
and do not make them control over me.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنْ وَضَعْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَرْفَعُنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma in wada`tani faman dha alladhi yarfa`uni

translation.en: O Allah, If You humiliate me, who can then exalt me?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ رَفَعْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَضَعُنِي
segments.transliteration: wa in rafa`tani faman dha alladhi yada`uni

translation.en: And if You exalt me, who can then humiliate me?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ اهْلَكْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَعْرِضُ لَكَ فِي عَبْدِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa in ahlaktani faman dha alladhi ya`ridu laka fi `abdika

translation.en: If You annihilate me, who can then interfere before You concerning the affair of me—Your slave
or who can intercede to ask You about it?

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ عَلِمْتُ انَّهُ لَيْسَ فِي حُكْمِكَ ظُلْمٌ
segments.transliteration: wa qad `alimtu annahu laysa fi hukmika zulmun

translation.en: I have already known for sure that Your decrees are devoid of injustice
and Your punishment does not count on immediateness.

segments.transliteration: wa innama ya`jalu man yakhafu alfawta

translation.en: Verily, immediateness is the work of him who fears lest he may miss,

segments.transliteration: wa innama yahtaju ila alzzulmi aldda`ifu

translation.en: and only do the weak need injustice.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ تَعَالَيْتَ يَا إِلٰهِي عَنْ ذٰلِكَ  عُلُوّاً كَبِيراً
segments.transliteration: wa qad ta`alayta ya ilahi `an dhalika `uluwwan kabiran

translation.en: As for You, O my God, You are too exalted to be so—Exalted and Great You are beyond all measure!
O Allah, I take refuge in You; so, (please) have protection upon me!
I call for Your safekeeping; so, (please) keep me under Your security!
I appeal for Your sustenance; so, (please) provide me with sustenance!
I put trust in You; so, (please) keep me under Your supervision!
I call for Your aid against my enemy; so, (please) grant me support!
I seek Your assistance; so, (please) assist me!

segments.transliteration: wa astaghfiruka ya ilahi faghfir li

translation.en: I ask for Your forgiveness; so, (please) forgive me.
So, respond! Respond! Respond!

text.en: Fourth: It is highly recommended to visit the holy tomb of Imam al-Husayn (a.s.) at the land of Karbala’ and to reside there up to the ‘Id al-Adha Day (the tenth of Dhu’l-Hijjah) so that Almighty Allah will save from all evils of that year.

Although it is not included with the feasts of Islam, the ninth of Dhu’l-Hijjah is one of the great feast days in Islam. On this day, Almighty Allah commanded His servants to obey and worship Him. He thus extended for them the tables of His benevolence and magnanimity. On this day too, Satan becomes abject, lowly, expelled, and angry more than any other day.It is narrated that Imam Zayn al-’Abidin (a.s.), on the ninth of Dhu’l-Hijjah, heard someone begging people for financial aid. The Imam (a.s.) said to him, “Woe is you! On such a day, do you beg other than Almighty Allah? On this day, even fetuses in wombs are expected to be included with the mercy of Almighty Allah and they will be delighted.The devotional acts on this day are as follows:
First: It is recommended to perform bathing on this day.

Second: It is recommended to visit the holy tomb of Imam al-Husayn (a.s.), for its reward is equal to the reward of one thousand times of Hajj, one thousand times of ‘Umrah, and one thousand times of jihad (holy war), and even more. The narrations entailing the great merits and rewards of visiting the holy tomb of Imam al-Husayn (a.s.) on the ninth of Dhu’l-Hijjah have been uninterruptedly reported. If fact, the reward of visiting the holy tomb of Imam al-Husayn (a.s.) and having the honor of attending therein is not less than the reward of attending on Mount ‘Arafat and even more.

Third: It is recommended to offer a two unit prayer immediately after the obligatory Asr Prayer before saying the supplicatory prayers of ‘Arafat. This prayer should be offered outdoors and it should include confessions of sins. One who offers this prayer will be granted the reward of attending on Mount ‘Arafat and having all sins forgiven.After this prayer, it is recommended to begin with the acts and supplications of the ‘Arafat Day that are reported from the Holy Infallibles (a.s.). Although these acts and supplications are too numerous to be mentioned in this book, I will try to mention a number of them that is compatible to the size of this book:

In al-Misbah, al-Kaf’ami says that it is recommended to observe fasting on the ‘Arafat Day, unless fasting prevents from saying the supplications. It is also recommended to bathe oneself before midday and to visit the holy tomb of Imam al-Husayn (a.s.) on day and night. At midday, it is recommended to leave one’s house and offer the obligatory Zohr and Asr prayers outdoors with complete performance of their parts. After accomplishment, it is recommended to offer a two unit prayer reciting Surah al-Faatehah and Surah al-Tawheed in the first unit and Surah al-Faatehah and <ref=1:109>Surah Al-Kafirun</ref> in the second. After that, it is recommended to offer a four unit prayer reciting at each unit Surah al-Faatehah once and repeating Surah al-Tawheed fifty times.

This is in fact the prayer of Imam AliAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.) that has been already mentioned in this book within the rites of Fridays.In Iqbal al-A’mal, Sayyid Ibn Tawus says:Say the following doxology that is reported from the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.):

translation.en: Glory be to Him Whose Throne is in the heavens.
Glory be to Him Whose dominion is on the earth.
Glory be to Him Whose decree is in the graves.
Glory be to Him Whose ways are in oceans.
Glory be to Him Whose authority is (clearly shown) in Hellfire.
Glory be to Him Whose mercy is in Paradise.
Glory be to Him Whose justice is on the Resurrection Day.
Glory be to Him Who raised the skies.
Glory be to Him Who expanded the earth.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ مَلْجَأَ وَلاَ مَنْجَى مِنْهُ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: subhana alladhi la malja'a wa la manjan minhu illa ilayhi

translation.en: Glory be to Him save Whom there is no shelter and no salvation.

text.en: Then say 100 times:

translation.en: All glory be to Allah,
all praise be to Allah,
there is no god save Allah,
and Allah is the Greatest.

text.en: Then, repeat Surah al-Tawhid one hundred times, <ref=1:2:255-257>Ayat Al-Kursi</ref> one hundred times, and invoke blessings upon Muhammad and his Household one hundred times.
Then say 10 times:

translation.en: There is no god save Allah,
alone without having any partner.
His is the kingdom and His is all praise.
He grants life and causes to die
and He causes to die and grants life
while He is Ever-living and never dies.
In His Hand is all goodness
and He has power over all things.

text.en: and ten times:

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa

translation.en: I implore Allah for forgiveness. There is no god save He,
the Ever-living, the Self-Subsistent; and to Him I turn repentant.

text.en: and ten times:

translation.en: O Allah!

text.en: and ten times:

translation.en: O All-beneficent!

text.en: and ten times:

translation.en: O All-merciful!

text.en: and ten times:

translation.en: O Fashioner of the heavens and the earth!
O Lord of majesty and honor!

text.en: and ten times:

translation.en: O Ever-living! O Self-Subsistent!

text.en: and ten times:

translation.en: O All-tender! O All-donor!

text.en: and ten times:

translation.en: O He save Whom there is no god!

text.en: and ten times:

translation.en: Respond to us.

text.en: Then say:

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You;

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيَّ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa aqrabu ilayya min habli alwaridi

translation.en: O He Who is nearer to me than my life-vein!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَحُولُ بَيْنَ ٱلْمَرْءِ وَقَلْبِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya man yahulu bayna almar'i wa qalbihi

translation.en: O He Who intervenes between man and his heart!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِٱلْمَنْظَرِ ٱلأَعْلَىٰ وَبِٱلأُفُقِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa bilmanzari al-a`la wa bil-ufuqi almubini

translation.en: O He Who is in the Highest Prospect and in the Evident Horizon!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱسْتَوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa alrrahmani `ala al`arshi istawa

translation.en: O He Who is the All-beneficent; on the Throne He has settled!
O He like Whom there is nothing
and He is the All-hearer, the All-seer!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: I beseech You to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: Then, submit your needs and they will be granted, by the permission of Almighty Allah.

You may then say the following supplicatory prayer that is reported from Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.) who said: If you wish to please Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad - peace be upon them all - you may say the following invocation:

translation.en: O Allah, O He Who is the most magnanimous of all those who may grant!
O He Who is the best of all those who are asked!
O He Who is the most Merciful of all those whose mercy may be sought!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلأَوَّلِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa alihi fi al-awwalina

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and his Household among the foremost generations,

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلآخِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salli `ala muhammadin wa alihi fi al-akhirina

translation.en: send blessings to Muhammad and his Household among the last generations,

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلْمَلأِ ٱلأَعْلَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa salli `ala muhammadin wa alihi fi almala'i al-a`la

translation.en: send blessings to Muhammad and his Household among the Highest Chiefs,

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salli `ala muhammadin wa alihi fi almursalina
