translation.en: and send blessings to Muhammad and his Household among the Messengers.
O Allah, (please) grant Muhammad and his Household
the right of mediation, preference,
honor, loftiness,
and the grand rank.
O Allah, I believed in Muhammad,

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَلَمْ أَرَهُ
segments.transliteration: salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi wa lam arahu

translation.en: may Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household, while I have not seen him;
so, do not deprive me of seeing him on the Resurrection Day,
confer upon me with the favor of accompanying him,
cause me to die while I follow his creed,
and allow me to drink from his Pool
a drink that is quenching,
palatable, and pleasant,
after which I will never be thirsty.
Verily, You have power over all things.
O Allah, I believe in Muhammad,

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَلَمْ أَرَهُ
segments.transliteration: salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi wa lam arahu

translation.en: may Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household, while I have not seen him;
so, (please) show me his face in the gardens of Paradise.
O Allah, convey to Muhammad,
may Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household,
many greetings and compliments from me.

text.en: You may then say the famous supplicatory prayer known as Dua <ref=3:1025>Dua Ummi-Dawud</ref>, which has been previously cited within the devotional acts of Rajab.You may then say the following doxology whose reward is too much to be mentioned in this book:

translation.en: All glory be to Allah before one and all!

segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi ba`da kulli ahadin

translation.en: All glory be to Allah after one and all!

segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi ma`a kulli ahadin

translation.en: All glory be to Allah with one and all!

segments.arabic: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ يَبْقَىٰ رَبُّنَا ويَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi yabqa rabbuna wa yafna kullu ahadin

translation.en: All glory be to Allah; our Lord exists eternally while the all will vanish!

segments.arabic: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ تَسْبِيحاً يَفْضُلُ تَسْبِيحَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi tasbihan yafdulu tasbiha almusabbihina

translation.en: All glory be to Allah with such glorification that exceeds all the glorifications of those who glorify Him;
with much excellence that exceeds all others.

segments.arabic: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ تَسْبِيحاً يَفْضُلُ تَسْبِيحَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi tasbihan yafdulu tasbiha almusabbihina

translation.en: All glory be to Allah with such glorification that exceeds all the glorifications of those who glorify Him;
with much excellence that remains after all others.

segments.arabic: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ تَسْبِيحاً يَفْضُلُ تَسْبِيحَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi tasbihan yafdulu tasbiha almusabbihina

translation.en: All glory be to Allah with such glorification that exceeds all the glorifications of those who glorify Him;
with much excellence that is with all others.

segments.arabic: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ تَسْبِيحاً يَفْضُلُ تَسْبِيحَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi tasbihan yafdulu tasbiha almusabbihina

translation.en: All glory be to Allah with such glorification that exceeds all the glorifications of those who glorify Him;

segments.arabic: فَضْلاً كَثِيراً لِرَبِّنَا ٱلْبَاقِي وَيَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
segments.transliteration: fadlan kathiran lirabbana albaqi wa yafna kullu ahadin

translation.en: with much excellence to our Lord Who shall exist eternally while all others will vanish.

segments.arabic: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ تَسْبِيحاً لاَ يُحْصَىٰ وَلاَ يُدْرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi tasbihan la yuhsa wa la yudra

translation.en: All glory be to Allah with such glorification that is uncounted, unrealized,

segments.transliteration: wa la yunsa wa la yabla

translation.en: unforgettable, unending,

segments.transliteration: wa la yafna wa laysa lahu muntaha

translation.en: unrelenting, and ceaseless.

segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi tasbihan yadumu bidawamihi

translation.en: All glory be to Allah with glorification that is as eternal as He is

segments.transliteration: wa yabqa bibaqa'ihi fi siniyyi al`alamina

translation.en: and as remaining as He is in the years of the worlds,

segments.transliteration: wa shuhuri aldduhuri wa ayyami alddunya

translation.en: the months of the ages, the days of the world,
and the hours of night and day.

segments.arabic: وَسُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ أَبَدَ ٱلأَبَدِ وَمَعَ ٱلأَبَدِ
segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi abada al-abadi wa ma`a aliabadi

translation.en: All glory be to Allah incessantly and with eternity
that no number can describe it,
no eternity can stop it
and no eternity can interrupt it.
Blessed be Allah, the best of creators.
All praise be to Allah before one and all!
All praise be to Allah after one and all!
All praise be to Allah with one and all!

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ يَبْقَىٰ رَبُّنَا ويَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi yabqa rabbuna wa yafna kullu ahadin

translation.en: All praise be to Allah; our Lord exists eternally while the all will vanish!

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْداً يَفْضُلُ حَمْدَ ٱلْحَامِدِينَ
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi hamdan yafdulu hamda alhamidina

translation.en: All praise be to Allah with such praise that exceeds all the praise of those who praise Him;
with much excellence that exceeds all others.

segments.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْداً يَفْضُلُ حَمْدَ ٱلْحَامِدِينَ
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi hamdan yafdulu hamda alhamidina

translation.en: All praise be to Allah with such praise that exceeds all the praise of those who praise Him;
with much excellence that remains after all others.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْداً يَفْضُلُ حَمْدَ الْحَامِدِينَ
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi hamdan yafdulu hamda alhamidina

translation.en: All praise be to Allah with such praise that exceeds all the praise of those who praise Him;
with much excellence that is with all others.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْداً يَفْضُلُ حَمْدَ ٱلْحَامِدِينَ
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi hamdan yafdulu hamda alhamidina

translation.en: All praise be to Allah with such praise that exceeds all the praise of those who praise Him;

segments.arabic: فَضْلاً كَثيراً لِرَبِّنَا ٱلْبَاقِي وَيَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
segments.transliteration: fadlan kathiran lirabbana albaqi wa yafna kullu ahadin

translation.en: with much excellence to our Lord Who shall exist eternally while all others will vanish.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْداً لاَ يُحْصَىٰ وَلاَ يُدْرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi hamdan la yuhsa wa la yudra

translation.en: All praise be to Allah with such praise that is uncounted, unrealized,

segments.transliteration: wa la yunsa wa la yabla

translation.en: unforgettable, unending,

segments.transliteration: wa la yafna wa laysa lahu muntaha

translation.en: unrelenting, and ceaseless.
All praise be to Allah with praise that is as eternal as He is

segments.transliteration: wa yabqa bibaqa'ihi fi siniyyi al`alamina

translation.en: and as remaining as He is in the years of the worlds,

segments.transliteration: wa shuhuri aldduhuri wa ayyami alddunya

translation.en: the months of the ages, the days of the world,
and the hours of night and day.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ أَبَدَ ٱلأَبَدِ وَمَعَ ٱلأَبَدِ
segments.transliteration: walhamdu lillahi abada al-abadi wa ma`a aliabadi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah incessantly and with eternity
that no number can describe it,
no eternity can stop it,
and no eternity can interrupt it.
Blessed be Allah, the best of creators.

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ قَبْلَ كُلِّ أَحَدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu qabla kulli ahadin

translation.en: There is no god save Allah before one and all!

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ بَعْدَ كُلِّ أَحَدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu ba`da kulli ahadin

translation.en: There is no god save Allah after one and all!

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ مَعَ كُلِّ أَحَدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu ma`a kulli ahadin

translation.en: There is no god save Allah with one and all!

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ يَبْقَىٰ رَبُّنَا ويَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu yabqa rabbuna wa yafna kullu ahadin

translation.en: There is no god save Allah; our Lord exists eternally while the all will vanish!

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ تَهْلِيلاً يَفْضُلُ تَهْلِيلَ ٱلْمُهَلِّلِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu tahlilan yafdulu tahlila almuhallilina

translation.en: There is no god save Allah with such confession of godhead that exceeds all the confessions of those who confess His godhead;
with much excellence that exceeds all others.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ تَهْلِيلاً يَفْضُلُ تَهْلِيلَ ٱلْمُهَلِّلِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu tahlilan yafdulu tahlila almuhallilina

translation.en: There is no god save Allah with such confession of godhead that exceeds all the confessions of those who confess His godhead;
with much excellence that remains after all others.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ تَهْلِيلاً يَفْضُلُ تَهْلِيلَ ٱلْمُهَلِّلِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu tahlilan yafdulu tahlila almuhallilina

translation.en: There is no god save Allah with such confession of godhead that exceeds all the confessions of those who confess His godhead;
with much excellence that is with all others.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ تَهْلِيلاً يَفْضُلُ تَهْلِيلَ ٱلْمُهَلِّلِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu tahlilan yafdulu tahlila almuhallilina

translation.en: There is no god save Allah with such confession of godhead that exceeds all the confessions of those who confess His godhead;

segments.arabic: فَضْلاً كَثيراً لِرَبِّنَا ٱلْبَاقِي وَيَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
segments.transliteration: fadlan kathiran lirabbana albaqi wa yafna kullu ahadin

translation.en: with much excellence to our Lord Who shall exist eternally while all others will vanish.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ تَهْلِيلاً لاَ يُحْصَىٰ وَلاَ يُدْرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu tahlilan la yuhsa wa la yudra

translation.en: There is no god save Allah with such confession of His godhead that is uncounted, unrealized,

segments.transliteration: wa la yunsa wa la yabla

translation.en: unforgettable, unending,

segments.transliteration: wa la yafna wa laysa lahu muntaha

translation.en: unrelenting, and ceaseless.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ تَهْلِيلاً يَدُومُ بِدَوَامِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu tahlilan yadumu bidawamihi

translation.en: There is no god save Allah with such confession that is as eternal as He is

segments.transliteration: wa yabqa bibaqa'ihi fi siniyyi al`alamina

translation.en: and as remaining as He is in the years of the worlds,

segments.transliteration: wa shuhuri aldduhuri wa ayyami alddunya

translation.en: the months of the ages, the days of the world,
and the hours of night and day.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ أَبَدَ ٱلأَبَدِ وَمَعَ ٱلأَبَدِ
segments.transliteration: wa la ilaha illa allahu abada al-abadi wa ma`a aliabadi

translation.en: There is no god save Allah incessantly and with eternity
that no number can describe it,
no eternity can stop it,
and no eternity can interrupt it.
Blessed be Allah, the best of creators.
Allah is the Greatest before one and all!
Allah is the Greatest after one and all!
Allah is the Greatest with one and all!

segments.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ يَبْقَىٰ رَبُّنَا ويَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
segments.transliteration: wallahu akbaru yabqa rabbuna wa yafna kullu ahadin

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest; our Lord exists eternally while the all will vanish!

segments.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ تَكْبِيراً يَفْضُلُ تَكْبِيرَ ٱلْمُكَبِّرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wallahu akbaru takbiran yafdulu takbira almukabbirina

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest with such greatness that exceeds all the magnification of those who confess His All-greatness;
with much excellence that exceeds all others.

segments.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ تَكْبِيراً يَفْضُلُ تَكْبِيرَ ٱلْمُكَبِّرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wallahu akbaru takbiran yafdulu takbira almukabbirina

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest with such greatness that exceeds all the magnification of those who confess his All-greatness;
with much excellence that remains after all others.

segments.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ تَكْبِيراً يَفْضُلُ تَكْبِيرَ ٱلْمُكَبِّرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wallahu akbaru takbiran yafdulu takbira almukabbirina

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest with such greatness that exceeds all the magnification of those who confess his All-greatness;
with much excellence that is with all others.

segments.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ تَكْبِيراً يَفْضُلُ تَكْبِيرَ ٱلْمُكَبِّرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wallahu akbaru takbiran yafdulu takbira almukabbirina

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest with such greatness that exceeds all the magnification of those who confess his All-greatness;

segments.arabic: فَضْلاً كَثيراً لِرَبِّنَا ٱلْبَاقِي وَيَفْنَىٰ كُلُّ أَحَدٍ
segments.transliteration: fadlan kathiran lirabbana albaqi wa yafna kullu ahadin

translation.en: with much excellence to our Lord Who shall exist eternally while all others will vanish.

segments.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ تَكْبِيراً لاَ يُحْصَىٰ وَلاَ يُدْرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wallahu akbaru takbiran la yuhsa wa la yudra

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest with such greatness that is uncounted, unrealized,

segments.transliteration: wa la yunsa wa la yabla

translation.en: unforgettable, unending,

segments.transliteration: wa la yafna wa laysa lahu muntaha

translation.en: unrelenting, and ceaseless.
Allah is the Greatest with such greatness that is as eternal as He is

segments.transliteration: wa yabqa bibaqa'ihi fi siniyyi al`alamina

translation.en: and as remaining as He is in the years of the worlds,

segments.transliteration: wa shuhuri aldduhuri wa ayyami alddunya

translation.en: the months of the ages, the days of the world,
and the hours of night and day.

segments.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ أَبَدَ ٱلأَبَدِ وَمَعَ ٱلأَبَدِ
segments.transliteration: wallahu akbaru abada al-abadi wa ma`a aliabadi

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest incessantly and with eternity
that no number can describe it,
no eternity can stop it,
and no eternity can interrupt it.
Blessed be Allah, the best of creators.

text.en:
You may then say the famous supplicatory prayer, which begins
with the following statement: <ref=3:1101>Allahumma Man Tabba Va  Tahiya</ref> This supplicatory prayer has been previously mentioned within the
rites at Friday nights.
You may then say the supplicatory prayer that has been mentioned
by Shaykh al-Tusi in Misbah al-Mutahajjid. It is ascribed to Imam
Zayn al-’Abidin (a.s.) and it begins with the following statement: اللّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الله رَبُّ العالَمِينَ.

It is worth mentioning that this supplicatory prayer, which has not
been cited herein because of its lengthiness, is also advisably said
during the ritual of al-wuquf ‘ala‘arafah (Halting At Mount ‘Arafat),
which is one of the rituals of Hajj. It is also highly advisable to say the forty-seventh supplication of
al-Sahifah al-Kamilah al-Sajjadiyyah. It is recommended to say the
supplicatory prayer, which comprises all the requirements of worldly
and religious life, with reverence.

The supplicatory prayer of Imam al-Husayn (a.s.), the Chief of
Martyrs, on the ‘Arafat Day is one of the famous prayers. Bishr and
Bashir, the sons of Ghalib al-Asadi, narrated that they, once,
accompanied Imam al-Husayn (a.s.) at the ‘Arafat Night when he left
his tent with submission and reverence. He walked slowly until he,
accompanied by a group of his household, sons, and servants, stopped
at the left side of Mount ‘Arafat and turned his face towards the Holy
Ka’bah. He then raised his hands (for supplication) to the level of his
face, just like a poor man begging food, and said:
<ref=3:1114>Dua Arafah</ref>
It is also recommended to say the <ref=3:1285>third comprehensive Ziyarah</ref>.At the last hour of the `Arafah Day, it is recommended to say the following:

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ إِنَّ ذُنُوبِي لاَ تَضُرُّكَ
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi inna dhunubi la tadurruka

translation.en: O my Lord, my sins do not harm You

segments.transliteration: wa inna maghfirataka li la tanqusuka

translation.en: nor will Your forgiveness to me reduce Your Grandeur.
So, (please do) grant me that which does not reduce Your Grandeur
and forgive me that which does not harm You.

text.en: It is also recommended to say the following:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ لاَ تَحْرِمْنِي خَيْرَ مَا عِنْدَكَ لِشَرِّ مَا عِنْدِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma la tahrimni khayra ma `indaka lisharri ma `indi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) do not deprive me of the good that You have because of the evil that I have.

segments.arabic: فَإِنْ أَنْتَ لَمْ تَرْحَمْنِي بِتَعَبِي وَنَصَبِي
segments.transliteration: fa'in anta lam tarhamni bita`abi wa nasabi

translation.en: If You do not have mercy upon me due to my fatigue and tiredness,

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَحْرِمْنِي أَجْرَ ٱلْمُصَابِ عَلَىٰ مُصيبَتِهِ

translation.en: (please) then do not deprive me of the reward of those whom are afflicted with misfortunes.

text.en:
Sayyid Ibn Tawus has advised that just before sunset, one should recite <ref=3:1306>Dua al-Asharat</ref>
.
THE TENTH DAY

The tenth of ZILHAJJ is the ‘Id al-Adha (The feast of immolation)
Day. A number of acts has been narrated to be done on this honorable
day. They are as follows:

First: It is highly recommended to bathe oneself on this day. In fact,
some scholars have decided it as obligatory.

Second: Salat al-’Id, as is described within the acts on the ‘Id al-
Fitr Day, should be offered on this day. However, on the tenth of
ZILHAJJ, it is recommended to break the fasting after offering Salat
al-’Id and it is recommended to eat from the meat of the sacrificed
animals.

It is recommended, thereafter, to offer the ‘Id Prayer (Salat al-’Id), which consists of two units. In the first unit, recite Surah al-Faatehah and <ref=1:87>Surah Al-A'laa</ref>. After the recitation of these Surahs, say the Takbir statement (i.e. Allahu-akbar) five times and raise your hands for Qunut after each Takbir, saying:

translation.en: O Allah: You are the Lord of glory and greatness
And the Lord of magnanimity and omnipotence
And the Lord of pardon and mercy,
And the worthiest of being feared and the Lord of forgiveness;

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقّ هذَا الْيَوْمِ الّذِي جَعَلْتَهُ لِلْمُسْلِمِينَ عِيداً،
segments.transliteration: as’aluka bihaqqi hadha aliyawmi alladhy ja`altahu lilmuslimena `edan

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of this day, which You have decided to be feast for the Muslims,

segments.arabic: وَلِمُحَمّدٍ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِه ذُخْراً وَمَزِيداً
segments.transliteration: wa limuhammadin salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi dhukhran wa mazedan

translation.en: And to be safety and increasing honor for Muhammad—peace of Allah be upon him and his Household—

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلّيَ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: (I beseech You) that You may send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تُدْخِلَنِي فِي كُلّ خَيْرٍ أَدْخَلْتَ فِيهِ مُحَمّداً وَآلَ مُحَمّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa an tudkhilany fe kulli khayrin adkhalta fehi muhammadan wa ala muhammadin

translation.en: And You may include me with every item of goodness with which You have included Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تُخْرِجَنِي مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ أَخْرَجْتَ مِنْهُ مُحَمّداً وَآلَ مُحَمّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa an tukhrijany min kulli su‘in akhrajta minhu muhammadan wa ala muhammadin

translation.en: And that You save me from any item of evil from which You have saved Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
May Your blessings be upon him and upon them.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ إِنّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ مَا سَأَلَكَ عِبَادُكَ الصَّالِحُونَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inne as’aluka khayra ma sa’alaka `ibaduka alssalihuna

translation.en: O Allah: I pray You for the best of all that for which Your righteous servants have prayed You,

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِمَّا اسْتَعَاذَ مِنْهُ عِبَادُكَ الصَّالِحُونَ.
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika mimma ista`adha minhu `ibaduka alssalihuna

translation.en: And I seek Your protection against all that against which Your righteous servants have asked Your protection.

text.en: You may then say the Takbir statement for the sixth time, do the genuflection (ruku’), and prostrate yourself (sujud). When you stand up for the second unit, recite Surah al-Faatehah and <ref=1:91>Surah Al-Shams</ref> and then say the Takbir statement four times only raising the hands for Qunut after each statement. After that, say the fifth Takbir statement and continue the prayer. After accomplishment of the prayer, say the famous Tasbih al-Zahra’(a.s.).

Third: It is recommended to say the supplications that are reported
to be said before and after Salat al-’Id. These supplications are
mentioned in the book of Iqbal al-A’mal. At any rate, the most
important of these supplications is the <ref=4:3995>supplication No. 48</ref> of al-
Sahifah al-Kamilah al-Sajjadiyyah, which begins with “Allahumma
hadha yawmun mubarakun... (O Allah, This is a blessed day...).” It is
also recommended to say the <ref=4:3993>supplication No. 46</ref> of the same book,
which begins with “ya man yarhamu man la yarhamuhu’l-ibad... (O
He Who has mercy upon him whom is not compassionated by the
servants...)”

Fourth: It is recommended to say <ref=3:1305>Dua al-Nudbah</ref>
(The Supplication
of Lamentation)

Fifth: It is confirmedly recommended to offer a sacrifice an animal (as per conditions) and have breakfast after offering Salat al-Eid and it is recommended to eat from the meat of the sacrificed animal.

Sixth: As for those who are present at Mina,it is recommended to say the following doxological statements fifteen times immediately after the accomplishment of fifteen obligatory prayers beginning with the Zohr Prayer on the ‘Id al-Adha Day and ending up with the Fajr Prayer on the thirteenth of ZILHAJJ. As for those who are at places other than Mina, it is recommended to say these statements ten times instead of fifteen immediately after ten obligatory prayers beginning with the Zohr Prayer on the ‘Id al-Adha Day and ending up with the Fajr Prayer on the twelfth of ZILHAJJ. These statements, according to the authentic narration mentioned in al-Kafi, are as follows:

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest. Allah is the Greatest.
There is no god save Allah.

segments.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ اكْبَرُ اللَّهُ اكْبَرُ ٱللَّهُ اكْبَرُ

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest. Allah is the Greatest. Allah is the Greatest.
And all praise be to Allah.
Allah is the Greatest for He has guided us (to the right path).

segments.arabic: اللَّهُ اكْبَرُ عَلَىٰ مَا رَزَقَنَا مِنْ بَهيمَةِ ٱلانْعَامِ

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest for He has bestowed upon us with the cattle quadrupeds.
All praise be to Allah for that through which He has tried us.

text.en: It is recommended to repeat these statements immediately after the obligatory and supererogatory prayers as many times as possible.

The EId al-Ghadir is the Greatest feast day of Almighty Allah. It is also the feast of the Holy Prophet’s Household. It is in fact the most celebrated feast day. All the Prophets that Almighty Allah appointed used to celebrate this day and maintain its sanctity. In the heavens, this day is called “the Day of the Promised Covenant” and in the earth “the Day of the Exacted Covenant and the Witnessed Crowd.”

It has been narrated that when Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.) was asked whether Muslims have a feast day other than ‘Id al-Fitr, ‘Id al-Adha, and Fridays, he answered, “Yes, they have. There is still the holiest feast day, which falls on the day when the Messenger of Allah (a.s.) appointed Ameer al-Momineen -Imam Ali- (a.s.) (as his successor and the coming leader of the Muslim community). On that day, the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) declared, ‘Whoever has regarded me as his master must now regard Ali as his master.’ It falls on the eighteenth of ZILHAJJ.”When he was asked about the deeds that should be done on that day, Imam al-Sadiq(a.s.) instructed, “(The best acts on this day are) observance of fasting, acts of worship, mention of the Household of the Holy Prophet, and invocation of blessings upon them. The Holy Messenger of Allah (a.s.) instructed Imam AliAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.) to betake that day as feast. Similarly, the Prophets (a.s.) used to instruct their successors to betake the eighteenth of ZILHAJJ as feast day.”Abu-Nasr al-Bizanti has narrated that Imam al-Rida(a.s.) said to him, “Wherever you are, try to be present on the Ghadir Day at the tomb of Imam AliAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.). Verily, Almighty Allah will forgive the sins of sixty years for any believer and Muslim - male and female - on that day and will release from Hellfire twice as many as the number of those whom He releases from Hellfire in the month of Ramadan, at the Qadr Night and at the ‘Id al-Fitr Night. A single dirham (a currency) that is given as alms on this day to the believing brethren is equal to one thousand dirhams (that are given as alms on other occasions). Try to do favors to your brethren on this day and try to please each believing man and woman. By Allah I swear, if people recognized the reality of this day, the angels should shake hands with them ten times a day.”
To sum it up, to honor this day is necessary. The devotional acts on the ‘Id al-Ghadir Day are as follows:

First: It is recommended to observe fasting on this day, for it erases the sins of sixty years. Furthermore, it has been narrated that to observe fasting on this day is equal to the observance of fasting of one’s whole lifetime and its reward is equal to the rewards of one hundred times of Hajj and ‘Umrah.
Second: It is recommended to bathe oneself (Ghusl) on this day.

Third: It is recommended to visit the holy tomb of Imam AliAmeer al-Momineen(a.s.). It is necessary to do one’s best to attend at the holy tomb of Imam Ali(a.s.) on this day even if such a journey be difficult. Three forms of Ziyarat have been decided for this day. The first is the familiar  <ref=3:1233>Ziyarat Aminullah</ref> , which can be practiced whether one is present at the holy tomb or is far away from it.

Fourth: It is recommended to say the supplication of seeking Almighty Allah’s protection against Satan (i.e. Isti’adhah), which is mentioned by Sayyid Ibn Tawus, in his book of Iqbal al-A’mal, who has reported it from the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.).

translation.en: In the Name of God, Most Compassionate, Most Merciful

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَيْرِ الْأَسْمَاءِ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ رَبِّ الْآخِرَةِ وَ الْأُولَى وَ رَبِّ الْأَرْضِ وَ السَّمَاءِ

translation.en: In the Name of God – the best of the Names. In the Name of the Lord of the Hereafter and this world, Lord of the earth and the heavens.

segments.arabic: ذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ كَيْدُ الْأَعْدَاءِ وَ بِهَا تُدْفَعُ كُلُّ الْأَسْوَاءِ وَ بِالْقَسَمِ بِهَا يُكْفَى مَنِ اسْتَكْفَى

translation.en: The Name with which the plots of the enemies will not be effective, with which all evil is fended off, and with which anyone who asks will be taken care of.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبُّ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ وَ خَالِقُهُ وَ بَارِئُ كُلِّ مَخْلُوقٍ وَ رَازِقُهُ

translation.en: O' my God! You are the Lord and Creator of all things. You are the Initiator and Provider for all creators

segments.arabic: وَ مُحْصِي كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ وَ عَالِمُهُ، وَ كَافِي كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ وَ قَاصِمُهُ

translation.en: You count all things and know about them. You destroy all the rebellious oppressors

segments.arabic: وَ مُعِينُ كُلِّ مُتَوَكِّلٍ عَلَيْهِ وَ عَاصِمُهُ وَ بِرُّ كُلِّ مَخْلُوقٍ وَ رَاحِمُهُ

translation.en: You help all who rely on You and help them. You are kind and merciful to all creatures

segments.arabic: لَيْسَ لَكَ ضِدٌّ فَيُعَانِدُكَ [فيعادك‌] وَ لَا نِدٌّ فَيُقَاوِمُكَ وَ لَا شَبِيهٌ فَيُعَادِلُكَ

translation.en: There is none to oppose You. There is none to insist before You. There is none comparable to You
You are Exalted and Great beyond all this

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ اعْتَصَمْتُ وَ اسْتَقَمْتُ وَ إِلَيْكَ تَوَجَّهْتُ وَ عَلَيْكَ اعْتَمَدْتُ

translation.en: O' my God! I seek protection in You and direct my attention to You. I depend upon You.

segments.arabic: يَا خَيْرَ عَاصِمٍ وَ أَكْرَمَ رَاحِمٍ وَ أَحْكَمَ حَاكِمٍ وَ أَعْلَمَ عَالِمٍ

translation.en: O the best Protector, the Kindest Merciful, the Wisest Ruler and Most Knowlegeable Scholar!

segments.arabic: مَنِ اعْتَصَمَ بِكَ عَصَمْتَهُ وَ مَنِ اسْتَرْحَمَكَ رَحِمْتَهُ

translation.en: You protect whoever seeks Your Protection. You are merciful to whoever seeks Your Mercy

segments.arabic: وَ مَنِ اسْتَكْفَاكَ كَفَيْتَهُ وَ مَنْ تَوَكَّلَ [عَلَيْكَ‌] أَمِنْتَهُ وَ هَدَيْتَهُ

translation.en: You suffice whoever seeks sufficiency. You secure and guide whoever relies upon You

segments.arabic: سَمْعاً لِقَوْلِكَ يَا رَبِّ وَ طَاعَةً لِأَمْرِكَ [بِأَمْرِكَ‌]

translation.en: O Lord! I hear and obey Your Orders

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَقُولُ وَ بِتَوْفِيقِكَ أَقُولُ وَ عَلَى كِفَايَتِكَ أَعُولُ

translation.en: O my God! I speak with Your Success, I trust in Your Sufficiency

segments.arabic: وَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ أَطُولُ وَ بِكَ أَسْتَكْفِي وَ أَصُولُ‌

translation.en: I bestow by Your Power, I seek sufficiency from You.

segments.arabic: فَاكْفِنِي اللَّهُمَّ وَ أَنْقِذْنِي وَ تَوَلَّنِي وَ اعْصِمْنِي وَ عَافِنِي وَ امْنَعْ مِنِّي وَ خُذْ لِي وَ كُنْ لِي بِعَيْنِكَ وَ لَا تَكُنْ عَلَيَّ

translation.en: O my God! Please suffice for me, save me, protect me, give me well-being, defend me, and take care of me

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَ إِلَيْكَ أَنَبْتُ وَ إِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ

translation.en: My Lord! You are my Nourisher! In You I have placed my trust, and to You do I turn in repentance, and to You is (our) Final Goal

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ قَدِيرٌ

translation.en: And You have Power over all things.

text.en: Fifth: It is recommended to offer a two unit prayer. After accomplishment, one should prostrate oneself and thank Almighty Allah one hundred times:

translation.en: Thanks be to Allah.

text.en: Then, one should raise the head from the prostration and say the following:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَنَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bi'anna laka alhamda

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of that all praise be to You,
alone, without having any partner,
and that You are One, One and Only, and eternally Besought of all;
You beget not nor are You begotten,

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun laka kufwan ahadun

translation.en: and there is none like You;
and that Muhammad is Your servant and Messenger,
Your blessings be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ فِي شَأْنٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa kulla yawmin fi sha'nin

translation.en: O He Who is in a state every day!

segments.arabic: كَمَا كَانَ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ أَنْ تَفَضَّلْتَ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: kama kana min sha'nika an tafaddalta `alayya

translation.en: Just as You decided to confer upon me with Your favor
when You included me with those to whom You responded,
the company of Your religion,
and the company of those who pray You,

segments.transliteration: wa waffaqtani lidhalika fi mubtada'i khalqi

translation.en: You had led me to this in the beginning of Your creation of me

segments.transliteration: tafaddulan minka wa karaman wa judan

translation.en: as a sign of Your favoring, generosity, and magnanimity.
Then, You followed the favor with another favor,
the magnanimity with another magnanimity,
and the generosity with another generosity,
on account of Your kindness and mercy,

segments.arabic: إِلَىٰ أَنْ جَدَّدْتَ ذٰلِكَ ٱلْعَهْدَ لِي تَجْدِيداً
segments.transliteration: ila an jaddadta dhalika al`ahda li tajdidan

translation.en: so You renewed all that for me over again
after You renewed my creation
while I was a thing quite forgotten,
oblivious, unmindful, and heedless.
So, You completed Your grace
when You made me remember that,
bestowed this favor upon me,
and guided me to it.
So, (please) may one of Your decisions,

segments.transliteration: ya ilahi wa sayyidi wa mawlaya

translation.en: O my God, Master, and Sustainer,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُتِمَّ لِي ذٰلِكَ وَلاَ تَسْلُبْنيهِ
segments.transliteration: an tutimma li dhalika wa la taslubnihi

translation.en: be that You perfect this for me and never deprive me of it
until You cause me to die on this faith
and You are pleased with me.
For, verily, You are the worthiest Benefactor
of perfecting Your grace for me.
O Allah, we have listened, obeyed,
and answered Your call on account of Your favor to us.
So, all praise be to You.
Your forgiveness, O our Lord, we seek
and to You is the return.
We believe in Allah, alone;
there is no partner with Him,
and (we believe) in His Messenger, Muhammad,
may Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household,

segments.transliteration: wa saddaqna wa ajabna da`iya allahi

translation.en: we trust and respond to the caller of Allah,
we followed the Messenger as regards the loyalty to our master,
and the master of the believers,
the commander of the believers,
`Ali, the son of Abu-Talib,
Allah’s servant and His Messenger’s brother,
the grandest veracious,
the claim on His creation,
by him, He supported His Prophet
and His religion, the manifest true.
(We believe in him as) the sign of Allah’s religion,
the keeper of His knowledge,
the container of Allah’s unseen affairs,
the carrier of Allah’s secrets,
the trustee of Allah on His creatures,
and His witness on His created beings.
O Allah, O our Lord, surely, we have heard a preacher

segments.arabic: يُنَادِي لِلإِيـمَانِ أَنْ آمِنُوٱ بِرَبِّكُمْ فَآمَنَّا
segments.transliteration: yunadi lil'imani an aminu birabbikum fa'amanna

translation.en: calling to the faith, saying, “Believe in your Lord.” So, we did believe.
Our Lord! Forgive us therefore our faults,
cover our evil deeds,
and make us die with the righteous ones.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَآتِنَا مَا وَعَدْتَنَا عَلَىٰ رُسُلِكَ
segments.transliteration: rabbana wa atina ma wa`adtana `ala rusulika

translation.en: Our Lord! And grant us what You have promised us by Your messengers;
and disgrace us not on the Day of Resurrection.
Surely, You do not fail to perform the promise.

segments.transliteration: fa'inna ya rabbana bimannika wa lutfika

translation.en: Because we, O our Lord, on account of Your grace and kindness,
responded to Your caller
followed the Messenger, believed him,
trusted the Master of the Believers,
and denied the idols (Jibt) and false deities (Taghut).
So, (please) join us with those whom we chose to join
and put us in the group of our Imams,
for we do believe in them with absolute belief,
and to them we do submit.
We believe in their secret and open affairs,
their present and their absent ones,
and their living and their dead ones.
We consent to them as our imams,
leaders, and chiefs.
And we stop at them

segments.transliteration: baynana wa bayna allahi duna khalqihi

translation.en: in all of our affairs with Allah, excluding all other creatures of Him.
We do not seek any substitutes of them,

segments.transliteration: wa la nattakhidhu min dunihim walijatan

translation.en: and we do not betake ourselves any friends other than them.
We, before Allah, disapprove

segments.arabic: مِنْ كُلِّ مَنْ نَصَبَ لَهُمْ حَرْباً
segments.transliteration: min kulli man nasaba lahum harban

translation.en: all those who made war with them,
from jinn and men,
from the past and the coming generations.
We deny the idols, the false deities,
the four pagans,
their partisans, their followers,
and all those who support them
from jinn and human beings
from the first of time to the last of it.
O Allah, we call You to witness

segments.arabic: أَنَّا نَدِينُ بِمَا دَانَ بِهِ مُحَمَّدٌ وَآلُ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: annaa nadinu bima dana bihi muhammadun wa alu muhammadin

translation.en: that we profess all that professed by Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
Allah’s blessings be upon him and them.
We say only that which they say
and we believe in only that in which they believe.
What they say is our saying,
what they profess is what we profess,
what they reject is what we reject,
those to whom they adhere are they to whom we adhere,
those whom they oppose are they whom we oppose,
those whom they curse are they whom we curse,

segments.transliteration: wa man tabarra'u minhu tabarra'na minhu

translation.en: those whom they condemn are they whom we condemn,
and those to whom they pray for mercy are they to whom we pray for mercy.
We believe in, submit to,
accept, and follow our masters,
Allah’s blessings be upon them.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَتِمِّمْ لَنَا ذٰلِكَ وَلاَ تَسْلُبْنَاهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fatammim lana dhalika wa la taslubnahu

translation.en: O Allah, so, perfect this for us and do not deprive us of it.
Make it well-established and fixed with us
and do not make it temporal (belief).
Make us live on it (no matter how long You will make us to live)
and cause us to die on it (when You decide to terminate our lives).
Muhammad’s Household are our Imams;
so, we follow them
and act loyally to them.
We oppose their enemy, the enemy of Allah;
so, (please) include us with them in this world and the Hereafter,
and make us of those drawn near (to You),
for we are satisfied with that.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: One may then prostrate oneself again and repeat each of the following doxological prayers one hundred times:

translation.en: All praise be to Allah.

text.en: and one hundred times

translation.en: Thanks be to Allah.

text.en: According to a narration, to practice this act brings about the same reward of one who was present at that day and swore allegiance to the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) as regards the divinely commissioned leadership (wilayah) of Imam Ali(a.s.). Besides, it is preferable to offer this prayer at midday, which is the very time when the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) declared the successorship and leadership of Imam Ali(a.s.) at Ghadir Khumm. It is also preferable to recite <ref=1:97>Surah Al-Qadr</ref> at the first unit of the prayer and Surah al-Tawheed at the second (of course, after Surah al-Faatehah).

Sixth: It is recommended to bathe oneself and offer a two unit prayer half an hour before midday. At each unit, one should recite Surah al-Faatehah once, Surah al-Tawheed ten times, <ref=1:2:255-257>Ayat Al-Kursi</ref> ten times, and <ref=1:97>Surah Al-Qadr</ref> ten times. The reward of practicing this act is equal, in the sight of Almighty Allah, to the rewards of one hundred thousand times of Hajj and one hundred thousand times of ‘Umrah. Almighty Allah will also grant all the worldly and religious needs of the performer with easiness and good health.

It is however worth mentioning that Sayyid Ibn Tawus, in Iqbal al-A’mal, referring to this prayer, has preceded Surah al-Qadr to Ayah al-Kursi. Also, ‘Allamah al-Majlisi, in Zad al-Ma’ad, mentioned that Surah al-Qadr should be preceded to Ayah al-Kursi. So have I done in my other books. But when I investigated the matter, I found out that the majority of scholars who have mentioned this prayer preceded Ayah al-Kursi to Surah al-Qadr. At any rate, there is probability that such confusion has occurred due to an error in writing by Sayyid Ibn Tawus himself or the copiers of the book, since Sayyid Ibn Tawus is too lofty to disagree with the consensus of the other scholars. Finally, Almighty Allah alone knows the most accurate form.It is preferable to say the supplicatory prayer that begins with the following statement, after this prayer:

segments.arabic: رَبَّنا إِنَّنا سَمِعْنا مُنادِياً يُنادِي لِلْإِيمانِ أَنْ آمِنُوا بِرَبِّكُمْ فَآمَنَّا
segments.transliteration: rabana ainana samina munadiaa yunadi lilaiymani aan aminua birabikum famanaa

translation.en: Our Lord! we have heard the call of one calling (Us) to Faith, 'Believe ye in the Lord,' and we have believed.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنا فَاغْفِرْ لَنا ذُنُوبَنا وَ كَفِّرْ عَنَّا سَيِّئاتِنا وَ تَوَفَّنا مَعَ الْأَبْرارِ
segments.transliteration: rabana faghfir lana dhunubana wa kafir anaa sayiyatina wa tawafana maa alaabrari

translation.en: Our Lord! Forgive us our sins, blot out from us our iniquities, and take to Yourself our souls in the company of the righteous

segments.arabic: رَبَّنا وَ آتِنا ما وَعَدْتَنا عَلى‌ رُسُلِكَ وَ لا تُخْزِنا يَوْمَ الْقِيامَةِ إِنَّكَ لا تُخْلِفُ الْمِيعادَ
segments.transliteration: rabana wa atina ma waadtana aly rusulika wa la tukhzina yawma alqiamati ainaka la tukhlifu almiada

translation.en: Our Lord! Grant us what You didst promise unto us through Your apostles, and save us from shame on the Day of Judgment: For You never break Your promise.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أُشْهِدُكَ وَ كَفَى بِكَ شَهِيداً
segments.transliteration: allahuma ainiy aushhiduka wa kafay bika shahidaa

translation.en: O' my God! I take You as witness. You suffice as a witness for me

segments.arabic: وَ أُشْهِدُ مَلَائِكَتَكَ وَ حَمَلَةَ عَرْشِكَ وَ سُكَّانَ سَمَاوَاتِكَ وَ أَرْضِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aushhidu malayikataka wa hamalata arshika wa sukaana samawatika wa aardika

translation.en: I take Your angels, the carriers of Your Throne, the controllers of Your heavens and earth as witnesses

segments.arabic: بِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْمَعْبُودُ الَّذِي لَيْسَ مِنْ لَدُنْ عَرْشِكَ إِلَى قَرَارِ أَرْضِكَ‌
segments.transliteration: biaanaka aanta allahu aladhi la ailaha ailaa aanta almabudu aladhi laysa min ladun arshika ailay qarari aardika

translation.en: that You are God and there are no Gods but You

segments.arabic: مَعْبُودٌ يُعْبَدُ سِوَاكَ إِلَّا بَاطِلٌ مُضْمَحِلٌّ غَيْرَ وَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيمِ
segments.transliteration: mabudu yubadu siwaka ailaa batilu mudmahilu ghayra wajhika alkarimi

translation.en: You are the one besides whose Noble Face none is worshipped!

segments.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْمَعْبُودُ لَا مَعْبُودَ سِوَاكَ تَعَالَيْتَ عَمَّا يَقُولُ الظَّالِمُونَ عُلُوّاً كَبِيراً
segments.transliteration: la ailaha ailaa aanta almabudu la mabuda siwaka taalayta amaa yaqulu alzaalimuna uluaa kabiraa

translation.en: There is no God but You! O' He who is Worshipped and there is no one else to worship but You. You are Sublime and You are high indeed are You exalted above what the evil-doers say! "Exalted and Great (beyond measure)!"

segments.arabic: وَ أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُكَ وَ رَسُولُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aashhadu aana muhamadaa abduka wa rasuluka

translation.en: And I bear witness that Muhammad is Your Servant and Your Prophet.

segments.arabic: وَ أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ عَلِيّاً أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَ وَلِيُّهُمْ وَ مَوْلَاهُمْ وَ مَوْلَايَ
segments.transliteration: wa aashhadu aana aliaa aamiru almuminina wa waliuhum wa mawlahum wa mawlaya

translation.en: I witness that Ali is the Commander of the Faithful. He is their friend, and master and he is my master.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا سَمِعْنَا النِّدَاءَ وَ صَدَّقْنَا الْمُنَادِيَ رَسُولَكَ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ
segments.transliteration: rabana ainana samina alnidaa wa sadaqna almunadia rasulaka salay allahu alayhi wa alihi

translation.en: O' our Lord! We heard the call and acknowledge the caller who is Your Prophet (God's blessings be upon him and his family).

segments.arabic: إِذْ نَادَى نِدَاءً عَنْكَ بِالَّذِي أَمَرْتَهُ أَنْ يُبَلِّغَ عَنْكَ مَا أَنْزَلْتَ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ مُوَالاةِ وَلِيِّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: aidh naday nidaa anka bialadhi aamartahu aan yubaligha anka ma aanzalta ailayhi min mualati walii almuminina

translation.en: He called based on Your Order and declared the mastery of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: وَ حَذَّرْتُهُ وَ أَنْذَرْتَهُ إِنْ لَمْ يَبْلُغْ أَنْ تَسْخَطَ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: wa hadhartuhu wa aandhartahu ain lam yablugh aan taskhata alayhi

translation.en: about which You had admonished him that You would be angry with him if he does not deliver this message

segments.arabic: وَ أَنَّهُ إِذَا بَلَّغَ رِسَالَتَكَ [رِسَالاتِكَ‌] عَصَمْتَهُ مِنَ النَّاسِ فَنَادَى مُبَلِّغاً وَحْيَكَ وَ رِسَالاتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aanahu aidha balagha risalataka [risalatika] asamtahu mina alnaasi fanaday mubalighaa wahyaka wa risalatika

translation.en: and that You will protect him from the people if he does. So he delivered this message and declared,

segments.arabic: أَلَا مَنْ كُنْتُ مَوْلَاهُ فَعَلِيٌّ مَوْلَاهُ وَ مَنْ كُنْتُ وَلِيَّهُ فَعَلِيٌّ وَلِيُّهُ وَ مَنْ كُنْتُ نَبِيَّهُ فَعَلِيٌّ أَمِيرُهُ
segments.transliteration: aala man kuntu mawlahu faaliu mawlahu wa man kuntu waliahu faaliu waliuhu wa man kuntu nabiahu faaliu aamiruhu

translation.en: Whoever I am the Master of, Ali is the Master of. Whoever I am the Guardian of, Ali is the Guardian of! Whoever I am the Prophet of, Ali is the Commander of!

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا قَدْ أَجَبْنَا دَاعِيَكَ النَّذِيرَ الْمُنْذِرَ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدَكَ الَّذِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: rabana qad aajabna daiaka alnadhira almundhira muhamadaa abdaka aladhi aanamta alayhi

translation.en: O our Lord! We positively respond to the call of Muhammad - the conveyor of good tidings, the warner, Your servant whom You blessed
and established as an example for the Children of Israel

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا وَ اتَّبَعْنَا مَوْلَانَا وَ وَلِيَّنَا وَ هَادِيَنَا وَ دَاعِيَنَا وَ دَاعِيَ الْأَنَامِ
segments.transliteration: rabana amanaa wa atabana mawlana wa waliana wa hadiana wa daiana wa daia alaanami

translation.en: O' our Lord! We believe and follow our master, our guardian, our guide, the one who invites us and invites the people

segments.arabic: وَ صِرَاطَكَ السَّوِيَّ الْمُسْتَقِيمَ وَ مَحَجَّتَكَ الْبَيْضَاءَ وَ سَبِيلَكَ الدَّاعِيَ إِلَيْكَ عَلَى بَصِيرَةٍ هُوَ وَ مَنِ اتَّبَعَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa sirataka alsawia almustaqima wa mahajataka albaydaa wa sabilaka aldaaia ailayka alay basirati hua wa mani atabaahu

translation.en: and in Your Straight Path, Your Bright Path through which he and his followers call us to You

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحانَ اللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ‌ بِوَلَايَتِهِ وَ بِأَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ وَ بِاتِّخَاذِ الْوَلَائِجِ مِنْ دُونِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi amaa yushrikuna biwalayatihi wa biaamri rabihim wa biatikhadhi alwalayiji min dunihi

translation.en: Exalted is Allah far above the things they associate with Him! Some doubt his Mastery and Order of their Lord by finding associates other than him

segments.arabic: فَاشْهَدْ يَا إِلَهِي أَنَّ الْإِمَامَ الْهَادِيَ الْمُرْشِدَ الرَّشِيدَ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: fashhad ya ailahi aana alaimama alhadia almurshida alrashida alia bna aabi talibi salawatu allahi alayhi aamiru almuminina

translation.en: O' my God! Please bear witness that Ali ibn Abi Talib (God's blessing be upon him) is the Divine Leader – the guide, the guider and the guided

segments.arabic: الَّذِي ذَكَرْتَهُ فِي كِتَابِكَ قُلْتَ‌ وَ إِنَّهُ فِي أُمِّ الْكِتابِ لَدَيْنا لَعَلِيٌّ حَكِيمٌ‌
segments.transliteration: aladhi dhakartahu fi kitabika qulta wa ainahu fi aumi alkitabi ladayna laaliu hakimu

translation.en: about whom You said the following in Your Book, "And verily, it is in the Mother of the Book, in Our Presence, high (in dignity), full of wisdom."

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَأَنَا نَشْهَدُ بِأَنَّهُ عَبْدُكَ الْهَادِي مِنْ بَعْدِ نَبِيِّكَ النَّذِيرُ الْمُنْذِرُ وَ الصِّرَاطُ الْمُسْتَقِيمُ
segments.transliteration: allahuma faana nashhadu biaanahu abduka alhadi min badi nabiika alnadhiru almundhiru wa alsiratu almustaqimu

translation.en: O' my God! We bear witness that he is Your Guiding Servant after Your Prophet – the conveyor of good tidings, the warner, the right path

segments.arabic: وَ إِمَامُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَ قَائِدُ الْغُرِّ الْمُحَجَّلِينَ وَ حُجَّتُكَ الْبَالِغَةُ وَ لِسَانُكَ الْمُعَبِّرُ عَنْكَ فِي خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aimamu almuminina wa qayidu alghuri almuhajalina wa hujatuka albalighatu wa lisanuka almuabiru anka fi khalqika

translation.en: and the Divine Leader of the believers, leader of those with white-foreheads, Your Clear Proof, Your Speaking Tongue to the people on Your Behalf

segments.arabic: وَ الْقَائِمُ بِالْقِسْطِ بَعْدَ نَبِيِّكَ وَ دَيَّانُ دِينِكَ وَ خَازِنُ عِلْمِكَ وَ عَيْبَةُ وَحْيِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa alqayimu bialqisti bada nabiika wa dayaanu dinika wa khazinu ilmika wa aybatu wahyika

translation.en: one standing firm on justice after Your Prophet who propagates Your Religion, the Treasure of Your Knowledge, the seat of Your Revelations

segments.arabic: وَ عَبْدُكَ وَ أَمِينُكَ الْمَأْمُونُ الْمَأْخُوذُ مِيثَاقُهُ مَعَ مِيثَاقِكَ وَ مِيثَاقِ رُسُلِكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa abduka wa aaminuka almamunu almakhudhu mithaquhu maa mithaqika wa mithaqi rusulika min khalqika

translation.en: Your Servant, Your Trusted One, who has made a covenant when You took covenant from Your Messengers

segments.arabic: وَ بَرِيَّتِكَ بِالشَّهَادَةِ وَ الْإِخْلَاصِ بِالْوَحْدَانِيَّةِ بِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa bariatika bialshahadati wa alaikhlasi bialwahdaniati biaanaka aanta allahu la ailaha ailaa aanta

translation.en: witnessing to and sincere in his belief of Your Oneness. For You are God, There is no God but You

segments.arabic: وَ مُحَمَّدٌ عَبْدُكَ وَ رَسُولُكَ وَ عَلِيٌّ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَ جَعَلْتَ الْإِقْرَارَ بِوَلَايَتِهِ تَمَامَ تَوْحِيدِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa muhamadu abduka wa rasuluka wa aliu aamiru almuminina wa jaalta alaiqrara biwalayatihi tamama tawhidika

translation.en: Muhammad is Your Servant and Prophet. And Ali is the Commander of the Faithful. You established confessing to His Mastery as the perfection of belief in Your Oneness

segments.arabic: وَ الْإِخْلَاصَ لَكَ بِوَحْدَانِيَّتِكَ وَ إِكْمَالَ دِينِكَ وَ تَمَامَ نِعْمَتِكَ عَلَى جَمِيعِ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa alaikhlasa laka biwahdaniatika wa aikmala dinika wa tamama nimatika alay jamii khalqika

translation.en: and sincerity for you and the completion of Your Religion and the perfection of Your Blessings for all Your creatures

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتَ وَ قَوْلُكَ الْحَقُ‌ الْيَوْمَ أَكْمَلْتُ لَكُمْ دِينَكُمْ وَ أَتْمَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ نِعْمَتِي وَ رَضِيتُ لَكُمُ الْإِسْلامَ‌ دِيناً
segments.transliteration: faqulta wa qawluka alhaqu alyawma aakmaltu lakum dinakum wa aatmamtu alaykum nimati wa raditu lakumu alaislama dinaa

translation.en: You said the following and whatever you say is right. "This day have I perfected your religion for you, completed My Favor upon you, and have chosen for you Islam as your religion."

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَى مَا مَنَنْتَ بِهِ عَلَيْنَا مِنَ الْإِخْلَاصِ لَكَ بِوَحْدَانِيَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: falaka alhamdu alay ma mananta bihi alayna mina alaikhlasi laka biwahdaniatika

translation.en: Praise belongs to You for Your Favor upon us in sincere utterance of Your Oneness

segments.arabic: وَ جُدْتَ عَلَيْنَا بِمُوَالاةِ وَلِيِّكَ الْهَادِي مِنْ بَعْدِ نَبِيِّكَ النَّذِيرِ الْمُنْذِرِ
segments.transliteration: wa judta alayna bimualati waliika alhadi min badi nabiika alnadhiri almundhiri

translation.en: and the Mastery of Your Friend upon us after Your Prophet - the one who gives good tidings, the one who warns

segments.arabic: وَ رَضِيتَ لَنَا الْإِسْلَامَ دِيناً بِمَوْلَانَا وَ أَتْمَمْتَ عَلَيْنَا نِعْمَتَكَ بِالَّذِي جَدَّدْتَ لَنَا عَهْدَكَ وَ مِيثَاقَكَ وَ ذَكَّرْتَنَا ذَلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa radita lana alaislama dinaa bimawlana wa aatmamta alayna nimataka bialadhi jadadta lana ahdaka wa mithaqaka wa dhakartana dhalika

translation.en: You were pleased with Islam as our Religion due to our master, and perfected Your Blessings with the renewal of Your Promise and Covenant, and its reminder

segments.arabic: وَ جَعَلْتَنَا مِنْ أَهْلِ الْإِخْلَاصِ وَ التَّصْدِيقِ لِعَهْدِكَ وَ مِيثَاقِكَ وَ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْوَفَاءِ بِذَلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa jaaltana min aahli alaikhlasi wa altasdiqi liahdika wa mithaqika wa min aahli alwafai bidhalika

translation.en: Let us be amongst the sincere ones who acknowledge Your Promise and Covenant, who adhere to this

segments.arabic: وَ لَمْ تَجْعَلْنَا مِنَ النَّاكِثِينَ وَ الْمُكَذِّبِينَ الَّذِينَ يُكَذِّبُونَ الْجَاحِدِينَ بِيَوْمِ الدِّينِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam tajalna mina alnaakithina wa almukadhibina aladhina yukadhibuna aljahidina biawmi aldiyni

translation.en: and do not let us be amongst the deserters and those who refute the Day of Judgment

segments.arabic: وَ لَمْ تَجْعَلْنَا مِنَ الْمُغَيِّرِينَ وَ الْمُبَدِّلِينَ وَ الْمُنْحَرِفِينَ [وَ الْمُحَرِّفِينَ‌] وَ الْمُبَتِّكِينَ آذَانَ الْأَنْعَامِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam tajalna mina almughayirina wa almubadilina wa almunharifina [wa almuharifina] wa almubatikina adhana alaanami

translation.en: Do not place us amongst those who change and manipulate things, who cut the ears of the animals,

segments.arabic: وَ الْمُغَيِّرِينَ خَلْقَ اللَّهِ وَ مِنَ الَّذِينَ‌ اسْتَحْوَذَ عَلَيْهِمُ الشَّيْطانُ فَأَنْساهُمْ ذِكْرَ اللَّهِ‌ وَ صَدَّهُمْ عَنِ السَّبِيلِ وَ الصِّرَاطِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa almughayirina khalqa allahi wa mina aladhina astahwadha alayhimu alshaytanu faansahum dhikra allahi wa sadahum ani alsabili wa alsirati almustaqimi

translation.en: change Gods Creation who have been overcome by Satan, have forgotten Gods Remembrance and have deviated from the Right Path.

text.en: Then repeat many times:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ الْعَنِ الْجَاحِدِينَ وَ النَّاكِثِينَ وَ الْمُغَيِّرِينَ وَ الْمُبَدِّلِينَ وَ الْمُكَذِّبِينَ‌ الَّذِينَ يُكَذِّبُونَ بِيَوْمِ الدِّينِ‌ مِنَ الْأَوَّلِينَ وَ الْآخِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahuma alani aljahidina wa alnaakithina wa almughayirina wa almubadilina wa almukadhibina aladhina yukadhibuna biawmi aldiyni mina alaawalina wa alakhirina

translation.en: O' my God! Please damn those who deny God, the deserters, the ones who change, the liars and those who refute - those who lie about the Resurrection Day from the first and the last generations.

text.en: Then say:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَى نِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيْنَا بِالَّذِي هَدَيْتَنَا إِلَى مُوَالاةِ وُلَاةِ أَمْرِكَ مِنْ بَعْدِ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: allahuma laka alhamdu alay nimatika alayna bialadhi hadaytana ailay mualati wulati aamrika min badi nabiika

translation.en: O' my God! Praise belongs to You over Your Blessings to us that which You guided us towards friendship with those in charge of Your Affairs after Your Prophet

segments.arabic: وَ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْهَادِينَ الَّذِينَ جَعَلْتَهُمْ أَرْكَاناً لِتَوْحِيدِكَ وَ أَعْلَامَ الْهُدَى وَ مَنَارَ التَّقْوَى وَ الْعُرْوَةَ الْوُثْقَى
segments.transliteration: wa alaayimati alhadina aladhina jaaltahum aarkanaa litawhidika wa aalama alhuday wa manara altaqway wa alurwata alwuthqay

translation.en: and the guiding Divine Leaders whom You established as the pillars of the profession of Your Unity, signs of true guidance, pillars of virtue, the most trustworthy strong-holds

segments.arabic: وَ كَمَالَ دِينِكَ وَ تَمَامَ نِعْمَتِكَ وَ مَنْ بِهِمْ وَ بِمُوَالاتِهِمْ رَضِيتَ لَنَا الْإِسْلَامَ دِيناً
segments.transliteration: wa kamala dinika wa tamama nimatika wa man bihim wa bimualatihim radita lana alaislama dinaa

translation.en: the perfection of Your Religion, the completion of Your Blessings, those by whom and through whose Mastery You chose Islam as our religion.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ آمَنَّا بِكَ وَ صَدَّقْنَا نَبِيَّكَ الرَّسُولَ النَّذِيرَ الْمُنْذِرَ
segments.transliteration: rabana falaka alhamdu amanaa bika wa sadaqna nabiaka alrasula alnadhira almundhira

translation.en: O' our Lord! Praise belongs to You. We believe in You and we certify Your Prophet – the Messenger, the one who gives good tidings, the one who warns.

segments.arabic: وَ اتَّبَعْنَا الْهَادِيَ مِنْ بَعْدِ النَّذِيرِ الْمُنْذِرِ وَالَيْنَا وَلِيَّهُمْ وَ عَادَيْنَا عَدُوَّهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa atabana alhadia min badi alnadhiri almundhiri walayna waliahum wa adayna aduahum

translation.en: We follow the guides after the one who gives good tidings, the one who warns. We shall be friends with their friends and enemy of their enemies

segments.arabic: وَ بَرِئْنَا مِنَ الْجَاحِدِينَ وَ النَّاكِثِينَ وَ الْمُكَذِّبِينَ بِيَوْمِ الدِّينِ
segments.transliteration: wa barina mina aljahidina wa alnaakithina wa almukadhibina biawmi aldiyni

translation.en: Please separate us from those who deny God, the deserters and those who refute the Day of the Judgment.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا كَانَ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ يَا صَادِقَ الْوَعْدِ يَا مَنْ‌ لا يُخْلِفُ الْمِيعادَ
segments.transliteration: allahuma fakama kana min shanika ya sadiqa alwadi ya man la yukhlifu almiada

translation.en: O' my God! O' Truthful in promise! O' He who never breaks His Promise.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ فِي شَأْنٍ أَنْ أَتْمَمْتَ عَلَيْنَا نِعْمَتَكَ بِمُوَالاةِ أَوْلِيَائِكَ الْمَسْئُولِ عَنْهُمْ عِبَادُكَ
segments.transliteration: ya man hua kula yawmi fi shani aan aatmamta alayna nimataka bimualati aawliayika almasyuwli anhum ibaduka

translation.en: O' He who shines in Splendour every day! It was You who completed Your Blessings for us by the Mastery of Your Friends - those to whom Your Servants are responsible,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّكَ قُلْتَ‌ ثُمَّ لَتُسْئَلُنَّ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ النَّعِيمِ‌ وَ قُلْتَ‌ وَ قِفُوهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ مَسْؤُلُونَ‌
segments.transliteration: fainaka qulta thuma latusyaluna yawmayidhi ani alnaimi wa qulta wa qifuhum ainahum maswuluna

translation.en: since You have said, "Then, shall ye be questioned that Day about the joy (ye indulged in!)." and said, "But stop them, for they must be asked:"

segments.arabic: وَ مَنَنْتَ بِشَهَادَةِ الْإِخْلَاصِ لَكَ بِوَلَايَةِ أَوْلِيَائِكَ الْهُدَاةِ مِنْ بَعْدِ النَّذِيرِ الْمُنْذِرِ السِّرَاجِ الْمُنِيرِ
segments.transliteration: wa mananta bishahadati alaikhlasi laka biwalayati aawliayika alhudati min badi alnadhiri almundhiri alsiraji almuniri

translation.en: You Favoured with sincere testimony to the Mastery of Your Friends who are the ones who give good tidings, the ones who warn, and the luminous lanterns.

segments.arabic: وَ أَكْمَلْتَ لَنَا الدِّينَ بِمُوَالاتِهِمْ وَ الْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْ عَدُوِّهِمْ وَ أَتْمَمْتَ عَلَيْنَا النِّعَمَ بِالَّذِي جَدَّدْتَ لَنَا عَهْدَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aakmalta lana aldiyna bimualatihim wa albaraati min aduihim wa aatmamta alayna alniama bialadhi jadadta lana ahdaka

translation.en: You perfected the Religion by their Mastery and disowning their enemies.

segments.arabic: وَ ذَكَّرْتَنَا مِيثَاقَكَ الْمَأْخُوذَ مِنَّا فِي ابْتِدَاءِ [مُبْتَدَإِ] خَلْقِكَ إِيَّانَا
segments.transliteration: wa dhakartana mithaqaka almakhudha minaa fi abtidai [mubtadai] khalqika aiyaana

translation.en: You perfected the Blessings for us by renewing their Covenant and by reminding us of our testimony in the beginning of Creation.

segments.arabic: وَ جَعَلْتَنَا مِنْ أَهْلِ الْإِجَابَةِ وَ ذَكَّرْتَنَا الْعَهْدَ وَ الْمِيثَاقَ وَ لَمْ تُنْسِنَا ذِكْرَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa jaaltana min aahli alaijabati wa dhakartana alahda wa almithaqa wa lam tunsina dhikraka

translation.en: You let us be of those who answer in the positive, and reminded us about our promise and covenant, and did not let us forget it

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّكَ قُلْتَ‌ وَ إِذْ أَخَذَ رَبُّكَ مِنْ بَنِي آدَمَ مِنْ ظُهُورِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَ أَشْهَدَهُمْ عَلى‌ أَنْفُسِهِمْ أَلَسْتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ قالُوا بَلى‌ شَهِدْنا بِمَنِّكَ
segments.transliteration: fainaka qulta wa aidh aakhadha rabuka min bani adama min zuhurihim dhuriyatahum wa aashhadahum aly aanfusihim aalastu birabikum qalua baly shahidna bimanika

translation.en: and said, "When Your Lord drew forth from the Children of Adam - from their loins - their descendants, and made them testify concerning themselves, (saying): "Am I not your Lord (who cherishes and sustains you)?"- They said: "Yea! We do testify!"We bear witness to Your Favor

segments.arabic: بِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ رَبُّنَا وَ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدَكَ وَ رَسُولَكَ نَبِيُّنَا
segments.transliteration: biaanaka aanta allahu la ailaha ailaa aanta rabuna wa aana muhamadaa abdaka wa rasulaka nabiuna

translation.en: that You are God. There are no Gods but You. You are our Lord and Your Servant and Prophet Muhammad is our Prophet.

segments.arabic: وَ أَنَّ عَلِيّاً أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَلِيُّنَا وَ مَوْلَانَا
segments.transliteration: wa aana aliaa aamira almuminina waliuna wa mawlana

translation.en: We bear witness that the Commander of the Faithful Ali is our Guardian and Master.

segments.arabic: وَ شَهِدْنَا بِالْوَلَايَةِ لِوَلِيِّنَا وَ مَوْلَانَا مِنْ ذُرِّيَّةِ نَبِيِّكَ مِنْ صُلْبِ وَلِيِّنَا وَ مَوْلَانَا
segments.transliteration: wa shahidna bialwalayati liwaliina wa mawlana min dhuriyati nabiika min sulbi waliina wa mawlana

translation.en: We bear witness to the Mastery of our Master and our Guardian from the progeny of Your Prophet, and from the lineage of our Master -

segments.arabic: عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَبْدِكَ الَّذِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِ وَ جَعَلْتَهُ فِي أُمِّ الْكِتَابِ لَدَيْكَ عَلِيّاً حَكِيماً
segments.transliteration: alii bni aabi talibi aamiri almuminina abdika aladhi aanamta alayhi wa jaaltahu fi aumi alkitabi ladayka aliaa hakimaa

translation.en: the Commander of the Faithful Ali ibn Abi Talib - who is Your Servant whom You blessed! You established him as Knowing and Wise in the Mother of the Book that is near You

segments.arabic: وَ جَعَلْتَهُ آيَةً لِنَبِيِّكَ وَ آيَةً مِنْ آيَاتِكَ الْكُبْرَى
segments.transliteration: wa jaaltahu ayata linabiika wa ayata min ayatika alkubray

translation.en: and established him as a sign for Your Prophet and as one of the main signs

segments.arabic: وَ الَنَّبَإِ الْعَظِيمِ‌ الَّذِي هُمْ فِيهِ مُخْتَلِفُونَ‌
segments.transliteration: wa alanabai alazimi aladhi hum fihi mukhtalifuna

translation.en: He is the great news about whom many people had differences

segments.arabic: وَ النَّبَإِ الْعَظِيمِ الَّذِي هُمْ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضُونَ وَ عَنْهُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ مَسْئُولُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa alnabai alazimi aladhi hum anhu muriduna wa anhu yawma alqiamati masyuwluna

translation.en: He is that great news from which they turned their faces away and about which they shall be questioned on the Resurrection Day

segments.arabic: وَ تَمَامَ نِعْمَتِكَ الَّتِي عَنْهَا يُسْأَلُ عِبَادُكَ إِذْ هُمْ مَوْقُوفُونَ وَ عَنِ النَّعِيمِ مَسْئُولُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa tamama nimatika alati anha yusaalu ibaduka aidh hum mawqufuna wa ani alnaimi masyuwluna

translation.en: He is the Perfection of Your Blessings for whom Your Servants shall be stopped and questioned.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَ كَمَا كَانَ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ مَا أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْنَا بِالْهِدَايَةِ إِلَى مَعْرِفَتِهِمْ فَلْيَكُنْ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahuma wa kama kana min shanika ma aanamta alayna bialhidayati ailay marifatihim falyakun min shanika

translation.en: O' my God! As You honored us with the blessing of being guided to their recognition, please honor us

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَنْ تُبَارِكَ لَنَا فِي يَوْمِنَا هَذَا الَّذِي ذَكَّرْتَنَا فِيهِ عَهْدَكَ وَ مِيثَاقَكَ
segments.transliteration: aan tusaliya alay muhamadi wa ali muhamadi wa aan tubarika lana fi yawmina hadha aladhi dhakartana fihi ahdaka wa mithaqaka

translation.en: and bestow Your Blessings on Muhammad and his Progeny, bless us on this day in which You reminded us of Your Promise and Your Covenant! Please complete our religion and perfect Your Blessings for us.

segments.arabic: وَ أَكْمَلْتَ لَنَا دِينَنَا وَ أَتْمَمْتَ عَلَيْنَا نِعْمَتَكَ وَ جَعَلْتَنَا بِنِعْمَتِكَ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْإِجَابَةِ وَ الْإِخْلَاصِ بِوَحْدَانِيَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aakmalta lana dinana wa aatmamta alayna nimataka wa jaaltana binimatika min aahli alaijabati wa alaikhlasi biwahdaniatika

translation.en: Please let us be amongst those whose prayers are answered and are sincere in their belief to Your Oneness,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْإِيمَانِ وَ التَّصْدِيقِ بِوَلَايَةِ أَوْلِيَائِكَ وَ الْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْ أَعْدَائِكَ وَ أَعْدَاءِ أَوْلِيَائِكَ الْجَاحِدِينَ الْمُكَذِّبِينَ بِيَوْمِ الدِّينِ
segments.transliteration: wa min aahli alaiymani wa altasdiqi biwalayati aawliayika wa albaraati min aadayika wa aadai aawliayika aljahidina almukadhibina biawmi aldiyni

translation.en: and those with true faith, acknowledsging the Mastery of Your Friends, and disowning Your enemies, the enemies of Your Friends, those who deny God and thos who refute the Day of the Judgment

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ يَا رَبِّ تَمَامَ مَا أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْنَا وَ لَا تَجْعَلْنَا مِنَ الْمُعَانِدِينَ وَ لَا تُلْحِقْنَا بِالْمُكَذِّبِينَ بِيَوْمِ الدِّينِ
segments.transliteration: faasaaluka ya rabi tamama ma aanamta alayna wa la tajalna mina almuanidina wa la tulhiqna bialmukadhibina biawmi aldiyni

translation.en: O' Lord! I ask You for the perfection of the Blessings which You have granted us. Please do not let us be amongst those who oppose and do not let us join those who refute the Day of the Judgment

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ لَنَا قَدَمَ صِدْقٍ مَعَ الْمُتَّقِينَ وَ اجْعَلْ لَنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً
segments.transliteration: wa ajal lana qadama sidqi maa almutaqina wa ajal lana min ladunka rahmata

translation.en: Please let us take a true step along with the virtous ones. Please grant us mercy from Your own Presence

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ لَنَا مِنْ الْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَاماً إِلَى يَوْمِ الدِّينِ يَوْمَ يُدْعَى كُلُّ أُنَاسٍ بِإِمَامِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa ajal lana min almutaqina aimamaa ailay yawmi aldiyni yawma yuday kulu aunasi biaimamihim

translation.en: and let us have a leader from the pious people until the Judgment Day - the day on which all the people are called along with their leaders

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنَا فِي ظِلِّ الْقَوْمِ الْمُتَّقِينَ الْهُدَاةِ بَعْدَ النَّذِيرِ الْمُنْذِرِ وَ الْبَشِيرِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الدُّعَاةِ إِلَى الْهُدَى
segments.transliteration: wa ajalna fi zili alqawmi almutaqina alhudati bada alnadhiri almundhiri wa albashiri alaayimati alduati ailay alhuday

translation.en: And place us in the shade of the pious people – the guides after the conveyor of good tidings, the warners, the Divine Leaders who invite to guidance

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَجْعَلْنَا مِنَ الْمُكَذِّبِينَ الدُّعَاةِ إِلَى النَّارِ وَ هُمْ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَ أَوْلِيَاؤُهُمْ‌ مِنَ الْمَقْبُوحِينَ‌
segments.transliteration: wa la tajalna mina almukadhibina alduati ailay alnaari wa hum yawma alqiamati wa aawliawuhum mina almaqbuhina

translation.en: Please do not let us be amongst the liars who invite towards the Fire and are disgraced along with their friends on the Resurrection Day

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا فَاحْشُرْنَا فِي زُمْرَةِ الْهَادِي الْمَهْدِيِّ
segments.transliteration: rabana fahshurna fi zumrati alhadi almahdii

translation.en: O our Lord! Please resurrect us amongst those who are guided

segments.arabic: وَ أَحْيِنَا مَا أَحْيَيْتَنَا عَلَى الْوَفَاءِ بِعَهْدِكَ وَ مِيثَاقِكَ الْمَأْخُوذِ مِنَّا عَلَى مُوَالاةِ أَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aahyina ma aahyaytana alay alwafai biahdika wa mithaqika almakhudhi minaa alay mualati aawliayika

translation.en: and resurrect us when You do so faithfulness to Your Pledge and the Covenat taken from us regarding friendship with Your Trustees

segments.arabic: وَ الْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْ أَعْدَائِكَ الْمُكَذِّبِينَ بِيَوْمِ الدِّينِ وَ النَّاكِثِينَ بِمِيثَاقِكَ وَ تَوَفَّنَا عَلَى ذَلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa albaraati min aadayika almukadhibina biawmi aldiyni wa alnaakithina bimithaqika wa tawafana alay dhalika

translation.en: and disowning from Your enemies who refute the Day of Judgment, and the deserters of Your Covenant, and let us die in this way.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ لَنَا مَعَ الرَّسُولِ سَبِيلًا وَ أَثْبِتْ لَنَا قَدَمَ صِدْقٍ فِي الْهِجْرَةِ إِلَيْهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa ajal lana maa alrasuli sabilaa wa aathbit lana qadama sidqi fi alhijrati ailayhim

translation.en: Please keep us on the path of the Messenger and please firmly establish our true steps in immigration to them

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ مَحْيَانَا خَيْرَ الْمَحْيَا وَ مَمَاتَنَا خَيْرَ الْمَمَاتِ وَ مُنْقَلَبَنَا خَيْرَ الْمُنْقَلَبِ عَلَى مُوَالاةِ أَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ajal mahyana khayra almahya wa mamatana khayra almamati wa munqalabana khayra almunqalabi alay mualati aawliayika

translation.en: Please let our lives be the best lives and let our deaths be the best deaths and let our transformations be the best transformations- in love for Your Friends

segments.arabic: وَ الْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْ أَعْدَائِكَ حَتَّى تَتَوَفَّانَا وَ أَنْتَ عَنَّا رَاضٍ قَدْ أَوْجَبْتَ لَنَا الْخُلُودُ فِي جَنَّتِك‌ بِرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa albaraati min aadayika hatay tatawafaana wa aanta anaa radi qad aawjabta lana alkhuludu fi janatik birahmatika

translation.en: and disowning from Your Enemies until You take away our lives with You pleased with us: And make our entry into Paradise a sure thing out of Your Mercy

segments.arabic: وَ الْمَثْوَى فِي جِوَارِكَ وَ الْإِنَابَةَ إِلَى دَارِ الْمُقَامَةِ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ‌ لا يَمَسُّنا فِيها نَصَبٌ وَ لا يَمَسُّنا فِيها لُغُوبٌ
segments.transliteration: wa almathway fi jiwarika wa alainabata ailay dari almuqamati min fadlika la yamasuna fiha nasabu wa la yamasuna fiha lughubu

translation.en: and let us reside by You and turn to the House of Permanence out of Your Nobility! without and hardship or strenuous efforts theirs

segments.arabic: ‌ رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ أَمَرْتَنَا بِطَاعَةِ وُلَاةِ أَمْرِكَ وَ أَمَرْتَنَا أَنْ نَكُونَ مَعَ الصَّادِقِينَ
segments.transliteration: rabana ainaka aamartana bitaati wulati aamrika wa aamartana aan nakuna maa alsaadiqina

translation.en: O Our Lord! You ordered us to obey him and obey those in charge of Your Affairs.

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتَ‌ أَطِيعُوا اللَّهَ وَ أَطِيعُوا الرَّسُولَ وَ أُولِي الْأَمْرِ مِنْكُمْ‌
segments.transliteration: faqulta aatiua allaha wa aatiua alrasula wa auwli alaamri minkum

translation.en: You ordered us and said, "Obey Allah, and obey the Messenger, and those charged with authority among you."

segments.arabic: وَ قُلْتَ‌ يا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَ كُونُوا مَعَ الصَّادِقِينَ‌
segments.transliteration: wa qulta ya aayuha aladhina amanua ataqua allaha wa kunua maa alsaadiqina

translation.en: You also said, "O' ye who believe! Fear Allah and be with those who are true (in word and deed)."

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا سَمِعْنَا وَ أَطَعْنَا رَبَّنَا ثَبِّتْ أَقْدامَنا وَ تَوَفَّنا مَعَ الْأَبْرارِ مُسْلِمِينَ مُسَلِّمِينَ مُصَدِّقِينَ لِأَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: rabana samina wa aatana rabana thabit aaqdamana wa tawafana maa alaabrari muslimina musalimina musadiqina liaawliayika

translation.en: Our Lord! We hear and obey. Our Lord! Please firmly establish our steps amd take to Yourself our souls in the company of the righteous as true Muslims who acknowledge Your Friends

segments.arabic: وَ لا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنا وَ هَبْ لَنا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ‌
segments.transliteration: wa la tuzigh qulubana bada aidh hadaytana wa hab lana min ladunka rahmata ainaka aanta alwahaabu

translation.en: Our Lord! "(they say), "Let not our hearts deviate now after You have guided us, but grant us mercy from Your own Presence; for You are the Grantor of bounties without measure."

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا بِكَ وَ صَدَّقْنَا نَبِيَّكَ وَ وَالَيْنَا وَلِيَّكَ وَ الْأَوْلِيَاءَ مِنْ بَعْدِ نَبِيِّكَ وَ وَلِيَّكَ مَوْلَى الْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: rabana amanaa bika wa sadaqna nabiaka wa walayna waliaka wa alaawliaa min badi nabiika wa waliaka mawlay almuminina alia bna aabi talibi salawatu allahi alayhi

translation.en: O our Lord! We believe in You and we acknowledge Your Prophet: Your Friend and those after Your Prophet are our Guardians. And Your Friend is the master of the believers Ali ibn Abi Talib (God's blessing be upon him) -

segments.arabic: وَ الْإِمَامَ الْهَادِيَ مِنْ بَعْدِ الرَّسُولِ النَّذِيرِ الْمُنْذِرِ السِّرَاجِ الْمُنِيرِ
segments.transliteration: wa alaimama alhadia min badi alrasuli alnadhiri almundhiri alsiraji almuniri

translation.en: -the Divine Leader –the guide after the Prophet - the conveyor of good tidings, the warner, and the luminous lantern

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا فَكَمَا كَانَ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ أَنْ جَعَلْتَنَا مِنْ أَهْلِ الْوَفَاءِ بِعَهْدِكَ بِمَنِّكَ عَلَيْنَا وَ لُطْفِكَ لَنَا
segments.transliteration: rabana fakama kana min shanika aan jaaltana min aahli alwafai biahdika bimanika alayna wa lutfika lana

translation.en: O our Lord! You have let us be faithful to Your Pledge by Your Favor and Kindness to us.

segments.arabic: فَلْيَكُنْ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَ تُكَفِّرَ عَنَّا سَيِّئاتِنا وَ تَوَفَّنا مَعَ الْأَبْرارِ
segments.transliteration: falyakun min shanika aan taghfira lana dhunubana wa tukafira anaa sayiyatina wa tawafana maa alaabrari

translation.en: So please "Our Lord! Forgive us our sins, blot out from us our iniquities, and take to Yourself our souls in the company of the righteous

segments.arabic: رَبَّنا وَ آتِنا ما وَعَدْتَنا عَلى‌ رُسُلِكَ وَ لا تُخْزِنا يَوْمَ الْقِيامَةِ إِنَّكَ لا تُخْلِفُ الْمِيعادَ
segments.transliteration: rabana wa atina ma waadtana aly rusulika wa la tukhzina yawma alqiamati ainaka la tukhlifu almiada

translation.en: Our Lord! Grant us what You didst promise unto us through Your apostles, and save us from shame on the Day of Judgment: For You never breakest Your promise."

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا بِكَ وَ وَفَيْنَا بِعَهْدِكَ وَ صَدَّقْنَا رُسُلَكَ وَ اتَّبَعْنَا وُلَاةَ الْأَمْرِ مِنْ بَعْدِ رُسُلِكَ
segments.transliteration: rabana amanaa bika wa wafayna biahdika wa sadaqna rusulaka wa atabana wulata alaamri min badi rusulika

translation.en: O‟ our Lord! We believe in You, we are loyal to Your pledge and we acknowledge Your Prophet. We follow those in charge of the affairs after Your Prophet

segments.arabic: وَ وَالَيْنَا أَوْلِيَاءَكَ وَ عَادَيْنَا أَعْدَاءَكَ‌ فَاكْتُبْنا مَعَ الشَّاهِدِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa walayna aawliaaka wa adayna aadaaka faktubna maa alshaahidina

translation.en: we shall be friends with Your Friends and we shall oppose Your enemies. Please then write us down amongst those who bear witness

segments.arabic: ‌ وَ احْشُرْنَا مَعَ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْهُدَاةِ مِنْ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ الرَّسُولِ الْبَشِيرِ النَّذِيرِ
segments.transliteration: wa ahshurna maa alaayimati alhudati min ali muhamadi alrasuli albashiri alnadhiri

translation.en: And resurrect us along with the Leaders to Guidance from the Progeny of Prophet Muhammad - the conveyor of good tidings, the warner

segments.arabic: آمَنَّا يَا رَبِّ بِسِرِّهِمْ وَ عَلَانِيَتِهِمْ وَ شَاهِدِهِمْ وَ غَائِبِهِمْ وَ مَشَاهِدِهِمْ وَ بِحَيِّهِمْ وَ مَيِّتِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: amanaa ya rabi bisirihim wa alaniatihim wa shahidihim wa ghayibihim wa mashahidihim wa bihayihim wa mayitihim

translation.en: O' Lord! We believe in them private or public, present or absent, living or dead!

segments.arabic: وَ رَضِينَا بِهِمْ أَئِمَّةً وَ سَادَةً وَ قَادَةً لَا نَبْتَغِي بِهِمْ بَدَلًا وَ لَا نَتَّخِذُ مِنْ دُونِهِمْ وَلَائِجَ أَبَداً
segments.transliteration: wa radina bihim aayimata wa sadata wa qadata la nabtaghi bihim badalaa wa la natakhidhu min dunihim walayija aabadaa

translation.en: We are pleased with them as our Divine Leaders and Masters. We shall never seek anyone but them, and shall not take any confidants but them.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا فَأَحْيِنَا مَا أَحْيَيْتَنَا عَلَى مُوَالاتِهِمْ وَ الْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْ أَعْدَائِهِمْ وَ التَّسْلِيمِ لَهُمْ وَ الرَّدِّ إِلَيْهِمْ
segments.transliteration: rabana faahyina ma aahyaytana alay mualatihim wa albaraati min aadayihim wa altaslimi lahum wa alradi ailayhim

translation.en: O' our Lord! Please let us live with their love, disowning their enemies, and submission to and obedience to them

segments.arabic: وَ تَوَفَّنَا إِذَا تَوَفَّيْتَنَا عَلَى الْوَفَاءِ لَكَ وَ لَهُمْ بِالْعَهْدِ وَ الْمِيثَاقِ
segments.transliteration: wa tawafana aidha tawafaytana alay alwafai laka wa lahum bialahdi wa almithaqi

translation.en: Please let us die in a state of loyalty to them in promise and covenant for You

segments.arabic: وَ الْمُوَالاةِ لَهُمْ وَ التَّصْدِيقِ وَ التَّسْلِيمِ لَهُمْ غَيْرَ جَاحِدِينَ وَ لَا نَاكِثِينَ وَ لَا مُكَذِّبِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa almualati lahum wa altasdiqi wa altaslimi lahum ghayra jahidina wa la nakithina wa la mukadhibina

translation.en: love for them, certifying and submitting to them - not those who deny God, the deserters and those who refute

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِالْحَقِّ الَّذِي جَعَلْتَهُ عِنْدَهُمْ وَ بِالَّذِي فَضَّلْتَهُمْ عَلَى الْعَالَمِينَ جَمِيعاً
segments.transliteration: allahuma ainiy aasaaluka bialhaqi aladhi jaaltahu indahum wa bialadhi fadaltahum alay alalamina jamiaa

translation.en: O' my God! I ask You by the right that You put near them, and made them superior to all the people of the world.

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُبَارِكَ لَنَا فِي يَوْمِنَا هَذَا الَّذِي أَكْرَمْتَنَا فِيهِ بِالْوَفَاءِ لِعَهْدِكَ الَّذِي عَهِدْتَ إِلَيْنَا
segments.transliteration: aan tubarika lana fi yawmina hadha aladhi aakramtana fihi bialwafai liahdika aladhi ahidta ailayna

translation.en: Please bless us on this day in which You honored us by acting upon Your Promise

segments.arabic: وَ الْمِيثَاقِ الَّذِي وَاثَقْتَنَا بِهِ مِنْ مُوَالاةِ أَوْلِيَائِكَ وَ الْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْ أَعْدَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa almithaqi aladhi wathaqtana bihi min mualati aawliayika wa albaraati min aadayika

translation.en: and the Covenat to love Your Friends and dissociate from Your Enemies

segments.arabic: وَ تَمُنَّ عَلَيْنَا بِنِعْمَتِكَ وَ تَجْعَلَهُ عِنْدَنَا مُسْتَقَرّاً ثَابِتاً وَ لَا تَسْلُبْنَاهُ أَبَداً وَ لَا تَجْعَلْهُ عِنْدَنَا مُسْتَوْدَعاً
segments.transliteration: wa tamuna alayna binimatika wa tajalahu indana mustaqaraa thabitaa wa la taslubnahu aabadaa wa la tajalhu indana mustawdaaa

translation.en: And favor us by granting us Your Bounties. Please make it a place of sojourn for us, and never take it away and do not let it be a place of departure for us
